papers.title: 3D-PATH: A Hierarchy LUT Processing-in-memory Accelerator with Thermal-aware Hybrid Bonding Integration.
papers.abstract: LUT-based processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures enable general-purpose in-situ computing by retrieving precomputed results. However, they suffer from limited computing precision, redundancy, and high latency of off-table access. To address these challenges, we present 3D-PATH, a novel PIM architecture that employs 3D hybrid bonding to integrate a DRAM-LUT, enhancing system capacity and reducing access latency. To further optimize efficiency, 3D-PATH introduces a hierarchical fast-LUT design that reduces storage redundancy and accelerates computation. Additionally, 3D-PATH extends computing precision by efficiently supporting floating-point operations via representation transformation and parallel interleaving banks. While hybrid bonding offers significant benefits, it induces heat dissipation challenges. To address this, we implement thermal-aware hardware that ensures the DRAM Die temperature maintains below the threshold of 85°C. Evaluations on arithmetic and AI workloads demonstrate that 3D-PATH achieves up to 12.68 × higher throughput than GPUs and 2.27-7.54 × over prior LUT-PIMs, while delivering a 12.24 × improvement in floating-point energy efficiency over GPU and 2.13 × over a 3D baseline.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 LUT 的内存处理 (PIM) 架构通过检索预先计算的结果来实现通用原位计算。然而，它们面临计算精度有限、冗余以及表外访问延迟高的问题。为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 3D-PATH，这是一种新颖的 PIM 架构，它采用 3D 混合绑定来集成 DRAM-LUT，从而增强系统容量并减少访问延迟。为了进一步优化效率，3D-PATH 引入了分层快速 LUT 设计，可减少存储冗余并加速计算。此外，3D-PATH 通过表示转换和并行交错库有效支持浮点运算，从而扩展了计算精度。虽然混合键合具有显着的优势，但它也带来了散热挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们实施了热感知硬件，确保 DRAM 芯片温度保持在 85°C 的阈值以下。对算术和 AI 工作负载的评估表明，3D-PATH 的吞吐量比 GPU 高 12.68 倍，比之前的 LUT-PIM 高 2.27-7.54 倍，同时浮点能效比 GPU 提高 12.24 倍，比 3D 基线提高 2.13 倍。

papers.title: A Probabilistic Perspective on Tiling Sparse Tensor Algebra.
papers.abstract: Sparse tensor algebra computations are often memory-bound due to irregular access patterns and low arithmetic intensity. We present D2T2 (Data-Driven Tensor Tiling), a framework that optimizes static coordinate-space tiling schemes to minimize memory traffic by identifying and leveraging relevant high-level statistics from input operands. For a given tensor algebra computation, D2T2 collects statistics from input tensors, builds a probability distribution-based model of the tensor computation, and uses it to predict traffic for various tiling configurations. It searches over tile shape and size configurations to minimize total traffic. We evaluate D2T2 against Tailors and DRT, two state of the art tiling schemes for sparse tensor algebra. We find that D2T2 achieves, on average, a 2.54 × speedup over Tailors and a 1.13× lower memory bandwidth compared to DRT for sparse-sparse matrix multiplication (SpMSpM). We also achieve 1.22–48.94× lower bandwidth for SpMSpM and up to 34.31× lower bandwidth for tensor operations (TTM and MTTKRP) than conservative static tiling schemes. Unlike prior tiling techniques, D2T2 is deployable without specialized hardware support. On Opal, a 16nm sparse tensor algebra accelerator, D2T2 generated tiling configurations that achieve 1.23–3.34 × speedups compared to their original hand-tuned configurations.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于不规则的访问模式和低算术强度，稀疏张量代数计算通常受内存限制。我们提出了 D2T2（数据驱动张量平铺），这是一个优化静态坐标空间平铺方案的框架，通过识别和利用输入操作数的相关高级统计数据来最大限度地减少内存流量。对于给定的张量代数计算，D2T2 从输入张量收集统计数据，构建基于概率分布的张量计算模型，并使用它来预测各种平铺配置的流量。它搜索图块形状和尺寸配置，以最大限度地减少总流量。我们针对 Tailors 和 DRT（稀疏张量代数的两种最先进的切片方案）评估了 D2T2。我们发现，对于稀疏-稀疏矩阵乘法 (SpMSpM)，D2T2 平均比 Tailors 实现 2.54 倍的加速，并且比 DRT 降低 1.13 倍的内存带宽。与保守的静态切片方案相比，我们还使 SpMSpM 的带宽降低了 1.22–48.94 倍，张量运算（TTM 和 MTTKRP）的带宽降低了 34.31 倍。与之前的切片技术不同，D2T2 无需专门的硬件支持即可部署。在 Opal（16nm 稀疏张量代数加速器）上，D2T2 生成的平铺配置与原始手动调整的配置相比，实现了 1.23–3.34 倍的加速。

papers.title: A TRRIP Down Memory Lane: Temperature-Based Re-Reference Interval Prediction For Instruction Caching.
papers.abstract: Modern mobile CPU software pose challenges for conventional instruction cache replacement policies due to their complex runtime behavior causing high reuse distance between executions of the same instruction. Mobile code commonly suffers from large amounts of stalls in the CPU frontend and thus starvation of the rest of the CPU resources. Complexity of these applications and their code footprint are projected to grow at a rate faster than available on-chip memory due to power and area constraints, making conventional hardware-centric methods for managing instruction caches to be inadequate. We present a novel software-hardware co-design approach called TRRIP (Temperature-based Re-Reference Interval Prediction) that enables the compiler to analyze, classify, and transform code based on "temperature" (hot/cold), and to provide the hardware with a summary of code temperature information through a well-defined OS interface based on using code page attributes. TRRIP’s lightweight hardware extension employs code temperature attributes to optimize the instruction cache replacement policy resulting in the eviction rate reduction of hot code. TRRIP is designed to be practical and adoptable in real mobile systems that have strict feature requirements on both the software and hardware components. TRRIP can reduce the L2 MPKI for instructions by 26.5% resulting in geomean speedup of 3.9%, on top of RRIP cache replacement running mobile code already optimized using PGO.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代移动 CPU 软件对传统的指令缓存替换策略提出了挑战，因为它们复杂的运行时行为导致同一指令的执行之间的重用距离较长。移动代码通常会遭受 CPU 前端大量停顿的影响，从而导致其余 CPU 资源匮乏。由于功率和面积的限制，这些应用程序及其代码占用空间的复杂性预计将以比可用片上存储器更快的速度增长，从而使得用于管理指令缓存的传统以硬件为中心的方法变得不够。我们提出了一种新颖的软件-硬件协同设计方法，称为TRRIP（基于温度的重新引用间隔预测），该方法使编译器能够根据“温度”（热/冷）分析、分类和转换代码，并通过基于使用代码页属性的明确定义的操作系统接口向硬件提供代码温度信息的摘要。 TRRIP的轻量级硬件扩展利用代码温度属性来优化指令缓存替换策略，从而降低热代码的驱逐率。 TRRIP 的设计目标是在实际移动系统中实用且可采用，这些系统对软件和硬件组件都有严格的功能要求。除了运行已使用 PGO 优化的移动代码的 RRIP 缓存替换之外，TRRIP 还可将指令的 L2 MPKI 减少 26.5%，从而使几何平均加速提高 3.9%。

papers.title: A. Delegato: Locality-Aware Atomic Memory Operations on Chiplets.
papers.abstract:
The irruption of chiplet-based architectures has been a game changer, enabling higher transistor integration and core counts in a single socket. However, chiplets impose higher and non-uniform memory access (NUMA) latencies than monolithic integration. This harms the efficiency of atomic memory operations (AMOs), which are fundamental to implementing fine-grained synchronization and concurrent data structures on large systems. AMOs are executed either near the core (near) or at a remote location within the cache hierarchy (far). On near AMOs, the core’s private cache fetches the target cache line in exclusiveness to modify it locally. Near AMOs cause significant data movement between private caches, especially harming parallel applications’ performance on chiplet-based architectures. Alternatively, far AMOs can alleviate the communication overhead by reducing data movement between processing elements. However, current multicore architectures only support one type of far AMO, which sends all updates to a single serialization point (centralized AMOs).

This work introduces two new types of far AMOs, delegated and migrating, that execute AMOs remotely without centralizing updates in a single point of the cache hierarchy. Combining centralized, delegated, and migrating AMOs allows the directory to select the best location to execute AMOs. Moreover, we propose Delegato, a tracing optimization to effectively transport usage information from private caches to the directory to predict the best atomic type to issue accurately. Additionally, we design a simple predictor on top of Delegato that seamlessly selects the best placement to perform AMOs based on the data access pattern and usage activity of cores. Our evaluation using gem5 shows that Delegato can speed up applications on average by 1.07 × over centralized AMOs and by 1.13 × over the state-of-the-art AMO predictor.
papers.abstract_zh:
基于小芯片的架构的出现改变了游戏规则，在单个插槽中实现了更高的晶体管集成度和核心数量。然而，与单片集成相比，小芯片会带来更高的非均匀内存访问 (NUMA) 延迟。这会损害原子内存操作 (AMO) 的效率，而原子内存操作是在大型系统上实现细粒度同步和并发数据结构的基础。 AMO 在核心附近（近）或缓存层次结构中的远程位置（远）执行。在近 AMO 上，核心的私有缓存以独占方式获取目标缓存行以在本地修改它。近 AMO 会导致私有缓存之间发生大量数据移动，尤其会损害基于小芯片的架构上的并行应用程序的性能。或者，远 AMO 可以通过减少处理元件之间的数据移动来减轻通信开销。然而，当前的多核架构仅支持一种类型的远 AMO，它将所有更新发送到单个序列化点（集中式 AMO）。

这项工作引入了两种新型远程 AMO：委托和迁移，它们远程执行 AMO，而无需将更新集中在缓存层次结构的单个点中。结合集中式、委托式和迁移式 AMO，目录可以选择执行 AMO 的最佳位置。此外，我们提出了 Delegato，一种跟踪优化，可以有效地将使用信息从私有缓存传输到目录，以准确预测要发布的最佳原子类型。此外，我们在 Delegato 之上设计了一个简单的预测器，可以根据数据访问模式和核心的使用活动无缝地选择执行 AMO 的最佳位置。我们使用 gem5 进行的评估表明，Delegato 的应用程序速度比集中式 AMO 平均提高了 1.07 倍，比最先进的 AMO 预测器平均提高了 1.13 倍。

papers.title: Accelerating Retrieval Augmented Language Model via PIM and PNM Integration.
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Language Models (RALMs) integrate a language model with an external database to generate high-quality outputs utilizing up-to-date information. However, both components of a RALM system, the language model and the retriever, suffer from distinct memory-bound bottlenecks. In particular, the attention mechanism of the language model heavily relies on General Matrix-Vector Multiplication (GEMV) operations using unique K/V matrices per request, complicating batch parallelization and exacerbating memory bandwidth constraints. Conversely, the retriever encounters performance bottlenecks due to frequent LUT lookups and intensive sorting operations, characterized by low arithmetic intensity and limited data reuse, making GPU acceleration challenging. To address these distinctive characteristics, this paper proposes MNM, a hardware architecture integrating Processing In Memory (PIM) within the HBM core die and Processing Near Memory (PNM) on the HBM logic die. The PIM module leverages the high internal bandwidth of HBM to accelerate GEMV operations in the language model, while the PNM module optimizes retrieval-specific tasks. Furthermore, this work introduces a novel RALM scheduling strategy combining selective batching and early generation to exploit the performance improvements achieved by the MNM architecture. By strategically overlapping retrieval and generation phases, the proposed scheduling scheme reduces idle cycles in a batched RALM system. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed techniques achieve up to 29.2 × performance speedup compared to a conventional GPU-based RALM system. In addition, the proposed PIM/PNM-integrated approach saves up to 71.5% of energy consumption, highlighting its applicability for memory-bound RALM workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 检索增强语言模型 (RALM) 将语言模型与外部数据库集成，以利用最新信息生成高质量的输出。然而，RALM 系统的两个组件（语言模型和检索器）都面临着明显的内存限制瓶颈。特别是，语言模型的注意力机制严重依赖于每个请求使用唯一的 K/V 矩阵的通用矩阵向量乘法 (GEMV) 操作，这使得批量并行化变得复杂并加剧了内存带宽限制。相反，检索器由于频繁的LUT查找和密集的排序操作而遇到性能瓶颈，其特点是运算强度低和数据复用有限，这使得GPU加速具有挑战性。为了解决这些独特的特征，本文提出了 MNM，这是一种集成 HBM 核心芯片内的内存处理 (PIM) 和 HBM 逻辑芯片上的近内存处理 (PNM) 的硬件架构。 PIM 模块利用 HBM 的高内部带宽来加速语言模型中的 GEMV 操作，而 PNM 模块则优化特定于检索的任务。此外，这项工作引入了一种新颖的 RALM 调度策略，将选择性批处理和早期生成相结合，以利用 MNM 架构实现的性能改进。通过战略性地重叠检索和生成阶段，所提出的调度方案减少了批处理 RALM 系统中的空闲周期。实验结果表明，与传统的基于 GPU 的 RALM 系统相比，所提出的技术可实现高达 29.2 倍的性能加速。此外，所提出的 PIM/PNM 集成方法可节省高达 71.5% 的能耗，突出了其对内存限制的 RALM 工作负载的适用性。

papers.title: Accurate Leakage Speculation for Quantum Error Correction.
papers.abstract:
Quantum Error Correction (QEC) protects qubits against bit- and phase-flip errors in the \(\mathinner {|{0}\rangle }/\mathinner {|{1}\rangle }\) subspace, but physical qubits can also leak into higher energy levels (e.g., \(\mathinner {|{2}\rangle }\) ). Leakage is especially harmful, as it corrupts all subsequent syndrome measurements and can spread to neighboring qubits. Detecting leakage on data qubits is particularly challenging, since they are never measured directly during QEC cycles. Prior work, such as eraser [ 43 ], addresses this by inferring leakage from syndrome patterns using a fixed heuristic. However, this approach often misclassifies benign syndromes, triggering excessive leakage-reduction circuits (LRCs). Because LRCs are themselves noisy and slow, these false triggers lengthen QEC cycles and inflate logical error rates.

We propose gladiator , a general and adaptable leakage speculation framework that works across surface code, color code, and qLDPC codes. Offline, gladiator builds a code-aware error-propagation graph calibrated to device data. Online, it classifies each syndrome in a few nanoseconds and schedules LRC only when the observed pattern is provably leakage-dominated. This precise speculation eliminates up to 3 × (and on average 2 ×) unnecessary LRCs, shortens QEC cycles, and suppresses false positives at their source. Evaluated on standard fault-tolerant benchmarks, gladiator delivers 1.7 × –3.9 × speedups and 16% reduction in logical error rate, advancing the efficiency of fault-tolerant quantum computing.
papers.abstract_zh:
量子纠错 (QEC) 保护量子位免受 \(\mathinner {|{0}\rangle }/\mathinner {|{1}\rangle }\) 子空间中的位和相位翻转错误的影响，但物理量子位也可能泄漏到更高的能级（例如 \(\mathinner {|{2}\rangle }\) ）。泄漏尤其有害，因为它会破坏所有后续的综合症测量，并可能传播到相邻的量子位。检测数据量子位上的泄漏尤其具有挑战性，因为它们在 QEC 周期期间永远不会直接测量。先前的工作，例如擦除器[43]，通过使用固定启发式从综合症模式推断泄漏来解决这个问题。然而，这种方法经常对良性综合征进行错误分类，从而触发过多的漏电减少电路（LRC）。由于 LRC 本身噪声大且速度慢，因此这些错误触发会延长 QEC 周期并增加逻辑错误率。

我们提出了gladiator，这是一种通用且适应性强的泄漏推测框架，可跨表面代码、颜色代码和qLDPC代码工作。离线时，角斗士构建了一个根据设备数据进行校准的代码感知错误传播图。在网上，它可以在几纳秒内对每种综合症进行分类，并且仅当观察到的模式可证明是泄漏主导时才安排 LRC。这种精确的推测消除了多达 3 ×（平均 2 ×）不必要的 LRC，缩短了 QEC 周期，并从源头上抑制了误报。在标准容错基准上进行评估，角斗士提供了 1.7 × –3.9 × 的加速和 16% 的逻辑错误率降低，提高了容错量子计算的效率。

papers.title: Amove: Accelerating LLMs through Mitigating Outliers and Salient Points via Fine-Grained Grouped Vectorized Data Type.
papers.abstract:
The quantization of Large Language Models (LLMs) poses significant challenges due to the heterogeneous nature of feature point distributions in low-bit quantization scenarios, including salient points, normal outliers, and massive outliers. These challenges are particularly pronounced in supporting both weight-only and weight-activation quantization modes, as existing methods often focus on a single mode and fail to address the diverse feature characteristics holistically, resulting in suboptimal model accuracy and hardware efficiency trade-offs.

To tackle these limitations, we introduce Amove, a novel co-design framework that synergistically integrates data type and hardware architecture design for efficient LLM quantization. Our approach is threefold: First, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of quantization granularity and propose a residual approximation mechanism that balances model accuracy and memory overhead under fine-grained quantization. Second, we design a flexible fine-grained grouped vectorized data type, enabling seamless support for both weight-activation and low-bit weight-only quantization modes within a unified framework. Third, we implement the hardware architecture of Amove on both GPU tensor core and systolic array-based architectures. The Amove-enhanced tensor core achieves an average speedup of 2.13× and a 1.70× reduction in energy consumption over the state-of-the-art OliVe design. Furthermore, an Amove-based accelerator achieves up to 2.67× speedup and 1.68× energy reduction over the state-of-the-art accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh:
由于低比特量化场景中特征点分布的异构性（包括显着点、正常异常值和大量异常值），大型语言模型（LLM）的量化提出了重大挑战。这些挑战在支持仅权重和权重激活量化模式时尤其明显，因为现有方法通常专注于单一模式，无法整体解决不同的特征特性，导致模型精度和硬件效率权衡不理想。

为了解决这些限制，我们引入了 Amove，这是一种新颖的协同设计框架，它协同集成数据类型和硬件架构设计，以实现高效的 LLM 量化。我们的方法有三个：首先，我们对量化粒度进行全面分析，并提出一种残差近似机制，在细粒度量化下平衡模型精度和内存开销。其次，我们设计了一种灵活的细粒度分组矢量化数据类型，能够在统一框架内无缝支持权重激活和低位仅权重量化模式。第三，我们在 GPU 张量核心和基于脉动阵列的架构上实现了 Amove 的硬件架构。与最先进的 OliVe 设计相比，Amove 增强型张量核心的平均速度提高了 2.13 倍，能耗降低了 1.70 倍。此外，与最先进的加速器相比，基于 Amove 的加速器可实现高达 2.67 倍的加速和 1.68 倍的能耗降低。

papers.title: Athena: Accelerating Quantized Convolutional Neural Networks under Fully Homomorphic Encryption.
papers.abstract: Deep learning under FHE is difficult due to two aspects: (1) formidable amount of ciphertext computations like convolutions, so frequent bootstrapping is inevitable which in turn exacerbates the problem; (2) lack of the support to various non-linear functions in terms of the diversity and accuracy. Previous work primarily used the CKKS-based approach, which requires large parameters and places a heavy burden on the hardware. In this paper, we propose Athena, including a novel framework targeting quantized convolutional neural networks under FHE, and a specialized accelerator to release the maximum potential of the framework. Unlike the classic CKKS-based approach, Athena only requires much smaller parameters, i.e., 2 15 degree and approximately 5 MB ciphertext size. Athena uses a uniform representation, functional bootstrapping, to accurately support any type of activation functions, and is not limited to polynomial approximate fitted functions such as ReLU and sigmoid. We highlight the following results: (1) the accuracy varies by \(+0.01\%\;/-0.24 \%\) compared with the plaintext quantized CNN; (2) the inference performance on the Athena accelerator achieves a speedup of 1.5 × to 2.3 ×, an EDAP improvement of 3.8 × to 9.9 ×, compared with state-of-the-art FHE accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: FHE下的深度学习之所以困难，主要有两个方面：（1）卷积等密文计算量巨大，频繁的自举（bootstrapping）是不可避免的，这反过来又加剧了问题； (2)缺乏对各种非线性函数的多样性和准确性的支持。之前的工作主要使用基于CKKS的方法，该方法需要较大的参数并且对硬件造成沉重的负担。在本文中，我们提出了 Athena，包括一个针对 FHE 下的量化卷积神经网络的新颖框架，以及一个专门的加速器来释放该框架的最大潜力。与经典的基于 CKKS 的方法不同，Athena 只需要小得多的参数，即 2×15 度和大约 5 MB 的密文大小。 Athena 使用统一表示法（函数自举）来精确支持任何类型的激活函数，并且不限于 ReLU 和 sigmoid 等多项式近似拟合函数。我们强调以下结果：（1）与明文量化 CNN 相比，准确率变化 \(+0.01\%\;/-0.24 \%\)； (2) 与最先进的 FHE 加速器相比，Athena 加速器的推理性能实现了 1.5 倍至 2.3 倍的加速比，EDAP 提升了 3.8 倍至 9.9 倍。

papers.title: ATR: Out-of-Order Register Release Exploiting Atomic Regions.
papers.abstract:
Modern superscalar processors require large physical register files to support a high number of in-flight instructions, which is crucial for achieving higher ILP and IPC. Conventional register renaming techniques release physical registers conservatively, waiting until the instruction that redefines the same architectural register commits, which results in inefficient register utilization. In particular, registers frequently remain allocated for many cycles although they are no longer in-use. To address this deficiency, previous approaches have explored early register release, which aims to free registers as soon as they have been fully consumed. However, these techniques are either unsafe or conservative, limiting the benefits.

We observe that over 17% of all allocated registers in SPEC2017int and 13% in SPEC2017fp are located within atomic commit regions , sequences that do not include conditional branches nor exception-causing instructions. Instructions within such regions are guaranteed to atomically commit or flush together, allowing safe early release of the registers allocated by the first instruction of a region. In particular, registers can be released without waiting for the redefining instruction of the architectural register to commit. We propose a novel renaming technique that leverages this insight to reduce register file pressure. Our technique enables out-of-order register release by identifying atomic commit regions using a simple mechanism that requires no stacks, queues, extra memory, or shadow cells. We show that, for SPEC2017int benchmarks, the proposed register renaming scheme achieves an average speedup of 5.13% for a 64-entry, and 1.48% for a 224-entry register file.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代超标量处理器需要大型物理寄存器文件来支持大量运行中指令，这对于实现更高的 ILP 和 IPC 至关重要。传统的寄存器重命名技术保守地释放物理寄存器，等待重新定义相同架构寄存器的指令提交，这导致寄存器利用率低下。特别是，寄存器经常在许多周期内保持分配状态，尽管它们不再使用。为了解决这个缺陷，以前的方法已经探索了早期寄存器释放，其目的是在寄存器被完全消耗后立即释放它们。然而，这些技术要么不安全，要么保守，限制了其益处。

我们观察到，SPEC2017int 中超过 17% 的所有已分配寄存器和 SPEC2017fp 中的 13% 位于原子提交区域内，即不包含条件分支也不包含引发异常的指令的序列。这些区域内的指令保证以原子方式提交或刷新在一起，从而允许安全地提前释放由区域的第一条指令分配的寄存器。特别地，无需等待架构寄存器的重定义指令提交就可以释放寄存器。我们提出了一种新颖的重命名技术，利用这种见解来减少寄存器文件压力。我们的技术通过使用不需要堆栈、队列、额外内存或影子单元的简单机制来识别原子提交区域，从而实现无序寄存器释放。我们表明，对于 SPEC2017int 基准测试，所提出的寄存器重命名方案对于 64 条目的寄存器文件实现了 5.13% 的平均加速，对于 224 条目的寄存器文件实现了 1.48% 的平均加速。

papers.title: AxCore: A Quantization-Aware Approximate GEMM Unit for LLM Inference.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become foundational to modern natural language processing, yet their immense computational and memory demands pose major obstacles for efficient inference. Transformer-based LLMs rely heavily on floating-point general matrix-matrix multiplication (FP-GEMM), which dominates both compute and bandwidth. In this paper, we introduce AxCore, a quantization-aware, approximate GEMM unit that combines weight-only quantization with floating-point multiplication approximation (FPMA) to deliver highly efficient and accurate LLM inference. Unlike traditional GEMM units, AxCore eliminates multipliers entirely, replacing them with low-bit integer additions in a novel systolic array. AxCore features several key innovations: (1) a mixed-precision FPMA-based processing element that supports direct computation on compressed weights and high-precision activations; (2) a lightweight accuracy preservation strategy, including subnormal number handling, error compensation, and format-aware quantization; and (3) a set of systolic array optimizations, including shared correction and normalization logic. Evaluations on open-source LLMs show that AxCore achieves up to 6.3 × -12.5 × higher compute density than conventional FP GEMM units. Compared to state-of-the-art INT4-based accelerators, FIGLUT and FIGNA, AxCore improves compute density by 53% and 70%, respectively, while also delivering lower perplexity. AxCore is opensourced at: https://github.com/CLab-HKUST-GZ/micro58-axcore.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 已成为现代自然语言处理的基础，但其巨大的计算和内存需求对高效推理造成了重大障碍。基于 Transformer 的 LLM 严重依赖浮点通用矩阵-矩阵乘法 (FP-GEMM)，它在计算和带宽方面占据主导地位。在本文中，我们介绍了 AxCore，这是一种量化感知的近似 GEMM 单元，它将仅权重量化与浮点乘法近似 (FPMA) 相结合，以提供高效且准确的 LLM 推理。与传统的 GEMM 单元不同，AxCore 完全消除了乘法器，用新颖的脉动阵列中的低位整数加法代替它们。 AxCore具有几项关键创新：（1）基于混合精度FPMA的处理元件，支持压缩权重和高精度激活的直接计算； (2) 轻量级精度保存策略，包括次正规数处理、误差补偿和格式感知量化； (3)一组脉动阵列优化，包括共享校正和归一化逻辑。对开源 LLM 的评估表明，AxCore 的计算密度比传统 FP GEMM 单元高出 6.3 × -12.5 ×。与最先进的基于 INT4 的加速器Figlut 和Figna 相比，AxCore 的计算密度分别提高了 53% 和 70%，同时还降低了困惑度。 AxCore 开源于：https://github.com/CLab-HKUST-GZ/micro58-axcore。

papers.title: Beyond Page Migration: Enhancing Tiered Memory Performance via Integrated Last-Level Cache Management and Page Migration.
papers.abstract: Emerging memory interconnect technologies, such as Compute Express Link (CXL), enable scalable memory expansion by integrating heterogeneous memory components like local DRAM and CXL-attached DRAM. These tiered memory systems offer potential benefits in bandwidth and capacity, but their heterogeneous performance characteristics pose significant challenges for efficient memory management. Traditional approaches, including hotness-based page placement, prioritize latency reduction by retaining frequently accessed data in near memory. However, these methods often fail to utilize aggregate memory bandwidth effectively, leading to imbalanced traffic and performance degradation under memory-heavy workloads. Additionally, the reliance on costly page migrations introduces overheads that impede responsiveness to workload variations. To address these challenges, we propose TierTune , a dynamic memory management framework integrating Last-Level Cache (LLC) partitioning and page migration. TierTune dynamically partitions the LLC between near and far memory nodes, rapidly mitigating latency imbalances and balancing memory traffic more effectively than software-based page migration. We extend this approach with a migration policy that dynamically redistributes pages to address persistent imbalances, incorporating cache hierarchy effects and bandwidth pressure into placement decisions. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that TierTune improves performance by 19.6% on average compared to state-of-the-art page migration policies across diverse workloads by balancing memory traffic more effectively and reducing migration overheads.
papers.abstract_zh: Compute Express Link (CXL) 等新兴内存互连技术通过集成本地 DRAM 和 CXL 连接 DRAM 等异构内存组件来实现可扩展的内存扩展。这些分层内存系统在带宽和容量方面提供了潜在的优势，但其异构性能特征对高效内存管理提出了重大挑战。传统方法（包括基于热度的页面放置）通过将频繁访问的数据保留在近内存中来优先考虑减少延迟。然而，这些方法通常无法有效地利用聚合内存带宽，导致内存繁重的工作负载下流量不平衡和性能下降。此外，对昂贵的页面迁移的依赖会带来开销，从而阻碍对工作负载变化的响应。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 TierTune，这是一个集成末级缓存 (LLC) 分区和页面迁移的动态内存管理框架。 TierTune 在近端和远端内存节点之间动态划分 LLC，比基于软件的页面迁移更有效地快速缓解延迟不平衡并平衡内存流量。我们通过动态重新分配页面的迁移策略扩展了这种方法，以解决持续的不平衡问题，将缓存层次结构效应和带宽压力纳入放置决策中。实验评估表明，通过更有效地平衡内存流量并减少迁移开销，与跨不同工作负载的最先进的页面迁移策略相比，TierTune 的性能平均提高了 19.6%。

papers.title: BitL: A Hybrid Bit-Serial and Parallel Deep Learning Accelerator for Critical Path Reduction.
papers.abstract: As deep neural networks (DNNs) advance, their computational demands have grown immensely. In this context, previous research introduced bit-wise computation to enhance silicon efficiency, along with skipping unnecessary zero-bit calculations. However, we observe that existing bit-wise approaches miss an opportunity to optimize the critical computation path, as they process groups of values sequentially from the most significant bits (MSBs) to the least significant bits (LSBs). To address this limitation, we propose BitL, a novel bit-wise computing unit designed to minimize the critical path and improve the throughput. BitL dynamically switches between horizontal and vertical data lookups across sub-tiles during Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) operations. Additionally, it presents an innovative optimization technique to maximize the utilization of computing units while switching its lookup direction. Our evaluation demonstrates that BitL delivers up to 1.92 × higher throughput compared to a baseline DNN accelerator and achieves a 1.24 × improvement over recent zero-bit skipping accelerators. Furthermore, BitL improves energy efficiency by 2.06 × on average, with a silicon area overhead of only 5.71%.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着深度神经网络 (DNN) 的进步，它们的计算需求也大幅增长。在这种情况下，之前的研究引入了逐位计算来提高芯片效率，同时跳过不必要的零位计算。然而，我们观察到现有的逐位方法错过了优化关键计算路径的机会，因为它们从最高有效位（MSB）到最低有效位（LSB）顺序处理值组。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 BitL，一种新颖的按位计算单元，旨在最小化关键路径并提高吞吐量。 BitL 在乘法累加 (MAC) 操作期间在跨子图块的水平和垂直数据查找之间动态切换。此外，它还提供了一种创新的优化技术，可以在切换查找方向的同时最大限度地提高计算单元的利用率。我们的评估表明，与基线 DNN 加速器相比，BitL 的吞吐量提高了 1.92 倍，并且比最新的零位跳跃加速器提高了 1.24 倍。此外，BitL 的能源效率平均提高了 2.06 倍，而硅片面积开销仅为 5.71%。

papers.title: Boosting Task Scheduling Data Locality with Low-latency, HW-accelerated Label Propagation.
papers.abstract: Task Scheduling is a popular technique for exploiting parallelism in modern computing systems. In particular, HW-accelerated Task Scheduling has been shown to be effective at improving the performance of fine-grained workloads by dynamically assigning tasks to cores based on their data dependencies with minimal overhead, allowing the handling of tasks with execution times in the order of thousands of cycles. However, the performance of applications assisted by accelerated Task Scheduling is limited by the fact that once a task has all its dependencies fulfilled, it is typically executed on the first available core, which might not be locality-optimal. We thus propose a novel approach to Task Scheduling that leverages HW-accelerated Label Propagation (LP), a graph clustering algorithm, to group tasks with intersecting data patterns such that they are executed on the same core. We show that our approach can significantly improve the performance of task-based applications, improving overall program execution times by up to 1.50 × while simultaneously reducing average task sizes by up to 1.81 ×, augmenting both synthetic benchmarks and real-world applications running on a 24-core RISC-V processor mapped to the Alveo U55C FPGA. These gains rely heavily on the low-latency nature of our proposed label propagation accelerator, which will typically cluster dynamic task graphs in under 300 cycles, up to 581 × faster than an equivalent software implementation. Furthermore, by ensuring that ideal placement predictions are used as a hint rather than a hard constraint, we allow the system to benefit from improved data locality for memory-intensive applications while also maintaining high core utilization in compute-bound scenarios. Our results hence demonstrate the potential of HW-accelerated label propagation to improve the performance of Task Scheduling systems with low-latency, dynamic data locality optimization.
papers.abstract_zh: 任务调度是现代计算系统中利用并行性的一种流行技术。特别是，硬件加速任务调度已被证明可以有效地提高细粒度工作负载的性能，它可以根据数据依赖性以最小的开销将任务动态分配给内核，从而允许处理执行时间为数千个周期的任务。然而，加速任务调度辅助的应用程序的性能受到以下事实的限制：一旦任务满足其所有依赖性，它通常在第一个可用核心上执行，这可能不是局部最优的。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的任务调度方法，该方法利用硬件加速标签传播（LP）（一种图聚类算法）对具有交叉数据模式的任务进行分组，以便它们在同一核心上执行。我们证明，我们的方法可以显着提高基于任务的应用程序的性能，将整体程序执行时间提高多达 1.50 倍，同时将平均任务大小减少多达 1.81 倍，增强综合基准测试和在映射到 Alveo U55C FPGA 的 24 核 RISC-V 处理器上运行的实际应用程序。这些收益在很大程度上依赖于我们提出的标签传播加速器的低延迟特性，该加速器通常会在 300 个周期内对动态任务图进行聚类，比同等软件实现快 581 倍。此外，通过确保理想的放置预测用作提示而不是硬约束，我们允许系统从内存密集型应用程序的数据局部性改进中受益，同时还在计算密集型场景中保持高核心利用率。因此，我们的结果证明了硬件加速标签传播通过低延迟、动态数据局部性优化来提高任务调度系统性能的潜力。

papers.title: Bootes: Boosting the Efficiency of Sparse Accelerators Using Spectral Clustering.
papers.abstract: Sparse matrix-matrix multiplication (SpGEMM) is crucial in many applications, with numerous recent efforts focused on optimizing it. The row-wise product has emerged as a favorable SpGEMM dataflow due to its balanced performance, but it alone is insufficient to minimize data movement and off-chip traffic—key factors for efficient accelerator deployment. Previous studies face three key challenges: (1) reordering is often suboptimal, failing to maximize memory traffic reduction; (2) preprocessing steps are typically slow and inefficient, making the overhead hard to justify; and (3) certain sparsity patterns do not benefit from reordering, potentially increasing traffic, yet existing methods lack a mechanism to detect such cases. To address these challenges, we propose Bootes, a novel approach that leverages spectral clustering to optimally reorder the rows of matrix A, aligning data access patterns with matrix B to maximize reuse and reduce off-chip memory traffic during row-wise matrix multiplication. Our key insight lies in using a similarity matrix that captures the structural properties of matrix A to guide clustering, along with an optimized implementation of the spectral clustering algorithm to reduce preprocessing overhead. Additionally, Bootes incorporates a decision tree model trained on real-world matrices to predict when reordering is beneficial, enabling a cost-aware preprocessing strategy. Bootes achieves a geometric mean speedup of 11.61 × in preprocessing time compared to existing row reordering techniques while maintaining scalability. It is deployed on state-of-the-art accelerators—Flexagon, GAMMA, and Trapezoid—where it reduces off-chip traffic by 2.31 ×, 1.67 ×, and 1.38 ×, respectively, thereby boosting their efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpGEMM) 在许多应用中至关重要，最近的许多工作都集中在优化它上。由于其均衡的性能，行式产品已成为一种受欢迎的 SpGEMM 数据流，但仅靠它还不足以最大限度地减少数据移动和片外流量——高效加速器部署的关键因素。先前的研究面临三个关键挑战：（1）重新排序通常不是最优的，无法最大限度地减少内存流量； (2) 预处理步骤通常缓慢且低效，使得开销难以合理； (3)某些稀疏模式不会从重新排序中受益，可能会增加流量，但现有方法缺乏检测此类情况的机制。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Bootes，这是一种利用谱聚类对矩阵 A 的行进行最佳重新排序的新颖方法，将数据访问模式与矩阵 B 对齐，以最大限度地重用并减少行式矩阵乘法期间的片外内存流量。我们的关键见解在于使用相似矩阵来捕获矩阵 A 的结构属性来指导聚类，以及谱聚类算法的优化实现以减少预处理开销。此外，Bootes 还结合了一个在现实世界矩阵上训练的决策树模型，可以预测重新排序何时有益，从而实现成本感知的预处理策略。与现有的行重新排序技术相比，Bootes 在预处理时间上实现了 11.61 倍的几何平均加速，同时保持了可扩展性。它部署在最先进的加速器（Flexagon、GAMMA 和 Trapezoid）上，分别将片外流量减少了 2.31 ×、1.67 × 和 1.38 ×，从而提高了效率。

papers.title: C3ache: Towards Hierarchical Cache-Centric Computing for Sparse Matrix Multiplication on GPGPUs.
papers.abstract:
Sparse matrix multiplications (SPMMs) are fundamental kernels in various domains and are highly demanded to be executed on general-purpose graphics processing units (GPGPUs). However, it is a challenge to efficiently execute SPMMs across varying sparsity regimes on GPGPUs due to the significant variations in sparsity patterns across different domains. Most of the state-of-the-art works enhance GPGPUs by integrating dedicated accelerator units in processor, which prioritize computational density over memory subsystem optimizations. As sparsity increases, the overhead from expensive memory accesses and redundant input fetches in sparse matrices constrains the effectiveness of processor-centric optimization schemes. Consequently, these optimizations become suboptimal for workloads dominated by irregular memory access patterns and low arithmetic intensity.

To address these problems, we proposed a hierarchical cache-centric computing architecture with hybrid dataflow, C 3 ache , to achieve near-optimal memory efficiency and data reuse. First, the hybrid dataflow based on the outer-product dataflow and Gustavson’s dataflow is proposed to decouple the SPMM computation into two distinct phases (multiplication and merging) with different behavioral characteristics and align with the memory access pattern. Furthermore, C 3 ache restructures the cache hierarchy through in-cache computing, transforming the two levels of cache into large-scale data parallel processing in memory (PIM) units and in-situ merging PIM units respectively to map the two computation phases of SPMMs. To synchronize the granularity of data fetching with the memory access pattern, a novel memory-aware compressed format is proposed for sparse encoding to further reduce the memory transaction and the decoding overhead of C 3 ache . To realize C 3 ache , an efficient multi-precision matrix multiplication PIM macro is also implemented. Experimental results demonstrate that C 3 ache achieves 7.22 × and 2.4 × speedup on average with 42.4 × and 22.9 × EDP reduction over the GPGPU CUDA Cores and Sparse Tensor Cores respectively, while reducing memory access more than 80%.
papers.abstract_zh:
稀疏矩阵乘法 (SPMM) 是各个领域的基本内核，并且非常需要在通用图形处理单元 (GPGPU) 上执行。然而，由于不同领域的稀疏模式存在显着差异，因此在 GPGPU 上跨不同稀疏度机制有效执行 SPMM 是一个挑战。大多数最先进的作品通过在处理器中集成专用加速器单元来增强 GPGPU，这些加速器单元优先考虑计算密度而不是内存子系统优化。随着稀疏性的增加，稀疏矩阵中昂贵的内存访问和冗余输入获取的开销限制了以处理器为中心的优化方案的有效性。因此，对于以不规则内存访问模式和低算术强度为主的工作负载，这些优化变得次优。

为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种具有混合数据流的分层缓存为中心的计算架构C 3 ache，以实现近乎最优的内存效率和数据重用。首先，提出了基于外积数据流和 Gustavson 数据流的混合数据流，将 SPMM 计算解耦为具有不同行为特征的两个不同阶段（乘法和合并），并与内存访问模式保持一致。此外，C 3 ache通过缓存内计算重构缓存层次结构，将两级缓存分别转化为大规模内存数据并行处理（PIM）单元和原位合并PIM单元，映射SPMM的两个计算阶段。为了使数据获取的粒度与存储器访问模式同步，提出了一种新颖的存储器感知压缩格式用于稀疏编码，以进一步减少存储器事务和C 3 ache 的解码开销。为了实现C 3 ache ，还实现了高效的多精度矩阵乘法PIM宏。实验结果表明，与 GPGPU CUDA 核心和稀疏张量核心相比，C 3 ache 平均加速达到 7.22 倍和 2.4 倍，EDP 分别减少 42.4 倍和 22.9 倍，同时减少内存访问超过 80%。

papers.title: ccAI: A Compatible and Confidential System for AI Computing.
papers.abstract:
Confidential xPU computing has emerged as a prominent technique for effectively securing users’ AI computing workloads on heterogeneous systems equipped with xPUs. Although the industry adopts this technology in cutting-edge hardware (e.g. NVIDIA H100 GPU) to safeguard high-performance AI computing, most clouds still rely on legacy xPUs and suffer from data leakage problems. Moreover, although the academy proposes several confidential xPU designs, these solutions have yet to be widely deployed in heterogeneous clouds. A key limitation is the compatibility challenge, which requires non-trivial engineering effort to address. Therefore, there is an urgent need to design a compatible and confidential xPU protection system that is tailored for today’s AI computing platforms.

To address these issues, we present ccAI , a heterogeneous system that ensures both high compatibility and strong security for AI computing based on xPU. By leveraging the PCIe interconnect as a common abstraction layer, ccAI provides a unified solution for securing diverse xPU types while preserving user transparency, effectively overcoming key compatibility limitations of existing approaches. Specifically, ccAI achieves this through two core components: (1) a dedicated hardware module, the PCIe Security Controller (PCIe-SC), which enforces computing security of diverse types of xPU and (2) a collaborative software component, the Adaptor, deployed within the Trusted VM (TVM), which orchestrates secure workload processing without modifying applications or drivers. To handle the complexity of PCIe packet transmissions, ccAI incorporates a flexible and fine-grained processing framework, within which ccAI additionally optimizes frequent I/O interactions and security-critical operations to minimize performance overhead. We implement a prototype of ccAI and evaluate it across multiple real-world xPU platforms using a range of Large Language Models (LLMs). Results show that ccAI effectively protects xPU computing with low (0.05 \(\%\) – 5.67 \(\%\) ) performance overhead
papers.abstract_zh:
机密 xPU 计算已成为一种重要技术，可有效保护配备 xPU 的异构系统上的用户 AI 计算工作负载。尽管业界在尖端硬件（例如NVIDIA H100 GPU）中采用该技术来保障高性能AI计算，但大多数云仍然依赖于传统xPU并遭受数据泄露问题。此外，尽管该学院提出了几种保密的xPU设计，但这些解决方案尚未在异构云中广泛部署。一个关键的限制是兼容性挑战，这需要大量的工程工作来解决。因此，迫切需要设计一种适合当今AI计算平台的兼容且保密的xPU保护系统。

针对这些问题，我们提出了ccAI，一种异构系统，保证基于xPU的AI计算的高兼容性和强安全性。通过利用 PCIe 互连作为通用抽象层，ccAI 提供了一个统一的解决方案，用于保护不同 xPU 类型的安全，同时保持用户透明度，有效克服现有方法的关键兼容性限制。具体来说，ccAI 通过两个核心组件实现这一目标：(1) 专用硬件模块 PCIe 安全控制器 (PCIe-SC)，它强制执行不同类型 xPU 的计算安全性；(2) 协作软件组件适配器，部署在可信虚拟机 (TVM) 内，它在不修改应用程序或驱动程序的情况下协调安全工作负载处理。为了处理 PCIe 数据包传输的复杂性，ccAI 结合了灵活且细粒度的处理框架，其中 ccAI 还优化了频繁的 I/O 交互和安全关键操作，以最大限度地降低性能开销。我们实现了 ccAI 原型，并使用一系列大型语言模型 (LLM) 在多个现实世界的 xPU 平台上对其进行评估。结果表明，ccAI 以较低的 (0.05 \(\%\) – 5.67 \(\%\) ) 性能开销有效保护 xPU 计算

papers.title: Chameleon: Adaptive Caching and Scheduling for Many-Adapter LLM Inference Environments.
papers.abstract:
The effectiveness of LLMs has triggered an exponential rise in their deployment, imposing substantial demands on inference clusters. Such clusters often handle numerous concurrent queries for different LLM downstream tasks. To handle multi-task settings with vast LLM parameter counts, Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enables task-specific fine-tuning while sharing most of the base LLM model across tasks. Hence, it supports concurrent task serving with reduced memory requirements. However, existing designs face inefficiencies: they overlook workload heterogeneity, impose high CPU-GPU link bandwidth from frequent adapter loading, and suffer from head-of-line blocking in their schedulers.

To address these challenges, we present Chameleon , a novel LLM serving system optimized for many-adapter environments. Chameleon introduces two new ideas: adapter caching and adapter-aware scheduling. First, Chameleon caches popular adapters in GPU memory, minimizing adapter loading times. For caching, it uses otherwise idle GPU memory, avoiding extra memory costs. Second, Chameleon uses a non-preemptive multi-queue scheduler to efficiently account for workload heterogeneity. In this way, Chameleon simultaneously prevents head of line blocking and starvation. Under high loads, Chameleon reduces the P99 and P50 TTFT latencies by 80.7% and 48.1%, respectively, over a state-of-the-art baseline, while improving the throughput by 1.5 ×.
papers.abstract_zh:
法学硕士的有效性引发了其部署的指数级增长，对推理集群提出了巨大的要求。此类集群通常会处理不同 LLM 下游任务的大量并发查询。为了处理具有大量 LLM 参数数量的多任务设置，低秩适应 (LoRA) 可以实现特定于任务的微调，同时跨任务共享大部分基本 LLM 模型。因此，它支持并发任务服务，同时减少内存需求。然而，现有的设计面临着效率低下的问题：它们忽视了工作负载的异构性，由于频繁的适配器加载而强加了高 CPU-GPU 链路带宽，并且在调度程序中受到队头阻塞的影响。

为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 Chameleon，这是一种针对多适配器环境进行优化的新型 LLM 服务系统。 Chameleon 引入了两个新想法：适配器缓存和适配器感知调度。首先，Chameleon 将流行的适配器缓存在 GPU 内存中，从而最大限度地减少适配器加载时间。对于缓存，它使用空闲的 GPU 内存，避免额外的内存成本。其次，Chameleon 使用非抢占式多队列调度程序来有效地解决工作负载异构性。通过这种方式，变色龙可以同时防止队头阻塞和饥饿。在高负载下，Chameleon 与最先进的基准相比，将 P99 和 P50 TTFT 延迟分别降低了 80.7% 和 48.1%，同时将吞吐量提高了 1.5 倍。

papers.title: Characterizing and Optimizing Realistic Workloads on a Commercial Compute-in-SRAM Device.
papers.abstract:
Compute-in-SRAM architectures offer a promising approach to achieving higher performance and energy efficiency across a range of data-intensive applications. However, prior evaluations have largely relied on simulators or small prototypes, limiting the understanding of their real-world potential. In this work, we present a comprehensive performance and energy characterization of a commercial compute-in-SRAM device, the GSI APU, under realistic workloads. We compare the GSI APU against established architectures, including CPUs and GPUs, to quantify its energy efficiency and performance potential. We introduce an analytical framework for general-purpose compute-in-SRAM devices that reveals fundamental optimization principles by modeling performance trade-offs, thereby guiding program optimizations.

Exploiting the fine-grained parallelism of tightly integrated memory-compute architectures requires careful data management. We address this by proposing three optimizations: communication-aware reduction mapping, coalesced DMA, and broadcast-friendly data layouts. When applied to retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over large corpora (10GB–200GB), these optimizations enable our compute-in-SRAM system to accelerate retrieval by 4.8 × –6.6 × over an optimized CPU baseline, improving end-to-end RAG latency by 1.1 × –1.8 ×. The shared off-chip memory bandwidth is modeled using a simulated HBM, while all other components are measured on the real compute-in-SRAM device. Critically, this system matches the performance of an NVIDIA A6000 GPU for RAG while being significantly more energy-efficient (54.4 × -117.9 × reduction). These findings validate the viability of compute-in-SRAM for complex, real-world applications and provide guidance for advancing the technology.
papers.abstract_zh:
SRAM 计算架构提供了一种有前景的方法，可以在一系列数据密集型应用中实现更高的性能和能源效率。然而，之前的评估很大程度上依赖于模拟器或小型原型，限制了对其现实世界潜力的理解。在这项工作中，我们展示了商业 SRAM 计算设备 GSI APU 在实际工作负载下的综合性能和能耗特征。我们将 GSI APU 与现有架构（包括 CPU 和 GPU）进行比较，以量化其能源效率和性能潜力。我们引入了一个用于通用 SRAM 计算设备的分析框架，该框架通过对性能权衡建模来揭示基本优化原理，从而指导程序优化。

利用紧密集成的内存计算架构的细粒度并行性需要仔细的数据管理。我们通过提出三种优化来解决这个问题：通信感知缩减映射、合并 DMA 和广播友好的数据布局。当应用于大型语料库（10GB–200GB）上的检索增强生成（RAG）时，这些优化使我们的 SRAM 计算系统能够在优化的 CPU 基准上将检索速度提高 4.8 × –6.6 ×，从而将端到端 RAG 延迟缩短 1.1 × –1.8 ×。共享片外内存带宽使用模拟 HBM 进行建模，而所有其他组件均在真实的 SRAM 计算设备上测量。重要的是，该系统与 RAG 的 NVIDIA A6000 GPU 的性能相匹配，同时能效显着提高（减少 54.4 × -117.9 ×）。这些发现验证了 SRAM 计算对于复杂的现实应用的可行性，并为推进该技术提供了指导。

papers.title: Characterizing the Efficiency of Distributed Training: A Power, Performance, and Thermal Perspective.
papers.abstract: The rapid scaling of Large Language Models (LLMs) has pushed training workloads far beyond the limits of single-node analysis, demanding a deeper understanding of how these models behave across large-scale, multi-GPU systems. In this paper, we present a comprehensive characterization of LLM training across diverse real-world workloads and hardware platforms, including NVIDIA H100/H200 and AMD MI250 GPUs. We analyze dense and sparse models under various parallelism strategies – tensor, pipeline, data, and expert – and evaluate their effects on hardware utilization, power consumption, and thermal behavior. We further evaluate the effectiveness of optimizations such as activation recomputation and compute-communication overlap. Our findings show that performance is not determined solely by scaling hardware capacity. Scale-up systems with fewer, higher-memory GPUs can outperform scale-out systems in communication-bound regimes, but only under carefully tuned configurations; in other cases, scale-out deployments achieve superior throughput. We also show that certain parallelism combinations, such as tensor with pipeline, lead to bandwidth underutilization due to inefficient data chunking, while increasing microbatch sizes beyond a certain point induces bursty execution and peak power excursions that worsen thermal throttling. These insights reveal how training performance is shaped by complex interactions between hardware, system topology, and model execution. We conclude by offering recommendations for system and hardware design to improve the scalability and reliability of future LLM systems and workloads. The source code of this project is available at https://github.com/sitar-lab/CharLLM-PPT.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的快速扩展使训练工作负载远远超出了单节点分析的限制，需要更深入地了解这些模型在大规模多 GPU 系统中的行为方式。在本文中，我们全面描述了跨不同现实世界工作负载和硬件平台（包括 NVIDIA H100/H200 和 AMD MI250 GPU）的 LLM 训练。我们分析各种并行策略（张量、管道、数据和专家）下的密集和稀疏模型，并评估它们对硬件利用率、功耗和热行为的影响。我们进一步评估激活重新计算和计算通信重叠等优化的有效性。我们的研究结果表明，性能不仅仅取决于硬件容量的扩展。在通信受限的情况下，具有更少、更高内存 GPU 的纵向扩展系统可以超越横向扩展系统，但前提是经过仔细调整的配置；在其他情况下，横向扩展部署可实现卓越的吞吐量。我们还表明，某些并行组合（例如张量与管道）会由于数据分块效率低下而导致带宽利用率不足，而将微批量大小增加到超过某个点会导致突发执行和峰值功率偏移，从而加剧热节流。这些见解揭示了硬件、系统拓扑和模型执行之间的复杂交互如何影响训练性能。最后，我们提供系统和硬件设计建议，以提高未来法学硕士系统和工作负载的可扩展性和可靠性。该项目的源代码可在 https://github.com/sitar-lab/CharLLM-PPT 获取。

papers.title: Chasoň: Supporting Cross HBM Channel Data Migration to Enable Efficient Sparse Algebraic Acceleration.
papers.abstract: High bandwidth memory (HBM) equipped sparse accelerators are emerging as a new class of accelerators that offer concurrent accesses to data and parallel execution to mitigate the memory bound behavior of sparse kernels. However, because of their underlying non-zero scheduling scheme, state-of-the-art HBM-based sparse accelerators (e.g., Serpens) suffer from high resource underutilization causing suboptimal performance, and inefficiency. To solve this challenge, we propose Chasoň, an HBM-based streaming accelerator for sparse kernels, specifically sparse matrix vector multiplication. Chasoň supports our novel non-zero scheduling scheme called Cross-HBM Channel out-of-order (OoO) Scheduling (CrHCS) to enable data migration across HBM channels and mitigate resource underutilization. We implement Chasoň on AMD Alveo U55C, achieving 301 MHz clock frequency and evaluate it based on SuiteSparse and SNAP matrix collections. Chasoň improves the resource utilization and achieves up to 8 ×, 20.33 ×, 11.65 ×, and 2.67 × performance improvement and 2.03 ×, 34.72 ×, 19.48 ×, and 14.61 × better energy efficiency over Serpens, Nvidia RTX 4090, Nvidia RTX 6000 Ada, and Intel Core i9-11980HK, respectively. The source code of Chasoň is available at https://github.com/UbaidHunts/Chason.
papers.abstract_zh: 配备高带宽内存 (HBM) 的稀疏加速器正在成为一类新型加速器，它提供对数据的并发访问和并行执行，以减轻稀疏内核的内存限制行为。然而，由于其底层的非零调度方案，最先进的基于 HBM 的稀疏加速器（例如 Serpens）面临着资源利用率较高的问题，导致性能不佳和效率低下。为了解决这一挑战，我们提出了 Chasoň，一种基于 HBM 的稀疏内核流加速器，特别是稀疏矩阵向量乘法。 Chasoň 支持我们称为跨 HBM 通道无序 (OoO) 调度 (CrHCS) 的新型非零调度方案，以实现跨 HBM 通道的数据迁移并缓解资源利用不足的情况。我们在 AMD Alveo U55C 上实现 Chasoň，实现 301 MHz 时钟频率，并基于 SuiteSparse 和 SNAP 矩阵集合对其进行评估。与 Serpens、Nvidia RTX 4090、Nvidia RTX 6000 Ada 和 Intel Core i9-11980HK 相比，Chasoň 提高了资源利用率，性能提高了 8 倍、20.33 倍、11.65 倍和 2.67 倍，能效提高了 2.03 倍、34.72 倍、19.48 倍和 14.61 倍，分别。 Chasoň 的源代码可在 https://github.com/UbaidHunts/Chason 获取。

papers.title: Citadel: Rethinking Memory Allocation to Safeguard Against Inter-Domain Rowhammer Exploits.
papers.abstract: Rowhammer is a hardware security vulnerability at the heart of every DRAM-based memory system. Despite its discovery a decade ago, comprehensive defenses in current systems remain elusive, while the probability of successful attacks grows with DRAM density. Hardware-based defenses have proven ineffective due to substantial cost, delays in commercial adoption, and repeated circumventions by attackers, while more flexible software-based solutions incur major performance and memory capacity overheads or offer only limited protection. Citadel is a new memory allocator design that prevents Rowhammer-initiated security exploits by addressing the vulnerability’s root cause: physical adjacency of DRAM rows. It introduces flexible security domains and isolates them in physically disjoint memory regions, guaranteeing security by design. On a server system, Citadel supports thousands of security domains at a modest 7.2% average memory overhead and no performance loss, while remaining readily deployable across legacy, contemporary, and future platforms. In contrast, recent domain isolation schemes fail to support many workload scenarios due to excessive overhead and incur 4–6 × higher overhead for supported scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: Rowhammer 是每个基于 DRAM 的内存系统核心的硬件安全漏洞。尽管它在十年前就被发现了，但当前系统中的全面防御仍然难以实现，而成功攻击的可能性随着 DRAM 密度的增加而增加。由于成本高昂、商业采用的延迟以及攻击者的反复规避，基于硬件的防御已被证明是无效的，而更灵活的基于软件的解决方案会产生重大的性能和内存容量开销，或者仅提供有限的保护。 Citadel 是一种新的内存分配器设计，可通过解决漏洞的根本原因（DRAM 行的物理相邻性）来防止 Rowhammer 发起的安全漏洞。它引入了灵活的安全域，并将它们隔离在物理上不相交的内存区域中，通过设计保证安全性。在服务器系统上，Citadel 以 7.2% 的平均内存开销支持数千个安全域，并且没有性能损失，同时仍然可以跨传统、现代和未来平台轻松部署。相比之下，最近的域隔离方案由于开销过多而无法支持许多工作负载场景，并且为支持的场景带来 4-6 倍的开销。

papers.title: ColumnDisturb: Understanding Column-based Read Disturbance in Real DRAM Chips and Implications for Future Systems.
papers.abstract:
We experimentally demonstrate a new widespread read disturbance phenomenon, ColumnDisturb, in real commodity DRAM chips. By repeatedly opening or keeping a DRAM row (aggressor row) open, we show that it is possible to disturb DRAM cells through a DRAM column (i.e., bitline) and induce bitflips in DRAM cells sharing the same columns as the aggressor row (across multiple DRAM subarrays). With ColumnDisturb, the activation of a single row concurrently disturbs DRAM cells across as many as three DRAM subarrays (e.g., up to 3072 DRAM rows in tested DDR4 DRAM chips) as opposed to RowHammer & RowPress, which affect only a few neighboring rows of the aggressor row in a single subarray. We rigorously and comprehensively characterize ColumnDisturb and its characteristics under various operational conditions (i.e., temperature, data pattern, DRAM timing parameters, average voltage level of the bitline, memory access pattern, and spatial variation) using 216 DDR4 and 4 HBM2 chips from three major DRAM manufacturers. Among our 27 key experimental observations, we highlight two major results and their implications.

First, ColumnDisturb affects chips from all three major DRAM manufacturers and worsens as DRAM technology scales down to smaller node sizes (e.g., the minimum time to induce the first ColumnDisturb bitflip reduces by up to 5.06 x and 2.96 x on average across all tested modules). We observe that, even in existing DRAM chips, ColumnDisturb induces bitflips within a nominal DDR4 refresh window (e.g., in 63.6 ms) in multiple cells from one module. We predict that, as DRAM technology node size reduces, ColumnDisturb would worsen in future DRAM chips, likely causing many more bitflips in the nominal refresh window. Second, beyond the nominal refresh window, ColumnDisturb induces bitflips in many (up to 198 x) more DRAM rows than retention failures. Therefore, ColumnDisturb has strong implications for existing retention-aware refresh mechanisms that aim to improve system performance and energy efficiency by leveraging the heterogeneity in DRAM cell retention times: our detailed analyses and cycle-level simulations show that ColumnDisturb greatly reduces and can completely diminish the performance and energy benefits of such mechanisms.

Our results have serious implications for the robustness of future DRAM-based computing systems due to continued aggressive DRAM technology scaling. We describe and evaluate two solutions for mitigating read disturbance bitflips in the presence of ColumnDisturb and call for more research on the topic.
papers.abstract_zh:
我们在实际商用 DRAM 芯片中通过实验演示了一种新的广泛存在的读取干扰现象，即 ColumnDisturb。通过重复打开或保持 DRAM 行（攻击者行）打开，我们表明可以通过 DRAM 列（即位线）干扰 DRAM 单元，并在与攻击者行共享相同列（跨多个 DRAM 子阵列）的 DRAM 单元中引发位翻转。使用 ColumnDisturb，单行的激活会同时干扰多达三个 DRAM 子阵列（例如，测试的 DDR4 DRAM 芯片中多达 3072 个 DRAM 行）的 DRAM 单元，这与 RowHammer 和 RowPress 不同，后者仅影响单个子阵列中干扰行的几个相邻行。我们使用来自三大 DRAM 制造商的 216 个 DDR4 和 4 个 HBM2 芯片，严格、全面地表征了 ColumnDisturb 及其在各种操作条件（即温度、数据模式、DRAM 时序参数、位线平均电压电平、内存访问模式和空间变化）下的特性。在我们的 27 个关键实验观察中，我们重点介绍了两个主要结果及其含义。

首先，ColumnDisturb 会影响所有三个主要 DRAM 制造商的芯片，并且随着 DRAM 技术缩小到更小的节点尺寸，情况会变得更糟（例如，在所有测试的模块中，引发第一次 ColumnDisturb 位翻转的最短时间平均减少高达 5.06 倍和 2.96 倍）。我们观察到，即使在现有 DRAM 芯片中，ColumnDisturb 也会在一个模块的多个单元中的标称 DDR4 刷新窗口（例如 63.6 毫秒）内引发位翻转。我们预测，随着 DRAM 技术节点尺寸的减小，未来 DRAM 芯片中的 ColumnDisturb 将会恶化，可能会在标称刷新窗口中导致更多的位翻转。其次，超出标称刷新窗口，ColumnDisturb 会导致比保留故障多（最多 198 倍）的 DRAM 行中的位翻转。因此，ColumnDisturb 对现有的保留感知刷新机制具有重大影响，这些机制旨在通过利用 DRAM 单元保留时间的异质性来提高系统性能和能源效率：我们的详细分析和周期级模拟表明，ColumnDisturb 大大降低并可能完全削弱此类机制的性能和能源效益。

由于持续积极的 DRAM 技术扩展，我们的结果对未来基于 DRAM 的计算系统的稳健性产生了严重影响。我们描述并评估了在 ColumnDisturb 存在的情况下减轻读取干扰位翻转的两种解决方案，并呼吁对该主题进行更多研究。

papers.title: ComPASS: A Compatible PIM Protocol Architecture and Scheduling Solution for Processor-PIM Collaboration.
papers.abstract: With growing demands from memory-bound applications, Processing-In-Memory (PIM) architectures have emerged as a promising way to reduce data movement. However, existing PIM designs face challenges in compatibility and efficiency due to limited command/address space and the overhead of switching between PIM and normal memory modes. To address these limitations, we propose ComPASS, a compatible PIM protocol and scheduling solution that enables efficient processor-PIM integration. ComPASS introduces PIM-ACT, a new memory command that triggers multi-bank activation and PIM operations at once, allowing for compatibility across diverse PIM architectures. It also adds a PIM request generator within the memory controller, which can serve all PIM devices compliant with PIM-ACT, avoiding device-specific integration. In addition, ComPASS supports architecture-aware optimizations, enabling each PIM device to use a customized PIM-ACT configuration tailored to its architecture without compromising compatibility. For efficient scheduling of both PIM and conventional memory requests, ComPASS proposes static and adaptive scheduling that maintain PIM throughput while allocating bandwidth to conventional workloads for overall system efficiency. Our evaluation shows that ComPASS consistently meets PIM performance targets by achieving up to 10.75 × GEMV speedup on LPDDR-PIM over non-PIM environments, even under co-execution with memory-intensive CPU workloads, thereby demonstrating both efficiency and compatibility.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着内存限制应用程序的需求不断增长，内存处理 (PIM) 架构已成为减少数据移动的一种有前途的方法。然而，由于有限的命令/地址空间以及 PIM 和普通内存模式之间切换的开销，现有的 PIM 设计面临兼容性和效率方面的挑战。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 ComPASS，这是一种兼容的 PIM 协议和调度解决方案，可实现高效的处理器-PIM 集成。 ComPASS 引入了 PIM-ACT，这是一种新的内存命令，可同时触发多组激活和 PIM 操作，从而实现跨不同 PIM 架构的兼容性。它还在内存控制器内添加了一个 PIM 请求生成器，该生成器可以为所有符合 PIM-ACT 的 PIM 设备提供服务，从而避免特定于设备的集成。此外，ComPASS 支持架构感知优化，使每个 PIM 设备能够使用适合其架构的定制 PIM-ACT 配置，而不会影响兼容性。为了有效调度 PIM 和传统内存请求，ComPASS 提出了静态和自适应调度，可维持 PIM 吞吐量，同时为传统工作负载分配带宽，以提高整体系统效率。我们的评估表明，即使在与内存密集型 CPU 工作负载共同执行的情况下，ComPASS 在 LPDDR-PIM 上实现比非 PIM 环境高达 10.75 × GEMV 的加速，从而始终满足 PIM 性能目标，从而展示了效率和兼容性。

papers.title: Coruscant: Co-Designing GPU Kernel and Sparse Tensor Core to Advocate Unstructured Sparsity in Efficient LLM Inference.
papers.abstract: In the era of large language models (LLMs) and long-context generation, model compression techniques such as pruning, quantization, and distillation offer effective ways to reduce memory usage. Among them, pruning is constrained by the difficulty of exploiting unstructured sparsity on modern hardware. Consequently, LLM pruning is often restricted to structured patterns for hardware efficiency, although unstructured sparsity offers better accuracy retention at higher sparsity. To bridge this gap between the full potential of pruning and efficiency, we propose the Coruscant GPU SpMM kernel that leverages a bitmap-based sparse format for reduced memory footprint inside GPU memory and reduced latency of memory-bound matrix multiplications in LLM inference. This is achieved by transferring the compressed matrix tiles to GPU processors and decompressing them locally for tensor core execution. We see further optimization opportunity in microarchitecture-level and propose Coruscant Sparse Tensor Core, which computes directly on the compressed format without decompression by integrating a bitmap decoder. Coruscant kernel achieves up to 2 × speedup over cuBLAS and 1.48 × over Flash-LLM. With Coruscant Sparse Tensor Core, the speedup reaches 2.75 × over cuBLAS. Most importantly, Coruscant serves as an ideal solution for state-of-the-art LLM pruning methods by significantly reducing the memory footprint and accelerating SpMM on sparsity range 30% to 70%, enabling exploration of diverse sparsity patterns and pruning strategies.
papers.abstract_zh: 在大型语言模型 (LLM) 和长上下文生成时代，剪枝、量化和蒸馏等模型压缩技术提供了减少内存使用的有效方法。其中，剪枝受到现代硬件上利用非结构化稀疏性的困难的限制。因此，LLM 剪枝通常仅限于结构化模式以提高硬件效率，尽管非结构化稀疏性可以在更高的稀疏性下提供更好的精度保留。为了弥补修剪的全部潜力和效率之间的差距，我们提出了 Coruscant GPU SpMM 内核，它利用基于位图的稀疏格式来减少 GPU 内存内的内存占用，并减少 LLM 推理中内存绑定矩阵乘法的延迟。这是通过将压缩的矩阵图块传输到 GPU 处理器并在本地解压缩以供张量核心执行来实现的。我们看到了微架构级别的进一步优化机会，并提出了 Coruscant Sparse Tensor Core，它直接在压缩格式上进行计算，无需通过集成位图解码器进行解压缩。 Coruscant 内核比 cuBLAS 实现了高达 2 倍的加速，比 Flash-LLM 实现了 1.48 倍的加速。使用 Coruscant Sparse Tensor Core，加速比 cuBLAS 提高了 2.75 倍。最重要的是，Coruscant 通过显着减少内存占用并在稀疏范围 30% 至 70% 上加速 SpMM，从而成为最先进的 LLM 剪枝方法的理想解决方案，从而能够探索不同的稀疏模式和剪枝策略。

papers.title: COSMOS: RL-Enhanced Locality-Aware Counter Cache Optimization for Secure Memory.
papers.abstract: Secure memory systems employing AES-CTR encryption face significant performance challenges due to high counter (CTR) cache miss rates, especially in applications with irregular memory access patterns. These high miss rates increase memory traffic and latency, as each CTR cache miss triggers additional DRAM accesses. To address these bottlenecks and adapt to diverse access patterns, we propose COSMOS (Counter Optimized Secure Memory Operation Scheme), a novel solution leveraging reinforcement learning to reduce long memory access latency. COSMOS integrates two RL-based specialized predictors: one for data location prediction and another for CTR locality prediction, each with a well-defined state space, action space, and reward function. The RL-based data location predictor determines whether data reside on-chip or off-chip after an L1 cache miss, enabling early CTR access for off-chip predictions with minimal changes to the existing cache hierarchy. The RL-based CTR locality predictor identifies CTRs with high locality, supporting a locality-centric CTR cache (LCR-CTR) to improve cache efficiency and reduce miss rates. µCOSMOS improves performance over MorphCtr by 25% in for irregular memory access applications, with minimal hardware overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于计数器 (CTR) 缓存未命中率较高，采用 AES-CTR 加密的安全内存系统面临着重大的性能挑战，特别是在内存访问模式不规则的应用中。这些高缺失率会增加内存流量和延迟，因为每次 CTR 缓存缺失都会触发额外的 DRAM 访问。为了解决这些瓶颈并适应不同的访问模式，我们提出了 COSMOS（计数器优化安全内存操作方案），这是一种利用强化学习来减少长内存访问延迟的新颖解决方案。 COSMOS 集成了两个基于 RL 的专用预测器：一个用于数据位置预测，另一个用于 CTR 局部性预测，每个预测器都有明确定义的状态空间、动作空间和奖励函数。基于 RL 的数据位置预测器确定 L1 缓存未命中后数据是驻留在片内还是片外，从而能够在对现有缓存层次结构进行最小更改的情况下实现片外预测的早期 CTR 访问。基于强化学习的 CTR 局部性预测器识别具有高局部性的 CTR，支持以局部性为中心的 CTR 缓存 (LCR-CTR)，以提高缓存效率并降低缺失率。对于不规则内存访问应用，μCOSMOS 的性能比 MorphCtr 提高了 25%，并且硬件开销极小。

papers.title: Crane: Inter-Layer Scheduling Framework for DNN Inference and Training Co-Support on Tiled Architecture.
papers.abstract:
Tiled architectures have emerged as a compelling platform for scaling deep neural network (DNN) execution, offering both compute density and communication efficiency. To harness their full potential, effective inter-layer scheduling is crucial for managing operation order, memory behavior, and compute resource coordination. However, current schedulers often fall short due to three persistent issues: incomplete treatment of core design factors, limited flexibility in handling diverse workload structures, and reliance on heuristic search algorithms with poor convergence.

In this work, we trace these limitations to the absence of a unified and expressive scheduling representation. We introduce Crane , a framework that addresses these gaps through a hierarchical table-format abstraction capable of encoding rich scheduling semantics. Crane supports both inference and training workloads, and reformulates scheduling as a mathematically structured optimization problem, enabling more complete and efficient exploration of the scheduling space. Evaluations show that Crane reduces energy-delay product by up to 21.01 × and improves scheduling speed by at least 2.82 × over state-of-the-art baselines.
papers.abstract_zh:
平铺架构已成为扩展深度神经网络 (DNN) 执行的引人注目的平台，可提供计算密度和通信效率。为了充分发挥其潜力，有效的层间调度对于管理操作顺序、内存行为和计算资源协调至关重要。然而，当前的调度程序常常由于三个长期存在的问题而达不到要求：对核心设计因素的处理不完整、处理不同工作负载结构的灵活性有限以及依赖于收敛性差的启发式搜索算法。

在这项工作中，我们将这些限制追溯到缺乏统一且富有表现力的调度表示。我们引入了 Crane，这是一个框架，它通过能够编码丰富的调度语义的分层表格式抽象来解决这些差距。 Crane 支持推理和训练工作负载，并将调度重新表述为数学结构的优化问题，从而能够更完整、更高效地探索调度空间。评估表明，与最先进的基准相比，Crane 将能量延迟乘积减少了高达 21.01 倍，并将调度速度提高了至少 2.82 倍。

papers.title: CrossBit: Bitwise Computing in NAND Flash Memory with Inter-Bitline Data Communication.
papers.abstract: In-flash processing (IFP), which involves performing data computation inside NAND flash memory, holds high potential for improving the performance and energy efficiency of data-intensive application by minimizing data movement. Recent research has introduced several IFP architectures enabling bulk bitwise operations inside NAND flash chips to demonstrate this potential. However, previous IFP designs were limited to performing bitwise operations on data sensed within the same bitline, thus lacking the capability to handle more complex functions requiring interactions between data from different bitlines. This paper presents CrossBit, a new IFP architecture that enables both intra-bitline and inter-bitline operations with minimal additional circuitry integrated into commodity NAND flash memory. With the capability for inter-bitline operations , CrossBit facilitates in-flash error correction code (IF-ECC) operations, thereby enabling reliable multi-level cell (MLC) IFP. Moreover, CrossBit efficiently processes fundamental database queries that were previously inefficient with existing work that only supports intra-bitline operations . Experimental results show that the implementation of IF-ECC in CrossBit results in a substantial reduction in bit error rate (BER) for MLC operations, leading to 1.8 × increase in bit-density by using MLC compared to previous IFP designs which uses SLC only. When used for accelerating fundamental database queries, CrossBit achieves notable average speedup and energy efficiency improvement of 2.1 × and 2.5 × compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) IFP architecture. We further demonstrate the practicality by processing the full set of end-to-end database queries from the widely used Star schema benchmark, where CrossBit achieves 1.7 × speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 闪存内处理 (IFP) 涉及在 NAND 闪存内执行数据计算，通过最大限度地减少数据移动，在提高数据密集型应用的性能和能源效率方面具有巨大潜力。最近的研究引入了几种 IFP 架构，可在 NAND 闪存芯片内进行批量按位操作，以展示这种潜力。然而，以前的IFP设计仅限于对同一位线内感测的数据执行按位操作，因此缺乏处理需要来自不同位线的数据之间交互的更复杂功能的能力。本文介绍了 CrossBit，这是一种新的 IFP 架构，能够以最少的附加电路集成到商品 NAND 闪存中，实现位线内和位线间操作。凭借位线间操作的能力，CrossBit 有助于闪存内纠错码 (IF-ECC) 操作，从而实现可靠的多级单元 (MLC) IFP。此外，CrossBit 可有效处理基本的数据库查询，而这些查询以前在仅支持位线内操作的现有工作中效率较低。实验结果表明，在 CrossBit 中实施 IF-ECC 可大幅降低 MLC 操作的误码率 (BER)，与之前仅使用 SLC 的 IFP 设计相比，使用 MLC 可使位密度增加 1.8 倍。当用于加速基本数据库查询时，与最先进的 (SOTA) IFP 架构相比，CrossBit 实现了 2.1 倍和 2.5 倍的显着平均加速和能效改进。我们通过处理来自广泛使用的星型模式基准的全套端到端数据库查询来进一步证明实用性，其中 CrossBit 实现了 1.7 倍的加速。

papers.title: CryptoBTB: A Secure Hierarchical BTB for Diverse Instruction Footprint Workloads.
papers.abstract:
Timing attacks leveraging shared resources on a CPU are a growing concern. Branch Target Buffer (BTB), a crucial component of high-performance processors, is shared among threads and privileged spaces. Recently, researchers discovered numerous vulnerabilities in the BTB, allowing an adversary to maliciously infer a victim’s BTB update and mistrain the BTB. Such attacks can successfully bypass privilege-level and secure enclave protection, as well as address space isolation. Randomizing BTB through encrypted addressing to prevent these attacks suffers from high performance overhead due to exposed encryption latency in the pipeline. Prior works address this by using encryption schemes that are either not fully secure or require frequent flush. The most recent proposal, HyBP [ 79 ], uses stronger encryption schemes. However, it suffers from high overhead since it underutilizes the BTB and suffers from higher collisions within the same thread.

In this work, we propose CryptoBTB, a secure BTB, specifically designed for an exclusive BTB hierarchy. Our proposal decouples the index encryption from the index itself, enabling low-latency index encryption to obscure BTB set mapping. Additionally, unlike earlier secure BTB proposals, this scheme is well-suited for applications with a higher instruction footprint where performance is sensitive to the BTB capacity. We evaluated CryptoBTB on various classes of workloads that stress the BTB differently. Our results show that CryptoBTB incurs 4.27% performance overhead for these workloads, while HyBP experiences 31.89% overhead. Moreover, CryptoBTB requires 22.57% lower hardware overhead than HyBP.
papers.abstract_zh:
利用 CPU 上的共享资源的定时攻击越来越受到关注。分支目标缓冲区 (BTB) 是高性能处理器的关键组件，在线程和特权空间之间共享。最近，研究人员发现 BTB 中存在大量漏洞，使攻击者能够恶意推断受害者的 BTB 更新并误导 BTB。此类攻击可以成功绕过特权级别和安全飞地保护以及地址空间隔离。通过加密寻址随机化 BTB 来防止这些攻击，会因管道中暴露的加密延迟而遭受高性能开销。先前的工作通过使用不完全安全或需要频繁刷新的加密方案来解决这个问题。最新的提案 HyBP [79] 使用更强的加密方案。然而，它的开销较高，因为它未充分利用 BTB，并且同一线程内的冲突较多。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 CryptoBTB，一种安全的 BTB，专门为专有的 BTB 层次结构而设计。我们的建议将索引加密与索引本身解耦，从而实现低延迟索引加密来模糊 BTB 集映射。此外，与早期的安全 BTB 提议不同，该方案非常适合具有较高指令占用空间的应用，其中性能对 BTB 容量敏感。我们在不同类别的工作负载上评估了 CryptoBTB，这些工作负载对 BTB 的压力不同。我们的结果显示，CryptoBTB 在这些工作负载上产生了 4.27% 的性能开销，而 HyBP 则产生了 31.89% 的开销。此外，CryptoBTB 所需的硬件开销比 HyBP 低 22.57%。

papers.title: DEAR: Improving Performance and Lifetime of SSDs Using Dynamic Error-Aware Refresh.
papers.abstract: Although NAND flash memory has achieved significant capacity improvements through advanced 3D stacking and multi-level cell technologies, these advances have intensified the read-disturb problem. Modern SSDs require efficient solutions to minimize the overhead of managing read-disturb errors. In this paper, we propose DEAR (Dynamic Error-Aware Refresh), a novel approach that dynamically monitors flash memory error status at runtime. Unlike conventional methods that trigger read refresh (RR) procedures based on fixed read-count thresholds per block, DEAR selectively invokes RR at the WL granularity, based on actual error conditions. DEAR leverages an accurate and efficient runtime error estimator (SEE), significantly reducing unnecessary RR invocations. System-level evaluations with ten real-world workloads show that DEAR reduces RR invocations by 64.2% on average compared to existing methods, with negligible overhead. Furthermore, DEAR reduces the 99.9th percentile read latency by 44.9% and extends SSD lifetime by 36.7% compared to state-of-the-art techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管NAND闪存通过先进的3D堆叠和多级单元技术实现了显着的容量提升，但这些进步加剧了读取干扰问题。现代 SSD 需要高效的解决方案来最大限度地减少管理读取干扰错误的开销。在本文中，我们提出了 DEAR（动态错误感知刷新），这是一种在运行时动态监控闪存错误状态的新颖方法。与基于每个块的固定读取计数阈值触发读取刷新 (RR) 过程的传统方法不同，DEAR 根据实际错误情况有选择地在 WL 粒度上调用 RR。 DEAR 利用准确高效的运行时错误估计器 (SEE)，显着减少不必要的 RR 调用。对 10 个实际工作负载进行的系统级评估表明，与现有方法相比，DEAR 平均将 RR 调用减少了 64.2%，且开销可以忽略不计。此外，与最先进的技术相比，DEAR 将第 99.9% 的读取延迟降低了 44.9%，并将 SSD 使用寿命延长了 36.7%。

papers.title: DECA: A Near-Core LLM Decompression Accelerator Grounded on a 3D Roofline Model.
papers.abstract:
To alleviate the memory bandwidth bottleneck in Large Language Model (LLM) inference workloads, weight matrices are stored in memory in quantized and sparsified formats. Hence, before tiles of these matrices can be processed by in-core generalized matrix multiplication (GeMM) hardware engines, they need to be dequantized and de-sparsified. This is currently performed in software with vector operations. Unfortunately, this approach delivers only modest performance. Moreover, it is hard to understand how to improve the system, as the overall GeMM performance depends on the interaction between memory resources, vector units, and hardware matrix engines.

This paper addresses the problem of improving the performance of these environments. For this, it first develops the novel Roof-Surface performance model, a 3D model that provides clear insights into how memory resources, vector units, and hardware matrix engines interact to deliver compressed GeMM performance. Then, it proposes DECA , a new near-core ML-model decompression accelerator. DECA offloads tile de-sparsification and dequantization from the CPU, producing ready-to-use tiles for in-core GeMM engines. Finally, it introduces a new ISA extension that enables out-of-order invocation of the near-core accelerator. With this extension, accelerator and core computations can interleave and overlap with high performance. Our evaluation shows that, in a simulated 56-core Xeon 4 server with HBM, DECA accelerates the execution of compressed GeMMs by up to 4x over the use of optimized Intel software kernels. Further, DECA reduces the next-token generation time of Llama2-70B and OPT-66B by 1.6 × —1.9 ×.
papers.abstract_zh:
为了缓解大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理工作负载中的内存带宽瓶颈，权重矩阵以量化和稀疏格式存储在内存中。因此，在这些矩阵的瓦片可以由核心广义矩阵乘法（GeMM）硬件引擎处理之前，需要对它们进行反量化和反稀疏化。目前，这是在具有向量运算的软件中执行的。不幸的是，这种方法只能提供适度的性能。此外，很难理解如何改进系统，因为 GeMM 的整体性能取决于内存资源、向量单元和硬件矩阵引擎之间的交互。

本文解决了提高这些环境性能的问题。为此，它首先开发了新颖的 Roof-Surface 性能模型，这是一种 3D 模型，可以清晰地了解内存资源、向量单元和硬件矩阵引擎如何交互以提供压缩的 GeMM 性能。然后，它提出了 DECA，一种新的近核心 ML 模型解压加速器。 DECA 从 CPU 卸载分片去稀疏和反量化，为核心 GeMM 引擎生成即用型分片。最后，它引入了一个新的 ISA 扩展，可以实现近核心加速器的无序调用。通过此扩展，加速器和核心计算可以交错和重叠，从而实现高性能。我们的评估表明，在具有 HBM 的模拟 56 核 Xeon 4 服务器中，与使用优化的英特尔软件内核相比，DECA 将压缩 GeMM 的执行速度提高了 4 倍。此外，DECA 将 Llama2-70B 和 OPT-66B 的下一个令牌生成时间减少了 1.6 × —1.9 ×。

papers.title: DExiM: Exposing Impedance-Based Data Leakage in Emerging Memories.
papers.abstract: Emerging non-volatile memory (NVM) technologies, such as resistive RAM (ReRAM), ferroelectric RAM (FRAM), and magnetoresistive RAM (MRAM), are gaining traction due to their scalability, energy efficiency, and resilience to traditional charge-based attacks. Unlike conventional memories that store data as electrical charge, these NVMs encode information through distinct impedance states. While this fundamental shift in data storage has led to the assumption that such memories are inherently more secure, we demonstrate that impedance itself can serve as a side-channel leakage source. In this work, we introduce and validate a novel impedance-based side-channel attack that exploits the correlation between stored data and NVM cell impedance, enabling non-invasive data extraction via power distribution network measurements. Using template construction and scattering parameter analysis, we evaluate a range of commercial ReRAM, FRAM, and MRAM devices. Our results reveal statistically significant impedance variations tied to both inter- and intra-Hamming weight differences, confirming that data-dependent impedance leakage is a real and exploitable phenomenon. These findings expose a new class of hardware vulnerabilities in emerging memory systems and highlight the need for dedicated countermeasures against impedance side channels.
papers.abstract_zh: 电阻式 RAM (ReRAM)、铁电 RAM (FRAM) 和磁阻 RAM (MRAM) 等新兴非易失性存储器 (NVM) 技术因其可扩展性、能源效率和对传统电荷攻击的恢复能力而受到关注。与以电荷形式存储数据的传统存储器不同，这些 NVM 通过不同的阻抗状态对信息进行编码。虽然数据存储的这一根本性转变导致人们假设此类存储器本质上更安全，但我们证明阻抗本身可以充当侧通道泄漏源。在这项工作中，我们介绍并验证了一种新颖的基于阻抗的旁道攻击，该攻击利用存储数据和 NVM 单元阻抗之间的相关性，从而通过配电网络测量实现非侵入式数据提取。使用模板构建和散射参数分析，我们评估了一系列商用 ReRAM、FRAM 和 MRAM 器件。我们的结果揭示了与汉明间和汉明内权重差异相关的统计上显着的阻抗变化，证实了数据相关的阻抗泄漏是一种真实且可利用的现象。这些发现暴露了新兴存储系统中的一类新的硬件漏洞，并强调需要针对阻抗侧通道采取专门的对策。

papers.title: DiffTest-H: Toward Semantic-Aware Communication in Hardware-Accelerated Processor Verification.
papers.abstract:
Verification has become the most time-consuming phase in chip development. Co-simulation frameworks simulate the design under test (DUT) with a golden reference model (REF) and compare their instruction-level results for verification, causing over 98% communication overhead: although hardware-accelerated platforms, such as FPGA and emulators, speed up DUT simulation by 300 × –10000 ×, overall co-simulation speedup is still limited to 2.5 × –20 ×.

In this paper, we propose DiffTest-H , a semantic-aware, hardware-accelerated co-simulation framework with three techniques reducing communication overhead while preserving debuggability: (1) Batch minimizes communication frequency by tightly packing structurally diverse verification events into a single transfer. (2) Squash reduces data transmission volume by fusing verification events with a decoupled checking order. (3) Replay preserves instruction-level debuggability by reprocessing the original, unfused verification events around the failure point.

DiffTest-H is deployed on both Palladium emulator and FPGA to verify a 6-wide, out-of-order RISC-V processor, XiangShan. It achieves simulation speeds of 478KHz and 7.8MHz respectively, with an 80 × and 78 × speedup over the baseline, 119 × and 1945 × faster than 16-thread Verilator, and uncovers 151 bugs in XiangShan.
papers.abstract_zh:
验证已成为芯片开发中最耗时的阶段。协同仿真框架使用黄金参考模型 (REF) 来模拟被测设计 (DUT)，并比较其指令级结果进行验证，从而导致超过 98% 的通信开销：尽管 FPGA 和仿真器等硬件加速平台将 DUT 仿真速度提高了 300 × –10000 ×，但整体协同仿真加速仍然限于 2.5 × –20 ×。

在本文中，我们提出了 DiffTest-H，一种语义感知、硬件加速的联合仿真框架，采用三种技术减少通信开销，同时保留可调试性：(1) Batch 通过将结构多样的验证事件紧密打包到单个传输中来最小化通信频率。 (2) Squash通过将验证事件与解耦的检查顺序融合来减少数据传输量。 (3) 重放通过重新处理故障点周围原始的、未融合的验证事件来保留指令级可调试性。

DiffTest-H 部署在 Palladium 仿真器和 FPGA 上，以验证 6 宽乱序 RISC-V 处理器香山。它的仿真速度分别达到 478KHz 和 7.8MHz，比基线加速 80 倍和 78 倍，比 16 线程 Verilator 快 119 倍和 1945 倍，并发现了香山中的 151 个错误。

papers.title: Dissecting and Modeling the Architecture of Modern GPU Cores.
papers.abstract:
GPUs are the most popular platform for accelerating HPC workloads, such as artificial intelligence and science simulations. However, most microarchitectural research in academia relies on simulators that model GPU core architectures based on designs that are more than 15 years old, and differ significantly from modern core architectures.

This work reverse engineers the architecture of modern NVIDIA GPU cores, unveiling key aspects of its design and the important role of the compiler in some of its main components. In particular, it reveals how the issue logic works, the structure of the register file and its associated cache, multiple features of the instruction and data memory pipelines.

When modeling all these discovered microarchitectural details in a state-of-the-art simulation framework, we show that its accuracy is significantly improved, achieving a \(20.58\%\) reduction in mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) on average, which results in a \(13.45\%\) MAPE on average with respect to real modern hardware.

In addition, we show that the software-based dependence management mechanism included in modern NVIDIA GPUs outperforms a hardware mechanism based on scoreboards in terms of performance and area.
papers.abstract_zh:
GPU 是加速 HPC 工作负载（例如人工智能和科学模拟）最流行的平台。然而，学术界的大多数微架构研究都依赖于模拟器，这些模拟器根据超过 15 年的设计对 GPU 核心架构进行建模，并且与现代核心架构有很大不同。

这项工作对现代 NVIDIA GPU 核心的架构进行了逆向工程，揭示了其设计的关键方面以及编译器在其一些主要组件中的重要作用。特别是，它揭示了发出逻辑的工作原理、寄存器文件及其关联缓存的结构、指令和数据存储器管道的多个功能。

当在最先进的仿真框架中对所有这些发现的微架构细节进行建模时，我们表明其准确性显着提高，平均绝对百分比误差 (MAPE) 平均降低了 \(20.58\%\)，这导致相对于真实的现代硬件平均 MAPE 为 \(13.45\%\)。

此外，我们还表明，现代 NVIDIA GPU 中包含的基于软件的依赖性管理机制在性能和面积方面优于基于记分板的硬件机制。

papers.title: Distributed-HISQ: A Distributed Quantum Control Architecture.
papers.abstract:
The design of a scalable Quantum Control Architecture (QCA) faces two primary challenges. First, the continuous growth in qubit counts has rendered distributed QCA inevitable, yet the non-deterministic latencies inherent in feedback loops demand cycle-accurate synchronization across multiple controllers. Existing synchronization strategies — whether lock-step or demand-driven — introduce significant performance penalties. Second, existing quantum instruction set architectures are polarized, being either too abstract or too granular. This lack of a unifying design necessitates recurrent hardware customization for each new control requirement, which limits the system’s reconfigurability and impedes the path toward a scalable and unified digital microarchitecture.

Addressing these challenges, we propose Distributed-HISQ , featuring: (i) HISQ, A universal instruction set that redefines quantum control with a hardware-agnostic design. By decoupling from quantum operation semantics, HISQ provides a unified language for control sequences, enabling a single microarchitecture to support various control methods and enhancing system reconfigurability. (ii) BISP , a booking-based synchronization protocol that can potentially achieve zero-cycle synchronization overhead. The feasibility and adaptability of Distributed-HISQ are validated through its implementation on a commercial quantum control system targeting superconducting qubits. We performed a comprehensive evaluation using a customized quantum software stack. Our results show that BISP effectively synchronizes multiple control boards, leading to a 22.8% reduction in average program execution time and a ∼ 5 × reduction in infidelity when compared to an existing lock-step synchronization scheme.
papers.abstract_zh:
可扩展的量子控制架构 (QCA) 的设计面临两个主要挑战。首先，量子比特数量的持续增长使得分布式 QCA 不可避免，但反馈循环中固有的非确定性延迟要求跨多个控制器实现周期精确的同步。现有的同步策略（无论是锁步还是需求驱动）都会带来严重的性能损失。其次，现有的量子指令集架构是两极分化的，要么过于抽象，要么过于细化。由于缺乏统一的设计，需要针对每个新的控制要求进行经常性的硬件定制，这限制了系统的可重新配置性，并阻碍了通往可扩展和统一数字微架构的道路。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了分布式 HISQ，其特点是：（i）HISQ，一种通用指令集，通过与硬件无关的设计重新定义了量子控制。通过与量子操作语义解耦，HISQ提供了统一的控制序列语言，使单一微架构能够支持多种控制方法，增强系统的可重构性。 (ii) BISP，一种基于预订的同步协议，有可能实现零周期同步开销。 Distributed-HISQ 的可行性和适应性通过其在针对超导量子位的商业量子控制系统上的实现得到了验证。我们使用定制的量子软件堆栈进行了全面评估。我们的结果表明，与现有的锁步同步方案相比，BISP 有效地同步了多个控制板，平均程序执行时间减少了 22.8%，不保真度减少了约 5 倍。

papers.title: DRAM Fault Classification through Large-Scale Field Monitoring for Robust Memory RAS Management.
papers.abstract: As DRAM technology scales down, maintaining prior levels of reliability becomes increasingly challenging due to heightened susceptibility to faults. This growing concern underscores the need for effective in-field fault monitoring and management. Addressing this challenge, this work first introduces a refined DRAM fault classification, derived from the correlation between DRAM addresses and their underlying architectural hierarchies of faulty DRAMs. Building on this classification, we propose a comprehensive memory fault management strategy adequate to each DRAM fault. We further formalize and implement a structured remediation framework, enabling fault-specific mitigation. Utilizing this methodology, we conduct a large-scale field study on DDR4 x4 and DDR5 10x4 RDIMMs, uncovering that over 98% of DDR4 x4 RDIMM faults are tightly coupled with intra-bank architectural characteristics. In particular, we identify that early detection and localized management of faults within 2×2 MATs 1 —encompassing the vast majority of clustered row faults—are crucial to achieving resilient memory subsystems. We also observe intrinsic correlations among faulty Row Addresses (RAs), indicating unavoidable structural address patterns in most DRAMs. Additionally, our method demonstrates strong diagnostic accuracy in detecting unbounded faults 2 even in DDR5 10x4 RDIMMs equipped with in-DRAM ECC. The insights gained from this study not only enhance DRAM fault diagnosis and mitigation but also inform the development of RAS features for future memory systems with limited error correction capabilities.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着 DRAM 技术规模不断缩小，由于故障的敏感性增加，保持先前的可靠性水平变得越来越具有挑战性。这种日益增长的担忧强调了有效的现场故障监控和管理的必要性。为了应对这一挑战，这项工作首先引入了一种精细的 DRAM 故障分类，该分类源自 DRAM 地址与其故障 DRAM 的底层架构层次结构之间的相关性。在此分类的基础上，我们提出了适合每种 DRAM 故障的全面内存故障管理策略。我们进一步规范并实施结构化修复框架，实现针对特定故障的缓解。利用这种方法，我们对 DDR4 x4 和 DDR5 10x4 RDIMM 进行了大规模的现场研究，发现超过 98% 的 DDR4 x4 RDIMM 故障与银行内架构特征紧密相关。特别是，我们发现 2×2 MAT 1 内的故障（包括绝大多数集群行故障）的早期检测和本地化管理对于实现弹性内存子系统至关重要。我们还观察到错误行地址 (RA) 之间的内在相关性，表明大多数 DRAM 中不可避免的结构地址模式。此外，我们的方法在检测无限故障 2 方面表现出强大的诊断准确性，即使是在配备 DRAM ECC 的 DDR5 10x4 RDIMM 中也是如此。从这项研究中获得的见解不仅增强了 DRAM 故障诊断和缓解，还为纠错能力有限的未来内存系统的 RAS 功能的开发提供了信息。

papers.title: Drishti: Do Not Forget Slicing While Designing Last-Level Cache Replacement Policies for Many-Core Systems.
papers.abstract:
High-performance Last-level Cache (LLC) replacement policies mitigate off-chip memory access latency by intelligently determining which cache lines to retain in the LLC. State-of-the-art replacement policies significantly outperform policies like LRU. However, the effectiveness of these policies is not evaluated on many-core systems with sliced LLCs, which is common in commercial many-core systems. Recent state-of-the-art LLC replacement policies use two seminal ideas: (i) a sampled cache and (ii) a reuse predictor. In a monolithic LLC, there is a single sampled cache and a single reuse predictor. However, these structures must be created per slice with the sliced LLC.
