We study the interaction between sliced LLC and state-of-the-art replacement policies, identifying a few unexplored interactions. A per-slice reuse predictor makes myopic decisions based on the accesses made to a particular slice, unaware of the global reuse behavior. A trivial solution to this problem is to design a centralized reuse predictor shared by all the LLC slices. However, this will significantly increase interconnect traffic, requiring more bandwidth to access the centralized reuse predictor. Next, we observe that with a sliced LLC, the LLC sets used for the sampled cache do not receive sufficient LLC misses. As these LLC sets drive the decisions of LLC replacement policies, some of the decisions become suboptimal.

We propose Drishti, which is designed to improve the effectiveness of LLC replacement policies further. We make a case for two enhancements: (i) a per-core and yet global reuse predictor with a local (per-slice) sampled cache, and argue that there is no need for a global sampled cache, and (ii) a per-slice dynamic sampled cache to improve the utility of LLC sets used for the sampled cache. We evaluate two state-of-the-art LLC replacement policies, Hawkeye and Mockingjay, on four, 16, and 32-core systems with eight, 32, and 64MB sliced LLC. On a 32-core system, Drishti enhances the effectiveness of two state-of-the-art replacement policies, Hawkeye and Mockingjay, by improving performance by 5.6% and 13.2%, respectively, compared to the baseline LRU policy. Without Drishti, Hawkeye and Mockingjay improve performance by 3.3% and 6.7%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
高性能末级缓存 (LLC) 替换策略通过智能确定在 LLC 中保留哪些缓存行来减少片外内存访问延迟。最先进的替换策略明显优于 LRU 等策略。然而，这些策略的有效性并未在具有切片 LLC 的多核系统上进行评估，这在商业多核系统中很常见。最近最先进的 LLC 替换策略使用两个开创性的想法：(i) 采样缓存和 (ii) 重用预测器。在单片 LLC 中，有一个采样缓存和一个重用预测器。但是，这些结构必须使用切片 LLC 为每个切片创建。我们研究了切片有限责任公司和最先进的替代政策之间的相互作用，确定了一些未经探索的相互作用。每片重用预测器根据对特定片的访问做出短视决策，不知道全局重用行为。该问题的一个简单解决方案是设计一个由所有 LLC 切片共享的集中式重用预测器。然而，这将显着增加互连流量，需要更多带宽来访问集中式重用预测器。接下来，我们观察到，对于切片 LLC，用于采样缓存的 LLC 集没有收到足够的 LLC 未命中。由于这些 LLC 集驱动 LLC 替代政策的决策，因此某些决策变得次优。

我们提出 Drishti，旨在进一步提高 LLC 替代政策的有效性。我们提出了两个增强功能的案例：（i）具有本地（每片）采样缓存的每核全局重用预测器，并认为不需要全局采样缓存，以及（ii）每片动态采样缓存以提高用于采样缓存的 LLC 集的实用性。我们在具有 8、32 和 64MB 切片 LLC 的 4、16 和 32 核系统上评估了两种最先进的 LLC 替换策略 Hawkeye 和 Mockingjay。在 32 核系统上，Drishti 提高了两种最先进的替换策略 Hawkeye 和 Mockingjay 的有效性，与基准 LRU 策略相比，性能分别提高了 5.6% 和 13.2%。如果没有 Drishti，Hawkeye 和 Mockingjay 的性能分别提高了 3.3% 和 6.7%。

papers.title: DS-TIDE: Harnessing Dynamical Systems for Efficient Time-Independent Differential Equation Solving.
papers.abstract:
Time-Independent Differential Equations (TIDEs) are central to modeling equilibrium behavior across a wide range of scientific and engineering domains. Conventional numerical solvers offer reliable solutions but incur significant computational costs due to fine-grained discretization and iterative procedures. Machine learning–based approaches address this by replacing iterative solving with one-time inference; however, they inevitably sacrifice accuracy and incur even higher costs once the training of sophisticated models is taken into account. Consequently, designing a TIDE solver that achieves high accuracy, broad applicability, and exceptional computational efficiency remains a fundamental challenge.

In this paper, we propose DS-TIDE, a novel hardware solver that is inspired by, and subsequently leverages, the intrinsic connection between Dynamical Systems (DS) and Differential Equations (DE) to efficiently and accurately solve TIDEs. DS-TIDE employs a CMOS-compatible DS-based processor, whose physical states evolve under carefully designed DE-driven dynamics and naturally converge to equilibria – the solutions of the target TIDE within ∼ 1 μs . To enhance expressivity, DS-TIDE incorporates Heterogeneous Dynamics with Temporal Layering (HDTL), which solves TIDEs through a three-stage DS evolution – conditioning, solving, and decoding – each governed by specialized dynamics. The entire evolution process is analogous to an infinitely deep neural network temporally unrolled, offering the system the capability of representing complex equations. Furthermore, DS-TIDE is equipped with an on-device DS-DE alignment mechanism that dynamically adapts intrinsic hardware dynamics within milliseconds, effectively aligning the system’s dynamics to diverse target DEs. Experimental results across TIDEs from a wide range of scientific and engineering domains demonstrate that DS-TIDE achieves ∼ 10 3 × efficiency improvement while delivering competitive or superior accuracy compared to state-of-the-art numerical and ML-based solvers.
papers.abstract_zh:
与时间无关的微分方程 (TIDE) 是对广泛的科学和工程领域的平衡行为进行建模的核心。传统的数值求解器提供可靠的解决方案，但由于细粒度的离散化和迭代过程，会产生大量的计算成本。基于机器学习的方法通过用一次性推理代替迭代求解来解决这一问题；然而，一旦考虑到复杂模型的训练，它们不可避免地会牺牲准确性并产生更高的成本。因此，设计一个具有高精度、广泛适用性和卓越计算效率的 TIDE 求解器仍然是一个基本挑战。

在本文中，我们提出了 DS-TIDE，这是一种新型硬件求解器，其灵感来自于动力系统 (DS) 和微分方程 (DE) 之间的内在联系，并随后利用它们来高效、准确地求解 TIDE。 DS-TIDE 采用与 CMOS 兼容的基于 DS 的处理器，其物理状态在精心设计的 DE 驱动动力学下演化，并自然收敛到平衡点，即目标 TIDE 在 ∼ 1 μs 内的解。为了增强表现力，DS-TIDE 将异构动力学与时间分层 (HDTL) 相结合，通过三阶段 DS 演化（调节、求解和解码）来解决 TIDE，每个阶段都由专门的动力学控制。整个演化过程类似于临时展开的无限深度神经网络，为系统提供了表示复杂方程的能力。此外，DS-TIDE配备了设备上的DS-DE对齐机制，可以在几毫秒内动态调整固有的硬件动态，有效地将系统的动态与不同的目标DE对齐。来自广泛科学和工程领域的 TIDE 实验结果表明，与最先进的数值和基于 ML 的求解器相比，DS-TIDE 实现了约 10 3 × 的效率提升，同时提供具有竞争力或卓越的精度。

papers.title: EcoCore: Dynamic Core Management for Improving Energy Efficiency in Latency-Critical Applications.
papers.abstract: Modern data centers face increasing pressure to improve energy efficiency while guaranteeing Service Level Objectives (SLOs) for Latency-Critical (LC) applications. Resource management in public cloud environments, typically operating at the node or instance level, often results in underutilized idle cores and unnecessary energy consumption, highlighting the need for fine-grained core-level management. Existing studies on core management primarily focus on allocating cores for application threads, aiming to maximize idle cores without violating SLOs, but often neglect the impact of network packet processing on core idleness and energy consumption. In this work, we demonstrate that separate core allocation for network packet processing is essential to optimize both performance and energy efficiency in LC applications. Additionally, we show that co-managing packet processing intervals alongside core allocation further enhances core idleness and reduces energy consumption without compromising SLO compliance. Based on these insights, we propose EcoCore , a dynamic core management technique that jointly manages core allocation for application threads and network packet processing while adaptively adjusting packet processing intervals. EcoCore employs a lightweight predictive model to estimate energy consumption and tail latency, enabling it to select energy-efficient configurations without violating SLOs. Through comprehensive evaluations, including deployment on the AWS cloud platform, EcoCore demonstrates its practicality, reducing energy consumption by 11.7 \(\%\) on average and by up to 20.3 \(\%\) without SLO violations. In the AWS cloud environment, EcoCore extends core sleep states by up to 45.9 \(\%\) , resulting in additional energy savings of up to 35.8 \(\%\) . These results highlight EcoCore ’s potential for bridging the gap between coarse-grained resource management and fine-grained core management in data centers.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代数据中心面临着越来越大的压力，需要提高能源效率，同时保证延迟关键 (LC) 应用程序的服务级别目标 (SLO)。公有云环境中的资源管理通常在节点或实例级别运行，通常会导致闲置核心未充分利用和不必要的能源消耗，这凸显了细粒度核心级管理的必要性。现有的核心管理研究主要集中在为应用程序线程分配核心，旨在在不违反SLO的情况下最大化空闲核心，但往往忽视网络数据包处理对核心空闲和能耗的影响。在这项工作中，我们证明了网络数据包处理的单独核心分配对于优化 LC 应用的性能和能源效率至关重要。此外，我们还表明，在核心分配的同时共同管理数据包处理间隔可以进一步增强核心闲置率并降低能耗，而不会影响 SLO 合规性。基于这些见解，我们提出了 EcoCore，这是一种动态核心管理技术，可以联合管理应用程序线程和网络数据包处理的核心分配，同时自适应调整数据包处理间隔。 EcoCore 采用轻量级预测模型来估计能耗和尾部延迟，使其能够在不违反 SLO 的情况下选择节能配置。通过综合评估，包括在 AWS 云平台上的部署，EcoCore 展示了其实用性，在不违反 SLO 的情况下，平均降低能耗 11.7 \(\%\)，最高可达 20.3 \(\%\)。在 AWS 云环境中，EcoCore 将核心睡眠状态延长高达 45.9 \(\%\) ，从而额外节省高达 35.8 \(\%\) 的能源。这些结果凸显了 EcoCore 在缩小数据中心粗粒度资源管理和细粒度核心管理之间差距方面的潜力。

papers.title: Efficient Security Support for CXL Memory through Adaptive Incremental Offloaded (Re-)Encryption.
papers.abstract:
Current DRAM technologies face critical scaling limitations, significantly impacting the expansion of memory bandwidth and capacity required by modern data-intensive applications. Compute eXpress Link (CXL) emerges as a promising technology to address these limitations, enabling efficient cache-coherent memory expansion through direct connections between processors and CXL memory devices. Despite its potential, broad adoption of CXL memory in public cloud computing introduces substantial security challenges. Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs), such as Intel SGX/TDX and AMD SEV, provide robust protection for data integrity and confidentiality in cloud environments, complemented by CXL Integrity and Data Encryption (CXL IDE), which employs XTS encryption and Galois/Counter Mode (GCM) for secure message transmission.

However, this approach incurs significant performance overhead due to the latency of XTS encryption on memory-intensive workloads. To mitigate this, we propose Adaptive Incremental Offloaded (Re-)Encryption (AIORE), an adaptive security framework combining Counter (CTR) and XTS encryption. AIORE dynamically selects encryption schemes based on page access frequency, implements incremental and offloaded re-encryption strategies, and leverages memory node computation to reduce overheads. Evaluation with Gem5 across diverse benchmarks reveals that AIORE significantly reduces security overhead by 62.8% on average and maintains overhead within 3.7% relative to an insecure baseline.
papers.abstract_zh:
当前的 DRAM 技术面临着严重的扩展限制，严重影响了现代数据密集型应用所需的内存带宽和容量的扩展。 Compute eXpress Link (CXL) 作为解决这些限制的一项有前途的技术而出现，通过处理器和 CXL 内存设备之间的直接连接实现高效的缓存一致性内存扩展。尽管 CXL 内存具有潜力，但它在公共云计算中的广泛采用带来了巨大的安全挑战。可信执行环境 (TEE)，例如 Intel SGX/TDX 和 AMD SEV，为云环境中的数据完整性和机密性提供强大的保护，并辅以 CXL 完整性和数据加密 (CXL IDE)，后者采用 XTS 加密和 Galois/Counter 模式 (GCM) 来实现安全消息传输。

然而，由于 XTS 加密在内存密集型工作负载上存在延迟，这种方法会产生显着的性能开销。为了缓解这一问题，我们提出了自适应增量卸载（重新）加密（AIORE），这是一种结合了计数器（CTR）和 XTS 加密的自适应安全框架。 AIORE根据页面访问频率动态选择加密方案，实现增量和卸载重加密策略，并利用内存节点计算来减少开销。对 Gem5 跨不同基准的评估表明，与不安全的基准相比，AIORE 平均显着降低了 62.8% 的安全开销，并将开销保持在 3.7% 以内。

papers.title: Elevating Temporal Prefetching Through Instruction Correlation.
papers.abstract:
Temporal prefetchers can learn from irregular memory accesses and hide access latencies. As the on-chip storage technology for temporal prefetchers’ metadata advances, enabling the development of viable commercial prefetchers, it becomes evident that the precious on-chip storage resources highlight a significant deficiency in the existing temporal prefetchers’ utilization of metadata.

This paper introduces Kairos, which actively prefetches address with repetitive characteristics by detecting critical memory access instructions and tracking the prefetch coverage of corresponding metadata. Kairos operates on two principles: Temporal prefetchers are designed based on a program’s repetitive memory access behaviors, (1) allowing for the filtering out of instructions with low access probability to eliminate interference from corresponding temporal metadata; (2) retaining metadata with high prefetch potential while discarding low-utility entries.

Kairos achieves a 25.2% overall speedup compared to a baseline system with an IP-stride prefetcher, and outperforms state-of-the-art Triangel by 10.1%, while reducing storage overhead by two orders of magnitude, demonstrating substantially higher performance at significantly lower cost.
papers.abstract_zh:
临时预取器可以从不规则的内存访问中学习并隐藏访问延迟。随着时间预取器元数据片上存储技术的进步，使得可行的商业预取器的开发成为可能，很明显，宝贵的片上存储资源凸显了现有时间预取器在元数据利用方面的重大缺陷。

本文介绍了Kairos，它通过检测关键内存访问指令并跟踪相应元数据的预取覆盖率来主动预取具有重复特征的地址。 Kairos 的运行原理有两个： 时间预取器是根据程序重复的内存访问行为设计的，(1) 允许过滤掉访问概率较低的指令，以消除相应时间元数据的干扰； (2) 保留具有高预取潜力的元数据，同时丢弃低效用条目。

与具有 IP-stride 预取器的基准系统相比，Kairos 的整体加速速度提高了 25.2%，性能比最先进的 Triangel 提高了 10.1%，同时将存储开销降低了两个数量级，以更低的成本展示了更高的性能。

papers.title: Elk: Exploring the Efficiency of Inter-core Connected AI Chips with Deep Learning Compiler Techniques.
papers.abstract:
To meet the increasing demand of deep learning (DL) models, AI chips are employing both off-chip memory (e.g., HBM) and high-bandwidth low-latency interconnect for direct inter-core data exchange. However, it is not easy to explore the efficiency of these i nter- c ore c onnected A I (ICCA) chips, due to a fundamental tussle among compute (per-core execution), communication (inter-core data exchange), and I/O (off-chip data access).

In this paper, we develop Elk , a DL compiler framework to maximize the efficiency of ICCA chips by jointly trading off all the three performance factors discussed above. Elk structures these performance factors into configurable parameters and forms a global trade-off space in the DL compiler. To systematically explore this space and maximize overall efficiency, Elk employs a new inductive operator scheduling policy and a cost-aware on-chip memory allocation algorithm. It generates globally optimized execution plans that best overlap off-chip data loading and on-chip execution. To examine the efficiency of Elk , we build a full-fledged emulator based on a real ICCA chip IPU-POD4, and an ICCA chip simulator for sensitivity analysis with different interconnect network topologies. Elk achieves 94% of the ideal roofline performance of ICCA chips on average, showing the benefits of supporting large DL models on ICCA chips. We also show Elk ’s capability of enabling architecture design space exploration for new ICCA chip development.
papers.abstract_zh:
为了满足深度学习（DL）模型日益增长的需求，AI芯片正在采用片外存储器（例如HBM）和高带宽低延迟互连来实现核心间的直接数据交换。然而，由于计算（每核执行）、通信（核间数据交换）和 I/O（片外数据访问）之间存在根本性的冲突，探索这些核间连接的 AI (ICCA) 芯片的效率并不容易。

在本文中，我们开发了 Elk，一个 DL 编译器框架，通过共同权衡上述所有三个性能因素来最大限度地提高 ICCA 芯片的效率。 Elk 将这些性能因素构建为可配置参数，并在 DL 编译器中形成全局权衡空间。为了系统地探索这个空间并最大限度地提高整体效率，Elk 采用了新的归纳算子调度策略和成本感知的片上内存分配算法。它生成全局优化的执行计划，最好地重叠片外数据加载和片内执行。为了检查 Elk 的效率，我们构建了一个基于真实 ICCA 芯片 IPU-POD4 的成熟仿真器，以及一个用于不同互连网络拓扑的灵敏度分析的 ICCA 芯片模拟器。 Elk 平均实现了 ICCA 芯片理想屋顶线性能的 94%，展示了 ICCA 芯片上支持大型 DL 模型的好处。我们还展示了 Elk 为新 ICCA 芯片开发启用架构设计空间探索的能力。

papers.title: Empowering Vector Architectures for ML: The CAMP Architecture for Matrix Multiplication.
papers.abstract:
This study presents the Cartesian Accumulative Matrix Pipeline (CAMP) architecture, a novel approach designed to enhance matrix multiplication in Vector Architectures (VAs) and Single Instruction, Multiple Data (SIMD) units. CAMP improves processing efficiency of Quantized Neural Networks (QNNs).

Matrix multiplication is a cornerstone of machine learning applications, and its quantized versions are increasingly popular for more efficient operations. Unfortunately, existing VAs and SIMD-support units struggle to efficiently handle these quantized formats. In this work, we propose CAMP, a simple yet effective architecture that leverages a hybrid multiplier. The CAMP architecture significantly advances the performance of vector architectures in handling quantized data, enabling more efficient execution of matrix multiplication across various platforms, specifically targeting the ARMv8 Scalable Vector Extension (SVE) and edge RISC-V with SIMD-support unit architecture. Thanks to its hierarchical design, CAMP natively supports multiple integer precisions; here we focus on 4-bit and 8-bit, while the unit remains applicable as a general-purpose integer multiplier across other bit widths. In addition to increasing throughput, CAMP’s architectural design also contributes to energy efficiency, making it an effective solution for low-power applications.

Evaluations on a range of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) demonstrate that matrix multiplication operations using the proposed micro-architecture achieve up to 17 × and 23 × performance improvements compared to their respective baselines, the ARM A64FX core and a RISC-V-based edge System-on-Chip (SoC). Furthermore, synthesis and place-and-route (PnR) of the CAMP micro-architecture — using Synopsys ICC2 for the ARM TSMC 7nm (A64FX) and Cadence Innovus for the GlobalFoundries 22nm flow (RISC-V SoC)—add only 1% and 4% area overhead, respectively, compared to the baseline designs.
papers.abstract_zh:
本研究提出了笛卡尔累积矩阵管道 (CAMP) 架构，这是一种旨在增强向量架构 (VA) 和单指令多数据 (SIMD) 单元中的矩阵乘法的新颖方法。 CAMP 提高了量化神经网络 (QNN) 的处理效率。

矩阵乘法是机器学习应用的基石，其量化版本越来越受欢迎，以实现更高效的运算。不幸的是，现有的 VA 和 SIMD 支持单元很难有效地处理这些量化格式。在这项工作中，我们提出了 CAMP，这是一种利用混合乘法器的简单而有效的架构。 CAMP 架构显着提高了矢量架构在处理量化数据方面的性能，能够更高效地跨各种平台执行矩阵乘法，特别针对 ARMv8 可扩展矢量扩展 (SVE) 和具有 SIMD 支持单元架构的边缘 RISC-V。由于其分层设计，CAMP 原生支持多种整数精度；这里我们关注 4 位和 8 位，而该单元仍然适用于其他位宽度的通用整数乘法器。除了提高吞吐量之外，CAMP 的架构设计还有助于提高能源效率，使其成为低功耗应用的有效解决方案。

对一系列大型语言模型 (LLM) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的评估表明，与各自的基准、ARM A64FX 内核和基于 RISC-V 的边缘片上系统 (SoC) 相比，使用所提出的微架构的矩阵乘法运算可实现高达 17 倍和 23 倍的性能改进。此外，与基准设计相比，CAMP 微架构的综合和布局布线 (PnR) — 使用用于 ARM TSMC 7nm (A64FX) 的 Synopsys ICC2 和用于 GlobalFoundries 22nm 流程 (RISC-V SoC) 的 Cadence Innovus — 仅分别增加 1% 和 4% 的面积开销。

papers.title: FALA: Locality-Aware PIM-Host Cooperation for Graph Processing with Fine-Grained Column Access.
papers.abstract:
Graph processing is fundamental and critical to various domains, such as social networks and recommendation systems. However, its irregular memory access patterns incur significant memory bottlenecks on modern DRAM architectures, optimized for sequential access. To address this challenge, various approaches with cache and processing-in-memory (PIM) have been explored. Cache-based approaches target efficiently utilizing the cache by improving locality through graph tiling. However, a discrepancy between burst size and data makes them suffer from redundant memory accesses. PIM leverages high internal memory bandwidth but fails to exploit cache locality, showing inefficiencies in workloads with high data reuse. Hybrid approaches attempt to combine both techniques but still face limitations since they struggle with overfetching and inefficient cache utilization when vertex data has low reuse.

To this end, we propose FALA , a novel hybrid architecture that synergistically integrates PIM and cache-based acceleration to overcome these limitations. FALA introduces a fine-grained column access mechanism within memory banks and a locality-aware PIM architecture to enhance memory efficiency and cache utilization. Our design minimizes unnecessary memory access while fully utilizing both high internal bandwidth and on-chip caches. We evaluate FALA against state-of-the-art cache-based, PIM, and hybrid graph processing accelerators. Experimental results demonstrate that FALA achieves 1.56 × speedup and reduces energy consumption by 35.3% in geometric mean, compared to the prior art.
papers.abstract_zh:
图处理对于社交网络和推荐系统等各个领域来说都是基础和关键。然而，其不规则的内存访问模式在针对顺序访问进行优化的现代 DRAM 架构上会产生严重的内存瓶颈。为了应对这一挑战，人们探索了各种缓存和内存处理 (PIM) 方法。基于缓存的方法旨在通过图形平铺改进局部性来有效利用缓存。然而，突发大小和数据之间的差异使它们遭受冗余内存访问。 PIM 利用高内部内存带宽，但无法利用缓存局部性，这表明数据重用率高的工作负载效率低下。混合方法尝试结合这两种技术，但仍然面临局限性，因为当顶点数据重用率较低时，它们会面临过度获取和低效缓存利用率的问题。

为此，我们提出了 FALA，一种新颖的混合架构，它协同集成 PIM 和基于缓存的加速来克服这些限制。 FALA 在内存库中引入了细粒度的列访问机制和局部感知 PIM 架构，以提高内存效率和缓存利用率。我们的设计最大限度地减少了不必要的内存访问，同时充分利用高内部带宽和片上缓存。我们根据最先进的基于缓存、PIM 和混合图形处理加速器来评估 FALA。实验结果表明，与现有技术相比，FALA实现了1.56倍的加速，几何平均能耗降低了35.3%。

papers.title: FexMo: Enabling Fuse Execution Mode for Multi-task CGRAs.
papers.abstract:
Conventional CGRA multi-task resource allocation predominantly employs spatial partition, resulting in low temporal utilization of tiles. Our study reveals that fusing multiple tasks to share the whole CGRA can improve temporal utilization of tiles and introduce superior task throughput. However, this fuse execution mode brings two challenges: as nodes from multiple tasks’ DFGs multiplex the same tiles, load misses from any task will block the execution of other tasks. Besides, existing CGRA mappers fail to constrain the scheduling when fuse mapping multiple tasks’ DFGs collaboratively, which results in an imbalanced distribution of nodes along different modulo cycles. Both challenges hinder the full exploitation of the utilization and throughput advantages inherent to the fuse execution mode.

To address these challenges, we propose FexMo, a novel framework supporting fused execution mode for multi-task CGRA. Architecturally, FexMo introduces checkpoints with clock-gating mechanisms. The contexts of any tasks that encounter load misses are checkpointed to preserve progress without blocking other tasks, and will be resumed for retrying every time at the same modulo cycle. During load misses, tasks execute NOPs on the clock-gated tiles, preventing errors and saving power. For fuse mapping, FexMo proposes inter-DFGs co-scheduling strategy, which evenly distributes nodes from all tasks across modulo cycles, maximizing temporal utilization of tiles and fully leveraging the throughput benefits of fuse execution mode. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FexMo achieves an average utilization gain of 36.9% and a 1.99 × throughput improvement over the conventional partition execution mode. FexMo-Mapper completes mapping within one minute, delivering solutions with 2.72 × higher quality than conventional mappers on average. Implementation using the ASAP7 PDK flow shows FexMo achieves 434MHz clock frequency with negligible area overhead. Despite inducing additional power consumption, FexMo maintains 1.22 × higher energy efficiency than the baseline on average.
papers.abstract_zh:
传统的CGRA多任务资源分配主要采用空间划分，导致瓦片的时间利用率较低。我们的研究表明，融合多个任务以共享整个 CGRA 可以提高图块的时间利用率并引入卓越的任务吞吐量。然而，这种熔断执行模式带来了两个挑战：当来自多个任务的 DFG 的节点复用相同的块时，任何任务的加载未命中都会阻塞其他任务的执行。此外，现有的CGRA映射器在协同融合映射多个任务的DFG时无法约束调度，导致节点沿不同模周期的分布不平衡。这两个挑战都阻碍了熔丝执行模式固有的利用率和吞吐量优势的充分利用。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 FexMo，一种支持多任务 CGRA 融合执行模式的新型框架。在架构上，FexMo 引入了带有时钟门控机制的检查点。遇到加载未命中的任何任务的上下文都会被设置检查点，以在不阻塞其他任务的情况下保留进度，并且每次都会在相同的模周期中恢复重试。在加载未命中期间，任务在时钟门控块上执行 NOP，从而防止错误并节省电量。对于熔丝映射，FexMo 提出了 DFG 间协同调度策略，该策略跨模周期均匀分布所有任务的节点，最大限度地提高图块的时间利用率，并充分利用熔丝执行模式的吞吐量优势。大量实验表明，与传统分区执行模式相比，FexMo 的平均利用率提高了 36.9%，吞吐量提高了 1.99 倍。 FexMo-Mapper 可在一分钟内完成测绘，提供的解决方案质量平均比传统测绘仪高 2.72 倍。使用 ASAP7 PDK 流程的实施表明，FexMo 实现了 434MHz 时钟频率，而面积开销可以忽略不计。尽管会产生额外的功耗，但 FexMo 的能源效率平均比基准高 1.22 倍。

papers.title: Flexing RISC-V Instruction Subset Processors to Extreme Edge.
papers.abstract: This paper presents an automated approach for designing processors that support a subset of the RISC-V instruction set architecture (ISA) for a new class of applications at Extreme Edge. The electronics used in extreme edge applications must be area and power-efficient, but also provide additional qualities, such as low cost, conformability, comfort and sustainability. Flexible electronics, rather than silicon-based electronics, will be able to meet the above qualities. For this purpose, we propose a methodology for generating RISC-V instruction subset processors (RISSPs) tailored to these applications and implementing them as flexible integrated circuits (FlexICs). The methodology makes verification an integral part of the processor design by treating each instruction in the ISA as a discrete, fully functional, pre-verified hardware block. It automatically builds a custom processor by stitching together the instruction hardware blocks required by an application or a set of applications in a specific domain. We generate RISSPs using the proposed methodology for three extreme edge applications, and embedded applications from the Embench benchmark suite. When synthesized, RISSPs can achieve 8-to-43% reduction in area and 3-to-30% reduction in power compared to a processor supporting the full RISC-V ISA, and are also on average ~40 times more energy efficient than Serv - the world’s smallest 32-bit RISC-V processor. When physically implemented as FlexICs, the three extreme edge RISSPs achieve up to 42% area and 21% power savings with respect to the full RISC-V processor.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于设计处理器的自动化方法，该处理器支持 RISC-V 指令集架构 (ISA) 子集，适用于 Extreme Edge 的新型应用程序。极端边缘应用中使用的电子设备必须具有面积和功率效率，而且还要提供额外的品质，例如低成本、一致性、舒适性和可持续性。柔性电子产品，而不是硅基电子产品，将能够满足上述品质。为此，我们提出了一种生成适合这些应用的 RISC-V 指令子集处理器 (RISSP) 并将其实现为灵活集成电路 (FlexIC) 的方法。该方法通过将 ISA 中的每条指令视为离散的、功能齐全的、预先验证的硬件块，使验证成为处理器设计的一个组成部分。它通过将特定领域中的一个应用程序或一组应用程序所需的指令硬件块拼接在一起来自动构建定制处理器。我们使用所提出的方法为三个极端边缘应用程序以及 Embench 基准套件中的嵌入式应用程序生成 RISSP。综合后，与支持完整 RISC-V ISA 的处理器相比，RISSP 的面积可减少 8% 至 43%，功耗可减少 3% 至 30%，而且平均能效比 Serv（世界上最小的 32 位 RISC-V 处理器）高约 40 倍。当物理实现为 FlexIC 时，三个极端边缘 RISSP 相对于完整 RISC-V 处理器可实现高达 42% 的面积和 21% 的功耗节省。

papers.title: GateBleed: Exploiting On-Core Accelerator Power Gating for High Performance and Stealthy Attacks on AI.
papers.abstract:
As power consumption from AI training and inference continues to increase, AI accelerators are being integrated directly into the CPU. Intel’s Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) is one such example, debuting in the 4th Generation Intel Xeon Scalable CPU, attaining significant gains in the metrics of performance/watt and decreased memory offloading penalty. This paper discloses a timing side and covert channel, GateBleed , caused by the aggressive power gating utilized to keep the CPU within operating limits.

This paper shows that the GateBleed side channel is a threat to AI privacy, as many ML models such as Transformers and CNNs make critical computationally-heavy decisions based on private values like confidence thresholds and routing logits. Timing delays from the selective powering down of AMX components mean that each matrix multiplication is a potential leakage point when executed on the AMX accelerator. This paper identifies over a dozen potential gadgets across popular ML libraries (Hugging Face, PyTorch, TensorFlow, etc.), revealing that they can leak sensitive and private information, including class labels and internal states. GateBleed poses a risk for local and remote timing inference, even under previous protective measures.

GateBleed gadgets can also be used as a a generic high performance, stealthy magnifier for microarchitectural attacks to bypass timer resolution coarsening defenses and create robust and realistic side channels in noisy environments, such as remote attacks on networks with high traffic. This paper shows that when GateBleed gadget is used as a transmission channel for Spectre, it can leak arbitrary memory addresses of the victim with high performance (0.067 bps), and evade the state-of-the-art microarchitectural attack detectors for the first time.

This paper implements an end-to-end membership inference attack with 81% accuracy on a Transformer model optimized with Intel AMX and 99% accuracy on an early-exit CNN classifier. GateBleed achieves 0.89 precision while leaking expert choice in a Transformer mixture-of-experts (MoE) with 100% accuracy. These attacks do not rely on confidence scores or model outputs, but only on the execution time of attacker-controlled AMX instructions on the shared hardware accelerator with power gating. To the authors’ knowledge, this is the first side-channel attack on AI privacy that exploits hardware accelerator power optimizations. The paper also suggests effective mitigations and measures their trade-off between power consumption and performance .
papers.abstract_zh:
随着人工智能训练和推理的功耗不断增加，人工智能加速器正在直接集成到 CPU 中。英特尔的高级矩阵扩展 (AMX) 就是这样的一个例子，它在第四代英特尔至强可扩展 CPU 中首次亮相，在性能功耗比指标方面取得了显着的进步，并减少了内存卸载损失。本文公开了一种定时侧和隐蔽通道 GateBleed，它是由用于将 CPU 保持在操作限制内的积极电源门控引起的。

本文表明，GateBleed 侧通道对 AI 隐私构成威胁，因为 Transformer 和 CNN 等许多 ML 模型会根据置信阈值和路由逻辑等私有值做出关键的计算量大的决策。 AMX 组件选择性断电导致的时序延迟意味着在 AMX 加速器上执行时每个矩阵乘法都是潜在的泄漏点。本文识别了流行的 ML 库（Hugging Face、PyTorch、TensorFlow 等）中的十多个潜在小工具，揭示了它们可能泄露敏感和私人信息，包括类标签和内部状态。即使在之前的保护措施下，GateBleed 也会对本地和远程时序推断带来风险。

GateBleed 小工具还可以用作微架构攻击的通用高性能隐形放大器，以绕过计时器分辨率粗化防御，并在嘈杂的环境中创建强大且真实的侧通道，例如对高流量网络的远程攻击。本文表明，当使用 GateBleed gadget 作为 Spectre 的传输通道时，它可以高性能（0.067 bps）泄漏受害者的任意内存地址，并首次逃避最先进的微架构攻击检测器。

本文实现了端到端成员推理攻击，在使用 Intel AMX 优化的 Transformer 模型上实现了 81% 的准确率，在提前退出 CNN 分类器上实现了 99% 的准确率。 GateBleed 达到 0.89 的精度，同时在 Transformer 专家混合 (MoE) 中泄漏专家选择，准确率达到 100%。这些攻击不依赖于置信度分数或模型输出，而仅依赖于具有电源门控的共享硬件加速器上攻击者控制的 AMX 指令的执行时间。据作者所知，这是首次利用硬件加速器功率优化对人工智能隐私进行旁道攻击。该论文还提出了有效的缓解措施，并衡量了功耗和性能之间的权衡。

papers.title: GCC: A 3DGS Inference Architecture with Gaussian-Wise and Cross-Stage Conditional Processing.
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a leading neural rendering technique for high-fidelity view synthesis, prompting the development of dedicated 3DGS accelerators for resource-constrained platforms. The conventional decoupled preprocessing-rendering dataflow in existing accelerators has two major limitations: 1) a significant portion of preprocessed Gaussians are not used in rendering, and 2) the same Gaussian gets repeatedly loaded across different tile renderings, resulting in substantial computational and data movement overhead. To address these issues, we propose GCC, a novel accelerator designed for fast and energy-efficient 3DGS inference. GCC introduces a novel dataflow featuring: 1) cross-stage conditional processing , which interleaves preprocessing and rendering to dynamically skip unnecessary Gaussian preprocessing; and 2) Gaussian-wise rendering , ensuring that all rendering operations for a given Gaussian are completed before moving to the next, thereby eliminating duplicated Gaussian loading. We also propose an alpha-based boundary identification method to derive compact and accurate Gaussian regions, thereby reducing rendering costs. We implement our GCC accelerator in 28nm technology. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GCC significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art 3DGS inference accelerator, GSCore, in both performance and energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 3D 高斯泼溅 (3DGS) 已成为一种用于高保真视图合成的领先神经渲染技术，推动了针对资源受限平台的专用 3DGS 加速器的开发。现有加速器中传统的解耦预处理-渲染数据流有两个主要限制：1）很大一部分预处理高斯没有在渲染中使用，2）相同的高斯在不同的图块渲染中重复加载，导致大量的计算和数据移动开销。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 GCC，这是一种专为快速且节能的 3DGS 推理而设计的新型加速器。 GCC 引入了一种新颖的数据流，具有以下特点：1）跨阶段条件处理，将预处理和渲染交错进行，以动态跳过不必要的高斯预处理； 2）高斯明智渲染，确保给定高斯的所有渲染操作在移动到下一个之前完成，从而消除重复的高斯加载。我们还提出了一种基于 alpha 的边界识别方法来导出紧凑且准确的高斯区域，从而降低渲染成本。我们采用 28 纳米技术实现 GCC 加速器。大量实验表明，GCC 在性能和能效方面均明显优于最先进的 3DGS 推理加速器 GSCore。

papers.title: Ghost Threading: Helper-Thread Prefetching for Real Systems.
papers.abstract:
Memory latency is the bottleneck for many modern workloads. One popular solution from literature to handle this is helper threading, a technique that issues light-weight prefetching helper thread(s) extracted from the original application to bring data into the cache before the main thread uses it, hiding the long memory latency. Although prior work has reported promising results, many schemes are not available on real systems as they require hardware support for satisfying performance improvements.

To address this, we present Ghost Threading, a software-only helper-thread prefetching solution, which issues helper threads on idle Simultaneous Multithreading (SMT) contexts. The key challenge of prefetching is timeliness: data should not arrive too early or too late. Unlike prior work relying on proposed extra hardware synchronization or expensive OS synchronization, we develop a novel inter-thread synchronization approach based on an instruction supported by commercial processors, which enables cheap throttling of the helper thread. This ensures that it gets far enough ahead of the main thread, but not too far, for it to perform timely prefetching of data.

We evaluate Ghost Threading against state-of-the-art techniques on a modern Intel processor with memory-intensive workloads selected from graph analysis, database, and HPC domains. On an idle server, Ghost Threading achieves 1.33 × geometric mean speedup over the baseline, 1.25 × and 1.11 × over state-of-the-art software prefetching and parallelization techniques, respectively. We also show that Ghost Threading maintains these benefits on a busy server where the memory bandwidth pressure is higher.
papers.abstract_zh:
内存延迟是许多现代工作负载的瓶颈。文献中处理此问题的一种流行解决方案是辅助线程，该技术发出从原始应用程序中提取的轻量级预取辅助线程，以便在主线程使用数据之前将数据带入缓存，从而隐藏较长的内存延迟。尽管先前的工作已经报告了有希望的结果，但许多方案在实际系统上不可用，因为它们需要硬件支持才能满足性能改进。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Ghost Threading，这是一种纯软件辅助线程预取解决方案，它在空闲的同时多线程 (SMT) 上下文上发出辅助线程。预取的关键挑战是及时性：数据不应太早或太晚到达。与先前依赖于额外硬件同步或昂贵的操作系统同步的工作不同，我们开发了一种基于商业处理器支持的指令的新颖的线程间同步方法，该方法可以对辅助线程进行廉价的限制。这确保它比主线程提前足够远，但又不会太远，以便及时执行数据预取。

我们根据现代英特尔处理器上的最先进技术来评估 Ghost 线程，该处理器具有选自图形分析、数据库和 HPC 领域的内存密集型工作负载。在空闲服务器上，Ghost Threading 比基线实现了 1.33 倍几何平均加速，比最先进的软件预取和并行化技术分别实现了 1.25 倍和 1.11 倍。我们还表明，Ghost Threading 在内存带宽压力较高的繁忙服务器上保持了这些优势。

papers.title: HAWK: Fully Homomorphic Encryption Accelerator with Fixed-Word Key Decomposition Switching.
papers.abstract:
Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) allows for direct computation on encrypted data, preserving privacy while enabling outsourced processing. Despite its compelling advantages, FHE schemes come with a significant performance penalty. Although recent cryptographic advances have introduced promising optimization technologies to mitigate computational burden, FHE accelerator designs face significant challenges in deploying these algorithmic optimizations. These challenges stem primarily from divergent computational precision requirements and escalating on-chip memory demands, leading to mismatches between algorithm and hardware constraints.

We propose HAWK, an FHE acceleration solution based on algorithm–hardware co-design. We begin with an in-depth analysis of the original key decomposition switching approach (KDS), identifying the main limitations of applying it to mainstream FHE accelerators. To address these issues, we propose the fixed-word key decomposition switching method (FW-KDS), significantly reducing computational overhead and memory requirements by up to \(58\%\) . We demonstrate how to effectively integrate this method into fixed-word accelerator designs and introduce several further optimizations. To address the expensive rounding operation inherent in the KDS method, we develop a new computational approach that reduces hardware costs while completely eliminating rounding errors. Furthermore, we adapt the underlying architecture to align with the computational demands of our algorithmic optimizations. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first exploration of deploying the KDS method in the fixed-word hardware accelerator. Experimental results demonstrate that HAWK achieves up to a 1.45 × performance improvement with only a 4% area increase.
papers.abstract_zh:
完全同态加密 (FHE) 允许对加密数据进行直接计算，在保护隐私的同时实现外包处理。尽管 FHE 方案具有令人信服的优势，但它也带来了显着的性能损失。尽管最近的密码学进展引入了有前途的优化技术来减轻计算负担，但 FHE 加速器设计在部署这些算法优化方面面临着重大挑战。这些挑战主要源于不同的计算精度要求和不断升级的片上内存需求，导致算法和硬件限制之间的不匹配。

我们提出HAWK，一种基于算法-硬件协同设计的FHE加速解决方案。我们首先深入分析原始密钥分解切换方法（KDS），找出将其应用于主流 FHE 加速器的主要局限性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了固定字密钥分解切换方法（FW-KDS），显着减少了计算开销和内存需求高达 \(58\%\) 。我们演示了如何有效地将这种方法集成到固定字加速器设计中，并引入了一些进一步的优化。为了解决 KDS 方法中固有的昂贵舍入操作，我们开发了一种新的计算方法，可以降低硬件成本，同时完全消除舍入误差。此外，我们调整底层架构以适应算法优化的计算需求。据我们所知，这是在固定字硬件加速器中部署KDS方法的首次探索。实验结果表明，HAWK 在仅增加 4% 的面积的情况下实现了高达 1.45 倍的性能提升。

papers.title: HEAT: NPU-NDP HEterogeneous Architecture for Transformer-Empowered Graph Neural Networks.
papers.abstract:
Transformer-empowered Graph Neural Networks (TF-GNNs) are gaining significant attention in AI research because they leverage the front-end Transformer’s ability to process textual data while also harnessing the back-end GNN’s capacity to analyze graph structures. Typically, TF-GNNs follow the sequential execution mode, where the front-end Transformer first encodes vertex features, followed by subgraph sampling and subsequent processing by the back-end GNN. However, due to the massive computation workloads of Transformers and the irregular memory access patterns of GNNs, achieving efficient inference for TF-GNNs remains a challenge. Although architectures like FACT and MEGA have been proposed to separately accelerate the Transformer and GNN, they overlook the new opportunities arising from the coupling of the Transformer and GNN.

To enable efficient TF-GNNs, we propose HEAT, a heterogeneous architecture with a Neural Processing Unit (NPU) and a DIMM-based Near-Data Processing (NDP). Such a heterogeneous architecture can utilize both the high computational power of NPU and the high internal bandwidth of NDP. To fully unleash the potential of the NPU-NDP architecture, HEAT makes the following three contributions: First , HEAT leverages graph topology to identify the importance of vertices and encodes their features in the Transformer using varying precision accordingly. Second , HEAT gives more flexibility to the execution granularity and execution order of subgraphs in GNN, allowing their DRAM accesses to scatter across different banks and enhancing locality between subgraphs. Third , HEAT decouples the inherent dependency between the front-end Transformer and the back-end GNN by allowing the Transformer to selectively encode only the vertex features required by the current subgraph. This enables concurrent execution of the NPU and NDP, thereby fully exploiting the parallelism of the heterogeneous architecture. Comprehensive evaluations on a wide range of datasets demonstrate that HEAT outperforms the high-performance A100 GPU, the state-of-the-art (SOTA) Transformer accelerator FACT, and GNN accelerator MEGA in terms of execution time and energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh:
基于 Transformer 的图神经网络 (TF-GNN) 在人工智能研究中获得了广泛关注，因为它们利用前端 Transformer 处理文本数据的能力，同时还利用后端 GNN 分析图结构的能力。通常，TF-GNN 遵循顺序执行模式，其中前端 Transformer 首先对顶点特征进行编码，然后进行子图采样，并由后端 GNN 进行后续处理。然而，由于 Transformer 的大量计算工作量和 GNN 的不规则内存访问模式，实现 TF-GNN 的高效推理仍然是一个挑战。尽管像 FACT 和 MEGA 这样的架构已经被提出来分别加速 Transformer 和 GNN，但它们忽视了 Transformer 和 GNN 耦合带来的新机会。

为了实现高效的 TF-GNN，我们提出了 HEAT，这是一种具有神经处理单元 (NPU) 和基于 DIMM 的近数据处理 (NDP) 的异构架构。这种异构架构可以同时利用NPU的高计算能力和NDP的高内部带宽。为了充分释放 NPU-NDP 架构的潜力，HEAT 做出了以下三点贡献：首先，HEAT 利用图拓扑来识别顶点的重要性，并相应地使用不同的精度在 Transformer 中对其特征进行编码。其次，HEAT 为 GNN 中子图的执行粒度和执行顺序提供了更大的灵活性，允许它们的 DRAM 访问分散在不同的存储体上，并增强了子图之间的局部性。第三，HEAT 通过允许 Transformer 有选择地仅对当前子图所需的顶点特征进行编码，解耦了前端 Transformer 和后端 GNN 之间的固有依赖关系。这使得NPU和NDP能够并发执行，从而充分利用异构架构的并行性。对广泛数据集的综合评估表明，HEAT 在执行时间和能源效率方面优于高性能 A100 GPU、最先进的 (SOTA) Transformer 加速器 FACT 和 GNN 加速器 MEGA。

papers.title: HiPACK: Efficient Sub-8-Bit Direct Convolution with SIMD and Bitwise Management.
papers.abstract: Quantized Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have progressed to utilize sub-8-bit data types, achieving notable reductions in both memory usage and computational expenses. Nevertheless, the efficient execution of sub-8-bit convolution operations remains insufficiently optimized, especially in the context of Single Instruction Multiple Data (SIMD) architectures. This paper introduces HiPACK, which takes the packing for efficient convolution as foundation to reduce the required number of operations, and address the challenges of SIMD incompatibility in sub-8-bit direct convolution by decoupling the unpacking phase from multiplication operations, optimizing the caching of intermediate data, determining the ideal segmentation, and employing a dual interleaved register (DIR) mechanism to facilitate parallel multiplication through SIMD. Collectively, these optimizations significantly enhance computational efficiency and diminish operational overhead. Evaluation on the BCM2711 ARM processor reveals speedups of up to 4.6 × compared to floating-point calculations and 1.7 × when measured against state-of-the-art solutions, thus accelerating model inference. Our implementation is open-sourced and available at: https://github.com/Xtra-Computing/HIPACK.
papers.abstract_zh: 量化深度神经网络 (DNN) 已发展到利用低于 8 位的数据类型，显着减少了内存使用量和计算费用。然而，亚 8 位卷积运算的高效执行仍然没有得到充分优化，特别是在单指令多数据 (SIMD) 架构的背景下。本文介绍了HiPACK，它以高效卷积的打包为基础，减少所需的运算次数，并通过将解包阶段与乘法运算解耦、优化中间数据的缓存、确定理想的分段以及采用双交错寄存器（DIR）机制以促进通过SIMD进行并行乘法来解决亚8位直接卷积中SIMD不兼容的挑战。总的来说，这些优化显着提高了计算效率并减少了运营开销。对 BCM2711 ARM 处理器的评估显示，与浮点计算相比，速度提升高达 4.6 倍，与最先进的解决方案相比，速度提升高达 1.7 倍，从而加速模型推理。我们的实现是开源的，可从以下网址获取：https://github.com/Xtra-Computing/HIPACK。

papers.title: HLX: A Unified Pipelined Architecture for Optimized Performance of Hybrid Transformer-Mamba Language Models.
papers.abstract:
The rapid increase in demand for long-context language models has revealed fundamental performance limitations in conventional Transformer architectures, particularly their quadratic computational complexity. Hybrid Transformer-Mamba models, which interleave attention layers with efficient state-space model layers such as Mamba-2, have emerged as promising solutions combining the strengths of both Transformer and Mamba. However, maintaining a high compute utilization and performance across workloads (e.g., varying sequence length and batch size) in the Hybrid models is challenging due to their heterogeneous compute patterns and shifting performance bottlenecks between the two key computational kernels: FlashAttention-2 (FA-2) and State-Space Duality (SSD).

In this paper, we introduce HLX, a unified pipelined architecture designed to ensure optimized performance across workloads for Hybrid models. Through detailed kernel-level analysis, we identify two key blockers that limit compute utilization: inter-operation dependencies in FA-2 and excessive memory traffic in SSD. To overcome these hurdles, we propose two novel fine-grained pipelined dataflows named PipeFlash and PipeSSD. PipeFlash effectively hides operational dependencies in attention computations, while PipeSSD firstly introduces the fused pipelined execution for SSD computations, substantially enhancing data reuse and reducing memory traffic. In addition, we propose a unified hardware architecture that can process both PipeFlash and PipeSSD in an efficient pipelining scheme to maximize the compute utilization. Finally, across sequence lengths from 1K to 128K, the proposed HLX architecture achieves up to 97.5% and 78.4% compute utilization for FA-2 and SSD, respectively, resulting in an average speedup of 1.75 × and 2.91 × over A100, and an average 2.78 × (FA-2), 1.84 × (FA-3), and 4.95 × speedups over H100. For end-to-end latency and batching, HLX achieves a 1.56 × and 1.38 × speedup over A100 and a 2.08 × and 1.76 × (1.84 × and 1.72 ×) speedup when running FA-2 (FA-3) on H100. It also significantly reduces area and power consumption by up to 89.8% and 63.8% compared to GPU baselines.
papers.abstract_zh:
对长上下文语言模型需求的快速增长揭示了传统 Transformer 架构的基本性能限制，特别是其二次计算复杂性。混合 Transformer-Mamba 模型将注意力层与高效的状态空间模型层（例如 Mamba-2）交织在一起，成为结合了 Transformer 和 Mamba 优势的有前景的解决方案。然而，由于混合模型的异构计算模式和两个关键计算内核（FlashAttention-2 (FA-2) 和状态空间对偶 (SSD)）之间的性能瓶颈转移，在混合模型中保持跨工作负载（例如，不同的序列长度和批量大小）的高计算利用率和性能具有挑战性。

在本文中，我们介绍了 HLX，这是一种统一的流水线架构，旨在确保混合模型的跨工作负载性能优化。通过详细的内核级分析，我们确定了限制计算利用率的两个关键障碍：FA-2 中的互操作依赖性和 SSD 中的过多内存流量。为了克服这些障碍，我们提出了两种新颖的细粒度管道数据流，名为 PipeFlash 和 PipeSSD。 PipeFlash有效隐藏了注意力计算中的操作依赖性，而PipeSSD首先引入了SSD计算的融合流水线执行，大大增强了数据重用并减少了内存流量。此外，我们提出了一个统一的硬件架构，可以以高效的流水线方案处理 PipeFlash 和 PipeSSD，以最大限度地提高计算利用率。最后，在从 1K 到 128K 的序列长度上，所提出的 HLX 架构对 FA-2 和 SSD 分别实现了高达 97.5% 和 78.4% 的计算利用率，比 A100 平均加速 1.75 × 和 2.91 ×，比 A100 平均加速 2.78 × (FA-2)、1.84 × (FA-3) 和 4.95 × H100。对于端到端延迟和批处理，HLX 比 A100 实现了 1.56 × 和 1.38 × 加速，在 H100 上运行 FA-2 (FA-3) 时实现了 2.08 × 和 1.76 ×（1.84 × 和 1.72 ×）加速。与 GPU 基准相比，它还显着减少了面积和功耗，分别高达 89.8% 和 63.8%。

papers.title: Interleaved Bitstream Execution for Multi-Pattern Regex Matching on GPUs.
papers.abstract: Pattern matching is a key operation in unstructured data analytics, commonly supported by regular expression (regex) engines. Bit-parallel regex engines compile regexes into bitstream programs, which expose fine-grained parallelism and are well-suited for GPU execution. A straightforward strategy executes each bitstream instruction sequentially, processing all data blocks in a loop. However, this execution suffers from poor data reuse and high memory consumption, limiting throughput. Our key insight is to adopt an interleaved execution model, where all bitstream instructions are fused into a single loop and executed block-wise. While interleaved execution could improve data reuse, enabling it on GPUs is non-trivial due to cross-block data dependencies. To address this, we introduce 1) Dependency-Aware Thread-Data Mapping, which resolves cross-block dependencies via selective recomputation. We further improve interleaved execution performance with two additional optimizations: 2) Shift Rebalancing, which balances dependency chains to reduce synchronization barriers; and 3) Zero Block Skipping, which exploits bitstream sparsity to skip computation on zero blocks. Together, these techniques make interleaved execution practical and efficient. Experiments on real-world regex benchmarks demonstrate a 19.5 × geometric mean speedup over the state-of-the-art GPU regex engine.
papers.abstract_zh: 模式匹配是非结构化数据分析中的关键操作，通常由正则表达式 (regex) 引擎支持。位并行正则表达式引擎将正则表达式编译为位流程序，这公开了细粒度并行性并且非常适合 GPU 执行。一种简单的策略是按顺序执行每个比特流指令，循环处理所有数据块。然而，这种执行会遇到数据重用性差和内存消耗高的问题，从而限制了吞吐量。我们的主要见解是采用交错执行模型，其中所有比特流指令都融合到单个循环中并按块执行。虽然交错执行可以改善数据重用，但由于跨块数据依赖性，在 GPU 上启用它并非易事。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 1) 依赖感知线程数据映射，它通过选择性重新计算来解决跨块依赖。我们通过两项额外的优化进一步提高了交错执行性能：2）Shift Rebalancing，平衡依赖链以减少同步障碍； 3) 零块跳过，利用比特流稀疏性来跳过零块上的计算。这些技术共同使交错执行变得实用且高效。对现实世界正则表达式基准的实验表明，与最先进的 GPU 正则表达式引擎相比，几何平均加速达到 19.5 倍。

papers.title: Ironman: Accelerating Oblivious Transfer Extension for Privacy-Preserving AI with Near-Memory Processing.
papers.abstract:
With the wide application of machine learning (ML), privacy concerns arise with user data as they may contain sensitive information. Privacy-preserving ML (PPML) based on cryptographic primitives has emerged as a promising solution in which an ML model is directly computed on the encrypted data to provide a formal privacy guarantee. However, PPML frameworks heavily rely on the oblivious transfer (OT) primitive to compute nonlinear functions. OT mainly involves the computation of single-point correlated OT (SPCOT) and learning parity with noise (LPN) operations. As OT is still computed extensively on general-purpose CPUs, it becomes the latency bottleneck of modern PPML frameworks.

In this paper, we propose a novel OT accelerator, dubbed \(\mathsf {Ironman}\) , to significantly increase the efficiency of OT and the overall PPML framework. We observe that SPCOT is computation-bounded, and thus propose a hardware-friendly SPCOT algorithm with a customized accelerator to improve SPCOT computation throughput. In contrast, LPN is memory-bandwidth-bounded due to irregular memory access patterns. Hence, we further leverage the near-memory processing (NMP) architecture equipped with memory-side cache and index sorting to improve effective memory bandwidth. With extensive experiments, we demonstrate \(\mathsf {Ironman}\) achieves a 39.2–237.4 × improvement in OT throughput across different NMP configurations compared to the full-thread CPU implementation. For different PPML frameworks, \(\mathsf {Ironman}\) demonstrates a 2.1–3.4 × reduction in end-to-end latency for both CNN and Transformer models.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着机器学习（ML）的广泛应用，用户数据出现了隐私问题，因为它们可能包含敏感信息。基于加密原语的隐私保护机器学习 (PPML​​) 已成为一种有前途的解决方案，其中直接在加密数据上计算机器学习模型以提供正式的隐私保证。然而，PPML 框架严重依赖于不经意传递 (OT) 原语来计算非线性函数。 OT主要涉及单点相关OT（SPCOT）计算和学习噪声奇偶校验（LPN）运算。由于 OT 仍然在通用 CPU 上广泛计算，因此它成为现代 PPML 框架的延迟瓶颈。

在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 OT 加速器，称为 \(\mathsf {Ironman}\) ，以显着提高 OT 和整体 PPML 框架的效率。我们观察到 SPCOT 是计算受限的，因此提出了一种具有定制加速器的硬件友好型 SPCOT 算法，以提高 SPCOT 计算吞吐量。相比之下，LPN 由于不规则的内存访问模式而受到内存带宽的限制。因此，我们进一步利用配备内存端缓存和索引排序的近内存处理（NMP）架构来提高有效内存带宽。通过大量实验，我们证明与全线程 CPU 实现相比，\(\mathsf {Ironman}\) 在不同 NMP 配置上实现了 39.2–237.4 倍的 OT 吞吐量提升。对于不同的 PPML 框架，\(\mathsf {Ironman}\) 证明 CNN 和 Transformer 模型的端到端延迟减少了 2.1–3.4 倍。

papers.title: Kelle: Co-design KV Caching and eDRAM for Efficient LLM Serving in Edge Computing.
papers.abstract:
Running Large Language Models (LLMs) on edge devices is crucial for reducing latency, improving real-time processing, and enhancing privacy. By performing inference directly on the device, data does not need to be sent to the cloud, ensuring faster responses and reducing reliance on network connectivity. However, implementing LLMs on edge devices presents challenges, particularly with managing key-value (KV) caches, which plays a pivotal role in LLM serving. As the input text lengthens, the size of the KV cache increases linearly with the sequence length, leading to a significant memory footprint and data access costs. On the other hand, edge devices have limited memory and computational power, making it hard to store and efficiently access the large caches needed for LLM inference.

To mitigate the substantial overhead caused by KV cache, we propose using embedded DRAM (eDRAM) as the primary storage for LLM serving in edge device, which offers higher storage density compared to SRAM. However, to ensure data integrity, eDRAM needs periodic refresh operations, which are power-intensive. To reduce eDRAM costs and improve overall system performance, we propose Kelle , a software-hardware co-design solution optimized for deploying LLMs on eDRAM-based edge systems. Combined with our fine-grained memory eviction, recomputation, and refresh control algorithms, the Kelle accelerator delivers a 3.9 × speedup and 4.5 × energy savings compared to existing baseline solutions.
papers.abstract_zh:
在边缘设备上运行大型语言模型 (LLM) 对于减少延迟、改进实时处理和增强隐私至关重要。通过直接在设备上执行推理，无需将数据发送到云端，从而确保更快的响应并减少对网络连接的依赖。然而，在边缘设备上实施 LLM 会带来挑战，特别是在管理键值 (KV) 缓存方面，这在 LLM 服务中发挥着关键作用。随着输入文本的延长，KV 缓存的大小会随着序列长度线性增加，从而导致显着的内存占用和数据访问成本。另一方面，边缘设备的内存和计算能力有限，因此很难存储和有效访问 LLM 推理所需的大型缓存。

为了减轻 KV 缓存造成的大量开销，我们建议使用嵌入式 DRAM (eDRAM) 作为边缘设备中 LLM 服务的主存储，与 SRAM 相比，它提供更高的存储密度。然而，为了确保数据完整性，eDRAM 需要定期刷新操作，这是非常耗电的。为了降低 eDRAM 成本并提高整体系统性能，我们提出了 Kelle，这是一种针对在基于 eDRAM 的边缘系统上部署 LLM 进行优化的软件硬件协同设计解决方案。与我们的细粒度内存驱逐、重新计算和刷新控制算法相结合，与现有基准解决方案相比，Kelle 加速器可实现 3.9 倍的加速和 4.5 倍的节能。

papers.title: LANCER: Low-Overhead, Accurate, and Non-Destructive Calibration for Real-World Fault-Tolerant Quantum Applications.
papers.abstract:
The ultimate goal of fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC) is to run practical applications. Due to the long execution time of practical workloads, an FTQC system must operate reliably for multiple days by correcting the errors of noisy qubits. However, drifts of error sources increase qubit error rates during execution (i.e., error drift), limiting the reliable execution time. Even worse, existing error-drift-handling methods cannot execute long-running workloads as they collapse the qubit states or fail to suppress errors.

In this paper, we propose LANCER, a novel accurate and non-destructive calibration method for reliable execution under error drifts. We observe that only a subset of qubits store quantum states during execution. Based on the observation, we periodically stall the program and migrate the quantum states temporarily to idle qubits, enabling accurate calibrations without losing the states. However, this idea faces two major challenges: (1) crosstalk between running and calibrating qubits and (2) huge latency overhead due to stalls when the quantum states are migrated to idle qubits.

We propose three solutions to resolve these challenges. First, we mitigate the crosstalk by toggling the frequencies of running qubits to separate them from the frequencies of calibrating qubits. Second, we reduce the latency overhead by utilizing the inherent idle times in the fault-tolerant quantum gate. Lastly, we further reduce the latency overhead by re-designing qubit layout to enable the execution even when the quantum states are migrated to idle qubits. The evaluation shows that LANCER enables the execution of 95 times larger programs (i.e., larger number of gates) compared to the baseline, with negligible latency and qubit overhead (4.3% and 4.0%, respectively).
papers.abstract_zh:
容错量子计算（FTQC）的最终目标是运行实际应用程序。由于实际工作负载的执行时间较长，FTQC 系统必须通过纠正噪声量子位的错误来可靠运行多天。然而，错误源的漂移会增加执行期间的量子位错误率（即错误漂移），从而限制了可靠的执行时间。更糟糕的是，现有的错误漂移处理方法无法执行长时间运行的工作负载，因为它们会破坏量子位状态或无法抑制错误。

在本文中，我们提出了 LANCER，一种新颖的精确且无损的校准方法，可在误差漂移下可靠执行。我们观察到，只有一部分量子位在执行过程中存储量子态。根据观察，我们定期停止程序并将量子态暂时迁移到空闲量子位，从而在不丢失状态的情况下实现精确校准。然而，这个想法面临两个主要挑战：（1）运行和校准量子位之间的串扰，以及（2）量子态迁移到空闲量子位时由于停顿而导致的巨大延迟开销。

我们提出了三种解决方案来解决这些挑战。首先，我们通过切换运行量子位的频率以将其与校准量子位的频率分开来减轻串扰。其次，我们通过利用容错量子门中固有的空闲时间来减少延迟开销。最后，我们通过重新设计量子位布局来进一步减少延迟开销，以便即使在量子态迁移到空闲量子位时也能执行。评估表明，与基线相比，LANCER 能够执行大 95 倍的程序（即更多的门），且延迟和量子位开销可以忽略不计（分别为 4.3% 和 4.0%）。

papers.title: LATPC: Accelerating GPU Address Translation Using Locality-Aware TLB Prefetching and MSHR Compression.
papers.abstract: Modern Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) support virtual memory to ease programmability and concurrency, but still suffer from significant address translation overhead due to frequent Translation Lookaside Buffer (TLB) misses and limited TLB Miss-Status Holding Register (MSHR) capacity. These misses trigger long-latency page table walks and stall memory accesses, degrading overall performance. In this paper, we present LATPC , a novel mechanism that combines TLB prefetching with MSHR compression to accelerate GPU address translation. LATPC leverages the regularity of Virtual Page Numbers (VPNs) across threads within a warp to coalesce TLB misses at the warp instruction level. LATPC then compresses multiple TLB miss requests into a small number of MSHR entries, reducing contention and enabling more efficient resource use. LATPC further improves translation efficiency by batching page table walks based on the identified VPN patterns, which not only reduces the number of page table walk invocations but also increases off-chip DRAM row buffer locality, lowering the latency of memory accesses during translation. Our evaluation using 24 GPU workloads shows that LATPC effectively exploits regularities and localities in address translation requests within a warp, achieving a 1.47× geometric mean speedup over the baseline without TLB prefetching.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代图形处理单元 (GPU) 支持虚拟内存以简化可编程性和并发性，但由于频繁的转换后备缓冲区 (TLB) 缺失和有限的 TLB 缺失状态保持寄存器 (MSHR) 容量，仍然遭受大量地址转换开销。这些未命中会触发长延迟的页表遍历并停止内存访问，从而降低整体性能。在本文中，我们提出了 LATPC，这是一种将 TLB 预取与 MSHR 压缩相结合以加速 GPU 地址转换的新颖机制。 LATPC 利用扭曲内跨线程的虚拟页码 (VPN) 的规律性来合并扭曲指令级别的 TLB 未命中。然后，LAPCC 将多个 TLB 未命中请求压缩为少量 MSHR 条目，从而减少争用并实现更高效的资源使用。 LATPC 根据识别的 VPN 模式对页表遍历进行批处理，进一步提高了转换效率，这不仅减少了页表遍历调用的数量，而且还增加了片外 DRAM 行缓冲区局部性，从而降低了转换期间内存访问的延迟。我们使用 24 个 GPU 工作负载进行的评估表明，LAPC 有效地利用了 warp 内地址转换请求的规律性和局部性，在没有 TLB 预取的情况下实现了比基线 1.47 倍的几何平均加速。

papers.title: Learning to Walk: Architecting Learned Virtual Memory Translation.
papers.abstract: The rise in memory demands of emerging datacenter applications has placed virtual memory translation in the spotlight, exposing it as a significant performance bottleneck. To address this problem, this paper introduces Learned Virtual Memory (LVM) , a page table structure that effectively provides optimal single-access address translation . LVM is founded on a novel learned index model that dynamically adapts the address translation procedure based on the characteristics of an application’s virtual address space. Furthermore, LVM’s learned index requires minimal memory space, does not impose stringent physical contiguity requirements, enjoys high cacheability in the MMU, efficiently supports insertions, and relies on simple fixed-point arithmetic. Finally, LVM supports all features of virtual memory, including multiple page sizes. We evaluate LVM with a set of operating system (OS) extensions in Linux, RTL synthesis, and full-system simulations across a wide range of workloads. LVM reduces the address translation overhead by an average of 44% over radix page tables, while reducing the page walk cache area required by 1.5 ×. Overall, LVM achieves a 2-27% speedup in application execution time and is within 1% of an ideal page table.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴数据中心应用程序内存需求的增长使虚拟内存转换成为人们关注的焦点，使其成为一个重要的性能瓶颈。为了解决这个问题，本文引入了学习虚拟内存（LVM），这是一种有效提供最佳单访问地址转换的页表结构。 LVM 基于一种新颖的学习索引模型，该模型根据应用程序虚拟地址空间的特征动态调整地址转换过程。此外，LVM的学习索引需要最小的内存空间，不施加严格的物理连续性要求，在MMU中享有高缓存能力，有效地支持插入，并且依赖于简单的定点运算。最后，LVM 支持虚拟内存的所有功能，包括多种页面大小。我们使用 Linux 中的一组操作系统 (OS) 扩展、RTL 综合以及跨各种工作负载的全系统模拟来评估 LVM。与基页表相比，LVM 平均减少了 44% 的地址转换开销，同时将所需的页遍历缓存区域减少了 1.5 倍。总体而言，LVM 在应用程序执行时间方面实现了 2-27% 的加速，并且与理想页表的差距在 1% 以内。

papers.title: LEGOSim: A Unified Parallel Simulation Framework for Multi-chiplet Heterogeneous Integration.
papers.abstract: The rise of multi-chiplet integration challenges existing simulators like gem5 [ 55 ] and GPGPU-Sim [ 45 ] for efficiently simulating heterogeneous multiple-chiplet systems due to incapability to modularly integrate heterogeneous chiplets and high synchronization overheads in parallel simulation. To address these limitations, this paper introduces LEGOSim, a unified parallel simulation framework capable of flexibly integrating various open-source and in-house designed chiplet simulators as processes in parallel simulation, referred to as "simlets" with minimal modifications needed. It introduces an on-demand synchronization protocol with adaptive time quanta and non-global fencing, ensuring synchronization only occurs when necessary, thus reducing overhead while maintaining correctness. The framework also integrates Network-on-Interposer (NoI) simulator for modeling inter-chiplet communication, enabling accurate assessment of various interconnection architectures’ performance. Evaluated with diverse benchmarks, LEGOSim shows high accuracy in simulating multi-chiplet architectures like SIMBA [ 69 ] and a CiM-based accelerator [ 14 ], with average errors of 3.79% and 3.94%, respectively. It significantly reduces synchronization overhead by up to 99.9% compared to per-cycle synchronization and by 66.1% compared to time quantum synchronization, without synchronization errors. Five case studies show that LEGOSim also provides precise system performance metrics and stall cause reporting, simplifying tasks such as performance analysis and optimization, and can be used for design space exploration of various multi-chiplet systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于无法模块化集成异构小芯片以及并行仿真中的高同步开销，多小芯片集成的兴起对 gem5 [55] 和 GPGPU-Sim [45] 等现有模拟器在高效模拟异构多小芯片系统方面提出了挑战。为了解决这些限制，本文引入了LEGOSim，这是一个统一的并行仿真框架，能够灵活地将各种开源和内部设计的小芯片模拟器集成为并行仿真中的流程，称为“simlet”，只需进行最少的修改。它引入了具有自适应时间量子和非全局防护的按需同步协议，确保同步仅在必要时发生，从而在保持正确性的同时减少开销。该框架还集成了中介层网络 (NoI) 模拟器，用于对芯片间通信进行建模，从而能够准确评估各种互连架构的性能。通过不同的基准评估，LEGOSim 在模拟多芯片架构（如 SIMBA [69] 和基于 CiM 的加速器 [14]）方面表现出很高的准确性，平均误差分别为 3.79% 和 3.94%。与每周期同步相比，它显着降低了同步开销高达 99.9%，与时间量子同步相比，同步开销显着降低了 66.1%，且没有同步错误。五个案例研究表明，LEGOSim 还提供精确的系统性能指标和停顿原因报告，简化了性能分析和优化等任务，并可用于各种多芯片系统的设计空间探索。

papers.title: Leveraging Chiplet-Locality for Efficient Memory Mapping in Multi-Chip Module GPUs.
papers.abstract:
While the multi-chip module (MCM) design allows GPUs to scale compute and memory capabilities through multi-chip integration, it introduces memory system non-uniformity, particularly when a thread accesses resources in remote chiplets. In this work, we investigate how page size in memory mapping affects this non-uniformity. Large pages reduce address translation overhead by covering larger memory regions per TLB entry; however, they enforce coarse-grained data placement, which can lead to data misallocation across chiplets. In contrast, small pages allow for finer-grained placement, increasing the likelihood of mapping data to the chiplet most likely to access it. We observe that application performance is sensitive to page size, with the appropriate configuration depending on workload characteristics.

This paper introduces CLAP which determines the suitable page size—specifically, how much data should be co-located within a single chiplet-for each application. We observe that GPU applications exhibit a distinct memory mapping pattern, in which specific groups of virtually adjacent pages are primarily accessed by the same chiplet with the group size tending to remain consistent -a property referred to as chiplet-locality . Leveraging this insight, CLAP predicts groups of pages exhibit chiplet-locality and pre-organizes them to contiguous physical frames within the chiplet most likely to access them. This organization forms regions that behave like large pages, as CLAP enables these page groups to be covered by a single merged TLB entry through deliberate virtual-to-physical contiguity. As a result, CLAP delivers the benefits of large pages without compromising chiplet-level memory locality. Our evaluation shows that CLAP improves performance by up to 19.2% compared to previous paging schemes.
papers.abstract_zh:
虽然多芯片模块 (MCM) 设计允许 GPU 通过多芯片集成来扩展计算和内存能力，但它会引入内存系统的不一致性，特别是当线程访问远程小芯片中的资源时。在这项工作中，我们研究了内存映射中的页面大小如何影响这种不均匀性。大页面通过覆盖每个 TLB 条目更大的内存区域来减少地址转换开销；然而，它们强制执行粗粒度的数据放置，这可能导致小芯片之间的数据错误分配。相比之下，小页面允许更细粒度的放置，从而增加将数据映射到最有可能访问它的小芯片的可能性。我们观察到应用程序性能对页面大小敏感，并根据工作负载特征进行适当的配置。

本文介绍了 CLAP，它可以确定每个应用程序的合适页面大小（具体来说，在单个小芯片中应共存多少数据）。我们观察到 GPU 应用程序表现出独特的内存映射模式，其中虚拟相邻页面的特定组主要由同一小芯片访问，且组大小往往保持一致 - 这种属性称为小芯片局部性。利用这种洞察力，CLAP 预测页面组表现出小芯片局部性，并将它们预先组织到最有可能访问它们的小芯片内的连续物理帧。这种组织形成了行为类似于大页面的区域，因为 CLAP 使这些页面组能够通过有意的虚拟到物理连续性由单个合并的 TLB 条目覆盖。因此，CLAP 提供了大页面的优势，而不会影响小芯片级内存局部性。我们的评估表明，与之前的寻呼方案相比，CLAP 的性能提高了高达 19.2%。

papers.title: LLM.265: Video Codecs are Secretly Tensor Codecs.
papers.abstract:
As the parameter size of large language models (LLMs) continues to expand, the need for a large memory footprint and high communication bandwidth have become significant bottlenecks for the training and inference of LLMs. To mitigate these bottlenecks, various tensor compression techniques have been proposed to reduce the data size, thereby alleviating memory requirements and communication pressure.

Our research found that video codecs, despite being originally designed for compressing videos, show excellent efficiency when compressing various types of tensors. We demonstrate that video codecs can be versatile and general-purpose tensor codecs while achieving the state-of-the-art compression efficiency in various tasks. We further make use of the hardware video encoding and decoding module available on GPUs to create a framework capable of both inference and training with video codecs repurposed as tensor codecs. Building on insights gained from video codecs, we further show that the hardware of the video codecs can be customized and enhanced to significantly improve tensor encoding/decoding throughput without incurring substantial costs, making it a highly effective solution for large-scale model deployment without requiring significant modifications to the existing GPU architecture.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着大型语言模型（LLM）的参数大小不断扩大，对大内存占用和高通信带宽的需求已成为LLM训练和推理的重大瓶颈。为了缓解这些瓶颈，人们提出了各种张量压缩技术来减小数据大小，从而减轻内存需求和通信压力。

我们的研究发现，视频编解码器尽管最初是为压缩视频而设计的，但在压缩各种类型的张量时表现出出色的效率。我们证明视频编解码器可以是通用的张量编解码器，同时在各种任务中实现最先进的压缩效率。我们进一步利用 GPU 上可用的硬件视频编码和解码模块来创建一个能够进行推理和训练的框架，并将视频编解码器重新用作张量编解码器。基于从视频编解码器获得的见解，我们进一步表明，视频编解码器的硬件可以定制和增强，以显着提高张量编码/解码吞吐量，而不会产生大量成本，使其成为大规模模型部署的高效解决方案，而无需对现有 GPU 架构进行重大修改。

papers.title: LLMulator: Generalizable Cost Modeling for Dataflow Accelerators with Input-Adaptive Control Flow.
papers.abstract:
Precise and rapid performance prediction for dataflow-based accelerators is essential for efficient hardware design and design space exploration. However, existing methods often fall short due to limited generalization across hardware architectures, applications, and input-dependent control flows.

Considering the rich program semantic knowledge contained in pre-trained large language models (LLMs), which is used for text and code generation, we propose a progressive numeric modeling paradigm based on pre-trained LLMs. This is an approach to achieve hardware, application, and control flow-sensitive generalization in dataflow accelerator performance prediction. Specifically, to make accurate performance estimates for unseen applications beyond the scope of the training data, we propose a numeric prediction model capable of estimating any performance range. This is achieved by treating the numerical data of the dataflow program as separate tokens and using categorical output for performance values, allowing us to observe confidence at each numerical position. Second, LLMulator supports input-adaptive performance prediction by introducing a reinforcement learning-based dynamic calibration framework, enabling accurate modeling of applications whose control flow varies with input—unlike prior methods that assume fixed execution paths. The cycles prediction error converges to within 11.2% after several iterations, reducing the error by 9.7% over static models. Finally, to generalize across diverse hardware architectures and configurations, we introduce a progressive data augmentation framework that systematically generates rich datasets spanning software and hardware variations. This includes multi-level dataflow structures and a structured representation of memory parameters and loop mapping primitives, significantly improving the performance of LLMulator for diverse hardware configurations.

Experiments show that LLMulator achieves an average absolute percentage error (MAPE) of 12.2% in ASIC design scenarios, reducing errors by 16.7%-7.8% compared to existing SOTA methods (TLP, GNNHLS). These results establish LLMulator as a highly accurate and interpretable framework for performance prediction, showcasing new opportunities for applying pre-trained LLMs to hardware modeling.
papers.abstract_zh:
基于数据流的加速器的精确、快速的性能预测对于高效的硬件设计和设计空间探索至关重要。然而，由于硬件架构、应用程序和依赖于输入的控制流的通用性有限，现有方法常常存在不足。

考虑到用于文本和代码生成的预训练大型语言模型（LLM）中包含丰富的程序语义知识，我们提出了一种基于预训练 LLM 的渐进式数值建模范例。这是一种在数据流加速器性能预测中实现硬件、应用程序和控制流敏感泛化的方法。具体来说，为了对超出训练数据范围的未见过的应用程序进行准确的性能估计，我们提出了一种能够估计任何性能范围的数值预测模型。这是通过将数据流程序的数值数据视为单独的标记并使用性能值的分类输出来实现的，使我们能够观察每个数值位置的置信度。其次，LLMulator 通过引入基于强化学习的动态校准框架来支持输入自适应性能预测，从而能够对控制流随输入变化的应用程序进行精确建模，这与假设固定执行路径的先前方法不同。经过多次迭代，周期预测误差收敛到11.2%以内，比静态模型误差降低9.7%。最后，为了泛化不同的硬件架构和配置，我们引入了一个渐进式数据增强框架，该框架可以系统地生成跨越软件和硬件变化的丰富数据集。这包括多级数据流结构以及内存参数和循环映射原语的结构化表示，显着提高了 LLMulator 对于不同硬件配置的性能。

实验表明，LLMulator在ASIC设计场景中实现了12.2%的平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE），与现有的SOTA方法（TLP、GNNHLS）相比，误差减少了16.7%-7.8%。这些结果使 LLMulator 成为一个高度准确且可解释的性能预测框架，展示了将预训练的 LLM 应用于硬件建模的新机会。

papers.title: LongSight: Compute-Enabled Memory to Accelerate Large-Context LLMs via Sparse Attention.
papers.abstract: Large input context windows in transformer-based LLMs help minimize hallucinations and improve output accuracy and personalization. However, as the context window grows, the attention phase increasingly dominates execution time. Key–Value (KV) caching alleviates part of this cost by avoiding redundant computation, but the KV cache itself can quickly exceed the capacity of today’s GPU high-bandwidth memory (HBM). In this work, we present LongSight, an algorithm–hardware co-design framework for accelerating attention in large-context scenarios. LongSight leverages a compute-enabled CXL memory device, originally designed for dense retrieval acceleration, to offload KV cache storage and retrieval. Therefore, LongSight effectively elevates the value of relatively low-cost LPDDR DRAM to that of high-end HBM. We demonstrate that, with just a single GPU and a single compute-enabled CXL memory expander, LongSight can efficiently support context lengths of up to 1 million tokens for state-of-the-art Llama models.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于变压器的法学硕士中的大输入上下文窗口有助于最大限度地减少幻觉并提高输出准确性和个性化。然而，随着上下文窗口的增长，注意力阶段越来越主导执行时间。键值 (KV) 缓存通过避免冗余计算来减轻部分成本，但 KV 缓存本身很快就会超过当今 GPU 高带宽内存 (HBM) 的容量。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LongSight，一种算法-硬件协同设计框架，用于加速大上下文场景中的注意力。 LongSight 利用支持计算的 CXL 内存设备（最初设计用于密集检索加速）来卸载 KV 缓存存储和检索。因此，LongSight有效地将相对低成本的LPDDR DRAM的价值提升到高端HBM的价值。我们证明，只需一个 GPU 和一个支持计算的 CXL 内存扩展器，LongSight 就可以有效地支持最先进的 Llama 模型高达 100 万个令牌的上下文长度。

papers.title: LoopFrog: In-Core Hint-Based Loop Parallelization.
papers.abstract:
To scale ILP, designers build deeper and wider out-of-order superscalar CPUs. However, this approach incurs quadratic scaling complexity, area, and energy costs with each generation. While small loops may benefit from increased instruction-window sizes and large loops may see speedups via thread-level parallelism across cores, there remains unexploited medium-granularity parallelism.

We propose LoopFrog to tap into this potential by bringing thread-level speculation schemes into the modern era. LoopFrog runs multiple loop iterations from a single thread in parallel within the microarchitecture. The core can spawn future loop iterations as new microarchitectural threadlets based on compiler-inserted hints, which can leapfrog execution beyond the parent thread’s instruction window, exposing a new, medium-grained parallelism, orthogonal to traditional ILP and TLP. LoopFrog monitors data dependencies between executing threadlets, forwards data for true dependencies and squashes speculative threadlets on ordering violations.

Using an LLVM-based compiler to insert hints, we achieve a geometric mean loop speedup of \(43\%\) , translating to whole-program speedups of \(9.2\%\) on SPEC CPU 2006 and \(9.5\%\) on SPEC CPU 2017 benchmarks, with only modest area and power overheads.
papers.abstract_zh:
为了扩展 ILP，设计人员构建了更深、更宽的无序超标量 CPU。然而，这种方法在每一代都会产生二次缩放的复杂性、面积和能源成本。虽然小循环可能会受益于增加的指令窗口大小，而大循环可能会通过跨内核的线程级并行性获得加速，但仍然存在未开发的中等粒度并行性。

我们建议 LoopF​​rog 通过将线程级推测方案引入现代来挖掘这一潜力。 LoopF​​rog 在微架构内从单个线程并行运行多个循环迭代。核心可以根据编译器插入的提示将未来的循环迭代生成为新的微架构线程，这可以超越父线程的指令窗口执行，从而暴露出一种新的、中粒度的并行性，与传统的 ILP 和 TLP 正交。 LoopF​​rog 监视正在执行的 threadlet 之间的数据依赖关系，转发真实依赖关系的数据，并在违反顺序时压缩推测的 threadlet。

使用基于 LLVM 的编译器插入提示，我们实现了 43% 的几何平均循环加速，这意味着 SPEC CPU 2006 上的整个程序加速为 9.2%，SPEC CPU 2017 基准测试上的整个程序加速为 9.5%，而面积和功耗开销适中。

papers.title: MCBP: A Memory-Compute Efficient LLM Inference Accelerator Leveraging Bit-Slice-enabled Sparsity and Repetitiveness.
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) face significant inference latency due to inefficiencies in GEMM operations, weight access, and KV cache access, especially in real-time scenarios. This highlights the need for a versatile compute-memory efficient accelerator. Unfortunately, existing Transformer accelerators struggle to address both aspects simultaneously, as they focus on value-level processing, missing fine-grained opportunities to optimize computation and memory collaboratively. This paper introduces MCBP, a bit-grained compute-memory efficient algorithm-hardware co-design that leverages bit-slice (BS) enabled repetitiveness and sparsity to accelerate LLM inference. MCBP features three key innovations: 1) BS-repetitiveness-enabled computation reduction (BRCR), which eliminates redundant GEMM computations via leveraging redundancy hidden among BS vectors; 2) BS-sparsity-enabled two-state coding (BSTC), which reduces weight access via exploiting significant sparsity in high-order bit-slice weight; 3) Bit-grained progressive prediction (BGPP), which reduces KV cache access by leveraging early-termination-based bit-grained prediction. These techniques, supported by custom accelerator designs, effectively alleviate the burden in GEMM, weight access, and KV cache access. Extensive experiments on 26 benchmarks show that MCBP achieves 9.43 × speed up and 31.1 × higher energy efficiency than Nvidia A100 GPU. Compared to SOTA Transformer accelerators, MCBP achieves 35 ×, 5.2 × and 3.2 × energy saving than Spatten, FACT and SOFA, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于 GEMM 操作、权重访问和 KV 缓存访问效率低下，大型语言模型 (LLM) 面临严重的推理延迟，尤其是在实时场景中。这凸显了对多功能计算内存高效加速器的需求。不幸的是，现有的 Transformer 加速器很难同时解决这两个方面的问题，因为它们专注于价值级别的处理，错过了协同优化计算和内存的细粒度机会。本文介绍了 MCBP，这是一种位粒度计算内存高效算法硬件协同设计，它利用位片 (BS) 启用的重复性和稀疏性来加速 LLM 推理。 MCBP具有三个关键创新：1）BS重复性计算减少（BRCR），它通过利用BS向量中隐藏的冗余来消除冗余GEMM计算； 2）支持BS稀疏性的二态编码（BSTC），通过利用高阶位片权重中的显着稀疏性来减少权重访问； 3）位粒度渐进预测（BGPP），它通过利用基于早期终止的位粒度预测来减少KV缓存访问。这些技术在定制加速器设计的支持下，有效减轻了GEMM、权重访问和KV缓存访问的负担。对 26 个基准测试的大量实验表明，MCBP 比 Nvidia A100 GPU 实现了 9.43 倍的加速和 31.1 倍的能效。与SOTA Transformer加速器相比，MCBP分别比Spatten、FACT和SOFA实现了35倍、5.2倍和3.2倍的节能。

papers.title: MHE-TPE: Multi-Operand High-Radix Encoder for Mixed-Precision Fixed-Point Tensor Processing Engines.
papers.abstract: Fixed-point general matrix multiplication (GEMM) is pivotal in AI-accelerated computing for data centers and edge devices in GPU and NPU tensor processing engines (TPEs). This work exposes two critical limitations in typical spatial mixed-precision TPEs: ❶ Redundant partial products (PPs) reduction in PE multipliers across temporal and spatial domains in MAC arrays. ❷ Compute density imbalance: when the operand bit-width is reduced by one-half, the throughput of GEMM only doubles, which is half of the theoretical 4× improvement. To address these challenges. First, we design a multi-operand high-radix encoder based on vector inner products, which reduces PPs for vector reduction by half through decoding. Second, we establish a three-stage computational paradigm for TPE’s microarchitecture, comprising bit-slice encoding, PPs generation, and PPs reduction, which enables bit-width reconfiguration in unified hardware. Our approach decomposes the mixed-precision mapping process in TPEs into two components: temporal mapping of multi-precision multiplicands and spatial mapping of multipliers, achieving balanced computational density. Implementation results based on the UMC 22nm process demonstrate that this architecture outperforms other solutions in critical metrics, including the mixed-precision support range ( INT2 ∼ INT32 combinations), area efficiency, and energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 定点通用矩阵乘法 (GEMM) 在 GPU 和 NPU 张量处理引擎 (TPE) 中的数据中心和边缘设备的 AI 加速计算中至关重要。这项工作暴露了典型空间混合精度 TPE 的两个关键限制： ❶ MAC 阵列中跨时域和空间域的 PE 乘法器的冗余部分积（PP）减少。 ❷ 计算密度不平衡：当操作数位宽减少一半时，GEMM 的吞吐量仅增加一倍，是理论 4 倍提升的一半。为了应对这些挑战。首先，我们设计了一种基于向量内积的多操作数高基编码器，通过解码将向量约简的PPs减少了一半。其次，我们为 TPE 的微架构建立了一个三阶段计算范式，包括位片编码、PPs 生成和 PPs 缩减，这使得能够在统一硬件中进行位宽重新配置。我们的方法将 TPE 中的混合精度映射过程分解为两个部分：多精度被乘数的时间映射和乘数的空间映射，从而实现平衡的计算密度。基于UMC 22nm工艺的实施结果表明，该架构在关键指标上优于其他解决方案，包括混合精度支持范围（INT2∼INT32组合）、面积效率和能源效率。

papers.title: Micro-MAMA: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Multicore Prefetching.
papers.abstract:
Online reinforcement learning (RL) holds promise for microarchitectural techniques like prefetching. Its ability to adapt to changing and previously-unseen scenarios makes it a versatile technique. However, when multiple RL-operated components compete for shared resources in multicore systems, they can often converge to sub-optimal policies due to conflicting incentives.

In this work, we identify key challenges that arise when scaling RL-based prefetchers to multi-core environments, and relate these to known problems from Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). In particular, we find that recent work using multi-armed bandit algorithms for prefetching can lead to inefficient systems when memory bandwidth is limited, as each agent attempts to claim a disproportionate share of the system’s bandwidth.

To solve this problem, we present μ Mama , a light-weight supervisor of distributed multi-armed bandit agents, which learns performant joint-policies. In μ Mama , distributed local agents narrow the global joint-action search space, while a central agent with a global perspective learns system-wide policies. Additionally, μ Mama provides key local agents with a system perspective, encouraging them to avoid actions that would harm the others.

μ Mama exhibits high adaptability, which we show by evaluating it using multiple measures of performance. In our evaluation of an 8-core system, the policies learned by μ Mama outperform those of independently-operating agents by an average of 2.1% when optimizing for throughput, and by an average of 10.4% when optimizing for fairness. We also show that μ Mama performs better in systems that are more bandwidth constrained, as well as when profiles of the workloads are provided.
papers.abstract_zh:
在线强化学习 (RL) 为预取等微架构技术带来了希望。它适应不断变化和以前未见过的场景的能力使其成为一种多功能技术。然而，当多个强化学习操作的组件在多核系统中竞争共享资源时，由于激励冲突，它们通常会收敛到次优策略。

在这项工作中，我们确定了将基于 RL 的预取器扩展到多核环境时出现的关键挑战，并将这些挑战与多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 的已知问题相关联。特别是，我们发现，当内存带宽有限时，最近使用多臂老虎机算法进行预取的工作可能会导致系统效率低下，因为每个代理都试图占用不成比例的系统带宽份额。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 μ Mama，一个分布式多臂老虎机代理的轻量级监督器，它学习高性能的联合策略。在 μ Mama 中，分布式本地代理缩小了全局联合行动搜索空间，而具有全局视角的中央代理则学习系统范围的策略。此外，μMama 还为当地主要特工提供系统视角，鼓励他们避免做出伤害他人的行为。

μ Mama 表现出高度的适应性，我们通过使用多种表现指标对其进行评估来证明这一点。在我们对 8 核系统的评估中，μ Mama 学习的策略在吞吐量优化时比独立操作的代理平均高出 2.1%，在公平性优化时平均高出 10.4%。我们还表明，μ Mama 在带宽受限的系统以及提供工作负载配置文件时表现更好。

papers.title: MINDFUL: Safe, Implantable, Large-Scale Brain-Computer Interfaces from a System-Level Design Perspective.
papers.abstract:
Brain-computer interface (BCI) technology is among the fastest growing fields in research and development. On the application side, BCIs provide a deeper understanding of brain function, inspire the creation of complex computational models, and hold significant promise for assisting individuals with disabilities. On the system side, BCIs have evolved from non-invasive, low-resolution wearable devices to invasive, high-resolution, implantable systems-on-chip (SoCs) that offer higher-quality brain data, enabling more effective exploration of brain activity. However, implantable BCIs must acquire large-scale neural signals and run real-time BCI applications, all while relying on wireless communication for practical use. Unlike typical devices, BCIs must operate within strict power constraints to ensure safety, which is crucial for their deployment in real-world applications. This requires careful co-design and a balanced approach across the key components of the BCI system.

In this work, we discuss why BCIs present unique design challenges compared to conventional computing systems. We develop equations based on the system-level structure of modern BCIs to estimate power consumption and explore trade-offs among key system components: data acquisition, on-chip computation, and wireless communication. Using these equations, we analyze BCI SoC designs that support wireless communication and examine how scaling trends, design constraints, and optimization strategies may impact the feasibility of future BCIs. Specifically, we show a clear discrepancy between certain cutting-edge, BCI-centric computations and the feasibility of their on-chip integration in power-constrained BCI systems, revealing a significant gap between the development of deep learning methods for BCI and the design of safe BCI systems. However, with targeted optimizations in BCI system design and greater specialization for specific applications, future BCI systems will be able to successfully integrate modern BCI applications and advance toward widespread adoption.
papers.abstract_zh:
脑机接口（BCI）技术是研究和开发中增长最快的领域之一。在应用方面，脑机接口提供了对大脑功能的更深入的了解，激发了复杂计算模型的创建，并为帮助残疾人士带来了重大希望。在系统方面，脑机接口已经从非侵入性、低分辨率可穿戴设备发展到侵入性、高分辨率、可植入片上系统（SoC），可提供更高质量的大脑数据，从而能够更有效地探索大脑活动。然而，植入式脑机接口必须采集大规模神经信号并运行实时脑机接口应用程序，同时在实际使用中依赖无线通信。与典型设备不同，BCI 必须在严格的功率限制下运行以确保安全，这对于它们在实际应用中的部署至关重要。这需要 BCI 系统的关键组件进行仔细的协同设计和平衡的方法。

在这项工作中，我们讨论了为什么脑机接口与传统计算系统相比会带来独特的设计挑战。我们根据现代脑机接口的系统级结构开发方程来估计功耗并探索关键系统组件之间的权衡：数据采集、片上计算和无线通信。使用这些方程，我们分析支持无线通信的 BCI SoC 设计，并研究扩展趋势、设计约束和优化策略如何影响未来 BCI 的可行性。具体来说，我们展示了某些尖端的、以 BCI 为中心的计算与其在功率受限的 BCI 系统中片上集成的可行性之间存在明显的差异，揭示了 BCI 深度学习方法的开发与安全 BCI 系统的设计之间的显着差距。然而，通过 BCI 系统设计的针对性优化和特定应用的更加专业化，未来的 BCI 系统将能够成功集成现代 BCI 应用并走向广泛采用。

papers.title: Misam: Machine Learning Assisted Dataflow Selection in Accelerators for Sparse Matrix Multiplication.
papers.abstract: The performance of Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication (SpGEMM), a foundational operation in scientific computing and machine learning, is highly sensitive to the diverse and dynamic sparsity patterns of its input matrices. While specialized hardware accelerators improve efficiency, their reliance on fixed dataflows, each optimized for a narrow sparsity regime, results in suboptimal performance on real-world workloads. Even recent flexible accelerators that support multiple dataflows face two critical limitations: (1) the lack of a fast and principled mechanism for runtime dataflow selection, and (2) the area overhead and hardware underutilization incurred to provide that flexibility. We present Misam, a machine learning framework that addresses these challenges to enable adaptive and hardware-efficient SpGEMM acceleration. Misam employs a lightweight decision tree to dynamically predict the optimal hardware configuration from matrix features. To overcome hardware underutilization, Misam leverages FPGA reconfigurability to deploy specialized, resource-efficient bitstreams on demand. This process is governed by an intelligent reconfiguration engine that evaluates whether the anticipated performance gain justifies the overhead of switching hardware configurations. Misam’s dynamic approach yields up to a 10.76 × speedup by judiciously reconfiguring.
