Misam demonstrates that a synergistic combination of machine learning-based prediction and judicious hardware reconfiguration can achieve high performance across a wide spectrum of sparsity patterns, bridging the gap between specialized efficiency and general-purpose adaptability.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpGEMM) 是科学计算和机器学习的基础运算，其性能对其输入矩阵的多样化和动态稀疏模式高度敏感。虽然专用硬件加速器提高了效率，但它们对固定数据流的依赖（每个数据流都针对狭窄的稀疏范围进行了优化）导致实际工作负载的性能不佳。即使是最近支持多个数据流的灵活加速器也面临两个关键限制：(1) 缺乏用于运行时数据流选择的快速且有原则的机制，以及 (2) 提供这种灵活性所产生的面积开销和硬件利用率不足。我们推出了 Misam，这是一个机器学习框架，可以解决这些挑战，以实现自适应且硬件高效的 SpGEMM 加速。 Misam 采用轻量级决策树根据矩阵特征动态预测最佳硬件配置。为了克服硬件利用率不足的问题，Misam 利用 FPGA 可重新配置性来按需部署专用的、资源高效的比特流。此过程由智能重新配置引擎控制，该引擎评估预期的性能增益是否证明切换硬件配置的开销是合理的。 Misam 的动态方法通过明智的重新配置可实现高达 10.76 倍的加速。 Misam 证明，基于机器学习的预测和明智的硬件重新配置的协同组合可以在各种稀疏模式下实现高性能，从而缩小专业效率和通用适应性之间的差距。

papers.title: Multi-Dimensional ML-Pipeline Optimization in Cost-Effective Disaggregated Datacenter.
papers.abstract: Machine learning (ML) pipelines deployed in datacenters are becoming increasingly complex and resource intensive, requiring careful optimizations to meet performance and latency requirements. Deployment in NUMA architectures with heterogeneous memory types such as CXL introduces a vast configuration space for memory and thread management. However, existing methods often need help to efficiently navigate this space, relying on significant manual tuning and needing more adaptability across diverse hardware platforms and extensive user-side code modification. This paper presents and experimentally evaluates an adaptive auto-tuning framework that optimizes memory configurations to maximize system throughput while adhering to Service Level Agreements (SLAs) on latency. Our optimization is carried out in two phases, addressing both performance and power efficiency. The proposed framework integrates an extended Berkeley Packet Filter (eBPF)-based kernel module for real-time performance monitoring and a user-space optimization core leveraging Bayesian Optimization and Pareto Optimality to explore high-dimensional configuration spaces. Extensive experimental evaluations on various workloads demonstrate that our framework achieves up to a 48% increase in throughput compared to default NUMA, TPP, Caption, and GPU while reducing search costs by as much as 77%. Furthermore, our two-phase optimization approach incorporates power efficiency, achieving up to 14.3% power savings without compromising throughput.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据中心部署的机器学习 (ML) 管道变得越来越复杂且资源密集，需要仔细优化才能满足性能和延迟要求。在具有异构内存类型（例如 CXL）的 NUMA 架构中进行部署，为内存和线程管理引入了巨大的配置空间。然而，现有的方法通常需要帮助来有效地驾驭这个空间，依赖于大量的手动调整，并且需要跨不同硬件平台和广泛的用户端代码修改的更多适应性。本文提出并通过实验评估了一种自适应自动调整框架，该框架可优化内存配置以最大限度地提高系统吞吐量，同时遵守延迟方面的服务级别协议 (SLA)。我们的优化分两个阶段进行，解决性能和能效问题。所提出的框架集成了基于扩展伯克利包过滤器（eBPF）的内核模块，用于实时性能监控，以及利用贝叶斯优化和帕累托最优来探索高维配置空间的用户空间优化核心。对各种工作负载的广泛实验评估表明，与默认的 NUMA、TPP、Caption 和 GPU 相比，我们的框架吞吐量提高了 48%，同时搜索成本降低了 77%。此外，我们的两阶段优化方法结合了电源效率，在不影响吞吐量的情况下实现了高达 14.3% 的节能。

papers.title: Multi-Stream Squash Reuse for Control-Independent Processors.
papers.abstract:
Single-core performance remains crucial for mitigating the serial bottleneck in applications, according to Amdahl’s Law. However, hard-to-predict branches pose significant challenges to achieve high Instruction-Level Parallelism (ILP) due to frequent pipeline flushes. In typical processors, when a branch is mispredicted, subsequent instructions are indiscriminately flushed, including potentially useful instructions that will be invariably executed in the future, known as Control-Independent (CI) instructions. While existing CI proposals are effective at leveraging idiomatic control flow structures, these techniques overlook more general reconvergence scenarios. Our analysis reveals that due to the program’s dynamic execution behavior, the redirected instruction stream can reconverge with not only the last squashed stream, but also several preceding streams. On average, 10% (and up to 31%) of reconvergence opportunities are overlooked if we only consider the interactions between the last squashed instruction stream and the current one.

In this paper, we introduce Multi-Stream Squash Reuse , which discovers execution reuse opportunities from several previously squashed streams. We use tagged rename mapping to enable pairwise comparisons between any two program execution states to identify data reuse. Our proposal achieves average improvements in IPC of 2.2% (SPECint2006), 0.8% (SPECint2017) and 2.4% (GAP) and maximum gains of 8.9% ( astar ), 6.1% ( bc ) and 4.0% ( cc ) from SPECint2006 and GAP benchmark suites.
papers.abstract_zh:
根据阿姆达尔定律，单核性能对于缓解应用程序中的串行瓶颈仍然至关重要。然而，由于频繁的管道刷新，难以预测的分支对实现高指令级并行性 (ILP) 提出了重大挑战。在典型的处理器中，当分支预测错误时，后续指令将被不加区别地刷新，包括将来总是执行的潜在有用指令，称为控制独立（CI）指令。虽然现有的 CI 提案在利用惯用的控制流结构方面是有效的，但这些技术忽略了更一般的重新收敛场景。我们的分析表明，由于程序的动态执行行为，重定向的指令流不仅可以与最后一个压缩的流重新收敛，还可以与前面的几个流重新收敛。如果我们只考虑最后压缩的指令流和当前指令流之间的交互，平均而言，10%（最多 31%）的重新收敛机会会被忽略。

在本文中，我们介绍了多流挤压重用，它从多个先前挤压的流中发现执行重用机会。我们使用标记重命名映射来启用任意两个程序执行状态之间的成对比较，以识别数据重用。我们的建议与 SPECint2006 和 GAP 基准套件相比，IPC 平均提高了 2.2% (SPECint2006)、0.8% (SPECint2017) 和 2.4% (GAP)，最大增益为 8.9% (astar)、6.1% (bc) 和 4.0% (cc)。

papers.title: MUSS-TI: Multi-level Shuttle Scheduling for Large-Scale Entanglement Module Linked Trapped-Ion.
papers.abstract:
Trapped-ion computing is a leading architecture in the pursuit of scalable and high fidelity quantum systems. Modular quantum architectures based on photonic interconnects offer a promising path for scaling trapped ion devices. In this design, multiple Quantum Charge Coupled Device (QCCD) units are interconnected through entanglement module. Each unit features a multi-zone layout that separates functionalities into distinct areas, enabling more efficient and flexible quantum operations. However, achieving efficient and scalable compilation of quantum circuits in such entanglement module linked Quantum Charge-Coupled Device (EML-QCCD) remains a primary challenge for practical quantum applications.

In this work, we propose a scalable compiler tailored for large-scale trapped-ion architectures, with the goal of reducing the shuttling overhead inherent in EML-QCCD devices. MUSS-TI introduces a multi-level scheduling approach inspired by multi-level memory scheduling in classical computing. This method is designed to be aware of the distinct roles of different zones and to minimize the number of shuttling operations required in EML-QCCD systems. We demonstrate that EML-QCCD architectures are well-suited for executing large-scale applications. Our evaluation shows that MUSS-TI reduces shuttle operations by 41.74% for applications with 30–32 qubits, and by an average of 73.38% and 59.82% for applications with 117–128 qubits and 256–299 qubits, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
俘获离子计算是追求可扩展和高保真量子系统的领先架构。基于光子互连的模块化量子架构为缩小俘获离子器件提供了一条有前途的途径。在该设计中，多个量子电荷耦合器件（QCCD）单元通过纠缠模块互连。每个单元都采用多区域布局，将功能分为不同的区域，从而实现更高效、更灵活的量子操作。然而，在这种纠缠模块连接的量子电荷耦合器件（EML-QCCD）中实现量子电路的高效且可扩展的编译仍然是实际量子应用的主要挑战。

在这项工作中，我们提出了一种专为大规模离子捕获架构量身定制的可扩展编译器，其目标是减少 EML-QCCD 器件固有的穿梭开销。 MUSS-TI 引入了受经典计算中多级内存调度启发的多级调度方法。该方法旨在了解不同区域的不同作用，并最大限度地减少 EML-QCCD 系统中所需的穿梭操作数量。我们证明 EML-QCCD 架构非常适合执行大规模应用程序。我们的评估表明，对于 30-32 量子位的应用，MUSS-TI 将穿梭操作减少了 41.74%，对于 117-128 量子位和 256-299 量子位的应用，平均分别减少了 73.38% 和 59.82%。

papers.title: MX+: Pushing the Limits of Microscaling Formats for Efficient Large Language Model Serving.
papers.abstract: Reduced-precision data formats are crucial for cost-effective serving of large language models (LLMs). While numerous reduced-precision formats have been introduced thus far, they often require intrusive modifications to the software frameworks or are rather unconventional for widespread adoption across hardware vendors. In this paper, we instead focus on recent industry-driven variants of block floating-point (BFP) formats and conduct a comprehensive analysis to push their limits for efficient LLM serving. Our analysis shows that existing ultra low-bit BFP variants struggle to provide reasonable language model performance due to outlier values in blocks. To address the outliers with BFPs, we propose MX+, a cost-effective and non-intrusive extension designed for seamless integration into the microscaling (MX) formats. MX+ builds on the key insight that the outlier does not need to use its exponent field in the element data type, which allows us to repurpose the exponent field as an extended mantissa to increase the precision of the outlier element. Our evaluation shows that MX+ achieves significantly higher model performance compared to the 4-bit MX format (MXFP4) with negligible storage overhead and slowdown, thus offering a compelling alternative to MXFP4 or MXFP6 for efficient LLM inference.
papers.abstract_zh: 降低精度的数据格式对于大型语言模型 (LLM) 的经济高效服务至关重要。虽然迄今为止已经引入了许多降低精度的格式，但它们通常需要对软件框架进行侵入性修改，或者对于硬件供应商的广泛采用来说是非常规的。在本文中，我们重点关注最新行业驱动的块浮点 (BFP) 格式变体，并进行全面分析，以突破其高效 LLM 服务的极限。我们的分析表明，由于块中的异常值，现有的超低位 BFP 变体难以提供合理的语言模型性能。为了解决 BFP 的异常问题，我们提出了 MX+，这是一种经济高效且非侵入式的扩展，旨在无缝集成到微缩放 (MX) 格式中。 MX+ 建立在离群值不需要在元素数据类型中使用其指数字段的关键见解的基础上，这使我们能够将指数字段重新用作扩展尾数，以提高离群值元素的精度。我们的评估表明，与 4 位 MX 格式 (MXFP4) 相比，MX+ 实现了显着更高的模型性能，并且存储开销和速​​度下降可以忽略不计，从而为 MXFP4 或 MXFP6 提供了一个引人注目的替代方案，以实现高效的 LLM 推理。

papers.title: NetSparse: In-Network Acceleration of Distributed Sparse Kernels.
papers.abstract:
Many hardware accelerators have been proposed to accelerate sparse computations. When these accelerators are placed in the nodes of a large cluster, distributed sparse applications become heavily communication-bound. Unfortunately, software solutions to optimize network communication are inefficient.

In this paper, we introduce novel hardware mechanisms to optimize network communication in distributed sparse computations. Our proposal, called NetSparse , consists of four mechanisms. Communication is offloaded to new processing units in the NIC that support efficient remote indexed gather operations, minimizing host-NIC communication. Moreover, these units have the ability to identify and eliminate redundant requests, which minimizes traffic. Further, new hardware modules in the NICs and switches concatenate multiple requests with the same destination node in a single packet, saving traffic and header overheads. Finally, switches are augmented with a hardware cache that stores fetched data from remote racks, making it available to all the nodes in the local rack on demand. Our evaluation on a simulated 128-node cluster with per-node sparse accelerators running sparse workloads reveals that NetSparse improves performance substantially. When the cluster uses traditional software-based communication, the workloads run only 3x faster than on a single-node system; when it is augmented with the NetSparse hardware, the workloads run 38x faster than on the single-node system—attaining more than half of the performance of an ideal system that has no communication overheads.
papers.abstract_zh:
已经提出了许多硬件加速器来加速稀疏计算。当这些加速器放置在大型集群的节点中时，分布式稀疏应用程序会受到严重的通信限制。不幸的是，优化网络通信的软件解决方案效率低下。

在本文中，我们介绍了新颖的硬件机制来优化分布式稀疏计算中的网络通信。我们的提案称为 NetSparse，由四种机制组成。通信被卸载到 NIC 中的新处理单元，支持高效的远程索引收集操作，从而最大限度地减少主机与 NIC 的通信。此外，这些单元能够识别并消除冗余请求，从而最大限度地减少流量。此外，NIC 和交换机中的新硬件模块将多个请求连接到单个数据包中的同一目标节点，从而节省流量和标头开销。最后，交换机增加了硬件缓存，用于存储从远程机架获取的数据，使其按需可供本地机架中的所有节点使用。我们对模拟 128 节点集群（每节点稀疏加速器运行稀疏工作负载）的评估表明，NetSparse 显着提高了性能。当集群使用传统的基于软件的通信时，工作负载的运行速度仅比单节点系统快 3 倍；当使用 NetSparse 硬件对其进行增强时，工作负载的运行速度比单节点系统快 38 倍，达到没有通信开销的理想系统性能的一半以上。

papers.title: NetZIP: Algorithm/Hardware Co-design of In-network Lossless Compression for Distributed Large Model Training.
papers.abstract: In distributed large model training, the long communication time required to exchange large volumes of gradients and activations among GPUs dominates the training time. To reduce the communication times, lossy or lossless compression of gradients and/or activations can be employed. However, lossy compression of gradients and activations may demand more training iterations to achieve the same model accuracy and cause convergence failure, respectively. Lossless compression, on the other hand, may not reduce the volumes of gradients and activations enough to offset the significant latency associated with compression and decompression on current platforms. To address these challenges, we propose NetZIP , an algorithm/hardware co-design for in-network lossless compression of both gradients and activations. NetZIP consists of two components. (1) NetZIP -algorithm transforms gradients and activations at the bit and value levels to help lightweight standard lossless compression achieve more compression of the gradients and activations. (2) NetZIP -accelerator integrates NetZIP -algorithm with a lightweight lossless compression accelerator within a NIC in a bump-in-the-wire fashion to reduce the compression/decompression latency under the resource constraints. NetZIP -algorithm compresses gradients and activations 40–63 and 43–75 percentage points more, respectively, than heavy standard lossless compression for Llama-3 70B, GPT-3 175B, and Llama-3 405B. NetZIP -accelerator, implemented within FPGA-NICs and connected to commodity servers, provides orders of magnitude lower latency for compression and decompression, respectively, than the lowest latency achieved by the standard lossless compression on current platforms. With greater compression of both gradients and activations, and lower latency for compression and decompression than the standard lossless compression, NetZIP provides 35% lower training time.
papers.abstract_zh: 在分布式大型模型训练中，GPU 之间交换大量梯度和激活所需的较长通信时间主导了训练时间。为了减少通信时间，可以采用梯度和/或激活的有损或无损压缩。然而，梯度和激活的有损压缩可能需要更多的训练迭代才能达到相同的模型精度，并分别导致收敛失败。另一方面，无损压缩可能无法减少足够的梯度和激活量来抵消当前平台上与压缩和解压缩相关的显着延迟。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 NetZIP，这是一种用于梯度和激活的网络内无损压缩的算法/硬件协同设计。 NetZIP 由两个组件组成。 (1) NetZIP算法在位和值级别上变换梯度和激活，以帮助轻量级标准无损压缩实现梯度和激活的更多压缩。 (2) NetZIP加速器将NetZIP算法与NIC内的轻量级无损压缩加速器以线内凸块的方式集成，以减少资源限制下的压缩/解压缩延迟。对于 Llama-3 70B、GPT-3 175B 和 Llama-3 405B，NetZIP 算法比重度标准无损压缩的梯度和激活值分别高出 40-63 和 43-75 个百分点。 NetZIP 加速器在 FPGA-NIC 内实现并连接到商用服务器，与当前平台上标准无损压缩实现的最低延迟相比，压缩和解压缩延迟分别降低了几个数量级。与标准无损压缩相比，NetZIP 对梯度和激活的压缩程度更高，压缩和解压缩的延迟更低，训练时间缩短了 35%。

papers.title: Nexus Machine: An Energy-Efficient Active Message Inspired Reconfigurable Architecture.
papers.abstract: Modern reconfigurable architectures are increasingly favored for resource-constrained edge devices as they balance high performance, energy efficiency, and programmability well. However, their proficiency in handling regular compute patterns constrains their effectiveness in executing irregular workloads, such as sparse linear algebra and graph analytics with unpredictable access patterns and control flow. To address this limitation, we introduce the Nexus Machine , a novel reconfigurable architecture consisting of a PE array designed to efficiently handle irregularity by distributing sparse tensors across the fabric and employing active messages that morph instructions based on dynamic control flow. As the inherent irregularity in workloads can lead to high load imbalance among different Processing Elements (PEs), Nexus Machine deploys and executes instructions en-route on idle PEs at run-time. Thus, unlike traditional reconfigurable architectures with only static instructions within each PE, Nexus Machine brings dynamic control to the idle compute units, mitigating load imbalance and enhancing overall performance. Our experiments demonstrate that Nexus Machine achieves 90% better performance compared to state-of-the-art (SOTA) reconfigurable architectures, within the same power budget and area. Nexus Machine also achieves 70% higher fabric utilization, in contrast to SOTA architectures.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代可重构架构越来越受到资源有限的边缘设备的青睐，因为它们很好地平衡了高性能、能源效率和可编程性。然而，他们处理常规计算模式的能力限制了他们执行不规则工作负载的效率，例如具有不可预测的访问模式和控制流的稀疏线性代数和图形分析。为了解决这一限制，我们引入了 Nexus Machine，这是一种新颖的可重构架构，由 PE 阵列组成，旨在通过在结构上分布稀疏张量并使用基于动态控制流改变指令的活动消息来有效处理不规则性。由于工作负载固有的不规则性可能导致不同处理元件 (PE) 之间的负载高度不平衡，因此 Nexus Machine 在运行时在空闲 PE 上部署并执行途中指令。因此，与每个 PE 中仅包含静态指令的传统可重构架构不同，Nexus Machine 为空闲计算单元带来动态控制，从而减轻负载不平衡并提高整体性能。我们的实验表明，在相同的功率预算和面积下，Nexus Machine 的性能比最先进的 (SOTA) 可重构架构高出 90%。与 SOTA 架构相比，Nexus Machine 的结构利用率也提高了 70%。

papers.title: OASIS: A Commercial High Performance Terminal AI Processor Supporting RISC-V Tensor Extension Instructions.
papers.abstract: The exponential growth of artificial intelligence (AI) has spurred a demand for efficient, scalable computing. While domain-specific accelerators (DSAs) outperform general-purpose GPUs, their closed architectures lead to ecosystem fragmentation. The open RISC-V ISA offers a path to a unified ecosystem, but faces fundamental architectural challenges: the inefficiency of standard extensions for domain-specific workloads and severe memory contention in heterogeneous SoCs. This paper investigates these challenges and proposes a set of evidence-backed design principles for high-performance RISC-V AI accelerators. To this end, we present OASIS, the first commercial terminal AI processor supporting RISC-V tensor extension instructions. Its core innovation is a scalable, multi-core RISC-V Tensor Processing Unit (RTPU) architected with three key principles: a hardware-accelerated data path to solve the im2col bottleneck; a decoupled memory subsystem to eliminate resource contention; and a novel, low-overhead synchronization mechanism that enables near-linear multi-core scaling. The success of this evidence-driven architecture is ultimately validated by an evaluation of the fabricated chip. To demonstrate its versatility, we benchmark its performance across a wide spectrum of representative AI models. Our results consistently show superior performance over leading commercial platforms across key terminal AI scenarios. This outcome is supported by deep-dive analyses including multi-core scaling and multi-model concurrency tests, alongside a Roofline model which confirms high hardware utilization. By submitting our tensor extension for standardization, this work establishes a new, evidence-backed blueprint for an open, scalable, and high-performance AI computing ecosystem.
papers.abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 的指数级增长刺激了对高效、可扩展计算的需求。虽然特定领域加速器 (DSA) 的性能优于通用 GPU，但其封闭架构会导致生态系统碎片化。开放的 RISC-V ISA 提供了一条通往统一生态系统的道路，但面临着基本的架构挑战：特定领域工作负载的标准扩展效率低下，以及异构 SoC 中严重的内存争用。本文研究了这些挑战，并提出了一套基于证据的高性能 RISC-V AI 加速器设计原则。为此，我们推出了首款支持RISC-V张量扩展指令的商用终端AI处理器OASIS。其核心创新是可扩展的多核 RISC-V 张量处理单元 (RTPU)，其架构遵循三个关键原则：解决 im2col 瓶颈的硬件加速数据路径；解耦的内存子系统，以消除资源争用；以及一种新颖的低开销同步机制，可实现近线性的多核扩展。这种证据驱动架构的成功最终通过对制造芯片的评估来验证。为了展示其多功能性，我们在各种代表性人工智能模型中对其性能进行了基准测试。我们的结果始终显示出在关键终端人工智能场景中优于领先商业平台的性能。这一结果得到了深入分析的支持，包括多核扩展和多模型并发测试，以及确认高硬件利用率的 Roofline 模型。通过提交我们的张量扩展进行标准化，这项工作为开放、可扩展和高性能的人工智能计算生态系统建立了一个新的、有证据支持的蓝图。

papers.title: OmniSim: Simulating Hardware with C Speed and RTL Accuracy for High-Level Synthesis Designs.
papers.abstract:
High-Level Synthesis (HLS) is increasingly popular for hardware design using C/C++ instead of Register-Transfer Level (RTL). To express concurrent hardware behavior in a sequential language like C/C++, HLS tools introduce constructs such as infinite loops and dataflow modules connected by FIFOs (first-in first-out). While these constructs can represent concurrency, efficiently and accurately simulating them at C level remains challenging. First, without hardware timing information, functional verification typically requires slow RTL synthesis and simulation, as the current approaches in commercial HLS tools. Second, cycle-accurate performance metrics, such as end-to-end latency or throughput, also rely on RTL simulation. No existing HLS tool fully overcomes the first limitation. For the second, prior work such as LightningSim partially improves simulation speed but lacks support for advanced dataflow features like cyclic dependencies and non-blocking FIFO accesses.

To overcome both limitations, we propose OmniSim , a framework that significantly extends the simulation capabilities of both academic and commercial HLS tools. First, OmniSim enables fast and accurate simulation of complex dataflow designs, especially those explicitly declared unsupported by commercial tools. It does so through sophisticated software multi-threading, where threads are orchestrated by querying and updating a set of FIFO tables that explicitly record exact hardware timing of each FIFO access. Second, OmniSim achieves near-C simulation speed with near-RTL accuracy for both functionality and performance, via flexibly coupled and overlapped functionality and performance simulations.

We demonstrate that OmniSim successfully simulates eleven designs previously unsupported by any HLS tool, achieving up to 35.9 × speedup over traditional C/RTL co-simulation, and up to 6.61 × speedup over the state-of-the-art yet less capable simulator, LightningSim, on its own benchmark suite.
papers.abstract_zh:
在使用 C/C++ 而不是寄存器传输级 (RTL) 的硬件设计中，高级综合 (HLS) 越来越受欢迎。为了用 C/C++ 等顺序语言表达并发硬件行为，HLS 工具引入了无限循环和通过 FIFO（先进先出）连接的数据流模块等结构。虽然这些构造可以表示并发性，但在 C 级别有效且准确地模拟它们仍然具有挑战性。首先，在没有硬件时序信息的情况下，功能验证通常需要缓慢的 RTL 合成和仿真，正如商业 HLS 工具中的当前方法一样。其次，周期精确的性能指标（例如端到端延迟或吞吐量）也依赖于 RTL 模拟。现有的 HLS 工具还没有完全克服第一个限制。其次，LightningSim 等之前的工作部分提高了模拟速度，但缺乏对循环依赖和非阻塞 FIFO 访问等高级数据流功能的支持。

为了克服这两个限制，我们提出了 OmniSim，这是一个可以显着扩展学术和商业 HLS 工具模拟功能的框架。首先，OmniSim 能够快速、准确地模拟复杂的数据流设计，尤其是那些明确声明不受商业工具支持的设计。它通过复杂的软件多线程来实现这一点，其中通过查询和更新一组 FIFO 表来编排线程，这些表明确记录每个 FIFO 访问的准确硬件时序。其次，OmniSim 通过灵活耦合和重叠的功能和性能仿真，实现了接近 C 的仿真速度和接近 RTL 的功能和性能精度。

我们证明，OmniSim 成功模拟了以前任何 HLS 工具都不支持的 11 种设计，在其自己的基准套件上实现了比传统 C/RTL 协同仿真高达 35.9 倍的加速，比最先进但能力较差的模拟器 LightningSim 高达 6.61 倍的加速。

papers.title: One Flew over the Stack Engine's Nest: Practical Microarchitectural Attacks on the Stack Engine.
papers.abstract: Security research on modern CPUs has raised numerous concerns in recent years. These security issues stem from classic microarchitectural optimizations designed decades ago, without consideration for security. Stack pointer tracking, also known as the stack engine in recent CPUs, is one such optimization. To investigate the security implications of the stack engine, we reverse engineer its operational details on a number of recent Intel and AMD CPUs for the first time. Our results show the particular microarchitecture-dependent behaviors of the stack engine, such as the conditions under which it needs to synchronize the stack pointer values with the backend. Using these results, we build three primitives called Direct Underflow , Sync+Reload and Prime+Sync+Probe that enable information leakage through the stack engine under different conditions. We use these primitives in the construction of various covert and side-channel attacks, leaking sensitive patient records from a widely-used JSON library as an example. Our mitigation efforts reveal that recent AMD Zen 4 and Zen 5 CPUs include undocumented chicken bits which allow enabling or disabling the stack engine. Using these bits to disable the stack engine, we measure 3.98% and 3.94% slowdown using SPEC CPU2017 on Zen 4 and Zen 5, respectively, prompting the need to consider more secure designs for the stack engine in future CPUs which we also discuss.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，针对现代 CPU 的安全研究引起了众多关注。这些安全问题源于几十年前设计的经典微架构优化，没有考虑安全性。堆栈指针跟踪（在最近的 CPU 中也称为堆栈引擎）就是这样的优化之一。为了调查堆栈引擎的安全隐患，我们首次在一些最新的 Intel 和 AMD CPU 上对其操作细节进行了逆向工程。我们的结果显示了堆栈引擎的特定微架构相关行为，例如需要将堆栈指针值与后端同步的条件。利用这些结果，我们构建了三个原语，称为 Direct Underflow 、 Sync+Reload 和 Prime+Sync+Probe ，它们能够在不同条件下通过堆栈引擎泄漏信息。我们在构建各种隐蔽和旁道攻击时使用这些原语，例如从广泛使用的 JSON 库中泄露敏感的患者记录。我们的缓解措施表明，最近的 AMD Zen 4 和 Zen 5 CPU 包含未记录的鸡块，允许启用或禁用堆栈引擎。使用这些位来禁用堆栈引擎，我们在 Zen 4 和 Zen 5 上使用 SPEC CPU2017 测得速度分别降低了 3.98% 和 3.94%，这提示需要在我们也讨论的未来 CPU 中考虑更安全的堆栈引擎设计。

papers.title: OneAdapt: Resource-Adaptive Compilation of Measurement-Based Quantum Computing for Photonic Hardware.
papers.abstract: Measurement-based quantum computing (MBQC), a.k.a. one-way quantum computing (1WQC), is a universal quantum computing model, which is particularly well-suited for photonic platforms. In this model, computation is driven by measurements on an entangled state, which serves as an intermediate representation (IR) between programs and hardware. However, compilers on previous IRs lack adaptivity to resource constraints in photonic quantum computers. In this work, we propose a novel IR with new optimization passes, realizing a compiler that minimizes execution time while being adaptive to the hardware size, to the number of delay lines, and to whether the hardware can support the additional flexibility in the IR or not. Moreover, our optimization can be integrated with quantum error correction (QEC) to improve the efficiency of photonic fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC).
papers.abstract_zh: 基于测量的量子计算 (MBQC)，又名单向量子计算 (1WQC)，是一种通用量子计算模型，特别适合光子平台。在此模型中，计算由纠缠态测量驱动，纠缠态充当程序和硬件之间的中间表示 (IR)。然而，以前的 IR 上的编译器缺乏对光子量子计算机中资源限制的适应性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有新优化通道的新型 IR，实现了一种编译器，可以最大限度地减少执行时间，同时适应硬件大小、延迟线数量以及硬件是否可以支持 IR 中的额外灵活性。此外，我们的优化可以与量子纠错（QEC）相结合，以提高光子容错量子计算（FTQC）的效率。

papers.title: Optimizing All-to-All Collective Communication with Fault Tolerance on Torus Networks.
papers.abstract:
Large-scale distributed processing is extensively employed for large model inference and training, such as Deep Learning Recommendation Models (DLRMs) and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models. However, the All-to-All collective, with its complex point-to-point communication patterns and blocking nature, has become a major performance bottleneck in distributed DLRM and MoE accelerations. Moreover, the prolonged distributed processing often encounters link failures, which severely impact system efficiency, reliability, and cost. Unlike switched-based topologies, which support any-to-any connections like Clos networks, All-to-All communication on torus networks can interfere with one another by sharing routing paths, creating critical performance limitations.

To address these challenges, we propose single-dimensional algorithm and multi-dimensional scheduling for all-to-all optimizations with fault tolerance on torus. In fault-free scenarios, we propose HalfRing algorithm and DimRotation scheduling. HalfRing utilizes bidirectional links to construct shortest communication path on a ring, while DimRotation allocates communication sequences of each data chunk across multiple dimensions to achieve full bandwidth utilization. In faulty scenarios, we introduce FoldedRing algorithm and MATE scheduling. FoldedRing facilitates fault-tolerant communication on a ring, while MATE accelerates communication on the faulty ring by leveraging available links from other dimensions. Our results show that, compared to the ring algorithm with pipeline scheduling, HalfRing, DimRotation and their combination can achieve average performance speedups of 1.56 ×, 1.45 ×, and 2.28 ×, respectively. For All-to-All with a single link failure, MATE can achieve a 1.37 × speedup compared to ring-based fault-free conditions. When compared with state-of-the-art routing methods in TPUv4 clusters, our approach achieves 1.57 × and 1.61 × speedups for fault-free and fault-tolerant scenarios, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
大规模分布式处理广泛用于大型模型推理和训练，例如深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）和专家混合（MoE）模型。然而，All-to-All 集合体以其复杂的点对点通信模式和阻塞性质，已成为分布式 DLRM 和 MoE 加速的主要性能瓶颈。此外，长时间的分布式处理经常会遇到链路故障，严重影响系统效率、可靠性和成本。与支持 Clos 网络等任意对任意连接的基于交换的拓扑不同，环面网络上的所有对所有通信可能会通过共享路由路径而相互干扰，从而造成关键的性能限制。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了单维算法和多维调度，以实现环面容错的全面优化。在无故障场景下，我们提出HalfRing算法和DimRotation调度。 HalfRing利用双向链路在环上构建最短通信路径，而DimRotation则跨多个维度分配每个数据块的通信序列以实现带宽的充分利用。针对故障场景，我们引入了FoldedRing算法和MATE调度。 FoldedRing有助于环上的容错通信，而MATE则通过利用其他维度的可用链路来加速故障环上的通信。我们的结果表明，与带有流水线调度的环算法相比，HalfRing、DimRotation 及其组合可以分别实现 1.56 ×、1.45 × 和 2.28 × 的平均性能加速。对于单链路故障的 All-to-All，与基于环的无故障条件相比，MATE 可以实现 1.37 倍的加速。与 TPUv4 集群中最先进的路由方法相比，我们的方法在无故障和容错场景下分别实现了 1.57 × 和 1.61 × 的加速。

papers.title: ORCHES: Orchestrated Test-Time-Compute-based LLM Reasoning on Collaborative GPU-PIM HEterogeneous System.
papers.abstract: Recent breakthroughs in AI reasoning, enabled by test-time compute (TTC) on compact large language models (LLMs), offer great potential for edge devices to effectively execute complex reasoning tasks. However, the intricate inference pipelines associated with TTC pose new efficiency bottlenecks, limiting achievable latency and hindering widespread adoption. Through an in-depth analysis, we identify three key barriers: (1) variable parallelism, characterized by inference-dependent dynamic control flows and varying batch sizes, complicating workload scheduling; (2) branch dependencies, hindering efficient pipelining across sequential reasoning steps; and (3) branch pruning, causing memory fragmentation and irregular data access patterns. Motivated by the memory-bound nature of LLMs and Processing-in-Memory (PIM)’s capability to reduce data movement, we propose ORCHES, a novel GPU–PIM collaborative system specifically designed to address these barriers. ORCHES integrates three key innovations: (1) adaptive workload assignment, dynamically balancing workloads between GPU and PIM units to maximize parallelism despite unpredictable branching; (2) branch-aware pipelining, leveraging speculative execution to substantially reduce inter-step pipeline stalls; and (3) fragmentation-aware memory structuring, enhancing data locality and access efficiency through coordinated caching and optimized memory layout reorganization. Experimental results demonstrate that ORCHES achieves average speedups of 4.16 × and 3.10 × over state-of-the-art (SOTA) GPU implementations for text-based and vision-based reasoning tasks, respectively, without any loss in the accuracy of the original reasoning pipeline.
papers.abstract_zh: 紧凑型大语言模型 (LLM) 上的测试时计算 (TTC) 实现了人工智能推理领域的最新突破，为边缘设备有效执行复杂推理任务提供了巨大潜力。然而，与 TTC 相关的复杂推理管道带来了新的效率瓶颈，限制了可实现的延迟并阻碍了广泛采用。通过深入分析，我们确定了三个关键障碍：（1）可变并行性，其特点是依赖推理的动态控制流和不同的批量大小，使工作负载调度复杂化； (2) 分支依赖性，阻碍跨顺序推理步骤的高效流水线； (3)分支修剪，导致内存碎片和不规则的数据访问模式。受 LLM 内存限制性质和内存处理 (PIM) 减少数据移动能力的启发，我们提出了 ORCHES，这是一种专门为解决这些障碍而设计的新型 GPU-PIM 协作系统。 ORCHES 集成了三个关键创新：（1）自适应工作负载分配，动态平衡 GPU 和 PIM 单元之间的工作负载，以在分支不可预测的情况下最大限度地提高并行性； (2) 分支感知流水线，利用推测执行来大幅减少步骤间流水线停顿； (3)碎片感知内存结构，通过协调缓存和优化内存布局重组来增强数据局部性和访问效率。实验结果表明，对于基于文本和基于视觉的推理任务，ORCHES 分别比最先进的 (SOTA) GPU 实现平均加速 4.16 倍和 3.10 倍，而原始推理管道的准确性没有任何损失。

papers.title: PIM-CCA: An Efficient PIM Architecture with Optimized Integration of Configurable Functional Units.
papers.abstract:
Processing-in-Memory (PIM) is a promising architecture for alleviating data movement bottlenecks by performing computations closer to memory. However, PIM workloads often encounter computational bottlenecks within the PIM itself. As these workloads become more compute-intensive by leveraging PIM’s high internal bandwidth, a small set of hot code regions emerges as the primary performance bottleneck. Unfortunately, increasing the complexity of the PIM processor is difficult due to inherent memory constraints, such as area and power. Therefore, enhancing the computational capability of PIM while maintaining a lightweight design within limited silicon budgets remains highly challenging.

In this paper, we propose PIM-CCA, a novel PIM architecture that integrates a Configurable Compute Accelerator (CCA) to mitigate computational bottlenecks with minimal hardware overhead. The CCA-enabled PIM design allows for the flexible configuration of compute logic, enabling acceleration across diverse workloads. The PIM-CCA compiler constructs an instruction-level dataflow graph to identify hot and compute-bound regions and offload them to the CCA. Furthermore, we analyze the interaction between the PIM threading model and resource utilization to derive the optimal thread count for efficient CCA-enabled PIM usage. We implement PIM-CCA in a cycle-accurate simulator based on a commercially available PIM system, and evaluate it using 14 representative benchmarks. The experimental results show that PIM-CCA achieves up to 1.55× performance improvement over baseline PIM systems, with only 0.036% additional area overhead, based on P&R results with limited metal layers.
papers.abstract_zh:
内存处理 (PIM) 是一种很有前途的架构，可通过在更接近内存的位置执行计算来缓解数据移动瓶颈。然而，PIM 工作负载经常会遇到 PIM 本身的计算瓶颈。随着这些工作负载通过利用 PIM 的高内部带宽而变得更加计算密集，一小组热代码区域就会成为主要性能瓶颈。不幸的是，由于固有的存储器限制（例如面积和功耗），增加 PIM 处理器的复杂性很困难。因此，增强 PIM 的计算能力，同时在有限的硅预算内保持轻量级设计仍然极具挑战性。

在本文中，我们提出了 PIM-CCA，这是一种新颖的 PIM 架构，它集成了可配置计算加速器 (CCA)，以最小的硬件开销缓解计算瓶颈。支持 CCA 的 PIM 设计允许灵活配置计算逻辑，从而实现跨不同工作负载的加速。 PIM-CCA 编译器构建指令级数据流图来识别热点区域和计算密集区域，并将它们卸载到 CCA。此外，我们分析了 PIM 线程模型和资源利用率之间的交互，以得出最佳线程数，以实现启用 CCA 的 PIM 的高效使用。我们在基于商用 PIM 系统的周期精确模拟器中实施 PIM-CCA，并使用 14 个代表性基准对其进行评估。实验结果表明，基于有限金属层的 P&R 结果，PIM-CCA 的性能比基线 PIM 系统提高了 1.55 倍，而仅增加了 0.036% 的面积开销。

papers.title: Pimba: A Processing-in-Memory Acceleration for Post-Transformer Large Language Model Serving.
papers.abstract:
Transformers are the driving force behind today’s Large Language Models (LLMs), serving as the foundation for their performance and versatility. Yet, their compute and memory costs grow with sequence length, posing scalability challenges for long-context inferencing. In response, the algorithm community is exploring alternative architectures—such as state space models (SSMs) (e.g., Mamba-2), linear attention, and recurrent neural networks (RNNs)—which we refer to as post-transformers . This shift presents a key challenge: building a serving system that efficiently supports not only emerging post-transformer LLMs but also existing transformer models within a unified framework.

To address this challenge, we analyze the performance characteristics of transformer and post-transformer LLMs. Despite their algorithmic differences, both are largely bounded by memory bandwidth under batched inference—due to attention in transformers and state updates in post-transformers. Inspired by this finding, we propose Pimba , an accelerator solution that aims to address the memory bottleneck by jointly leveraging (1) Processing-in-Memory (PIM) paradigm and (2) LLM quantization. Further analyses suggest two additional insights: (1) state update operations, unlike attention, incur high hardware cost, making per-bank PIM acceleration inefficient, and (2) different low-precision arithmetic methods offer varying accuracy-area tradeoffs, while we identify Microsoft’s MX as a Pareto-optimal choice. Building on these insights, we design the architecture of Pimba as an array of State-update Processing Units (SPUs), each shared between two banks to enable interleaved access. Each SPU includes a State-update Processing Engine (SPE) that comprises element-wise multipliers and adders using MX-based quantized arithmetic, enabling efficient execution of state update and attention operations. Our evaluation shows that, compared to LLM-optimized GPU and GPU+PIM systems, Pimba achieves up to 4.1 × and 2.1 × higher generation throughput, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
Transformer 是当今大型语言模型 (LLM) 背后的驱动力，是其性能和多功能性的基础。然而，它们的计算和内存成本随着序列长度的增加而增加，给长上下文推理带来了可扩展性挑战。为此，算法社区正在探索替代架构，例如状态空间模型 (SSM)（例如 Mamba-2）、线性注意力和循环神经网络 (RNN)，我们将其称为后变压器。这种转变提出了一个关键挑战：建立一个服务系统，不仅可以有效地支持新兴的变压器后法学硕士，而且可以在统一框架内有效支持现有的变压器模型。

为了应对这一挑战，我们分析了变压器和变压器后 LLM 的性能特征。尽管它们的算法存在差异，但由于变压器中的注意力和后变压器中的状态更新，两者在很大程度上都受到批量推理下的内存带宽的限制。受这一发现的启发，我们提出了 Pimba，这是一种加速器解决方案，旨在通过联合利用 (1) 内存处理 (PIM) 范式和 (2) LLM 量化来解决内存瓶颈。进一步的分析提出了两个额外的见解：(1) 与注意力不同，状态更新操作会产生较高的硬件成本，使得每个银行的 PIM 加速效率低下，(2) 不同的低精度算术方法提供不同的精度区域权衡，而我们将 Microsoft 的 MX 视为帕累托最优选择。基于这些见解，我们将 Pimba 的架构设计为一系列状态更新处理单元 (SPU)，每个单元在两个存储体之间共享以实现交错访问。每个 SPU 都包含一个状态更新处理引擎 (SPE)，该引擎由使用基于 MX 的量化算术的逐元素乘法器和加法器组成，从而能够高效执行状态更新和注意力操作。我们的评估表明，与 LLM 优化的 GPU 和 GPU+PIM 系统相比，Pim​​ba 的生成吞吐量分别提高了 4.1 倍和 2.1 倍。

papers.title: PointISA: ISA-Extensions for Efficient Point Cloud Analytics via Architecture and Algorithm Co-Design.
papers.abstract:
Point cloud analytics plays a crucial role in spatial machine vision for applications like autonomous driving, robotics and AR/VR. Recently, numerous domain-specific accelerators have been proposed to meet the stringent real-time and energy-efficiency demands of embedded and mobile platforms. However, most existing point cloud accelerators are kernel-independent hardware architectures, which face significant limitations and struggle to adapt to the rapidly evolving nature of point cloud applications.

To address these challenges, we propose PointISA, a novel Instruction Set Architecture (ISA) extension designed for efficient point cloud analytics through architecture and algorithm co-design. First, we incorporate specialized instructions into PointISA for point cloud processing, such as Euclidean distance computation and multidimensional sorting. And then, we present an unified hardware architecture that efficiently executes both PointISA’s specialized instructions and conventional matrix multiplication. Finally, we optimize key algorithms like farthest point sampling and k-nearest neighbors, adapting them into parallel multiple-points-to-multiple-points (MP2MP) patterns that fully exploit the architecture’s parallel capabilities while maintaining algorithmic correctness. Evaluation shows that PointISA achieves an average 5.4 × speedup and 4.9 × improvement in power efficiency across diverse point cloud workloads while incurring a negligible area overhead of 0.9%.
papers.abstract_zh:
点云分析在自动驾驶、机器人和 AR/VR 等应用的空间机器视觉中发挥着至关重要的作用。最近，人们提出了许多特定领域的加速器来满足嵌入式和移动平台严格的实时和能效要求。然而，大多数现有的点云加速器都是独立于内核的硬件架构，它们面临着巨大的限制，并且难以适应点云应用快速发展的性质。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 PointISA，这是一种新颖的指令集架构 (ISA) 扩展，旨在通过架构和算法协同设计进行高效的点云分析。首先，我们将专门的指令纳入PointISA中以进行点云处理，例如欧氏距离计算和多维排序。然后，我们提出了一个统一的硬件架构，可以有效地执行 PointISA 的专用指令和传统的矩阵乘法。最后，我们优化了最远点采样和 k 最近邻等关键算法，将它们调整为并行多点到多点 (MP2MP) 模式，充分利用架构的并行功能，同时保持算法的正确性。评估表明，PointISA 在不同的点云工作负载中实现了平均 5.4 倍的加速和 4.9 倍的电源效率改进，同时产生的面积开销可忽略不计，仅为 0.9%。

papers.title: PolymorPIC: Embedding Polymorphic Processing-in-Cache in RISC-V based Processor for Full-stack Efficient AI Inference.
papers.abstract:
The growing demand for neural network (NN) driven applications in AIoT devices necessitates efficient matrix multiplication (MM) acceleration. While domain-specific accelerators (DSAs) for NN are widely used, their large area overhead of dedicated buffers and low reusability limit cost-effectiveness. Processing-in-cache (PIC) architectures address this by repurposing existing SRAMs in processor caches for MM computation, eliminating dedicated DSA areas while retaining programmability. Despite its potential, PIC designs often overlook fundamental system-level issues, e.g ., compactness, programmability, coherence, and scheduling optimization.

In this work, we introduce PolymorPIC , a polymorphic architecture designed to accelerate MM directly within the cache using a bit-serial computing pattern. First, we propose a reconfigurable and processor-safe PIC architecture based on homogeneous memory arrays (HMAs), programmed through a meticulously designed interfaces in our software stack. Next, to enable mode switch of cache between cache mode and PIC mode, we develop a coherence strategy that ensures rapid, flexible, and processor-safe PIC. Moreover, we conduct scheduling optimization to maximize the NN acceleration performance of PolymorPIC . Ultimately, the PolymorPIC architecture is implemented on a RISC-V-based system-on-chip (SoC) and successfully end-to-end verified on a validation platform with an operating system running . Evaluation results show that by only introducing 11.5% area overhead for a single-core Out-of-Order processor (BOOM) with 1MB cache, PolymorPIC can improve the energy efficiency (TOPS/W) of multiple NNs by 1543.8 × on average. Compared to system-level implementation of using NPU as co-processor (Gemmini), PolymorPIC outperforms it by 3.76 × in area efficiency and 3.9 × in energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh:
AIoT 设备中对神经网络 (NN) 驱动的应用的需求不断增长，需要高效的矩阵乘法 (MM) 加速。虽然神经网络的特定领域加速器 (DSA) 被广泛使用，但其专用缓冲区的大面积开销和低可重用性限制了成本效益。缓存中处理 (PIC) 架构通过重新利用处理器缓存中的现有 SRAM 进行 MM 计算来解决这个问题，消除专用的 DSA 区域，同时保留可编程性。尽管 PIC 设计具有潜力，但它常常忽视基本的系统级问题，例如紧凑性、可编程性、一致性和调度优化。

在这项工作中，我们引入了 PolymorPIC，这是一种多态架构，旨在使用位串行计算模式直接在缓存内加速 MM。首先，我们提出了一种基于同质存储器阵列 (HMA) 的可重构且处理器安全的 PIC 架构，通过我们的软件堆栈中精心设计的接口进行编程。接下来，为了实现高速缓存模式和 PIC 模式之间的高速缓存模式切换，我们开发了一种一致性策略，以确保快速、灵活和处理器安全的 PIC。此外，我们还进行调度优化，以最大限度地提高 PolymorPIC 的神经网络加速性能。最终，PolymorPIC 架构在基于 RISC-V 的片上系统 (SoC) 上实现，并在运行操作系统的验证平台上成功进行了端到端验证。评估结果表明，对于具有 1MB 缓存的单核乱序处理器 (BOOM) 仅引入 11.5% 的面积开销，PolymorPIC 即可将多个神经网络的能源效率 (TOPS/W) 平均提高 1543.8 倍。与使用 NPU 作为协处理器的系统级实现（Gemmini）相比，PolymorPIC 在面积效率方面优于其 3.76 倍，在能源效率方面优于其 3.9 倍。

papers.title: PyTorchSim: A Comprehensive, Fast, and Accurate NPU Simulation Framework.
papers.abstract:
Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have continuously increasing demands for the performance and efficiency of Neural Processing Units (NPUs). While analytical models enable rapid exploration of high-level aspects (e.g., tiling), later stages of NPU design require a cycle-accurate simulator that supports various scenarios. However, existing NPU simulators are limited in several aspects, including support for high-speed, multi-core, multi-model tenancy, generic ISA (with vector operations), compiler, data-dependent timing model, and enabling both inference and training.

To address these challenges, we propose PyTorchSim, 1 a novel NPU simulation framework integrated with PyTorch 2. PyTorchSim models NPUs with a custom RISC-V-based ISA extended to support various acceleration units (e.g., systolic array). Our custom backend for PyTorch 2 compiles a given DNN using this ISA through lowering passes with MLIR and LLVM. Then, our extended Gem5 and Spike simulators execute the machine code to accurately model the DNN’s timing and functional aspects on the NPU. However, as such a conventional Instruction-Level Simulation (ILS) inevitably runs slowly, we propose Tile-Level Simulation (TLS) to improve speed without sacrificing accuracy. It uses tile-granularity operation latencies from offline ILS runs for high speed while still modeling DRAM and interconnect with cycle-accurate simulators. Furthermore, TLS can also be employed for sparse tensor operations using auxiliary per-tile latency obtained offline. As a result, PyTorchSim provides speedups of up to 139 × compared to Accel-Sim, while achieving high simulation accuracy against Google TPUv3 with an MAE of 11.5%. Additionally, we also demonstrate the effectiveness of PyTorchSim over existing simulators for different scenarios, including heterogeneous dense-sparse NPU, multi-model tenancy, compiler optimization, chiplet-aware NPU scheduling, and impact of DNN training hyperparameter.
papers.abstract_zh:
深度神经网络 (DNN) 对神经处理单元 (NPU) 的性能和效率的要求不断提高。虽然分析模型可以快速探索高级方面（例如平铺），但 NPU 设计的后期阶段需要支持各种场景的周期精确模拟器。然而，现有的 NPU 模拟器在几个方面受到限制，包括对高速、多核、多模型租户的支持、通用 ISA（具有向量运算）、编译器、数据相关时序模型以及支持推理和训练。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 PyTorchSim，1 一种与 PyTorch 2 集成的新型 NPU 仿真框架。PyTorchSim 使用基于 RISC-V 的自定义 ISA 来对 NPU 进行建模，该 ISA 扩展为支持各种加速单元（例如脉动阵列）。我们的 PyTorch 2 自定义后端使用此 ISA 通过使用 MLIR 和 LLVM 降低传递次数来编译给定的 DNN。然后，我们的扩展 Gem5 和 Spike 模拟器执行机器代码，以在 NPU 上准确建模 DNN 的时序和功能。然而，由于这种传统的指令级仿真（ILS）不可避免地运行缓慢，我们提出了平铺级仿真（TLS）来提高速度而不牺牲准确性。它利用离线 ILS 运行的切片粒度操作延迟来实现高速，同时仍然对 DRAM 进行建模并与周期精确的模拟器互连。此外，TLS 还可以使用离线获得的辅助每块延迟来进行稀疏张量运算。因此，与 Accel-Sim 相比，PyTorchSim 的加速速度高达 139 倍，同时针对 Google TPUv3 实现了高仿真精度，MAE 为 11.5%。此外，我们还展示了 PyTorchSim 相对于现有模拟器在不同场景下的有效性，包括异构密集-稀疏 NPU、多模型租赁、编译器优化、小芯片感知 NPU 调度以及 DNN 训练超参数的影响。

papers.title: Quartz: A Reconfigurable, Distributed-Memory Accelerator for Sparse Applications.
papers.abstract:
Iterative sparse matrix computations lie at the heart of many scientific computing and graph analytics algorithms. On conventional systems, their irregular memory accesses and low arithmetic intensity create challenging memory bandwidth bottlenecks. To overcome such bottlenecks, distributed-SRAM architectures are structured as an array of tiles, each with a processing element (PE) and a small local memory, to achieve very high aggregate memory bandwidth. However, current distributed-SRAM architectures suffer from either poor programmability due to over-specialized PEs or poor compute performance due to inefficient general-purpose PEs.

We propose Quartz, a new architecture that uses short dataflow tasks and reconfigurable PEs in a distributed-SRAM system to deliver both high performance and high programmability. Unlike traditional sparse CGRAs or on-die reconfigurable engines, Quartz allows reconfigurable compute to be highly utilized and scaled by (1) providing high memory bandwidth to each processing element and (2) introducing a task-level dataflow execution model that fits this new setting. Our execution model dynamically reconfigures each tile’s PE in response to inter-tile messages to execute tasks on local data. This execution model enables fine-grained data partitioning across tiles. To make execution efficient, we explore novel data partitioning techniques that use graph and hypergraph partitioning to minimize network traffic and balance load in the face of both static-static and static-dynamic operand sparsity. To ensure programmability, we show how a wide range of Einsum-expressible computations and flexible data distributions can be systematically captured in small tasks for execution on Quartz.

Quartz’s architecture, data partitioning techniques, and programming model together achieve gmean 21.4 × speedup over a prior state-of-the-art system for six different iterative sparse applications from scientific computing and graph analytics.
papers.abstract_zh:
迭代稀疏矩阵计算是许多科学计算和图分析算法的核心。在传统系统上，其不规则的内存访问和低算术强度造成了具有挑战性的内存带宽瓶颈。为了克服此类瓶颈，分布式 SRAM 架构被构造为瓦片阵列，每个瓦片都有一个处理元件 (PE) 和一个小型本地存储器，以实现非常高的聚合存储器带宽。然而，当前的分布式 SRAM 架构要么因 PE 过于专用而导致可编程性较差，要么因通用 PE 效率低而导致计算性能较差。

我们提出了 Quartz，这是一种新架构，它在分布式 SRAM 系统中使用短数据流任务和可重新配置的 PE，以提供高性能和高可编程性。与传统的稀疏 CGRA 或片上可重构引擎不同，Quartz 允许通过以下方式高度利用和扩展可重构计算：(1) 为每个处理元件提供高内存带宽；(2) 引入适合这种新设置的任务级数据流执行模型。我们的执行模型动态地重新配置每个瓦片的 PE，以响应瓦片间消息以在本地数据上执行任务。此执行模型支持跨切片的细粒度数据分区。为了提高执行效率，我们探索了新颖的数据分区技术，这些技术使用图和超图分区来最小化网络流量并在静态-静态和静态-动态操作数稀疏的情况下平衡负载。为了确保可编程性，我们展示了如何在小任务中系统地捕获各种 Einsum 可表达的计算和灵活的数据分布，以便在 Quartz 上执行。

Quartz 的架构、数据分区技术和编程模型共同实现了科学计算和图形分析的六种不同迭代稀疏应用程序比先前最先进系统的 gmean 21.4 倍加速。

papers.title: Rasengan: A Transition Hamiltonian-based Approximation Algorithm for Solving Constrained Binary Optimization Problems.
papers.abstract: Constrained binary optimization is a representative NP-hard problem in various domains, including engineering, scheduling, and finance. Variational quantum algorithms (VQAs) provide a promising methodology for solving this problem by integrating the power of quantum parallelism and classical optimizer. However, existing methods fail to achieve both high accuracy and low circuit complexity, rendering it impossible to deploy onto current quantum devices. This paper proposes Rasengan, a high-precision and deployable approach that leverages algorithm-hardware codesign for solving constrained optimization problems. Unlike traditional VQAs that shrink the whole space and locate the possible solutions in a superposition state, our key idea is to expand the search space from one feasible solution and precisely identify the optimal solution in a basis state. Specifically, we propose the transition Hamiltonian that exponentially explores the entire feasible solution space with all combinations of homogeneous basis vectors. We then introduce three optimization techniques, which greatly reduce the circuit complexity when implementing the Hamiltonian simulation, including Hamiltonian simplification and pruning, segmented execution, and solution purification. Experiments demonstrate that Rasengan improves the accuracy by 4.12 × compared to SOTA QAOA [ 43 ] and exhibits 379 × improvement on real-world quantum platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 约束二元优化是工程、调度和金融等各个领域中具有代表性的 NP 难题。变分量子算法（VQA）通过集成量子并行性和经典优化器的力量，为解决这一问题提供了一种有前景的方法。然而，现有的方法无法同时实现高精度和低电路复杂性，导致无法部署到当前的量子设备上。本文提出了Rasengan，一种高精度且可部署的方法，利用算法-硬件协同设计来解决约束优化问题。与传统的 VQA 缩小整个空间并在叠加状态下定位可能的解不同，我们的关键思想是从一个可行解扩展搜索空间，并在基础状态下精确识别最优解。具体来说，我们提出了转移哈密顿量，它以指数方式探索具有齐次基向量的所有组合的整个可行解空间。然后我们介绍了三种优化技术，这些技术大大降低了实现哈密顿模拟时的电路复杂性，包括哈密顿简化和剪枝、分段执行和解纯化。实验表明，与 SOTA QAOA [43] 相比，Rasengan 的精度提高了 4.12 倍，并且在现实世界的量子平台上表现出 379 倍的提高。

papers.title: RayN: Ray Tracing Acceleration with Near-memory Computing.
papers.abstract: A desire for greater realism and increasing transistor density has led the GPU industry to include specialized hardware for accelerating ray tracing in graphics processing units (GPUs). Ray tracing generates realistic images, but even with specialized hardware support for memory traversal, we find it is highly sensitive to memory latency due to pointer chasing operations. Noting that graphics has historically employed specialized DRAM memory (GDDR) and near-memory computing is highly suitable for improving memory access latency, we propose RayN, a near-memory ray tracing architecture. RayN places a memory controller and dedicated ray tracing computation units inside the logic layers of 3D stacked DRAM memory modules specialized for use with GPUs. We study different memory controller configurations for RayN and how to partition scene geometry among memory modules to mitigate load imbalance. RayN achieves 3.0 × speedup on average on representative ray tracing workloads over a GPU without near-memory support while incurring a minimal area and power overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 对更高真实感和增加晶体管密度的渴望导致 GPU 行业在图形处理单元 (GPU) 中加入了用于加速光线追踪的专用硬件。光线追踪生成逼真的图像，但即使有专门的硬件支持内存遍历，我们发现它对由于指针追踪操作而导致的内存延迟高度敏感。注意到图形历来采用专用 DRAM 内存 (GDDR) 并且近内存计算非常适合改善内存访问延迟，因此我们提出了 RayN，一种近内存光线追踪架构。 RayN 将内存控制器和专用光线追踪计算单元放置在专门用于 GPU 的 3D 堆叠 DRAM 内存模块的逻辑层内。我们研究了 RayN 的不同内存控制器配置以及如何在内存模块之间划分场景几何形状以减轻负载不平衡。 RayN 在没有近内存支持的情况下，通过 GPU 实现代表性光线追踪工作负载的平均加速 3.0 倍，同时产生最小的面积和功耗开销。

papers.title: Re-architecting End-host Networking with CXL: Coherence, Memory, and Offloading.
papers.abstract: The traditional Network Interface Controller (NIC) suffers from the inherent inefficiency of the PCIe interconnect with two key limitations. First, since it allows the NIC to transfer packets to the host CPU memory only through DMA, it incurs high latency, the impact of which becomes more pronounced, especially for small-sized packets. Second, it supports neither shared memory nor full cache coherence between the host CPU and the NIC. Therefore, the host CPU can access NIC memory only through MMIO—which provides higher latency and lower bandwidth than cache-coherent memory access—and software is often responsible for managing consistency between the host CPU and NIC memory. Although built on the PCIe interconnect, Compute Express Link (CXL) efficiently addresses these limitations by providing hardware-managed unified memory and cache coherence between the host CPU and NIC memory. This allows the host CPU and the NIC to access each other’s memory using load/store semantics, offering low latency and high bandwidth. In this work, we first present a Type-1 CXL-NIC design that replaces slow legacy PCIe transactions with fast CXL.cache transactions for NIC-to-CPU memory accesses. Second, we extend the Type-1 CXL-NIC to a Type-2 CXL-NIC that introduces cache-coherent NIC memory exposed to the host CPU through CXL.mem, which can buffer packets and descriptors 1 . Lastly, we demonstrate a networking-application co-acceleration by exploiting unique CXL Type-2 device features and near-packet processing on the Type-2 CXL-NIC. Our FPGA-based CXL-NIC prototypes reduce the tail latency of network packet and application request processing by \(49\%\) and \(39\%\) , respectively, compared to a commodity PCIe-NIC.
papers.abstract_zh: 传统的网络接口控制器 (NIC) 受到 PCIe 互连固有的低效率的困扰，并有两个关键限制。首先，由于它允许NIC仅通过DMA将数据包传输到主机CPU内存，因此会产生高延迟，其影响变得更加明显，特别是对于小尺寸数据包。其次，它既不支持主机 CPU 与 NIC 之间的共享内存，也不支持完全缓存一致性。因此，主机 CPU 只能通过 MMIO 访问 NIC 内存（与缓存一致性内存访问相比，MMIO 提供更高的延迟和更低的带宽），并且软件通常负责管理主机 CPU 和 NIC 内存之间的一致性。尽管构建在 PCIe 互连之上，但 Compute Express Link (CXL) 通过在主机 CPU 和 NIC 内存之间提供硬件管理的统一内存和缓存一致性，有效地解决了这些限制。这允许主机 CPU 和 NIC 使用加载/存储语义访问彼此的内存，从而提供低延迟和高带宽。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一种 Type-1 CXL-NIC 设计，该设计用快速的 CXL.cache 事务取代了缓慢的传统 PCIe 事务，以进行 NIC 到 CPU 内存访问。其次，我们将 Type-1 CXL-NIC 扩展到 Type-2 CXL-NIC，引入通过 CXL.mem 向主机 CPU 公开的缓存一致性 NIC 内存，该内存可以缓冲数据包和描述符 1 。最后，我们通过利用独特的 CXL Type-2 设备功能和 Type-2 CXL-NIC 上的近数据包处理来演示网络应用程序共同加速。与商用 PCIe-NIC 相比，我们基于 FPGA 的 CXL-NIC 原型分别将网络数据包和应用程序请求处理的尾部延迟减少了 \(49\%\) 和 \(39\%\)。

papers.title: REACT3D: Real-time Edge Accelerator for Incremental Training in 3D Gaussian Splatting based SLAM Systems.
papers.abstract:
3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a promising approach for high-fidelity scene reconstruction and has been widely adopted in Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems. 3DGS SLAM requires incremental training and rendering of Gaussians in real-time from continuous camera viewpoints. To match the streaming nature of SLAM, 3DGS-based mapping must sustain over 30 frames per second (FPS), which is a widely recognized threshold for maintaining accurate tracking and mapping quality. Existing GPU-based solutions and prior accelerators fall short of this target, primarily due to redundant training computation, unnecessary loss computing, and irregular memory access patterns.

To address these challenges, we propose REACT3D, a real-time edge accelerator designed for incremental training in 3DGS SLAM systems. At the algorithmic level, we introduce spatial consistency and convergence aware sparsification, which eliminates redundant computation in both forward and backward rendering by predicting under-optimized regions based on spatial coherence and convergence dynamics. At the architectural level, we design a pixel block-wise fine-grained dataflow to eliminate explicit loss computing, establish a tightly coupled pipeline, and improve hardware utilization. Furthermore, we develop a Content Addressable Memory (CAM)-based Dual-index Gaussian Buffer to resolve discontinuous memory accesses and avoid computation conflicts during gradient merging. Experimental results show that REACT3D achieves 12.10 × performance and 33.69 × energy efficiency improvement over NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin. To the best of our knowledge, REACT3D is the first hardware design that meets the real-time requirements of 3DGS SLAM on the edge.
papers.abstract_zh:
3D 高斯分布 (3DGS) 已成为一种有前途的高保真场景重建方法，并已广泛应用于同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 系统中。 3DGS SLAM 需要从连续摄像机视点实时增量训练和渲染高斯模型。为了匹配 SLAM 的流媒体特性，基于 3DGS 的映射必须维持每秒 30 帧 (FPS) 以上，这是保持准确跟踪和映射质量的广泛认可的阈值。现有的基于 GPU 的解决方案和先前的加速器未能实现这一目标，主要是由于冗余训练计算、不必要的损失计算和不规则的内存访问模式。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 REACT3D，这是一种实时边缘加速器，专为 3DGS SLAM 系统中的增量训练而设计。在算法层面，我们引入了空间一致性和收敛感知稀疏化，通过基于空间相干性和收敛动力学预测欠优化区域来消除前向和后向渲染中的冗余计算。在架构层面，我们设计了像素块级细粒度数据流，以消除显式损失计算，建立紧密耦合的管道，并提高硬件利用率。此外，我们开发了一种基于内容可寻址内存（CAM）的双索引高斯缓冲区，以解决不连续的内存访问并避免梯度合并期间的计算冲突。实验结果表明，REACT3D 较 NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin 实现了 12.10 倍的性能提升和 33.69 倍的能效提升。据我们所知，REACT3D是第一个满足边缘3DGS SLAM实时要求的硬件设计。

papers.title: ReGate: Enabling Power Gating in Neural Processing Units.
papers.abstract:
The energy efficiency of neural processing units (NPU) plays a critical role in developing sustainable data centers. Our study with different generations of NPU chips reveals that 30%–72% of their energy consumption is contributed by static power dissipation, due to the lack of power management support in modern NPU chips.

In this paper, we present ReGate, which enables fine-grained power-gating of each hardware component in NPU chips with hardware/software co-design. Unlike conventional power-gating techniques for generic processors, enabling power-gating in NPUs faces unique challenges due to the fundamental difference in hardware architecture and program execution model. To address these challenges, we carefully investigate the power-gating opportunities in each component of NPU chips and decide the best-fit power management scheme (i.e., hardware- vs. software-managed power gating). Specifically, for systolic arrays (SAs) that have deterministic execution patterns, ReGate enables cycle-level power gating at the granularity of processing elements (PEs) following the inherent dataflow execution in SAs. For inter-chip interconnect (ICI) and HBM controllers that have long idle intervals, ReGate employs a lightweight hardware-based idle-detection mechanism. For vector units and SRAM whose idle periods vary significantly depending on workload patterns, ReGate extends the NPU ISA and allows software (e.g., compilers) to manage the power gating. With implementation on a production-level NPU simulator, we show that ReGate can reduce the energy consumption of NPU chips by up to 32.8% (15.5% on average), with negligible impact on AI workload performance. The hardware implementation of power-gating logic introduces less than 3.3% overhead in NPU chips.
papers.abstract_zh:
神经处理单元 (NPU) 的能源效率在开发可持续数据中心方面发挥着关键作用。我们对不同代 NPU 芯片的研究表明，由于现代 NPU 芯片缺乏电源管理支持，其 30%–72% 的能耗是由静态功耗贡献的。

在本文中，我们提出了 ReGate，它可以通过硬件/软件协同设计对 NPU 芯片中的每个硬件组件进行细粒度功率门控。与通用处理器的传统电源门控技术不同，由于硬件架构和程序执行模型的根本差异，在 NPU 中实现电源门控面临着独特的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们仔细研究了 NPU 芯片每个组件中的电源门控机会，并决定最适合的电源管理方案（即硬件管理与软件管理的电源门控）。具体来说，对于具有确定性执行模式的脉动阵列 (SA)，ReGate 可以按照 SA 中固有的数据流执行，在处理元件 (PE) 的粒度上实现周期级功率门控。对于具有较长空闲间隔的芯片间互连 (ICI) 和 HBM 控制器，ReGate 采用了基于硬件的轻量级空闲检测机制。对于空闲时间根据工作负载模式而显着变化的矢量单元和 SRAM，ReGate 扩展了 NPU ISA，并允许软件（例如编译器）管理电源门控。通过在生产级 NPU 模拟器上的实施，我们表明 ReGate 可以将 NPU 芯片的能耗降低高达 32.8%（平均 15.5%），而对 AI 工作负载性能的影响可以忽略不计。电源门控逻辑的硬件实现在 NPU 芯片中引入了不到 3.3% 的开销。

papers.title: Rethinking Tiling and Dataflow for SpMM Acceleration: A Graph Transformation Framework.
papers.abstract:
Sparse Matrix Dense Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) is a fundamental computation kernel across various domains, including scientific computing, machine learning, and graph processing. Despite extensive research, existing approaches optimize SpMM using loop transformations and linear algebra principles, which (1) poorly handle unstructured sparsity patterns, (2) rely on empirical methods to explore data reuse opportunities, and (3) enforce rigid coordinate alignment, compromising data locality.

In this paper, we demonstrate that these limitations stem from the fundamental matrix representation and traditional dataflows of SpMM (e.g., inner-product, outer-product, and Gustavson). We propose Aquila, a graph transformation framework that reformulates SpMM computations as a graph optimization problem, leveraging graph theory to reinterpret tiling and dataflow. First, on the theoretical side, we introduce vertex decomposition and adaptive depth traversal (ADT) to enable non-contiguous tiling, where nonzero elements from discontinuous rows and columns are clustered by connectivity rather than following matrix dimensionality. This approach quantifies data reuse and improves data locality beyond traditional loop transformations while maintaining output equivalence. Second, on the algorithm side, we develop a pull-after-push (PaP) dataflow that simultaneously enhances the dense matrix data reuse while eliminating synchronization issues in output matrix accumulation. Third, building on our theoretical approach and dataflow, we present a versatile accelerator architecture that handles a variety of SpMM kernels with diverse data sizes and sparsity patterns in a unified architecture. Additionally, we introduce a bidirectional fiber tree (BFT) format to support the proposed graph-oriented dataflow in contrast to traditional column or row-major access. Evaluation across diverse sparse datasets shows Aquila achieves speedups of 4.3 ×, 3.4 ×, 3.7 ×, 2.9 ×, and 2.7 × in execution time and up to 4.8 × improvements in energy efficiency compared to state-of-the-art accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh:
稀疏矩阵密集矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 是跨多个领域的基本计算内核，包括科学计算、机器学习和图形处理。尽管进行了大量研究，但现有方法使用循环变换和线性代数原理来优化 SpMM，这些方法 (1) 不能很好地处理非结构化稀疏模式，(2) 依靠经验方法来探索数据重用机会，(3) 强制执行严格的坐标对齐，从而损害数据局部性。

在本文中，我们证明这些限制源于 SpMM 的基本矩阵表示和传统数据流（例如内积、外积和 Gustavson）。我们提出了 Aquila，一个图转换框架，它将 SpMM 计算重新表述为图优化问题，利用图论重新解释平铺和数据流。首先，在理论方面，我们引入顶点分解和自适应深度遍历（ADT）来实现非连续平铺，其中来自不连续行和列的非零元素通过连通性而不是遵循矩阵维数进行聚类。这种方法可量化数据重用，并在保持输出等效性的同时，超越传统循环转换来改进数据局部性。其次，在算法方面，我们开发了一种推后拉（PaP）数据流，该数据流同时增强了密集矩阵数据的重用，同时消除了输出矩阵累积中的同步问题。第三，基于我们的理论方法和数据流，我们提出了一种多功能加速器架构，可以在统一架构中处理具有不同数据大小和稀疏模式的各种 SpMM 内核。此外，我们引入了双向光纤树（BFT）格式来支持所提出的面向图形的数据流，而不是传统的列或行优先访问。对不同稀疏数据集的评估表明，与最先进的加速器相比，Aquila 的执行时间加速了 4.3 ×、3.4 ×、3.7 ×、2.9 × 和 2.7 ×，能源效率提高了 4.8 ×。

papers.title: RICH Prefetcher: Storing Rich Information in Memory to Trade Capacity and Bandwidth for Latency Hiding.
papers.abstract:
Memory systems characterized by high bandwidth and/or capacity alongside high access latency are becoming increasingly critical. This trend can be observed both at the device level—for instance, in non‑volatile memory—and at the system level, as seen in CXL‑based memory pooling architectures. To benefit from such memory in general‑purpose computing systems, it is essential to employ techniques that can tolerate high memory access latency. Although prefetching has long been recognized as a classical approach for latency tolerance, conventional prefetching techniques are typically either optimized for area efficiency or constrained by limited prefetching patterns. Consequently, they often fail to convert the abundant metadata into significant performance improvements at minimal cost.

To address these challenges, we propose RICH—a prefetcher that strategically consumes memory capacity and bandwidth to reduce memory access latency. First, RICH is capable of leveraging abundant metadata to improve performance by integrating spatial prefetching with diverse region sizes and prefetch triggers. Second, RICH implements such metadata with minimal overheads by employing a hierarchical on-chip/off-chip storage mechanism, thereby avoiding both large on-chip storage and critical off-chip accesses. We propose a specific implementation of RICH and evaluate it across a wide range of workloads. With increased memory latency, RICH achieves performance improvements of 8.3% over Bingo and 6.2% over PMP. This highlights the RICH’s suitability for future memory systems. In a conventional system, RICH still outperforms Bingo by 3.4%.
papers.abstract_zh:
以高带宽和/或容量以及高访问延迟为特征的内存系统变得越来越重要。这种趋势可以在设备级别（例如非易失性存储器）和系统级别（如基于 CXL 的内存池架构中看到）观察到。为了从通用计算系统中的此类内存中受益，必须采用能够容忍高内存访问延迟的技术。尽管预取长期以来一直被认为是延迟容忍的经典方法，但传统的预取技术通常要么针对区域效率进行优化，要么受到有限的预取模式的约束。因此，他们常常无法以最小的成本将丰富的元数据转化为显着的性能改进。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 RICH——一种预取器，它可以策略性地消耗内存容量和带宽，以减少内存访问延迟。首先，RICH 能够通过将空间预取与不同区域大小和预取触发器集成来利用丰富的元数据来提高性能。其次，RICH 通过采用分层片上/片外存储机制以最小的开销实现此类元数据，从而避免大量片上存储和关键的片外访问。我们提出了 RICH 的具体实现，并在广泛的工作负载中对其进行了评估。随着内存延迟的增加，RICH 的性能比 Bingo 提高了 8.3%，比 PMP 提高了 6.2%。这凸显了 RICH 对未来存储系统的适用性。在传统系统中，RICH 的性能仍比 Bingo 好 3.4%。

papers.title: RTGS: Real-Time 3D Gaussian Splatting SLAM via Multi-Level Redundancy Reduction.
papers.abstract:
3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) based Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems can largely benefit from 3DGS’s state-of-the-art rendering efficiency and accuracy, but have not yet been adopted in resource-constrained edge devices due to insufficient speed. Addressing this, we identify notable redundancies across the SLAM pipeline for acceleration. While conceptually straightforward, practical approaches are required to minimize the overhead associated with identifying and eliminating these redundancies.

In response, we propose RTGS, an algorithm-hardware co-design framework that comprehensively reduces the redundancies for real-time 3DGS-SLAM on edge. To minimize the overhead, RTGS fully leverages the characteristics of the 3DGS-SLAM pipeline.

On the algorithm side, we introduce (1) an adaptive Gaussian pruning step to remove the redundant Gaussians by reusing gradients computed during backpropagation; and (2) a dynamic downsampling technique that directly reuses the keyframe identification and alpha computing steps to eliminate redundant pixels. On the hardware side, we propose (1) a subtile-level streaming strategy and a pixel-level pairwise scheduling strategy that mitigates workload imbalance via a Workload Scheduling Unit (WSU) guided by previous iteration information; (2) a Rendering and Backpropagation (R&B) Buffer that accelerates the rendering backpropagation by reusing intermediate data computed during rendering; and (3) a Gradient Merging Unit (GMU) to reduce intensive memory accesses caused by atomic operations while enabling pipelined aggregation. Integrated into an edge GPU, RTGS achieves real-time performance (≥ 30 FPS) on four datasets and three algorithms, with up to 82.5 × energy efficiency over the baseline and negligible quality loss. Code is available at https://github.com/UMN-ZhaoLab/RTGS .
papers.abstract_zh:
基于 3D 高斯溅射 (3DGS) 的同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 系统可以在很大程度上受益于 3DGS 最先进的渲染效率和准确性，但由于速度不足，尚未在资源受限的边缘设备中采用。为了解决这个问题，我们确定了 SLAM 管道中显着的冗余以实现加速。虽然概念上很简单，但需要采取实用的方法来最大限度地减少与识别和消除这些冗余相关的开销。

为此，我们提出了 RTGS，一种算法-硬件协同设计框架，可全面减少边缘实时 3DGS-SLAM 的冗余。为了最大限度地减少开销，RTGS 充分利用了 3DGS-SLAM 管道的特性。

在算法方面，我们引入（1）自适应高斯剪枝步骤，通过重用反向传播期间计算的梯度来去除冗余高斯； (2)动态下采样技术，直接重用关键帧识别和alpha计算步骤来消除冗余像素。在硬件方面，我们提出（1）子图块级流媒体策略和像素级成对调度策略，通过先前迭代信息引导的工作负载调度单元（WSU）减轻工作负载不平衡； (2) 渲染和反向传播（R&B）缓冲区，通过重用渲染期间计算的中间数据来加速渲染反向传播； (3) 梯度合并单元 (GMU)，用于减少原子操作引起的密集内存访问，同时启用管道聚合。 RTGS 集成到边缘 GPU 中，可在四个数据集和三种算法上实现实时性能 (≥ 30 FPS)，能源效率比基准高出 82.5 倍，质量损失可以忽略不计。代码可在 https://github.com/UMN-ZhaoLab/RTGS 获取。

papers.title: S-DMA: Sparse Diffusion Models Acceleration via Spatiality-Aware Prediction and Dimension-Adaptive Dataflow.
papers.abstract: Diffusion Models (DMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance in a variety of image generation tasks. However, their complex architectures and intensive computations result in significant overhead and latency, posing challenges for hardware deployment. To address these issues, researchers have explored the sparsity in DMs to reduce computational workloads, including semantic sparsity in image generation and spatial sparsity in local editing. Unfortunately, existing sparsity prediction methods face critical limitations in deployment: 1) additional prediction overheads offset the benefits of sparsity; 2) convolution and general matrix multiplication (GEMM) exhibit distinct sparsity patterns, which current co-design frameworks struggle to process. In this paper, we introduce S-DMA, a software-hardware co-design framework that unifies efficient sparsity prediction while supporting various sparse operators. First, we propose a spatiality-aware similarity computation method that leverages the local similarity of images, reducing the computational complexity of sparsity prediction from O( N 2 ) to O( N ). Second, we implement NAND-based similarity for sparsity prediction, which minimizes the computational overheads and ensures adaptability to different sparsity schemes. Finally, a dedicated hardware architecture is designed to efficiently leverage the algorithm optimizations. A NAND-based sparsity prediction processing unit is designed to adaptively handle the sparsity patterns. Additionally, a sparsity-aware reduction network and a dimension-adaptive dataflow are employed to support convolution and GEMM with different DM sparsity patterns. Experimental results demonstrate that S-DMA achieves up to 51.11 × speedup and 43.87 × higher energy efficiency than NVIDIA A100 GPU. Compared to state-of-the-art DM accelerators, S-DMA achieves up to 7.05 × speedup and 3.19 × higher energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 扩散模型 (DM) 在各种图像生成任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，其复杂的架构和密集的计算导致大量的开销和延迟，给硬件部署带来了挑战。为了解决这些问题，研究人员探索了 DM 中的稀疏性以减少计算工作量，包括图像生成中的语义稀疏性和本地编辑中的空间稀疏性。不幸的是，现有的稀疏性预测方法在部署中面临着严重的限制：1）额外的预测开销抵消了稀疏性的好处； 2）卷积和通用矩阵乘法（GEMM）表现出独特的稀疏模式，当前的协同设计框架难以处理。在本文中，我们介绍了 S-DMA，这是一种软件硬件协同设计框架，它统一了高效的稀疏性预测，同时支持各种稀疏算子。首先，我们提出了一种空间感知相似度计算方法，该方法利用图像的局部相似度，将稀疏预测的计算复杂度从 O( N 2 ) 降低到 O( N )。其次，我们实现了基于 NAND 的相似性来进行稀疏性预测，这最大限度地减少了计算开销并确保了对不同稀疏性方案的适应性。最后，设计了专用硬件架构来有效利用算法优化。基于 NAND 的稀疏性预测处理单元被设计用于自适应地处理稀疏性模式。此外，还采用稀疏感知缩减网络和维度自适应数据流来支持具有不同 DM 稀疏模式的卷积和 GEMM。实验结果表明，S-DMA 比 NVIDIA A100 GPU 实现了高达 51.11 倍的加速比和 43.87 倍的能效。与最先进的 DM 加速器相比，S-DMA 可实现高达 7.05 倍的加速比和 3.19 倍的能效。

papers.title: SeaCache: Efficient and Adaptive Caching for Sparse Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Sparse tensor computations are highly memory-bound, making on-chip data reuse in SRAM buffers critical to the performance of domain-specific sparse accelerators. On-demand caches are commonly used in recent sparse accelerators, due to the advantage of easy space allocation and the ability to avoid unnecessary data fetches compared to scratchpad-style data buffering. However, existing cache designs suffer from inefficient space utilization due to the difficulty of fitting variable-length sparse data into fixed-size cache blocks. The theoretically optimal replacement policies used by them also have substantial implementation cost, requiring significant on-chip space to manage the metadata. To address these issues, we propose SeaCache to enable efficient and adaptive caching for sparse accelerators. SeaCache includes three key techniques. First, it incorporates fiber packing and splitting to efficiently map variable-length data into fixed-size cache blocks with high space utilization. Second, it proposes a practical replacement policy that performs similarly to the optimal one but has a much cheaper implementation. Third, it shares the cache space between the actual data and the replacement policy metadata, with a two-phase adaptive mechanism to decide the best partition ratio. Overall, SeaCache outperforms state-of-the-art sparse cache designs by 2.8 × on average, demonstrating the effectiveness of its novel optimizations.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏张量计算高度受内存限制，因此 SRAM 缓冲区中的片上数据重用对于特定领域稀疏加速器的性能至关重要。与暂存器式数据缓冲相比，按需缓存通常在最近的稀疏加速器中使用，因为它具有易于空间分配的优点，并且能够避免不必要的数据获取。然而，由于难以将可变长度稀疏数据装入固定大小的缓存块，现有的缓存设计面临着空间利用率低下的问题。他们使用的理论上最佳的替换策略也具有巨大的实施成本，需要大量的片上空间来管理元数据。为了解决这些问题，我们建议 SeaCache 为稀疏加速器提供高效且自适应的缓存。 SeaCache 包括三个关键技术。首先，它结合了光纤打包和分割，可以有效地将可变长度数据映射到具有高空间利用率的固定大小的缓存块中。其次，它提出了一种实用的替代政策，其表现与最优政策类似，但实施成本要低得多。第三，它在实际数据和替换策略元数据之间共享缓存空间，并通过两阶段自适应机制来决定最佳分区比率。总体而言，SeaCache 的性能平均比最先进的稀疏缓存设计高 2.8 倍，证明了其新颖优化的有效性。

papers.title: Security and Performance Implications of GPU Cache Eviction Priority Hints.
papers.abstract:
NVIDIA provides cache eviction priority hints such as evict_first and evict_last on recent GPUs. These hints allow users to specify the eviction priority that should be used for individual cache lines to improve cache utilization. However, NVIDIA does not disclose the microarchitectural details of these hints or cache eviction behaviors when using them, which makes their security and performance implications unclear.

In this paper, we first reverse engineer the detailed comprehensive behaviors of these eviction priority hints. Then based on our findings, we analyze their impact on system security and performance. First, we found that these priority hints introduce new security problems. Specifically, we develop a new covert channel using the evict_first priority hint, which is more efficient than existing GPU covert channels. We also demonstrate a performance degradation attack using the evict_last priority hint, which is more stealthy compared to the known methods. Second, from the performance perspective, we show that marking a cache line as evict_last does not always keep it in the cache. In fact, if more than 12/16 (or 3/16, depending on the driver version) of the L2 cache size worth of data are marked as evict_last, cache thrashing can occur, which leads to performance degradation for real GPU workloads.
papers.abstract_zh:
NVIDIA 在最新的 GPU 上提供了缓存逐出优先级提示，例如 evict_first 和 evict_last。这些提示允许用户指定应用于各个缓存行的逐出优先级，以提高缓存利用率。然而，NVIDIA 并未披露这些提示的微架构细节或使用它们时的缓存逐出行为，这使得它们的安全和性能影响尚不清楚。

在本文中，我们首先对这些驱逐优先级提示的详细综合行为进行逆向工程。然后根据我们的发现，我们分析它们对系统安全和性能的影响。首先，我们发现这些优先级提示引入了新的安全问题。具体来说，我们使用 evict_first 优先级提示开发了一个新的隐蔽通道，它比现有的 GPU 隐蔽通道更高效。我们还使用 evict_last 优先级提示演示了性能下降攻击，与已知方法相比，该攻击更加隐蔽。其次，从性能角度来看，我们表明将缓存行标记为 evict_last 并不总是将其保留在缓存中。事实上，如果超过 12/16（或 3/16，具体取决于驱动程序版本）的 L2 缓存大小的数据被标记为 evict_last，则可能会发生缓存抖动，从而导致实际 GPU 工作负载的性能下降。

papers.title: SHADOW: Simultaneous Multi-Threading Architecture with Asymmetric Threads.
papers.abstract:
Many important applications exhibit shifting demands between instruction-level parallelism (ILP) and thread-level parallelism (TLP) due to irregular sparsity and unpredictable memory access patterns. Conventional CPUs optimize for one but fail to balance both, leading to underutilized execution resources and performance bottlenecks. Addressing this challenge requires an architecture that can seemlessly and efficiently adapt to workload variations.

This paper presents SHADOW, the first asymmetric SMT core that dynamically balances ILP and TLP by executing out-of-order (OoO) and in-order (InO) threads simultaneously on the same core. SHADOW maximizes CPU utilization by leveraging deep ILP in the OoO thread and high TLP in lightweight InO threads. It is runtime-configurable, allowing applications to optimize the mix of OoO and InO execution. Evaluated on nine diverse benchmarks, SHADOW achieves up to 3.16 × speedup and 1.33 × average improvement over an OoO CPU, with just 1% area and power overhead. By dynamically adapting to workload characteristics, SHADOW outperforms conventional architectures, efficiently accelerating memory-bound workloads without compromising compute-bound performance.
papers.abstract_zh:
由于不规则的稀疏性和不可预测的内存访问模式，许多重要的应用程序在指令级并行性 (ILP) 和线程级并行性 (TLP) 之间呈现出不断变化的需求。传统 CPU 针对其中之一进行优化，但无法平衡两者，从而导致执行资源未充分利用和性能瓶颈。应对这一挑战需要一种能够无缝、高效地适应工作负载变化的架构。

本文介绍了 SHADOW，这是第一个非对称 SMT 内核，它通过在同一内核上同时执行乱序 (OoO) 和有序 (InO) 线程来动态平衡 ILP 和 TLP。 SHADOW 通过利用 OoO 线程中的深度 ILP 和轻量级 InO 线程中的高 TLP 来最大限度地提高 CPU 利用率。它是运行时可配置的，允许应用程序优化 OoO 和 InO 执行的组合。根据九个不同的基准进行评估，SHADOW 比 OoO CPU 实现了高达 3.16 倍的加速和 1.33 倍的平均改进，而面积和功耗仅为 1%。通过动态适应工作负载特征，SHADOW 的性能优于传统架构，可有效加速内存密集型工作负载，而不会影响计算密集型性能。

papers.title: ShadowBinding: Realizing Effective Microarchitectures for In-Core Secure Speculation Schemes.
papers.abstract:
Secure speculation schemes have shown great promise in the war against speculative side-channel attacks and will be a key building block for developing secure, high-performance architectures moving forward. As the field matures, the need for rigorous microarchitectures, and corresponding performance and cost analysis, become critical for evaluating secure schemes and for enabling their future adoption.

In ShadowBinding, we present effective microarchitectures for two state-of-the-art secure schemes, uncovering and mitigating fundamental microarchitectural limitations within the analyzed schemes, and providing important design characteristics. We uncover that Speculative Taint Tracking’s (STT’s) rename-based taint computation must be completed in a single cycle, creating an expensive dependency chain that limits performance for wider processor cores. We also introduce a novel microarchitectural approach for STT, named STT-Issue, which, by delaying the taint computation to the issue stage, eliminates the dependency chain, achieving better instructions per cycle (IPC), timing, area, and performance results.

Through a comprehensive evaluation of our STT and Non-Speculative Data Access (NDA) microarchitectural designs on the RISC-V Berkeley Out-of-Order Machine, we find that the IPC impact of in-core secure schemes is higher than previously estimated, close to 20% for the highest performance core. With insights into timing from our RTL evaluation, the performance loss, created by the combined impact of IPC and timing, becomes even greater, at 35%, 27%, and 22% for STT-Rename, STT-Issue, and NDA, respectively. If these trends were to hold for leading processor core designs, the performance impact would be well over 30%, even for the best-performing scheme.

Through these findings, research sentiments that Spectre can be solved by in-core secure schemes at low-performance costs are challenged. ShadowBinding serves as a call to arms for a more in-depth evaluation of secure speculation schemes and further work on in-core methods and optimizations, which can help mitigate the high performance cost of current state-of-the-art schemes without requiring extensive and expensive modifications.
papers.abstract_zh:
安全推测方案在对抗推测性旁道攻击的战争中显示出了巨大的前景，并将成为未来开发安全、高性能架构的关键组成部分。随着该领域的成熟，对严格的微架构以及相应的性能和成本分析的需求对于评估安全方案及其未来的采用变得至关重要。

在 ShadowBinding 中，我们为两种最先进的安全方案提供了有效的微架构，揭示并减轻了分析方案中的基本微架构限制，并提供了重要的设计特征。我们发现推测污点跟踪 (STT) 的基于重命名的污点计算必须在单个周期内完成，从而创建了一个昂贵的依赖链，限制了更广泛的处理器内核的性能。我们还引入了一种新颖的 STT 微架构方法，名为 STT-Issue，它通过将污点计算延迟到问题阶段，消除了依赖链，从而实现了更好的每周期指令 (IPC)、时序、面积和性能结果。

通过对 RISC-V 伯克利乱序机上的 STT 和非推测性数据访问 (NDA) 微架构设计进行全面评估，我们发现核内安全方案的 IPC 影响高于之前的估计，对于最高性能核心而言接近 20%。通过对 RTL 评估中时序的深入了解，由 IPC 和时序的综合影响造成的性能损失变得更大，对于 STT-Rename、STT-Issue 和 NDA 分别为 35%、27% 和 22%。如果这些趋势适用于领先的处理器核心设计，即使是性能最佳的方案，性能影响也将远远超过 30%。

通过这些发现，有关 Spectre 可以通过低性能成本的核心安全方案来解决的研究观点受到了挑战。 ShadowBinding 呼吁人们对安全推测方案进行更深入的评估，并进一步研究核心方法和优化，这有助于减轻当前最先进方案的高性能成本，而无需进行大量且昂贵的修改。

papers.title: SkipReduce: (Interconnection) Network Sparsity to Accelerate Distributed Machine Learning.
papers.abstract: The interconnection network is a critical component for building scalable systems, as its communication bandwidth directly impacts the collective communication performance of distributed training. In this work, we exploit interconnection network sparsity (or communication sparsity) to address challenges of communication performance and scalability. In particular, we identify how gradients (or packets) during communication can be randomly skipped with minimal impact on accuracy. However, skipping gradients in fine granularity (or individually) results in a loss of gradient information without improving communication performance, due to the synchronous nature of collective communication. Thus, we propose coarse -grained skipping where gradient slices are skipped, which enables skipping of some AllReduce steps to accelerate communication. In particular, we propose SkipReduce collective communication that intentionally skips random gradients during AllReduce. However, a naive implementation of SkipReduce can degrade accuracy by repeatedly skipping gradients from the same node, which introduces bias. To mitigate this accuracy loss, we show how randomizing the skipped gradient slices improves training accuracy with negligible additional runtime. We also observe that not all layers have similar communication sparsity and propose applying SkipReduce selectively where only the sparse layers (or gradients) are skipped to minimize the accuracy impact of SkipReduce. Compared to prior work on communication acceleration, SkipReduce can be seamlessly integrated into existing collective communication libraries with minimal overhead. We implement SkipReduce on top of NCCL’s ring-based AllReduce algorithm. Our results show that this method accelerates collective communication while preserving final training accuracy. Compared to baseline AllReduce, SkipReduce provides up to a 1.58 × speedup in time-to-accuracy. Beyond this performance gain in data parallelism, this work also discusses the broader implications of SkipReduce, including its application to other parallelism strategies and logical topologies, as well as its benefits as a model regularizer.
papers.abstract_zh: 互连网络是构建可扩展系统的关键组件，因为其通信带宽直接影响分布式训练的集体通信性能。在这项工作中，我们利用互连网络稀疏性（或通信稀疏性）来解决通信性能和可扩展性的挑战。特别是，我们确定了如何在通信过程中随机跳过梯度（或数据包），同时对准确性的影响最小。然而，由于集体通信的同步性质，细粒度（或单独）跳过梯度会导致梯度信息丢失，而不会提高通信性能。因此，我们提出粗粒度跳过，其中跳过梯度切片，这使得能够跳过一些 AllReduce 步骤来加速通信。特别是，我们提出了 SkipReduce 集体通信，在 AllReduce 期间有意跳过随机梯度。然而，SkipReduce 的简单实现可能会通过重复跳过同一节点的梯度来降低准确性，从而引入偏差。为了减轻这种准确性损失，我们展示了如何随机化跳过的梯度切片以可忽略的额外运行时间提高训练准确性。我们还观察到，并非所有层都具有类似的通信稀疏性，并建议有选择地应用 SkipReduce，其中仅跳过稀疏层（或梯度），以最大程度地减少 SkipReduce 的准确性影响。与之前的通信加速工作相比，SkipReduce 可以以最小的开销无缝集成到现有的集体通信库中。我们在 NCCL 基于环的 AllReduce 算法之上实现了 SkipReduce。我们的结果表明，这种方法可以加速集体沟通，同时保持最终的训练准确性。与基线 AllReduce 相比，SkipReduce 在准确时间方面提供了高达 1.58 倍的加速。除了数据并行性方面的性能提升之外，这项工作还讨论了 SkipReduce 的更广泛的影响，包括它在其他并行性策略和逻辑拓扑中的应用，以及它作为模型正则化器的好处。

papers.title: SmartPIR: A Private Information Retrieval System using Computational Storage Devices.
papers.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption-based Private Information Retrieval systems provide strong privacy by enabling encrypted queries on databases hosted by untrusted servers. However, adoption is limited by system-level bottlenecks, including severe I/O constraints in large-scale settings and inefficiencies in handling variable-length data. To solve these issues, we present SmartPIR, a scalable PIR system that tackles these challenges through a protocol and architecture co-design. First, we introduce an in-storage computing framework that offloads FHE operations to computational storage devices (CSDs), eliminating the overhead of large-volume data movement.
