papers.abstract_zh: 点云是自动驾驶和增强现实等许多嵌入式应用的重要几何数据结构类型。当前的点云网络（PCN）已被证明在使用推理执行点云分析方面取得了巨大成功，包括对象部分分割、形状分类等。然而，计算边缘的点云应用程序需要的不仅仅是推理步骤。它们需要对点云工作负载进行端到端 (E2E) 处理：原始数据的预处理、输入准备和推理以执行点云分析。当前支持点云工作负载端到端处理的 PCN 方法无法满足边缘的实时延迟要求，即 AI 服务跟上 3D 传感器生成原始数据的速度的能力。点云工作负载端到端处理的延迟源于两个原因：预处理阶段的内存密集型下采样和推理阶段输入准备的数据结构化步骤。在本文中，我们提出了 HgPCN，一种用于实时嵌入式点云应用的端到端异构架构。在 HgPCN 中，我们引入了两种基于空间索引的新颖方法来解决两个已识别的瓶颈。在HgPCN的预处理引擎中，采用八叉树索引采样方法来优化预处理阶段的内存密集型下采样瓶颈。在推理引擎中，HgPCN通过定制的数据结构单元扩展了商业DLA，该数据结构单元基于体素扩展收集方法，从根本上减少了推理阶段数据结构步骤的工作量。 HgPCN的初始原型已在Intel PAC（Xeon+FPGA）平台上实现。使用四个常用的点云数据集进行比较，在三个基准设备上运行：Intel Xeon W-2255、Nvidia Xavier NX Jetson GPU 和 Nvidia 4060ti GPU。这些点云数据集还在两个现有的 PCN 加速器上运行以进行比较：PointACC 和 Mesorasi。我们的结果表明，在推理阶段，根据数据集大小，HgPCN 与 PointACC 相比可实现 1.3× 到 10.2× 的加速，与 Mesorasi 相比可实现 2.2× 到 16.5× 的加速，与 Jetson NX GPU 相比可实现从 6.4× 到 21× 的加速。随着预处理阶段内存密集型下采样瓶颈的优化，整体延迟表明HgPCN可以通过提供与原始数据生成速率保持一致的端到端服务来达到实时要求。

papers.title: HyFiSS: A Hybrid Fidelity Stall-Aware Simulator for GPGPUs.
papers.abstract: The widespread adoption of GPUs has driven the development of GPU simulators, which, in turn, lead advancements in both GPU architectures and software optimization. Trace-driven cycle-accurate Cycle-accurate simulators, which provide detailed microarchitectural models and clock-level precision, come at the cost of extended simulation times and require high computational resources. Their scalability has become a bottleneck. A growing trend is the adoption of cycle-approximate simulators, which introduce mathematical modeling of partial hardware units and utilize sampling to accelerate simulation. However, this approach faces challenges regarding the accuracy of performance predictions. To address these limitations, we introduce HyFiSS, a hybrid fidelity stall-aware GPU simulator. HyFiSS features fine-grained stall events tracking and attribution by constructing a detailed execution pipeline model for various stall events on Streaming Multiprocessors (SMs). It accurately emulates the thread block scheduler behavior using real-time scheduling logs and utilizes sampling based on thread block sets to minimize the precision loss due to fine-grained sampling points on the microarchitectural state. We achieve a balance between reliability, speed, and the level of simulation detail, especially regarding bottlenecks. By evaluating a diverse set of benchmarks, HyFiSS achieves a mean absolute percentage error in predicting active cycles that is comparable to the state-of-the-art cycle-accurate simulator Accel-Sim. Moreover, HyFiSS achieves a substantial 12.8 × speedup in the simulation efficiency compared to Accel-Sim. HyFiSS also requires at least 3.2 × less disk storage than both Accel-Sim and another state-of-the-art cycle-approximate simulator PPT-GPU due to its efficient SASS (Streaming Assembler) traces compression. With precise, per-cycle stall events statistics, HyFiSS can provide accurate GPU performance metrics and stall cause reporting. This significantly simplifies performance analysis, bottleneck identification, and performance optimization tasks for researchers, making it easier to enhance GPU performance effectively.
papers.abstract_zh: GPU 的广泛采用推动了 GPU 模拟器的发展，反过来又带动了 GPU 架构和软件优化的进步。跟踪驱动的周期精确周期精确模拟器可提供详细的微架构模型和时钟级精度，但代价是延长仿真时间并需要大量计算资源。它们的可扩展性已成为瓶颈。一个日益增长的趋势是采用周期近似模拟器，它引入了部分硬件单元的数学建模并利用采样来加速模拟。然而，这种方法面临着性能预测准确性的挑战。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了 HyFiSS，一种混合​​保真、失速感知的 GPU 模拟器。 HyFiSS 通过为流多处理器 (SM) 上的各种停顿事件构建详细的执行管道模型，实现细粒度的停顿事件跟踪和归因。它使用实时调度日志准确模拟线程块调度程序行为，并利用基于线程块集的采样来最大限度地减少由于微架构状态上的细粒度采样点而导致的精度损失。我们在可靠性、速度和模拟细节水平之间实现了平衡，特别是在瓶颈方面。通过评估一组不同的基准，HyFiSS 在预测活动周期方面实现了与最先进的周期精确模拟器 Accel-Sim 相当的平均绝对百分比误差。此外，与 Accel-Sim 相比，HyFiSS 的仿真效率大幅提升了 12.8 倍。由于其高效的 SASS（流式汇编器）轨迹压缩，HyFiSS 所需的磁盘存储空间比 Accel-Sim 和另一种最先进的周期近似模拟器 PPT-GPU 至少少 3.2 倍。凭借精确的每周期停顿事件统计数据，HyFiSS 可以提供准确的 GPU 性能指标和停顿原因报告。这极大地简化了研究人员的性能分析、瓶颈识别和性能优化任务，从而更容易有效地增强 GPU 性能。

papers.title: HyperTEE: A Decoupled TEE Architecture with Secure Enclave Management.
papers.abstract: Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) architectures have been deployed in various commercial processors to provide secure environments for confidential programs and data. However, as a relatively new feature against security threats, existing designs still face a number of problems. Exploiting the management vulnerabilities, attackers can disclose secrets via controlled-channel or micro-architecture side-channel attacks. To address these problems, this paper proposes a novel TEE architecture, named HyperTEE. In our architecture, enclave management tasks are decoupled from the original computing subsystem to a dedicated, physically isolated Enclave Manage-ment Subsystem (EMS). A properly architected EMS prevents current management vulnerabilities and offers more secure enclave communication. We implemented the HyperTEE prototype on the FPGA platform. Experiments show that HyperTEE only introduces less than 1% area overhead, and 2.0 % and 1.9 % performance overhead on average for enclaves and non-enclave workloads, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 可信执行环境（TEE）架构已部署在各种商用处理器中，为机密程序和数据提供安全环境。然而，作为一种相对较新的针对安全威胁的功能，现有的设计仍然面临着许多问题。利用管理漏洞，攻击者可以通过受控通道或微架构侧通道攻击来泄露秘密。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种新颖的 TEE 架构，称为 HyperTEE。在我们的架构中，飞地管理任务从原始计算子系统解耦到专用的、物理隔离的飞地管理子系统（EMS）。正确架构的 EMS 可防止当前的管理漏洞并提供更安全的飞地通信。我们在 FPGA 平台上实现了 HyperTEE 原型。实验表明，HyperTEE 仅引入不到 1% 的区域开销，对于 enclave 和非 enclave 工作负载平均分别引入 2.0% 和 1.9% 的性能开销。

papers.title: ICED: An Integrated CGRA Framework Enabling DVFS-Aware Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable arrays (CGRAs) are a promising solution to enable energy-efficient acceleration of applications from different domains. By leveraging reconfiguration at the functional level, they can adapt to significantly different computational patterns. However, the relationships of voltage and frequency with the utilization of CGRA resources and the dynamic management of them are not well explored, leading to inefficient designs. CGRAs have also been successful in accelerating data-dependent streaming applications. However, in these applications, the execution time of each kernel in the pipeline might dynamically vary depending on the characteristics of the input. This also leads to under-utilization of resources for the dynamically changing kernels that do not limit the application throughput. DVFS can also improve energy efficiency for these applications by dynamically changing the voltage and frequency levels of tiles that host non-performance-constraining kernels. This paper proposes ICED - an integrated DVFS-aware framework to map applications on CGRAs that support power islands. ICED proposes a CGRA architecture supporting DVFS islands at varying granularity (from a single tile to a group of tiles) and the related DVFS-aware compilation and mapping toolchain. ICED is the first work that introduces DVFS support for spatio-temporal CGRAs at power-island levels. The experimental evaluation shows that ICED improves average utilization by $\mathbf{2}.\mathbf{3}\times$ and energy-efficiency by $\mathbf{1}.\mathbf{32}\times$ over a conventional CGRA. With streaming applications, ICED can achieve up to $\mathbf{1}.\mathbf{26}\times$ energy-efficiency compared with a state-of-the-art CGRA that introduces partial dynamic reconfiguration to adapt to variations in kernels' throughput.
papers.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA）是一种很有前途的解决方案，可以实现不同领域应用程序的节能加速。通过利用功能级别的重新配置，它们可以适应明显不同的计算模式。然而，电压和频率与CGRA资源的利用及其动态管理的关系没有得到很好的探索，导致设计效率低下。 CGRA 在加速依赖数据的流应用程序方面也取得了成功。然而，在这些应用程序中，管道中每个内核的执行时间可能会根据输入的特征动态变化。这还导致动态变化的内核的资源利用不足，而动态变化的内核并不限制应用程序的吞吐量。 DVFS 还可以通过动态更改托管非性能限制内核的瓦片的电压和频率水平来提高这些应用程序的能源效率。本文提出了 ICED——一种集成的 DVFS 感知框架，用于将应用程序映射到支持电力岛的 CGRA 上。 ICED 提出了一种 CGRA 架构，支持不同粒度（从单个图块到一组图块）的 DVFS 岛以及相关的 DVFS 感知编译和映射工具链。 ICED 是第一个在功率岛级别引入对时空 CGRA 的 DVFS 支持的工作。实验评估表明，ICED 将平均利用率提高了 $\mathbf{2}.\mathbf{3}\times$ ，将能源效率提高了 $\mathbf{1}.\mathbf{32}\times$ 超过传统的 CGRA。借助流式应用程序，与引入部分动态重新配置以适应的最先进的 CGRA 相比，ICED 可以实现高达 $\mathbf{1}.\mathbf{26}\times$ 的能源效率内核吞吐量的变化。

papers.title: ImPress: Securing DRAM Against Data-Disturbance Errors via Implicit Row-Press Mitigation.
papers.abstract: DRAM cells are susceptible to Data-Disturbance Errors (DDE), which can be exploited by an attacker to compromise system security. Rowhammer is a well-known DDE vulnerability that occurs when a row is repeatedly activated. Rowhammer can be mitigated by tracking aggressor rows inside DRAM (in-DRAM) or at the Memory Controller (MC). Row-Press (RP) is a new DDE vulnerability that occurs when a row is kept open for a long time. RP significantly reduces the number of activations required to induce an error, thus breaking existing RH solutions. Prior work on Explicit Row-Press mitigation, ExPress, requires the memory controller to limit the maximum row-open-time, and redesign existing Rowhammer solutions with reduced Rowhammer threshold. Unfortunately, ExPress incurs significant performance and storage overheads, and being a memory controller-based solution, it is incompatible with in-DRAM trackers. In this paper, we propose Implicit Row-Press mitigation (in-Press), which does not restrict row-open-time, is compatible with memory controller-based and in-DRAM solutions and does not reduce the tolerated Rowhammer threshold. In-Press treats a row open for a specified time as equivalent to an activation. We design in-Press by developing a Unified Charge-Loss Model, which combines the net effect of both Rowhammer and Row-Press for arbitrary patterns. We analyze both controller-based (Graphene and PARA) and in-DRAM trackers (Mithril and MINT). We show that in-Press makes Rowhammer solutions resilient to Row-Press transparently without affecting the Rowhammer threshold.
papers.abstract_zh: DRAM 单元容易受到数据干扰错误 (DDE) 的影响，攻击者可利用该错误来危害系统安全。 Rowhammer 是一个著名的 DDE 漏洞，当重复激活一行时会发生该漏洞。 Rowhammer 可以通过跟踪 DRAM 内 (in-DRAM) 或内存控制器 (MC) 处的攻击行来缓解。 Row-Press (RP) 是一种新的 DDE 漏洞，当行长时间保持打开状态时会发生该漏洞。 RP 显着减少了引发错误所需的激活次数，从而打破了现有的 RH 解决方案。先前有关显式行压缓解措施 Express 的工作要求内存控制器限制最大行打开时间，并重新设计现有的 Rowhammer 解决方案以降低 Rowhammer 阈值。不幸的是，ExPress 会产生显着的性能和存储开销，并且作为基于内存控制器的解决方案，它与 DRAM 跟踪器不兼容。在本文中，我们提出了隐式行压缓解（in-Press），它不限制行打开时间，与基于内存控制器和 DRAM 解决方案兼容，并且不会降低容忍的 Rowhammer 阈值。 In-Press 将打开指定时间的行视为等同于激活。我们通过开发统一电荷损失模型来设计 In-Press，该模型结合了 Rowhammer 和 Row-Press 对于任意模式的净效应。我们分析了基于控制器的跟踪器（Graphene 和 PARA）和 DRAM 跟踪器（Mithril 和 MINT）。我们表明，In-Press 使 Rowhammer 解决方案能够透明地适应 Row-Press，而不影响 Rowhammer 阈值。

papers.title: IvLeague: Side Channel-Resistant Secure Architectures Using Isolated Domains of Dynamic Integrity Trees.
papers.abstract: Modern secure processors rely on hardware-assisted encryption and tree-based integrity verification to protect off-chip data. However, despite extensive research on performance optimization’ there is a significant lack of emphasis on side channel vulnerabilities in secure architectures. Given the strong focus on data security, it is critical to ensure that the integration of new design elements into secure architectures does not inadvertently introduce additional vulnerabilities. Existing integrity verification mechanisms use a global in-tegrity tree shared across security domains, which can introduce side channel leakage through integrity tree metadata sharing. In this work, we present IvLeague framework - a novel integrity ver-ification mechanism for side channel-resistant isolated integrity trees among dynamic domains in secure processors. Specifically, IvLeague splits the global tree into multiple fixed-size subtrees, dynamically allocating these subtrees to domains during runtime. IvLeague enables efficient runtime scaling of memory coverage for individual domains. Additionally, we IvLeague-Invert, an optimization which shortens the integrity verification path by mapping data pages to high-level tree nodes. Finally, IvLeague-Pro further improves the integrity verification of hotpages by enabling efficient hotpage tracking and migrating hotpages closer to the root. We extensively evaluate all three IvLeague schemes using 16 real-world workloads with varying memory footprints. IvLeague scheme, along with its optimizations, demonstrates a 5%-19% speedup over the insecure baseline, while providing effective side channel protection for the integrity tree. Moreover, IvLeague ensures high utilization of TreeLings (over 99.5%) and supports workloads with highly skewed memory footprints.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代安全处理器依靠硬件辅助加密和基于树的完整性验证来保护片外数据。然而，尽管对性能优化进行了广泛的研究，但仍然严重缺乏对安全架构中侧通道漏洞的重视。鉴于对数据安全的高度关注，确保将新设计元素集成到安全架构中不会无意中引入额外的漏洞至关重要。现有的完整性验证机制使用跨安全域共享的全局完整性树，这可能会通过完整性树元数据共享引入侧通道泄漏。在这项工作中，我们提出了 IvLeague 框架 - 一种新颖的完整性验证机制，用于安全处理器中动态域之间的抗侧通道隔离完整性树。具体来说，IvLeague 将全局树拆分为多个固定大小的子树，在运行时动态地将这些子树分配给域。 IvLeague 能够在运行时有效扩展各个域的内存覆盖范围。此外，我们还进行了 IvLeague-Invert 优化，通过将数据页映射到高级树节点来缩短完整性验证路径。最后，IvLeague-Pro 通过启用高效的热点跟踪并将热点迁移到更靠近根的位置，进一步改进了热点的完整性验证。我们使用 16 个具有不同内存占用的实际工作负载对所有三种 IvLeague 方案进行了广泛评估。 IvLeague 方案及其优化表明，与不安全基线相比，速度提高了 5%-19%，同时为完整性树提供了有效的侧通道保护。此外，IvLeague 可确保 TreeLings 的高利用率（超过 99.5%）并支持内存占用严重倾斜的工作负载。

papers.title: Leveraging Cache Coherence to Detect and Repair False Sharing On-the-fly.
papers.abstract: Performance bugs due to false sharing do not man-ifest as observable correctness errors, and hence are challenging to detect and repair. Prior approaches aim to both detect and repair false sharing instances automatically but most of them suffer from one or more of the following drawbacks: (i) high performance overhead due to expensive tracking of shadow memory, (ii) reliance on imprecise hardware events, and (iii) limited applicability and portability. We present extensions to the MESI cache coherence protocol for efficiently identifying and mitigating false sharing instances. The FSDetect protocol tracks the frequency of coherence misses per cache block to identify harmful instances of falsely shared lines while incurring negligible performance overhead. The FSLite protocol extends FSDetect to transparently privatize the falsely shared lines on accesses after detection, thereby eliminating the performance problem arising from false sharing. FSLite maintains coherence by performing precise byte-level updates of privatized blocks at the LLC on termination of privatization. Our simulation results on a variety of multithreaded workloads show that FSDetect can precisely identify all known harmful instances of false sharing. FSLite, on average, improves the performance of applications suffering from false sharing by 1.39X over the unmodified baseline, at the cost of a minimal increase in the chip area. Furthermore, applications running with FSLite stress the network less and show improved energy behavior.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于错误共享而导致的性能错误不会表现为可观察到的正确性错误，因此难以检测和修复。现有方法旨在自动检测和修复错误共享实例，但大多数方法都存在以下一个或多个缺点：（i）由于影子内存跟踪成本高昂而导致高性能开销，（ii）依赖不精确的硬件事件，以及（iii）适用性和可移植性有限。我们提出了 MESI 缓存一致性协议的扩展，以有效识别和减少错误共享实例。 FSDetect 协议跟踪每个缓存块的一致性缺失频率，以识别错误共享行的有害实例，同时产生的性能开销可以忽略不计。 FSLite协议扩展了FSDetect，在检测后将访问的错误共享线路透明地私有化，从而消除了错误共享带来的性能问题。 FSLite 通过在私有化终止时在 LLC 上执行私有化块的精确字节级更新来保持一致性。我们对各种多线程工作负载的模拟结果表明，FSDetect 可以精确识别所有已知的有害的错误共享实例。平均而言，与未修改的基准相比，FSLite 将遭受错误共享的应用程序的性能提高了 1.39 倍，而代价是芯片面积的增加最小化。此外，使用 FSLite 运行的应用程序对网络的压力较小，并且表现出改进的能源行为。

papers.title: Leviathan: A Unified System for General-Purpose Near-Data Computing.
papers.abstract: The rising cost of data movement poses a significant challenge to future computing systems. The call to arms for novel data-centric systems has spawned a wave of near-data computing (NDC) architectures that move compute closer to data. Despite large benefits promised by NDC, prior designs suffer from limited applicability and difficult programming. This paper identifies the commonalities and differences across NDC designs to develop Leviathan, a unified architecture and programming interface for near-cache NDC. We build a taxonomy of NDC and identify the key dimensions as what, where, and when to compute. Leviathan provides a simple reactive-programming interface and automatically executes actions near data at the right time and place. The ability to integrate multiple NDC paradigms makes Leviathan the only general-purpose system to support a variety of specialized NDC designs. Across a range of NDC-specialized applications, Leviathan improves performance by 1.5×-3.7× and reduces energy by 22%-77% vs. a baseline multicore, while adding only ≈6% area compared to the last-level cache.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据移动成本的上升对未来的计算系统提出了重大挑战。对新型以数据为中心的系统的号召催生了一波近数据计算 (NDC) 架构，使计算更接近数据。尽管 NDC 承诺带来巨大好处，但先前的设计仍面临适用性有限和编程困难的问题。本文确定了 NDC 设计的共性和差异，以开发 Leviathan，这是一种用于近缓存 NDC 的统一架构和编程接口。我们构建了 NDC 分类法，并确定了计算内容、计算地点和时间等关键维度。 Leviathan 提供了一个简单的反应式编程接口，并在正确的时间和地点自动执行数据附近的操作。集成多个 NDC 范式的能力使 Leviathan 成为唯一支持各种专业 NDC 设计的通用系统。在一系列 NDC 专用应用中，与基准多核相比，Leviathan 将性能提高了 1.5×-3.7×，能耗降低了 22%-77%，而与最后一级缓存相比，仅增加了约 6% 的面积。

papers.title: LIBRA: Memory Bandwidth- and Locality-Aware Parallel Tile Rendering.
papers.abstract: The increasing demand for high-quality graphics requires a significant increase in computational power of modern GPUs. The common approach to follow is augmenting the number of compute units (i.e., shader cores). However, this can result in underutilized resources if the workload is not properly balanced. This is particularly challenging in Tile-Based Rendering (TBR) GPUs, the predominant architecture in mobile GPUs, running graphics applications due to limited per-tile workload. This work proposes parallel tile rendering to efficiently in-crease the computational capabilities of TBR GPUs. This solves the problem of not having enough work to utilize the additional compute units but causes memory-intensive applications to underperform due to the increased memory pressure. To this end, we introduce LIBRA, a parallel tile rendering architecture that includes a novel locality-aware approach to schedule tiles to Raster Units to evenly distribute memory requests during the rendering of each frame. This alleviates memory congestion, therefore, reducing memory access time. LIBRA leverages frame-to-frame coherence to predict the memory pressure of each tile of a frame without penalizing the hit ratio of the cache memories. Evaluations over a wide range of commercial gaming applications show that LIBRA reduces the average memory latency by 13.5% and achieves an average speedup of 20.9%. It also provides an 11.4% improvement in throughput (frames per second) and a total GPU energy reduction of 9.2%, while adding negligible overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 对高质量图形日益增长的需求需要显着提高现代 GPU 的计算能力。遵循的常见方法是增加计算单元（即着色器核心）的数量。但是，如果工作负载未适当平衡，这可能会导致资源利用不足。这对于基于图块的渲染 (TBR) GPU（移动 GPU 中的主要架构）来说尤其具有挑战性，由于每个图块的工作负载有限，因此运行图形应用程序。这项工作提出了并行图块渲染，以有效提高 TBR GPU 的计算能力。这解决了没有足够的工作来利用额外计算单元的问题，但会导致内存密集型应用程序由于内存压力增加而表现不佳。为此，我们引入了 LIBRA，这是一种并行图块渲染架构，其中包括一种新颖的局部感知方法，用于将图块调度到光栅单元，以便在每帧渲染期间均匀分配内存请求。这缓解了内存拥塞，从而减少了内存访问时间。 LIBRA 利用帧到帧的一致性来预测帧的每个图块的内存压力，而不影响高速缓存的命中率。对广泛商业游戏应用的评估表明，LIBRA 使平均内存延迟降低了 13.5%，平均加速达到 20.9%。它还使吞吐量（每秒帧数）提高了 11.4%，GPU 总能耗降低了 9.2%，同时增加的开销可以忽略不计。

papers.title: LightWSP: Whole-System Persistence on the Cheap.
papers.abstract: Whole-system persistence (WSP) has recently attracted more interest thanks to its transparency and performance benefits over partial-system persistence where users are not only burdened by complex persistent programming but also incapable of using DRAM as LLC. Nevertheless, existing WSP work either introduces high hardware cost or causes non-trivial performance overhead. To this end, this paper presents LightWSP, a compiler/architecture co-design scheme that can achieve WSP in a lightweight yet performant manner. LightWSP compiler partitions program into a series of recoverable regions (epochs) with their live-out registers checkpointed, while LightWSP hardware persists the stores of the regions-whose boundary serves as a power failure recovery point-enforcing crash consistency; LightWSP leverages the battery-backed write pending queue (WPQ) of a memory controller as a redo buffer, i.e., all stores are first buffered in WPQ and then persisted together in non-volatile memory (NVM) at each region end. In this way, no matter when power failure happens, NVM is never corrupted by the stores of the power-interrupted region, facilitating correct recovery. In particular, LightWSP supports multiple memory controllers on the cheap without costly speculation/misspeculation handling mechanisms used by prior work. The experimental results with 38 applications show that LightWSP incurs only an average of 9.0% run-time overhead. This is on par with the state-of-the-art work, that complicates the core microarchitecture significantly with its intrusive design for memory controller speculation, yet the hardware cost of LightWSP is near zero (0.5B per core).
papers.abstract_zh: 全系统持久性 (WSP) 最近因其相对于部分系统持久性的透明度和性能优势而引起了更多关注，在部分系统持久性中，用户不仅要承受复杂的持久性编程的负担，而且无法将 DRAM 用作 LLC。然而，现有的 WSP 工作要么引入高硬件成本，要么导致不小的性能开销。为此，本文提出了 LightWSP，这是一种编译器/架构协同设计方案，可以以轻量级且高性能的方式实现 WSP。 LightWSP 编译器将程序划分为一系列可恢复区域（纪元），并对其存活寄存器设置检查点，而 LightWSP 硬件则保留区域的存储（其边界用作电源故障恢复点），以强制执行崩溃一致性； LightWSP 利用内存控制器的电池支持的写挂起队列 (WPQ) 作为重做缓冲区，即所有存储首先在 WPQ 中缓冲，然后一起持久保存在每个区域末端的非易失性内存 (NVM) 中。这样，无论何时发生断电，NVM都不会被断电区域的存储损坏，从而有助于正确恢复。特别是，LightWSP 以低廉的价格支持多个内存控制器，而无需使用先前工作中使用的昂贵的推测/错误推测处理机制。 38 个应用程序的实验结果表明，LightWSP 平均仅产生 9.0% 的运行时开销。这与最先进的工作相当，后者通过内存控制器推测的侵入式设计使核心微架构显着复杂化，但 LightWSP 的硬件成本接近于零（每个核心 0.5B）。

papers.title: LoAS: Fully Temporal-Parallel Dataflow for Dual-Sparse Spiking Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have gained significant research attention over the past decade due to their potential for enabling resource-constrained edge devices. While existing SNN accelerators efficiently process sparse spikes with dense weights, the opportunities for accelerating SNNs with sparse weights, referred to as dual-sparsity, remain underexplored. In this work, we focus on accelerating dual-sparse SNNs, particularly on their core operation: sparse-matrix-sparse-matrix multiplication (spMspM). Our observations reveal that executing a dual-sparse SNN on existing spMspM accelerators designed for dual-sparse Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) results in sub-optimal efficiency. The main challenge is that SNNs, which naturally processes multiple timesteps, introducing an additional loop in ANN spMspM, leading to longer latency and more memory traffic. To address this issue, we propose a fully temporal-parallel (FTP) dataflow that minimizes data movement across timesteps and reduces the end-to-end latency of dual-sparse SNNs. To enhance the efficiency of the FTP dataflow, we introduce an FTP-friendly spike compression mechanism that efficiently compresses single-bit spikes and ensures contiguous memory access. Additionally, we propose an FTP-friendly inner-join circuit that reduces the cost of expensive prefix-sum circuits with negligible throughput penalties. These innovations are encapsulated in LoAS, a Low-latency inference Accelerator for dual-sparse SNNs. Running dual-sparse SNN workloads on LoAS demonstrates significant speedup (up to $8.51 \times$ ) and energy reduction (up to $3.68\times$ ) compared to prior dual-sparse accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 由于其在支持资源受限的边缘设备方面的潜力，在过去十年中获得了广泛的研究关注。虽然现有的 SNN 加速器可以有效地处理具有密集权重的稀疏尖峰，但使用稀疏权重（称为对偶稀疏性）加速 SNN 的机会仍未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，我们专注于加速双稀疏 SNN，特别是其核心操作：稀疏矩阵-稀疏矩阵乘法 (spMspM)。我们的观察表明，在专为双稀疏人工神经网络 (ANN) 设计的现有 spMspM 加速器上执行双稀疏 SNN 会导致效率次优。主要挑战是 SNN 自然会处理多个时间步，在 ANN spMspM 中引入额外的循环，导致更长的延迟和更多的内存流量。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种完全时间并行（FTP）数据流，它可以最大限度地减少跨时间步的数据移动，并减少双稀疏 SNN 的端到端延迟。为了提高 FTP 数据流的效率，我们引入了一种 FTP 友好的尖峰压缩机制，可以有效地压缩单位尖峰并确保连续的内存访问。此外，我们提出了一种 FTP 友好的内连接电路，可以降低昂贵的前缀和电路的成本，同时吞吐量损失可以忽略不计。这些创新被封装在 LoAS 中，LoAS 是一种用于双稀疏 SNN 的低延迟推理加速器。在 LoAS 上运行双稀疏 SNN 工作负载表现出显着的加速（高达 $8.51 \times$ ）和能耗降低（高达 $3.68\times$ ) 与之前的双稀疏加速器相比。

papers.title: Localizing the Tag Comparisons in the Wakeup Logic to Reduce Energy Consumption of the Issue Queue.
papers.abstract: There is a high demand to reduce the energy consumption of microprocessors. Among resources in a processor, the issue queue is one of the largest energy consumers, with much of the energy being consumed by the wakeup logic. The wakeup logic comprises the content-addressable memory, where tag comparisons are performed for all entries. Such global tag comparisons consume an appreciable amount of energy. This paper proposes a scheme called segmenting wakeup logic (SegWU), where the wakeup logic is segmented logically. An instruction is dispatched to an available entry in the segment selected based on the partial bits of the source tag values. At the wakeup time, a broadcast destination tag is compared only in the segment that corresponds to the partial bits of the destination tag value. Tag comparisons are not performed in the other segments. This localization of tag comparisons reduces the energy consumption. Our evaluation results for SPEC2017 benchmark programs show that SegWU reduces the number of tag comparisons by 90.3%. This lowers the IQ energy consumption, and the net reduction excluding the secondary effect (activity lowering of the front-end) and overhead is 3.0% in the base core energy consumption with no performance degradation. The overall energy reduction including the secondary effect is 6.9%.
papers.abstract_zh: 人们迫切需要降低微处理器的能耗。在处理器的资源中，发出队列是最大的能源消耗者之一，其中大部分能源被唤醒逻辑消耗。唤醒逻辑包括内容可寻址存储器，其中对所有条目执行标签比较。这种全局标签比较消耗了大量的能量。本文提出了一种称为分段唤醒逻辑（SegWU）的方案，其中唤醒逻辑是逻辑分段的。指令被分派到基于源标签值的部分位选择的段中的可用条目。在唤醒时，仅在与目标标签值的部分位相对应的段中比较广播目标标签。不在其他段中执行标签比较。标签比较的这种本地化减少了能量消耗。我们对 SPEC2017 基准程序的评估结果表明，SegWU 将标签比较次数减少了 90.3%。这降低了 IQ 能耗，排除次要影响（前端活动降低）和开销后，基本核心能耗净减少 3.0%，且性能没有下降。包括二次效应在内的总体节能效果为 6.9%。

papers.title: Looking into the Black Box: Monitoring Computer Architecture Simulations in Real-Time with AkitaRTM.
papers.abstract: Computer architecture simulators are essential for validating novel chip designs. However, they often provide little transparency during execution. This opaqueness limits the ability of users to identify issues during the simulation, leading to both wasted computational and human time. We address these issues by providing an intuitive user experience during simulation execution. Particularly, we reveal the status of executions and allow users to control the execution of a computer architecture simulator through AkitaRTM, an interactive web-based tool for real-time monitoring of computer architecture simulations. We based its design on the design workflow inefficiencies experienced by computer architects when using simulations. We demonstrate AkitaRTM's utility through two case studies, the second leading to a patch in the simulator. Additionally, we conducted a user study with computer architects, aiming to validate AkitaRTM. We found that, in addition to solving the observed problems, AkitaRTM also provided an educational benefit by making simulators more transparent to users. Based on these findings, we reflect upon the design of AkitaRTM and provide guidance for future human-centered tools in this space.
papers.abstract_zh: 计算机架构模拟器对于验证新颖的芯片设计至关重要。然而，它们在执行过程中往往缺乏透明度。这种不透明性限制了用户在模拟过程中识别问题的能力，导致计算和人力时间的浪费。我们通过在模拟执行期间提供直观的用户体验来解决这些问题。特别是，我们揭示了执行状态，并允许用户通过 AkitaRTM（一种基于网络的交互式工具，用于实时监控计算机体系结构模拟）来控制计算机体系结构模拟器的执行。我们的设计基于计算机架构师在使用模拟时遇到的设计工作流程效率低下的问题。我们通过两个案例研究展示了 AkitaRTM 的实用性，第二个案例研究导致了模拟器中的补丁。此外，我们与计算机架构师进行了一项用户研究，旨在验证 AkitaRTM。我们发现，除了解决观察到的问题之外，AkitaRTM 还通过使模拟器对用户更加透明来提供教育效益。基于这些发现，我们反思了 AkitaRTM 的设计，并为该领域未来以人为本的工具提供指导。

papers.title: Low-Overhead General-Purpose Near-Data Processing in CXL Memory Expanders.
papers.abstract: Emerging Compute Express Link (CXL) enables cost-efficient memory expansion beyond the local DRAM of processors. While its CXL.mem protocol provides minimal latency overhead through an optimized protocol stack, frequent CXL memory accesses can result in significant slowdowns for memory-bound applications whether they are latency-sensitive or bandwidth-intensive. The near-data processing (NDP) in the CXL controller promises to overcome such limitations of passive CXL memory. However, prior work on NDP in CXL memory proposes application-specific units that are not suitable for practical CXL memory-based systems that should support various applications. On the other hand, existing CPU or GPU cores are not cost-effective for NDP because they are not optimized for memory-bound applications. In addition, the communication between the host processor and CXL controller for NDP offloading should achieve low latency, but existing CXL.io/PCIe-based mechanisms incur $\mu\mathbf{s}-\mathbf{scale}$ latency and are not suitable for fine-grained NDP.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的 Compute Express Link (CXL) 可实现经济高效的内存扩展，超越处理器的本地 DRAM。虽然其 CXL.mem 协议通过优化的协议栈提供最小的延迟开销，但频繁的 CXL 内存访问可能会导致内存受限应用程序显着变慢，无论它们是延迟敏感型还是带宽密集型。 CXL 控制器中的近数据处理 (NDP) 有望克服无源 CXL 存储器的此类限制。然而，先前关于 CXL 存储器中的 NDP 的工作提出了特定于应用程序的单元，这些单元不适合应支持各种应用程序的实际基于 CXL 存储器的系统。另一方面，现有的 CPU 或 GPU 内核对于 NDP 来说并不经济高效，因为它们没有针对内存受限的应用程序进行优化。此外，用于 NDP 卸载的主机处理器和 CXL 控制器之间的通信应实现低延迟，但现有的基于 CXL.io/PCIe 的机制会产生 $\mu\mathbf{s}-\mathbf{scale}$ 延迟并且不适合细粒度的NDP。

papers.title: LUCIE: A Universal Chiplet-Interposer Design Framework for Plug-and-Play Integration.
papers.abstract: Multi-chip modules, recently also known as chiplets, are a promising approach to building large-scale silicon in the post-Moore's Law era. While chiplet-based designs offer advantages like averting manufacturing yield issues and enabling heterogeneous integration, there has not been a standard for seamless communication and integration of chiplets. This paper proposes LUCIE, a Lightweight Universal Chiplet-Interposer Ecosystem that provides a universal, modular, and reconfigurable framework for plug-and-play integration of chiplets. The key ideas behind LUCIE include a flexible 2D grid-based interposer design and a placement tool to aid chiplet integration. Its lightweight design and direct connection between chiplets allowed designs to fit into the LUCIE framework with minimal effort while achieving great performance. Performance analysis showed that LUCIE's performance is comparable to custom interposers, up to twice as fast as NoC-on-NoP designs in certain scenarios, and around 20% more power efficient than NoC-on-NoP designs. Compared to using custom interposers, cost analysis showed that LUCIE saves up to 18.9% of manufacturing cost, $60,000 of Non-Recurring Engineering cost, and 30 weeks less time-to-market. The LUCIE framework is more flexible and ideal for more topologies, such as 2D mesh and star topology. With the development of a novel, graph-based placement algorithm, LUCIE significantly reduces design complexity compared to monolithic and custom interposer-based chiplet systems while providing a high degree of modularity and reconfigurability.
papers.abstract_zh: 多芯片模块，最近也称为小芯片，是后摩尔定律时代构建大规模硅片的一种有前景的方法。虽然基于小芯片的设计具有避免制造良率问题和实现异构集成等优势，但目前还没有小芯片无缝通信和集成的标准。本文提出了 LUCIE，一种轻量级通用 Chiplet-Interposer 生态系统，它为 Chiplet 的即插即用集成提供了通用、模块化和可重新配置的框架。 LUCIE 背后的关键思想包括灵活的基于网格的 2D 中介层设计和有助于小芯片集成的放置工具。其轻量级设计和小芯片之间的直接连接使设计能够以最小的努力融入 LUCIE 框架，同时实现出色的性能。性能分析表明，LUCIE 的性能与定制中介层相当，在某些情况下速度最高可达 NoC-on-NoP 设计的两倍，并且比 NoC-on-NoP 设计的能效高出约 20%。与使用定制中介层相比，成本分析表明，LUCIE 可节省高达 18.9% 的制造成本、60,000 美元的非经常性工程成本，并将上市时间缩短 30 周。 LUCIE 框架更加灵活，适合更多拓扑，例如 2D 网格和星形拓扑。随着新型基于图形的布局算法的开发，与单片和基于定制中介层的小芯片系统相比，LUCIE 显着降低了设计复杂性，同时提供了高度的模块化和可重构性。

papers.title: MeMCISA: Memristor-Enabled Memory-Centric Instruction-Set Architecture for Database Workloads.
papers.abstract: The exponential growth of data exerts great pressure on hardware design for database systems. Memory-centric computing (MCC) architecture, which enable compute capabilities near or inside memory storage, demonstrate great potential in enhancing the efficiency of database operations with higher compute parallelism and reduced data movements. However, existing MCC architecture mainly focus on artificial intelligence (AI) computations and those designed for database applications can only run a limited number of standalone queries such as SORT or JOIN, lacking efficient support for increasingly diverse and complex database workloads. For example, realizing a commercial recommendation engine on database requires supporting workloads including but not limited to vector aggregation, convolution or $N$ -hop neighborhoods computing, etc. In this work, we develop a memristor-enabled memory-centric instruction-set architecture (MeMCISA) aiming to efficiently accelerate versatile workloads in modern database systems. MeMCISA features scalable multi-bank memristor-based storage organization with near-memory circuitries and caches in banks. An out-of-order (O0O) scheduling scheme is designed for MeMCISA based on a vector instruction set with four types of instructions (bit-level, element-level, vector-level, and control-level), combining memristor-enabled in-memory computing and near-memory computing to efficiently run workloads with varying computational kernels and data sizes. MeMCISA can support parallel instruction executions across different memristor banks as well as different hardware modules within a memristor bank. Furthermore, we develop data dependency handling mechanisms to support vector dependency scenarios in MeMCISA that do not exist in conventional scalar-based instruction sets. A prototype MeMCISA is implemented based on a 40nm CMOS technology with necessary peripheral hardware including instruction buffer and instruction scheduler. To accurately study MeMCISA performance in real-world database systems, a software-hardware co-designed framework integrating reconfigurable MeMCISA prototype is created that can support end-to-end simulations for database workloads starting from raw software codes. Based on this framework, we evaluate MeMCISA performance with standalone database queries as well as complex database workloads from representative benchmarks including UniBench, neural collaborative filtering (NCF), and ResNet-18. Simulation results demonstrate that MeMCISA achieves up to 41.84 × ~ 1767.70 × in speed compared to general-purpose processors (CPUs/GPUs).
papers.abstract_zh: 数据的指数级增长给数据库系统的硬件设计带来了巨大的压力。以内存为中心的计算 (MCC) 架构可实现内存存储附近或内部的计算能力，通过更高的计算并行性和减少的数据移动，在提高数据库操作效率方面展现出巨大的潜力。然而，现有的MCC架构主要侧重于人工智能（AI）计算，而为数据库应用程序设计的架构只能运行有限数量的独立查询（例如SORT或JOIN），缺乏对日益多样化和复杂的数据库工作负载的有效支持。例如，在数据库上实现商业推荐引擎需要支持包括但不限于向量聚合、卷积或 $N$ -hop 邻域计算等工作负载。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种启用忆阻器的以内存为中心的指令集架构(MeMCISA) 旨在有效加速现代数据库系统中的多功能工作负载。 MeMCISA 具有可扩展的基于多存储体忆阻器的存储组织，具有存储体中的近内存电路和缓存。 MeMCISA基于具有四种指令类型（位级、元素级、向量级和控制级）的向量指令集设计了一种无序（O0O）调度方案，结合忆阻器启用的内存计算和近内存计算，以有效运行具有不同计算内核和数据大小的工作负载。 MeMCISA 可以支持跨不同忆阻器组以及忆阻器组内不同硬件模块的并行指令执行。此外，我们开发了数据依赖处理机制来支持 MeMCISA 中的向量依赖场景，而传统的基于标量的指令集中不存在这些场景。原型MeMCISA基于40nm CMOS技术以及必要的外围硬件（包括指令缓冲器和指令调度器）实现。为了准确研究现实数据库系统中的 MeMCISA 性能，创建了一个集成可重构 MeMCISA 原型的软硬件协同设计框架，该框架可以支持从原始软件代码开始对数据库工作负载进行端到端模拟。基于此框架，我们通过独立数据库查询以及来自 UniBench、神经协同过滤 (NCF) 和 ResNet-18 等代表性基准的复杂数据库工作负载来评估 MeMCISA 性能。仿真结果表明，与通用处理器（CPU/GPU）相比，MeMCISA 的速度高达 41.84 × ~ 1767.70 ×。

papers.title: Memory Allocation Under Hardware Compression.
papers.abstract: As the scaling of memory density slows physically, a promising solution is to scale memory logically by enhancing the CPU's memory controller to encode and store data more densely in memory. This is known as hardware memory compression. Hardware memory compression decouples OS-managed physical memory from actual memory (i.e., DRAM); the memory controller spends a dynamically varying amount of DRAM on each physical page, depending on the compressibility of the page's content. The newly-decoupled actual memory effectively forms a new layer of memory beyond the traditional layers of virtual, pseudo-physical, and physical memory. We note unlike these traditional memory layers, each with its own specialized allocation interface (e.g., malloc/mmap for virtual memory, page tables+MMU for physical memory), this new layer of memory introduced by hardware memory compression still awaits its own unique memory allocation interface; its absence makes the allocation of actual memory imprecise and, sometimes, even impossible. Imprecisely allocating less actual memory, and/or unable to allocate more, can harm performance. Even imprecisely allocating more actual memory to some jobs can be harmful as it can result in allocating less actual memory to other jobs in highly-occupied memory systems, where compression is useful. To restore precise memory allocation, we design a new memory allocation specialized for this new layer of memory and, subsequently, architect a new MMU-like component in the memory controller and tackle the corresponding design challenges. We create a full-system FPGA prototype of a hardware-compressed memory system with precise memory allocation. Our evaluations using the prototype show that jobs perform stably under colocation. The performance variation is only 1%-2%; in comparison, it is 19%-89% under the prior art.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着内存密度的扩展在物理上减慢，一个有前途的解决方案是通过增强 CPU 的内存控制器以在内存中更密集地编码和存储数据来逻辑扩展内存。这称为硬件内存压缩。硬件内存压缩将操作系统管理的物理内存与实际内存（即 DRAM）解耦；内存控制器在每个物理页上使用动态变化的 DRAM 量，具体取决于页内容的可压缩性。新解耦的实际内存有效地形成了超越传统虚拟、伪物理和物理内存层的新内存层。我们注意到，与这些传统的内存层不同，每个内存层都有自己专门的分配接口（例如，虚拟内存的malloc/mmap，物理内存的页表+MMU），硬件内存压缩引入的这一新内存层仍然有自己独特的内存分配接口；它的缺失使得实际内存的分配不精确，有时甚至是不可能的。不精确地分配较少的实际内存和/或无法分配更多的内存可能会损害性能。即使不精确地为某些作业分配更多的实际内存也可能是有害的，因为它可能会导致在高占用内存系统中为其他作业分配更少的实际内存，而压缩在这些系统中很有用。为了恢复精确的内存分配，我们专门针对这一新的内存层设计了一种新的内存分配，随后在内存控制器中构建了一个新的类似 MMU 的组件，并解决了相应的设计挑战。我们创建了具有精确内存分配的硬件压缩内存系统的全系统 FPGA 原型。我们使用原型进行的评估表明，工作在托管环境下表现稳定。性能变化仅为1%-2%；相比之下，现有技术为19％-89％。

papers.title: Message from the MICRO 2024 General Chairs: "Hi, How Are you?" - "Jeremiah The Innocent" Mural.
papers.abstract: It is our pleasure and honor to welcome y'all to Austin for the 57th edition of the IEEE/ACM International Symposium on Microarchitecture 2024 (MICRO-57), the premier forum for presenting, discussing, and debating innovative microarchitecture ideas and techniques for advanced computing and communication systems. MICRO brings together researchers from around the world for technical exchange on traditional microarchitecture topics and emerging research areas in fields related to computer microarchitecture, compilers, computer chips, and computer systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们很高兴和荣幸地欢迎大家来到奥斯汀参加 2024 年第 57 届 IEEE/ACM 国际微架构研讨会 (MICRO-57)，这是展示、讨论和辩论先进计算和通信系统的创新微架构理念和技术的首要论坛。 MICRO 汇聚了来自世界各地的研究人员，就计算机微架构、编译器、计算机芯片和计算机系统相关领域的传统微架构主题和新兴研究领域进行技术交流。

papers.title: Message from the MICRO 2024 Program Chairs.
papers.abstract: It is our pleasure to present the technical program for MICRO 2024, the 57th ACM/IEEE International Symposium on Microarchitecture. This year's program features a wide variety of exciting topics representing the state of the art in computer architecture research. We had a record 497 submissions, an increase of 15& over last year. We accepted a record 113 papers. The reviewing process included 152 program committee (PC) members, 176 external review committee (ERC) members, and few other expert reviewers.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们很高兴介绍第 57 届 ACM/IEEE 国际微架构研讨会 MICRO 2024 的技术方案。今年的计划涵盖了各种令人兴奋的主题，代表了计算机体系结构研究的最新技术水平。我们收到了创纪录的 497 份参赛作品，比去年增加了 15 份。我们接受了创纪录的 113 篇论文。评审过程包括 152 名程序委员会 (PC) 成员、176 名外部评审委员会 (ERC) 成员以及少数其他专家评审员。

papers.title: MINT: Securely Mitigating Rowhammer with a Minimalist in-DRAM Tracker.
papers.abstract: This paper investigates secure low-cost in-DRAM trackers for mitigating Rowhammer (RH). In-DRAM solutions have the potential to solve the RH problem within the DRAM chip without relying on other parts of the system. However, in-DRAM mitigation suffers from two key challenges: First, the mitigations are synchronized with refresh, which means that we cannot mitigate at arbitrary times. Second, the SRAM area available for aggressor tracking is limited to only a few bytes. Existing low-cost in-DRAM trackers (such as TRR) have been broken by well-crafted access patterns, whereas, secure counter-based schemes require impractical overheads of hundreds or thousands of entries per bank. The goal of our paper is to develop an ultra-low-cost secure in-DRAM tracker. Our solution is based on a simple observation: If only one row can be mitigated at refresh, we should ideally need to track only one row. We propose a Minimalist In-DRAM Tracker (MINT), which provides secure mitigation with just a single entry. Unlike prior trackers that decide the row to be mitigated based on the past behavior (select based on activation counts) or solely based on the current activation (select with some probability), MINT decides which row in the future will get mitigated. At each refresh, MINT probabilistically decides which activation in the upcoming interval will be selected for mitigation at the next refresh. MINT provides guaranteed protection against classic single and double-sided attacks. We also derive the minimum RH threshold (TRH*) tolerated by MINT across all patterns. MINT has a TRH* of 1482, which can be lowered to 356 with RFM. The TRH* of MINT is lower than a prior counter-based design with 677 entries per bank, and is within 2x of the TRH* of an idealized design that stores one-counter-per-row. We also analyze the impact of refresh postponement on the TRH* of low-cost in-DRAM trackers, and propose an efficient solution to make such trackers compatible with refresh postponement.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文研究了用于缓解 Rowhammer (RH) 的安全低成本 DRAM 跟踪器。 In-DRAM 解决方案有可能解决 DRAM 芯片内的相对湿度问题，而无需依赖系统的其他部分。然而，DRAM 内缓解面临两个关键挑战：首先，缓解与刷新同步，这意味着我们无法在任意时间进行缓解。其次，可用于攻击者跟踪的 SRAM 区域仅限于几个字节。现有的低成本 DRAM 跟踪器（例如 TRR）已被精心设计的访问模式所破坏，而基于安全计数器的方案需要每个存储体数百或数千个条目的不切实际的开销。我们论文的目标是开发一种超低成本安全的 DRAM 跟踪器。我们的解决方案基于一个简单的观察：如果刷新时只能缓解一行，那么理想情况下我们应该只需要跟踪一行。我们提出了一种极简主义的 DRAM 跟踪器 (MINT)，它只需一个条目即可提供安全缓解。与之前的跟踪器不同，之前的跟踪器根据过去的行为（根据激活计数选择）或仅根据当前激活（以一定概率选择）来决定要缓解的行，MINT 决定将来的哪一行将得到缓解。每次刷新时，MINT 都会概率性地决定接下来的时间间隔中的哪个激活将被选择用于下次刷新时的缓解。 MINT 提供针对经典单面和双面攻击的有保障的保护。我们还得出了 MINT 在所有模式下所能容忍的最小 RH 阈值 (TRH*)。 MINT 的 TRH* 为 1482，可通过 RFM 降低至 356。 MINT 的 TRH* 低于先前基于计数器的设计（每组有 677 个条目），并且在每行存储一个计数器的理想化设计的 TRH* 的 2 倍以内。我们还分析了刷新延迟对低成本 DRAM 跟踪器 TRH* 的影响，并提出了一种有效的解决方案，使此类跟踪器与刷新延迟兼容。

papers.title: Mosaic: Harnessing the Micro-Architectural Resources of Servers in Serverless Environments.
papers.abstract: With serverless computing, users develop scalable applications using lightweight functions as building blocks, while cloud providers own most of the computing stack, allowing for better resource optimizations. In this paper, we observe that modern server-class processors are inefficiently utilized in serverless environments. Cores perform frequent context switches within function invocations and have a high degree of oversubscription. In such an environment, functions frequently lose their micro-architectural state in stateful hardware structures like caches, TLBs, and branch predictors, causing performance degradation. At the same time, modern processors are dimensioned for the needs of a broad set of applications, rendering them suboptimal for serverless workloads. Based on these insights, we propose Mosaic, an architecture optimized for serverless environments that maintains generality to efficiently support other workloads. Mosaic has two components: (1) MosaicCPU, a processor architecture that efficiently runs both serverless workloads and traditional monolithic applications, and (2) MosaicScheduler, a software stack for serverless systems that maximizes the benefits of MosaicCPU. MosaicCPU slices micro-architectural structures into small chunks and assigns tiles of such chunks to functions. The processor retains the state of functions in their tiles across context switches, thereby improving performance. Furthermore, currently-inactive tiles are set to a low power mode, thereby reducing energy consumption. In addition, MosaicScheduler maximizes efficiency by introducing predictive right-sizing of the per-function tiles, alongside with smart scheduling based on the state of the tiles. Overall, compared to conventional server-class processors, Mosaic improves the throughput of serverless workloads by 225% while using 22% less power.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过无服务器计算，用户使用轻量级函数作为构建块来开发可扩展的应用程序，而云提供商拥有大部分计算堆栈，从而实现更好的资源优化。在本文中，我们观察到现代服务器级处理器在无服务器环境中的利用效率低下。内核在函数调用中执行频繁的上下文切换，并且具有高度的超额订阅。在这样的环境中，函数经常会丢失缓存、TLB 和分支预测器等有状态硬件结构中的微架构状态，从而导致性能下降。与此同时，现代处理器的尺寸是为了满足广泛的应用程序的需求而设计的，这使得它们对于无服务器工作负载而言并不是最佳选择。基于这些见解，我们提出了 Mosaic，这是一种针对无服务器环境进行优化的架构，可保持通用性以有效支持其他工作负载。 Mosaic 有两个组件：(1) MosaicCPU，一种高效运行无服务器工作负载和传统整体应用程序的处理器架构；(2) MosaicScheduler，一种用于无服务器系统的软件堆栈，可最大限度地发挥 MosaicCPU 的优势。 MosaicCPU 将微架构结构切成小块，并将这些块的图块分配给函数。处理器在上下文切换期间保留其块中的功能状态，从而提高性能。此外，当前不活动的图块被设置为低功耗模式，从而减少能耗。此外，MosaicScheduler 通过引入每个功能图块的预测性正确大小以及基于图块状态的智能调度来最大限度地提高效率。总体而言，与传统服务器级处理器相比，Mosaic 将无服务器工作负载的吞吐量提高了 225%，同时功耗降低了 22%。

papers.title: Multi-Issue Butterfly Architecture for Sparse Convex Quadratic Programming.
papers.abstract: Convex quadratic optimization solvers are extensively utilized in various domains; however, achieving optimal performance in diverse situations remains a significant challenge due to the sparse nature of objective and constraint matrices. General-purpose architectures struggle with hardware utilization when performing critical sparse matrix operations, such as factorization and multiplication. To address this issue, we introduce a pipelined spatial architecture, Multi-Issue Butterfly (MIB), which supports all primitive scalar, vector, and matrix operations required by the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) based solver algorithm. The proposed architecture features a butterfly computational network with innovative working modes for each node, controlled by runtime instructions. We developed a companion scheduling method for matrix operations based on their sparsity patterns. For factorization, an elimination tree guides the network instructions reordering to avoid data hazards caused by computation dependencies. For matrix-vector multiplication, data prefetching resolves structural hazards caused by read and write conflicts to register files. Instructions without hazards are issued simultaneously to increase pipeline throughput and function unit utilization. We evaluate the proposed architecture using FPGA prototypes, representing the first fully FPGA-based generic QP solver. Our assessment includes extensive performance and efficiency bench-marks across 100 QP problems from five application domains. Compared to the same algorithm variation running on CPU backends, our prototype achieves a geometric mean of $30.5\times$ end-to-end speedup, $127.0 \times$ greater energy efficiency, and $16.5\times$ less runtime jitter. In comparison to GPU backends, the prototype attains a geometric mean of $4.3\times$ faster end-to-end speedup, $21.7\times$ higher energy efficiency, and $33.4\times$ less runtime jitter.
papers.abstract_zh: 凸二次优化求解器广泛应用于各个领域；然而，由于目标和约束矩阵的稀疏性，在不同情况下实现最佳性能仍然是一个重大挑战。通用架构在执行关键的稀疏矩阵运算（例如因式分解和乘法）时会遇到硬件利用率问题。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种管道空间架构，即多问题蝴蝶 (MIB)，它支持基于交替方向乘子法 (ADMM) 的求解器算法所需的所有原始标量、向量和矩阵运算。所提出的架构具有蝴蝶计算网络，每个节点具有创新的工作模式，由运行时指令控制。我们根据矩阵运算的稀疏模式开发了一种伴随调度方法。对于因式分解，消除树指导网络指令重新排序，以避免计算依赖性引起的数据危险。对于矩阵向量乘法，数据预取解决了寄存器文件读写冲突引起的结构危险。同时发出无危险的指令，以提高流水线吞吐量和功能单元利用率。我们使用 FPGA 原型评估所提出的架构，代表第一个完全基于 FPGA 的通用 QP 求解器。我们的评估包括来自五个应用领域的 100 个 QP 问题的广泛性能和效率基准。与在 CPU 后端运行的相同算法变体相比，我们的原型实现了几何平均 $30.5\times$ 端到端加速， $127.0 \times$ 更高的能源效率，以及 运行时抖动减少 16.5\times$ 。与 GPU 后端相比，原型实现了几何平均 $4.3\times$ 更快的端到端加速， $21.7\times$ 更高的能源效率，以及 $33.4\times$ 减少运行时抖动。

papers.title: NeoMem: Hardware/Software Co-Design for CXL-Native Memory Tiering.
papers.abstract: The Compute Express Link (CXL) interconnect makes it feasible to integrate diverse types of memory into servers via its byte-addressable SerDes links. Considering the various access latency, harnessing the full potential of CXL-based heterogeneous memory systems requires efficient memory tiering. However, prior work can hardly make a fundamental progress owing to low-resolution and high-overhead memory access profiling techniques. To address this critical challenge, we propose a novel memory tiering solution called NeoMem, which features a hardware/software co-design. NeoMem offloads memory profiling functions to CXL device-side controllers, integrating a dedicated hardware unit called NeoProf. NeoProf readily monitors memory accesses and provides the OS with crucial page hotness statistics and other useful system state information. On the OS kernel side, we design a revamped memory-tiering strategy, enabling accurate and timely hot page promotion based on NeoProf statistics. We implement NeoMem on a real FPGA-based CXL memory platform and Linux kernel v6.3. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that NeoMem achieves 32% ~ 67% geomean speedup over several existing memory tiering solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: Compute Express Link (CXL) 互连使得通过其字节可寻址 SerDes 链路将不同类型的内存集成到服务器中成为可能。考虑到各种访问延迟，充分发挥基于 CXL 的异构内存系统的潜力需要高效的内存分层。然而，由于低分辨率和高开销的内存访问分析技术，先前的工作很难取得根本性进展。为了应对这一关键挑战，我们提出了一种名为 NeoMem 的新型内存分层解决方案，该解决方案采用硬件/软件协同设计。 NeoMem 将内存分析功能卸载到 CXL 设备端控制器，集成了名为 NeoProf 的专用硬件单元。 NeoProf 可以轻松监控内存访问，并向操作系统提供关键的页面热度统计数据和其他有用的系统状态信息。在操作系统内核方面，我们设计了改进的内存分层策略，基于 NeoProf 统计数据实现准确及时的热点页面升级。我们在真正的基于 FPGA 的 CXL 内存平台和 Linux 内核 v6.3 上实现 NeoMem。综合评估表明，NeoMem 比现有的几种内存分层解决方案实现了 32% ~ 67% 的几何平均加速。

papers.title: Over-Synchronization in GPU Programs.
papers.abstract: The performance of GPU (Graphics Processing Unit)-accelerated functions affects a large spectrum of modern software. Efficiently synchronizing across thousands of concurrent threads is critical to the performance of GPU programs. GPU vendors have introduced advanced programming constructs, e.g., scopes, for efficiently synchronizing within a chosen subset of threads. However, programmers must explicitly employ them, where applicable, to benefit from such features. We demonstrate how GPU programs can leave performance on the table by failing to fully harness advanced synchronization features in modern GPUs - leading to over-synchronization. We discover three different variants of over-synchronization observed in real-world applications. We then build a tool, ScopeAdvice, to find cases of over-synchronization in CUDA programs. Avoiding reported over-synchronization improves the performance of several GPU applications by up to 55%.
papers.abstract_zh: GPU（图形处理单元）加速功能的性能影响着许多现代软件。有效同步数千个并发线程对于 GPU 程序的性能至关重要。 GPU 供应商引入了高级编程结构（例如作用域），用于在选定的线程子集中进行高效同步。但是，程序员必须在适用的情况下明确使用它们才能从这些功能中受益。我们演示了 GPU 程序如何因未能充分利用现代 GPU 中的高级同步功能而导致性能下降，从而导致过度同步。我们发现了在实际应用中观察到的三种不同的过度同步变体。然后，我们构建了一个工具 ScopeAdvice，用于查找 CUDA 程序中过度同步的情况。避免报告的过度同步可将多个 GPU 应用程序的性能提高高达 55%。

papers.title: PIFS-Rec: Process-In-Fabric-Switch for Large-Scale Recommendation System Inferences.
papers.abstract: Deep Learning Recommendation Models (DLRMs) have become increasingly popular and prevalent in today's datacenters, consuming most of the AI inference cycles. The performance of DLRMs is heavily influenced by available band-width due to their large vector sizes in embedding tables and concurrent accesses. To achieve substantial improvements over existing solutions, novel approaches towards DLRM optimization are needed, especially, in the context of emerging interconnect technologies like CXL. This study delves into exploring CXL-enabled systems, implementing a process-in-fabric-switch (PIFS) solution to accelerate DLRMs while optimizing their memory and bandwidth scalability. We present an in-depth characterization of industry-scale DLRM workloads running on CXL-ready systems, identifying the predominant bottlenecks in existing CXL systems. We, therefore, propose PIFS-Rec, a PIFS-based scheme that implements near-data processing through downstream ports of the fabric switch. PIFS-Rec achieves a latency that is 3.89 x lower than Pond, an industry-standard CXL-based system, and also outperforms BEACON, a state-of-the-art scheme, by 2.03x.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习推荐模型 (DLRM) 在当今的数据中心中变得越来越流行和普遍，消耗了大部分人工智能推理周期。由于嵌入表和并发访问中的矢量大小较大，DLRM 的性能很大程度上受到可用带宽的影响。为了实现对现有解决方案的实质性改进，需要新的 DLRM 优化方法，特别是在 CXL 等新兴互连技术的背景下。本研究深入探索支持 CXL 的系统，实施结构交换处理 (PIFS) 解决方案以加速 DLRM，同时优化其内存和带宽可扩展性。我们对在 CXL 就绪系统上运行的行业规模 DLRM 工作负载进行了深入的描述，确定了现有 CXL 系统中的主要瓶颈。因此，我们提出了PIFS-Rec，这是一种基于PIFS的方案，通过Fabric交换机的下游端口实现近数据处理。 PIFS-Rec 的延迟比基于 CXL 的行业标准系统 Pond 低 3.89 倍，并且比最先进的方案 BEACON 低 2.03 倍。

papers.title: PIM-MMU: A Memory Management Unit for Accelerating Data Transfers in Commercial PIM Systems.
papers.abstract: Processing-in-memory (PIM) has emerged as a promising solution for accelerating memory-intensive workloads as they provide high memory bandwidth to the processing units. This approach has drawn attention not only from the academic community but also from the industry, leading to the development of real-world commercial PIM devices. In this work, we first conduct an in-depth characterization on UPMEM's general-purpose PIM system and analyze the bottlenecks caused by the data transfers across the DRAM and PIM address space. Our characterization study reveals several critical challenges associated with DRAM↔PIM data transfers in memory bus integrated PIM systems, for instance, its high CPU core utilization, high power consumption, and low read/write throughput for both DRAM and PIM. Driven by our key findings, we introduce the PIM-MMU architecture which is a hardware/software co-design that enables energy-efficient DRAM↔PIM transfers for PIM systems. PIM-MMU synergistically combines a hardware-based data copy engine, a PIM-optimized memory scheduler, and a heterogeneity-aware memory mapping function, the utilization of which is supported by our PIM-MMU software stack, significantly improving the efficiency of DRAM↔PIM data transfers. Experimental results show that PIM-MMU improves the DRAM↔PIM data transfer throughput by an average $4.1\times$ and enhances its energy-efficiency by $4.1\times$ , leading to a $2.2\times$ end-to-end speedup for real-world PIM workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 已成为加速内存密集型工作负载的一种有前途的解决方案，因为它们为处理单元提供了高内存带宽。这种方法不仅引起了学术界的关注，也引起了工业界的关注，促进了实际商业 PIM 设备的发展。在这项工作中，我们首先对 UPMEM 的通用 PIM 系统进行深入的表征，并分析跨 DRAM 和 PIM 地址空间的数据传输造成的瓶颈。我们的特性研究揭示了与内存总线集成 PIM 系统中 DRAM↔PIM 数据传输相关的几个关键挑战，例如 DRAM 和 PIM 的高 CPU 内核利用率、高功耗以及低读/写吞吐量。在我们的主要发现的推动下，我们引入了 PIM-MMU 架构，它是一种硬件/软件协同设计，可为 PIM 系统实现节能的 DRAM↔PIM 传输。 PIM-MMU协同结合了基于硬件的数据复制引擎、PIM优化的内存调度程序和异构感知内存映射功能，其利用由我们的PIM-MMU软件堆栈支持，显着提高了DRAM↔PIM数据传输的效率。实验结果表明，PIM-MMU 将 DRAM↔PIM 数据传输吞吐量平均提高 $4.1\times$ ，将能源效率提高 $4.1\times$ ，导致 $2.2\times$ 实际 PIM 工作负载的端到端加速。

papers.title: PointCIM: A Computing-in-Memory Architecture for Accelerating Deep Point Cloud Analytics.
papers.abstract: Efficient deep point cloud (PC) analytics is crucial for numerous emerging applications such as autonomous vehicles and augmented and virtual reality. Our roofline model analysis reveals that the “memory wall” bottleneck primarily constrains the execution efficiency of deep PC analytics, providing valuable insight into optimization opportunities. In contrast to previous works, which greatly rely on approximating the original algorithm to fit hardware limitations, the approach presented in this paper is analytical; that is, our approach does not require any modification to the original algorithm, thus preserving its integrity and accuracy. In this paper, we introduce PointCIM, the first deep PC analytics accelerator that leverages computing-in-memory (CIM) optimization opportunities to address memory inefficiency. We identify that existing in-memory methods cannot fully support the distance function required by PC network inference. To address the challenge, we propose computation optimizations, including the Base+Offset mapping and early stopping for bit-serial computation, not only to enable full support for PC network inference in memory, but also to significantly improve hardware efficiency. We design the CIM architecture support for the proposed computation optimizations, including the memristor crossbar architecture, custom peripheral logic, data layout, and pipelined execution. Evaluation results show that the designed accelerator provides an average speedup of 17.1× and an energy reduction of 9.6× compared to the baseline of a typical edge SoC. We also compare PointCIM with several state-of-the-art PC accelerators, yielding up to 10.7× speedup and 4.9× energy savings.
papers.abstract_zh: 高效的深度点云 (PC) 分析对于自动驾驶汽车、增强现实和虚拟现实等众多新兴应用至关重要。我们的屋顶线模型分析表明，“内存墙”瓶颈主要限制了深度 PC 分析的执行效率，从而为优化机会提供了宝贵的见解。与以前的工作相比，以前的工作很大程度上依赖于近似原始算法来适应硬件限制，本文提出的方法是分析性的；也就是说，我们的方法不需要对原始算法进行任何修改，从而保持其完整性和准确性。在本文中，我们介绍了 PointCIM，这是第一个深度 PC 分析加速器，它利用内存计算 (CIM) 优化机会来解决内存效率低下的问题。我们发现现有的内存方法不能完全支持 PC 网络推理所需的距离函数。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了计算优化，包括 Base+Offset 映射和位串行计算的提前停止，不仅可以完全支持内存中的 PC 网络推理，还可以显着提高硬件效率。我们为所提出的计算优化设计了 CIM 架构支持，包括忆阻器交叉架构、定制外设逻辑、数据布局和流水线执行。评估结果表明，与典型边缘 SoC 的基准相比，所设计的加速器平均加速 17.1 倍，能耗降低 9.6 倍。我们还将 PointCIM 与几种最先进的 PC 加速器进行比较，获得高达 10.7 倍的加速和 4.9 倍的节能。

papers.title: Polymorphic Error Correction.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose a new memory error correction scheme, Polymorphic ECC, based on a novel idea of redundancy polymorphism for error correction. With redundancy polymorphism, we can use the check bits, i.e., parity bits in traditional ECC, to correct errors from different fault models. For example, the error correction procedure will use the same redundancy value for single-bit errors, double-bit errors, ChipKill, and others. As a result, Polymorphic ECC corrects more errors than traditional codes, which typically target a single fault model or require multiple redundancies for multi-fault model support, leading to higher storage overheads. Our construction is very compact, allowing us to embed an inlined cryptographic message authentication code (MAC) with each cacheline, ensuring data integrity and near 100% error detection without needing any extra storage. The MAC, further permits iterative correction among the many supported fault models. In the paper, we show that the novel combination of redundancy polymorphism with iterative correction, corrects errors due to fault models not covered by traditional codes and guarantees data integrity with up to 60-bit MACs while using 64-byte cachelines and standard 40-bit DDR5 memory channels.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们基于冗余多态性纠错的新思想，提出了一种新的内存纠错方案——多态ECC。 With redundancy polymorphism, we can use the check bits, i.e., parity bits in traditional ECC, to correct errors from different fault models. For example, the error correction procedure will use the same redundancy value for single-bit errors, double-bit errors, ChipKill, and others.因此，多态 ECC 比传统代码纠正更多错误，传统代码通常针对单个故障模型或需要多个冗余来支持多故障模型，从而导致更高的存储开销。我们的结构非常紧凑，允许我们在每个缓存行中嵌入内联的加密消息身份验证代码 (MAC)，从而确保数据完整性和近 100% 的错误检测，而不需要任何额外的存储。 The MAC, further permits iterative correction among the many supported fault models.在本文中，我们展示了冗余多态性与迭代校正的新颖组合，可以纠正由于传统代码未涵盖的故障模型而导致的错误，并在使用 64 字节缓存行和标准 40 位 DDR5 内存通道时保证高达 60 位 MAC 的数据完整性。

papers.title: Pushing the Performance Envelope of DNN-based Recommendation Systems Inference on GPUs.
papers.abstract: Personalized recommendation is a ubiquitous appli-cation on the internet, with many industries and hyperscalers extensively leveraging Deep Learning Recommendation Models (DLRMs) for their personalization needs (like ad serving or movie suggestions). With growing model and dataset sizes pushing computation and memory requirements, GPUs are being increasingly preferred for executing DLRM inference. However, serving newer DLRMs, while meeting acceptable latencies, continues to remain challenging, making traditional deployments increasingly more GPU-hungry, resulting in higher inference serving costs. In this paper, we show that the embedding stage continues to be the primary bottleneck in the GPU inference pipeline, leading up to a 3.2 x embedding-only performance slowdown. To thoroughly grasp the problem, we conduct a detailed microarchitecture characterization and highlight the presence of low occupancy in the standard embedding kernels. By leveraging direct compiler optimizations, we achieve optimal occupancy, pushing the performance by up to 53 %. Yet, long memory latency stalls continue to exist. To tackle this challenge, we propose spe-cialized plug-and-play-based software prefetching and L2 pinning techniques, which help in hiding and decreasing the latencies. Further, we propose combining them, as they complement each other. Experimental evaluations using AI00 GPUs with large models and datasets show that our proposed techniques improve performance by up to 103% for the embedding stage, and up to 77 % for the overall D LRM inference pipeline.
papers.abstract_zh: 个性化推荐是互联网上无处不在的应用程序，许多行业和超大规模企业广泛利用深度学习推荐模型 (DLRM) 来满足其个性化需求（例如广告服务或电影建议）。随着模型和数据集大小的不断增长，计算和内存需求不断增加，GPU 越来越成为执行 DLRM 推理的首选。然而，为较新的 DLRM 提供服务，同时满足可接受的延迟，仍然具有挑战性，这使得传统部署越来越需要 GPU，从而导致推理服务成本更高。在本文中，我们表明嵌入阶段仍然是 GPU 推理管道中的主要瓶颈，导致仅嵌入性能下降 3.2 倍。为了彻底解决这个问题，我们进行了详细的微架构表征，并强调了标准嵌入内核中存在的低占用率。通过利用直接编译器优化，我们实现了最佳占用率，将性能提升高达 53%。然而，长内存延迟停顿仍然存在。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了基于即插即用的专门软件预取和 L2 固定技术，这有助于隐藏和减少延迟。此外，我们建议将它们结合起来，因为它们是相辅相成的。使用 AI00 GPU 和大型模型和数据集进行的实验评估表明，我们提出的技术将嵌入阶段的性能提高了高达 103%，将整个 D LRM 推理管道的性能提高了 77%。

papers.title: PyPIM: Integrating Digital Processing-in-Memory from Microarchitectural Design to Python Tensors.
papers.abstract: Digital processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures mitigate the memory wall problem by facilitating parallel bitwise operations directly within the memory. Recent works have demonstrated their algorithmic potential for accelerating data-intensive applications; however, there remains a significant gap in the programming model and microarchitectural design. This is further exacerbated by aspects unique to memristive PIM such as partitions and operations across both directions of the memory array. To address this gap, this paper provides an end-to-end architectural integration of digital memristive PIM from a high-level Python library for tensor operations (similar to NumPy and PyTorch) to the low-level microarchitectural design. We begin by proposing an efficient microarchitecture and instruction set architecture (ISA) that bridge the gap between the low-level control periphery and an abstraction of PIM parallelism. We subsequently propose a PIM development library that converts high-level Python to ISA instructions and a PIM driver that translates ISA instructions into PIM micro-operations. We evaluate PyPIM via a cycle-accurate simulator on a wide variety of benchmarks that both demonstrate the versatility of the Python library and the performance compared to theoretical PIM bounds. Overall, PyPIM drastically simplifies the development of PIM applications and enables the conversion of existing tensor-oriented Python programs to PIM with ease.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存数字处理 (PIM) 架构通过直接在内存中促进并行按位操作来缓解内存墙问题。最近的工作已经证明了它们在加速数据密集型应用程序方面的算法潜力；然而，编程模型和微架构设计仍然存在很大差距。忆阻 PIM 特有的方面（例如跨存储器阵列两个方向的分区和操作）进一步加剧了这种情况。为了解决这一差距，本文提供了数字忆阻 PIM 的端到端架构集成，从用于张量运算的高级 Python 库（类似于 NumPy 和 PyTorch）到低级微架构设计。我们首先提出一种高效的微架构和指令集架构 (ISA)，以弥合低级控制外围设备和 PIM 并行性抽象之间的差距。随后，我们提出了一个将高级 Python 转换为 ISA 指令的 PIM 开发库，以及一个将 ISA 指令转换为 PIM 微操作的 PIM 驱动程序。我们通过周期精确的模拟器在各种基准上评估 PyPIM，这些基准都证明了 Python 库的多功能性以及与理论 PIM 范围相比的性能。总体而言，PyPIM 极大地简化了 PIM 应用程序的开发，并使现有的面向张量的 Python 程序轻松转换为 PIM。

papers.title: Qoncord: A Multi-Device Job Scheduling Framework for Variational Quantum Algorithms.
papers.abstract: Quantum computers face challenges due to limited resources, particularly in cloud environments. Despite these ob-stacles, Variational Quantum Algorithms (VQAs) are considered promising applications for present-day Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) systems. VQAs require multiple optimization iterations to converge on a globally optimal solution. Moreover, these optimizations, known as restarts, need to be repeated from different points to mitigate the impact of noise. Unfortunately, the job scheduling policies for each VQA task in the cloud are heavily unoptimized. Notably, each VQA execution instance is typically scheduled on a single NISQ device. Given the variety of devices in the cloud, users often prefer higher-fidelity devices to ensure higher-quality solutions. However, this preference leads to increased queueing delays and unbalanced resource utilization. We propose Qoncord, an automated job scheduling framework to address these cloud-centric challenges for VQAs. Qoncord leverages the insight that not all training iterations and restarts are equal, Qoncord strategically divides the training process into exploratory and fine-tuning phases. Early exploratory iterations, more resilient to noise, are executed on less busy machines, while fine-tuning occurs on high-fidelity machines. This adaptive approach mitigates the impact of noise, optimizes resource usage, and reduces queuing delays in cloud environments. Qoncord also significantly reduces execution time and minimizes restart overheads by eliminating low-performance iterations. Thus, Qoncord offers similar solutions 17.4 × faster. It also provides 13.3% better solutions for the same time budget as the baseline.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于资源有限，量子计算机面临挑战，特别是在云环境中。尽管存在这些障碍，变分量子算法 (VQA) 仍被认为是当今嘈杂中尺度量子 (NISQ) 系统的有前途的应用。 VQA 需要多次优化迭代才能收敛到全局最优解。此外，这些优化（称为重新启动）需要从不同的点重复进行，以减轻噪声的影响。不幸的是，云中每个 VQA 任务的作业调度策略都严重未优化。值得注意的是，每个 VQA 执行实例通常都调度在单个 NISQ 设备上。鉴于云中设备的多样性，用户通常更喜欢更高保真度的设备，以确保更高质量的解决方案。然而，这种偏好会导致排队延迟增加和资源利用率不平衡。我们提出了 Qoncord，这是一个自动化作业调度框架，用于解决 VQA 的这些以云为中心的挑战。 Qoncord 利用了并非所有训练迭代和重新启动都是平等的见解，Qoncord 从战略上将训练过程分为探索和微调阶段。早期的探索性迭代对噪声更具弹性，在不太繁忙的机器上执行，而微调则在高保真机器上进行。这种自适应方法可以减轻噪声的影响，优化资源使用，并减少云环境中的排队延迟。 Qoncord 还通过消除低性能迭代显着减少执行时间并最大限度地减少重新启动开销。因此，Qoncord 提供的类似解决方案速度提高了 17.4 倍。它还在与基准相同的时间预算下提供了 13.3% 更好的解决方案。

papers.title: RAHP: A Redundancy-aware Accelerator for High-performance Hypergraph Neural Network.
papers.abstract: Hypergraph Neural Network (HyperGNN) has emerged as a potent methodology for dissecting intricate multilateral connections among various entities. Current software/hardware solutions leverage a sequential execution model that relies on hyperedge and vertex indices for conducting standard matrix operations for HyperGNN inference. Yet, they are impeded by the dual challenges of redundant computation and irregular memory access overheads. This is primarily due to the frequent and repetitive access and updating of a number of feature vectors corresponding to the same hyperedges and vertices. To address these challenges, we propose the first redundancy-aware accelerator, RAHP, which enables high performance execution of HyperGNN inference. Specifically, we present a redundancy-aware asynchronous execution approach into the accelerator design for HyperGNN to reduce redundant computations and off-chip memory accesses. To unveil opportunities for data reuse and unlock the parallelism that existing HyperGNN solutions fail to capture, it prioritizes vertices with the highest degree as roots, prefetching other vertices along the hypergraph structure to capture the common vertices among multiple hyperedges, and synchronizing the computations of hyperedges and vertices in real-time. By such means, this facilitates the concurrent processing of relevant hyperedge and vertex computations of the common vertices along the hypergraph topology, resulting in smaller redundant computations overhead. Furthermore, by efficiently caching intermediate results of the common vertices, it curtails memory traffic and off-chip communications. To fully harness the performance potential of our proposed approach in the accelerator, RAHP incorporates a topology-driven data loading mechanism to minimize off-chip memory accesses on the fly. It is also endowed with an adaptive data synchronization scheme to mitigate the effects of conflicting updates of both hyperedges and vertices. Moreover, RAHP employs the similarity-based data caching strategy to further mitigate the overhead of redundant data transfers. We have implemented and assessed RAHP on a Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA card. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that RAHP achieves average speedups of 439.2x and 64.7x for HyperGNN inference, alongside average energy savings of 542.8x and 84.2x, compared to the cutting-edge software-based HyperGNN implementations on Intel Xeon CPUs and NVIDIA A100 GPUs, respectively. Additionally, in the realm of HyperGNN inference, RAHP secures average speedups of 7.8x, 5.4x, and 3.8x, and average energy savings of 10.2x, 8.9x, and 6.5x over the foremost GNN accelerators, i.e., FlowGNN, LL-GNN, and ReGNN, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 超图神经网络（HyperGNN）已成为剖析不同实体之间错综复杂的多边联系的有效方法。当前的软件/硬件解决方案利用顺序执行模型，该模型依赖于超边缘和顶点索引来执行 HyperGNN 推理的标准矩阵运算。然而，它们受到冗余计算和不规则内存访问开销的双重挑战的阻碍。这主要是由于对应于相同超边和顶点的多个特征向量的频繁且重复的访问和更新。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了第一个冗余感知加速器 RAHP，它可以实现 HyperGNN 推理的高性能执行。具体来说，我们在 HyperGNN 的加速器设计中提出了一种冗余感知异步执行方法，以减少冗余计算和片外内存访问。为了揭示数据重用的机会并解锁现有 HyperGNN 解决方案无法捕获的并行性，它优先考虑具有最高度数的顶点作为根，沿着超图结构预取其他顶点以捕获多个超边之间的公共顶点，并实时同步超边和顶点的计算。通过这种方式，这有利于沿着超图拓扑并行处理相关超边和公共顶点的顶点计算，从而导致更小的冗余计算开销。此外，通过有效地缓存公共顶点的中间结果，它减少了内存流量和片外通信。为了充分利用我们提出的加速器方法的性能潜力，RAHP 结合了拓扑驱动的数据加载机制，以最大程度地减少动态片外内存访问。它还具有自适应数据同步方案，以减轻超边和顶点更新冲突的影响。此外，RAHP采用基于相似性的数据缓存策略来进一步减轻冗余数据传输的开销。我们在 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA 卡上实现并评估了 RAHP。实验评估表明，与 Intel Xeon CPU 和 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上基于软件的尖端 HyperGNN 实现相比，RAHP 的 HyperGNN 推理平均加速分别为 439.2 倍和 64.7 倍，平均节能分别为 542.8 倍和 84.2 倍。此外，在 HyperGNN 推理领域，与最重要的 GNN 加速器（即 FlowGNN、LL-GNN 和 ReGNN）相比，RAHP 的平均加速分别为 7.8 倍、5.4 倍和 3.8 倍，平均节能分别为 10.2 倍、8.9 倍和 6.5 倍。

papers.title: Rearchitecting a Neuromorphic Processor for Spike-Driven Brain-Computer Interfacing.
papers.abstract: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) are electrophysiological devices (e.g., electrode arrays) that connect the brain to a computer. They offer neuroscientific and neurological innovations by utilizing a dedicated processor for continuous BCI signal processing. Recent studies propose a scaled-up BCI that adopts an order of magnitude larger number of electrodes to more precisely interface with the brain. As the BCI scales, utilizing a spike-driven processor emerges as an alternative processing method, where the BCI offloads computations to the processor upon detecting spikes. However, the processor design for spike-driven processing has been relatively unexplored compared to that of the continuous processor. In this work, we propose NeuroLobe, a flexible and efficient processor design for spike-driven processing. The key idea is to utilize a neuromorphic processor to take advantage of its event-driven computing nature. We carefully rearchitect the existing neuromorphic system for the purpose of flexibly and efficiently deploying the BCI algorithms. First, we extend the instruction set architecture of the existing neuromorphic processor to flexibly deploy representative spike-driven BCI algorithms. Second, we redesign the connection controller and execution path to improve the performance. Third, we design a custom synchronization unit for scalable processing. Fourth, we implement a custom software stack to minimize load imbalance among the cores. Lastly, we design a multitask controller to simultaneously process multiple algorithms. We evaluate NeuroLobe on four representative BCI algorithms with 11 configurations. Evaluation results show that NeuroLobe surpasses CPU and GPU in terms of speed and energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 脑机接口（BCIs）是将大脑连接到计算机的电生理设备（例如电极阵列）。他们利用专用处理器进行连续 BCI 信号处理，提供神经科学和神经学创新。最近的研究提出了一种扩大的脑机接口，采用数量级更多的电极来更精确地与大脑连接。随着 BCI 的扩展，利用尖峰驱动处理器成为一种替代处理方法，其中 BCI 在检测到尖峰时将计算卸载到处理器。然而，与连续处理器相比，尖峰驱动处理的处理器设计相对尚未被探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了 NeuroLobe，一种用于尖峰驱动处理的灵活高效的处理器设计。关键思想是利用神经形态处理器来利用其事件驱动的计算特性。我们仔细地重新架构了现有的神经形态系统，以便灵活高效地部署 BCI 算法。首先，我们扩展了现有神经形态处理器的指令集架构，以灵活部署代表性的脉冲驱动BCI算法。其次，我们重新设计了连接控制器和执行路径以提高性能。第三，我们设计了一个用于可扩展处理的定制同步单元。第四，我们实现了自定义软件堆栈，以最大限度地减少内核之间的负载不平衡。最后，我们设计了一个多任务控制器来同时处理多个算法。我们在四种具有 11 种配置的代表性 BCI 算法上评估 NeuroLobe。评估结果显示，NeuroLobe 在速度和能效方面超越了 CPU 和 GPU。

papers.title: Ring Road: A Scalable Polar-Coordinate-based 2D Network-on-Chip Architecture.
papers.abstract: Networks-on-chip (NoCs) are scaled out to build large-scale multi-chip networks to meet the growing demand for computing. However, the traditional router-based NoC architecture has significant limitations: 1) The overhead of routers is high, especially for long-distance traffic that traverses numerous chips and hops; 2) On/off-chip traffic is mixed up, so the local NoC performance is dragged down by the cross-chip traffic; 3) The routing design of intra/inter-chip networks is also entangled. The alternative router-less solution based on isolated multi-ring (IMR) can address some of these issues; however, the complete lack of routers leads to wiring overhead and limited scalability thus not suitable for large-scale multi-chip networks. Therefore, we are motivated to design a new network architecture that can reduce router/wiring overhead, isolate on/off-chip traffic, and decouple inter/intra-chip routing design by combining the advantages of both routers and router-less rings. In this paper, we propose Ring Road, in which high-speed isolated multi-rings are integrated with compact routers, thus achieving flexible traffic delivery with less router usage and overhead. A polar-coordinate-based description is presented to describe the topology, and corresponding deadlock-free routing algorithms are discussed. As a standalone NoC, Ring Road is low-cost, low-latency, and high-performance. It can also be scaled out into multi-chip networks without redesigning the on-chip routing regardless of inter-chip topology. With low-cost isolated ring channels, no matter how heavy the cross-chip traffic is, the local NoC performance remains consistent. Circuit implementation and post-synthesis analysis show that Ring Road achieves $1.7\sim 2\times$ bandwidth-per-area and $1.6\sim 1.9\times$ bandwidth-per-power compared with the traditional mesh router. Cycle-accurate simulation shows that Ring Road achieves better performance and energy efficiency at various workloads and configurations.
papers.abstract_zh: 片上网络 (NoC) 可以横向扩展，构建大规模多芯片网络，以满足不断增长的计算需求。然而，传统的基于路由器的NoC架构有很大的局限性：1）路由器的开销较高，特别是对于经过大量芯片和跳数的长距离流量； 2）片内/片外流量混杂，本地NoC性能受到跨片流量的拖累； 3）片内/片间网络的路由设计也很纠结。基于隔离多环 (IMR) 的替代无路由器解决方案可以解决其中一些问题；然而，完全没有路由器会导致布线开销和可扩展性有限，因此不适合大规模多芯片网络。因此，我们有动力设计一种新的网络架构，通过结合路由器和无路由器环的优点，可以减少路由器/布线开销，隔离片内/片外流量，解耦片间/片内路由设计。在本文中，我们提出了环路，其中高速隔离的多环与紧凑的路由器集成，从而以更少的路由器使用和开销实现灵活的流量传送。提出了一种基于极坐标的拓扑描述方法，并讨论了相应的无死锁路由算法。 Ring Road作为独立的NoC，具有低成本、低时延、高性能的特点。无论芯片间拓扑如何，它也可以扩展到多芯片网络，而无需重新设计片上路由。凭借低成本的隔离环通道，无论跨芯片流量有多大，本地NoC性能都保持一致。电路实现和综合后分析表明，Ring Road 实现了 $1.7\sim 2\times$ 每区域带宽和 与传统网状路由器相比，每功率带宽为 $1.6\sim 1.9\times$ 。周期精确的仿真表明，Ring Road 在各种工作负载和配置下实现了更好的性能和能源效率。

papers.title: RTL2MμPATH: Multi-μPATH Synthesis with Applications to Hardware Security Verification.
papers.abstract: The Check tools automate formal memory consistency model and security verification of processors by analyzing abstract models of microarchitectures, called μSPEC models. Despite the efficacy of this approach, a verification gap between μSPEC models, which must be manually written, and RTL limits the Check tools' broad adoption. Our prior work, called RTL2μSPEC, narrows this gap by automatically synthesizing formally verified μSPEC models from System Verilog implementations of simple processors. But, RTL2μSPEC assumes input designs where an instruction (e.g., a load) cannot exhibit more than one microarchitectural execution path (μPATH, e.g., a cache hit or miss path)-its single-execution-path assumption. In this paper, we first propose an automated approach and tool, called RTL2MμPATH, that resolves RTL2μSPEC's single-execution-path assumption. Given a System Verilog processor design, instruction encodings, and modest design metadata, RTL2MμPATH finds a complete set of formally verified μPATHS for each instruction. Next, we make an important observation: an instruction that can exhibit more than one μPATH strongly indicates the presence of a microarchitectural side channel in the input design. Based on this observation, we then propose an automated approach and tool, called Synthlc, that extends RTL2MμPATH with a symbolic information flow analysis to support synthesizing a variety of formally verified leakage contracts from System Verilog processor designs. Leakage contracts are foundational to state-of-the-art defenses against hardware side-channel attacks. SYnthlcis the first automated methodology for formally verifying hardware adherence to them.
papers.abstract_zh: Check 工具通过分析微架构的抽象模型（称为 μSPEC 模型），自动执行形式内存一致性模型和处理器的安全验证。尽管这种方法很有效，但 μSPEC 模型（必须手动编写）和 RTL 之间的验证差距限制了检查工具的广泛采用。我们之前的工作称为 RTL2μSPEC，通过从简单处理器的 System Verilog 实现自动合成经过正式验证的 μSPEC 模型来缩小这一差距。但是，RTL2μSPEC 假设输入设计中一条指令（例如加载）不能呈现多于一个微架构执行路径（μPATH，例如缓存命中或未命中路径）——其单执行路径假设。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种称为 RTL2MμPATH 的自动化方法和工具，它解决了 RTL2μSPEC 的单执行路径假设。给定 System Verilog 处理器设计、指令编码和适度的设计元数据，RTL2MμPATH 会为每条指令找到一组完整的经过正式验证的 μPATH。接下来，我们做出一个重要的观察：一条可以表现出多个 μPATH 的指令强烈表明输入设计中存在微架构侧通道。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种名为 Synthlc 的自动化方法和工具，它通过符号信息流分析扩展了 RTL2MμPATH，以支持从 System Verilog 处理器设计综合各种形式验证的泄漏契约。泄漏合约是针对硬件侧通道攻击的最先进防御的基础。 SYNthl 是第一个用于正式验证硬件是否遵守这些规则的自动化方法。

papers.title: SambaNova SN40L: Scaling the AI Memory Wall with Dataflow and Composition of Experts.
papers.abstract: Monolithic large language models (LLMs) like GPT-4 have paved the way for modern generative AI applications. Training, serving, and maintaining monolithic LLMs at scale, however, remains prohibitively expensive and challenging. The disproportionate increase in compute-to-memory ratio of modern AI accelerators have created a memory wall, necessitating new methods to deploy AI. Recent research has shown that a composition of many smaller expert models, each with several orders of magnitude fewer parameters, can match or exceed the capabilities of monolithic LLMs. Composition of Experts (CoE) is a modular approach that lowers the cost and complexity of training and serving. However, this approach presents two key challenges when using conventional hardware: (1) without fused operations, smaller models have lower operational intensity, which makes high utilization more challenging to achieve; and (2) hosting a large number of models can be either prohibitively expensive or slow when dynamically switching between them. In this paper, we describe how combining CoE, streaming dataflow, and a three-tier memory system scales the AI memory wall. We describe Samba-CoE, a CoE system with 150 experts and a trillion total parameters. We deploy Samba-CoE on the SambaNova SN40L Reconfigurable Dataflow Unit (RDU) -a commercial dataflow accelerator architecture that has been codesigned for enterprise inference and training applications. The chip introduces a new three-tier memory system with on-chip distributed SRAM, on-package HBM, and off-package DDR DRAM. A dedicated inter-RDU network enables scaling up and out over multiple sockets. We demonstrate speedups ranging from 2× to 13× on various benchmarks running on eight RDU sockets compared with an unfused baseline. We show that for CoE inference deployments, the 8-socket RDU Node reduces machine footprint by up to 19 ×, speeds up model switching time by 15× to 31×, and achieves an overall speedup of 3.7× over a DGX H100 and 6.6× over a DGX A100.
papers.abstract_zh: 像 GPT-4 这样的整体大型语言模型 (LLM) 为现代生成式 AI 应用铺平了道路。然而，大规模培训、服务和维护单一的法学硕士仍然非常昂贵且具有挑战性。现代人工智能加速器的计算与内存比率的不成比例的增加已经形成了内存墙，需要新的方法来部署人工智能。最近的研究表明，由许多较小的专家模型组成（每个模型的参数少几个数量级）可以匹配或超过整体法学硕士的能力。专家组成 (CoE) 是一种模块化方法，可降低培训和服务的成本和复杂性。然而，这种方法在使用传统硬件时面临两个关键挑战：（1）没有融合操作，较小的模型具有较低的操作强度，这使得高利用率更难以实现； (2) 在模型之间动态切换时，托管大量模型的成本可能会非常昂贵，或者速度会很慢。在本文中，我们描述了如何结合 CoE、流数据流和三层内存系统来扩展 AI 内存墙。我们描述了 Samba-CoE，这是一个拥有 150 名专家和万亿总参数的 CoE 系统。我们在 SambaNova SN40L 可重新配置数据流单元 (RDU) 上部署 Samba-CoE，这是一种商业数据流加速器架构，专为企业推理和培训应用程序而设计。该芯片引入了新的三层存储系统，包括片上分布式 SRAM、封装内 HBM 和封装外 DDR DRAM。专用的 RDU 间网络可通过多个插槽进行纵向扩展和横向扩展。与未融合的基准相比，我们在八个 RDU 插槽上运行的各种基准测试中展示了从 2 倍到 13 倍的加速。我们表明，对于 CoE 推理部署，8 插槽 RDU 节点可将机器占用空间减少多达 19 倍，将模型切换时间加快 15 倍至 31 倍，整体加速比 DGX H100 提高 3.7 倍，比 DGX A100 提高 6.6 倍。

papers.title: Scalar Vector Runahead.
papers.abstract: Modern graph and database processing typically takes place on high-end servers in data centers. However, with growing concerns of data privacy, trustworthiness, and all-time connectivity, there has been a shift toward increased analytics processing on edge devices such as mobile phones. In an ideal scenario, we would run these applications on the energy-efficient in-order cores available in these systems rather than the power-hungry out-of-order cores.
