随着机器学习模型变得越来越普遍，它们越来越多地应用于严重影响人们生活的应用（例如医疗诊断、司法系统判决等）。因此，一些社区呼吁机器学习模型不仅要准确，而且要可解释。为了实现这一目标，必须通过总结每个建议结果如何得出的解释来补充建议。可解释的随机森林 (XRF) 模型是该领域的热门选择，因为它们非常准确，并且可以通过可解释性功能进行增强，从而允许最终用户了解如何以及为何达到特定结果。然而，XRF 模型的局限性阻碍了它们的采用，最重要的是与训练此类模型以支持高精度分类相关的高计算需求，同时还用可解释性元数据对其进行注释。

作为回应，我们推出了 ACRE，一个支持 XRF 模型训练的硬件加速器。 ACRE 加速了导致性能瓶颈的关键操作，同时维护对支持可解释性至关重要的元数据。它利用新颖的内存处理硬件单元，与 3D 堆叠高带宽内存 (HBM) 组位于同一位置。该单元可在本地加速关键训练计算的执行，从而提高有效数据传输带宽。我们的评估表明，当 ACRE 增强 HBM3 内存时，与采用 DDR4 内存的基准多核处理器解决方案相比，它的平均系统级训练性能提高了 26.6 倍。此外，与 HBM3 架构基准相比，ACRE 的性能提高了 2.5 倍，在主机中不受 16k 线程限制的瓶颈影响时，性能提高到 5 倍。最后，由于性能更高，我们观察到 ACRE 总体能耗比 DDR 基准降低了 16.5 倍。

papers.title: ADA-GP: Accelerating DNN Training By Adaptive Gradient Prediction.
papers.abstract: Neural network training is inherently sequential where the layers finish the forward propagation in succession, followed by the calculation and back-propagation of gradients (based on a loss function) starting from the last layer. The sequential computations significantly slow down neural network training, especially the deeper ones. Prediction has been successfully used in many areas of computer architecture to speed up sequential processing. Therefore, we propose ADA-GP, which uses gradient prediction adaptively to speed up deep neural network (DNN) training while maintaining accuracy. ADA-GP works by incorporating a small neural network to predict gradients for different layers of a DNN model. ADA-GP uses a novel tensor reorganization method to make it feasible to predict a large number of gradients. ADA-GP alternates between DNN training using backpropagated gradients and DNN training using predicted gradients. ADA-GP adaptively adjusts when and for how long gradient prediction is used to strike a balance between accuracy and performance. Last but not least, we provide a detailed hardware extension in a typical DNN accelerator to realize the speed up potential from gradient prediction. Our extensive experiments with fifteen DNN models show that ADA-GP can achieve an average speed up of 1.47 × with similar or even higher accuracy than the baseline models. Moreover, it consumes, on average, 34% less energy due to reduced off-chip memory accesses compared to the baseline accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经网络训练本质上是顺序的，各层依次完成前向传播，然后从最后一层开始计算和反向传播梯度（基于损失函数）。顺序计算显着减慢了神经网络训练的速度，尤其是更深层次的训练。预测已成功应用于计算机体系结构的许多领域，以加速顺序处理。因此，我们提出了 ADA-GP，它自适应地使用梯度预测来加速深度神经网络（DNN）训练，同时保持准确性。 ADA-GP 的工作原理是结合一个小型神经网络来预测 DNN 模型不同层的梯度。 ADA-GP使用一种新颖的张量重组方法使得预测大量梯度成为可能。 ADA-GP 在使用反向传播梯度的 DNN 训练和使用预测梯度的 DNN 训练之间交替。 ADA-GP 自适应地调整梯度预测的使用时间和持续时间，以在准确性和性能之间取得平衡。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们在典型的 DNN 加速器中提供了详细的硬件扩展，以实现梯度预测的加速潜力。我们对 15 个 DNN 模型进行的广泛实验表明，ADA-GP 可以实现 1.47 倍的平均速度提升，并且精度与基线模型相似甚至更高。此外，与基线加速器相比，由于减少了片外内存访问，它的能耗平均减少了 34%。

papers.title: AESPA: Asynchronous Execution Scheme to Exploit Bank-Level Parallelism of Processing-in-Memory.
papers.abstract: This paper presents an asynchronous execution scheme to leverage the bank-level parallelism of near-bank processing-in-memory (PIM). We observe that performing memory operations underutilizes the parallelism of PIM computation because near-bank PIMs are designated to operate all banks synchronously. The all-bank computation can be delayed when one of the banks performs the basic memory commands, such as read/write requests and activation/precharge operations. We aim to mitigate the throughput degradation and especially focus on execution delay caused by activation/precharge operations. For all-bank execution accessing the same row of all banks, a large number of activation/precharge operations inevitably occur. Considering the timing parameter limiting the rate of row-open operations (tFAW), the throughput might decrease even further. To resolve this activation/precharge overhead, we propose AESPA, a new parallel execution scheme that operates banks asynchronously. AESPA is different from the previous synchronous execution in that (1) the compute command of AESPA targets a single bank, and (2) each processing unit computes data stored in multiple DRAM columns. By doing so, while one bank computes multiple DRAM columns, the memory controller issues activation/precharge or PIM compute commands to other banks. Thus, AESPA hides the activation latency of PIM computation and fully utilizes the aggregated bandwidth of the banks. For this, we modify hardware and software to support vector and matrix computation of previous near-bank PIM architectures. In particular, we change the matrix-vector multiplication based on an inner product to fit it on AESPA PIM. Previous matrix-vector multiplication requires data broadcasting and simultaneous computation across all processing units. By changing the matrix-vector multiplication method, AESPA PIM can transfer data to respective processing units and start computation asynchronously. As a result, the near-bank PIMs adopting AESPA achieve 33.5% and 59.5% speedup compared to two different state-of-the-art PIMs.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种异步执行方案，以利用近存储体内存处理 (PIM) 的存储体级并行性。我们观察到，执行内存操作没有充分利用 PIM 计算的并行性，因为近库 PIM 被指定为同步操作所有库。当其中一个存储体执行基本存储器命令（例如读/写请求和激活/预充电操作）时，全存储体计算可能会被延迟。我们的目标是减轻吞吐量下降，特别关注激活/预充电操作引起的执行延迟。对于访问所有存储体的同一行的所有存储体执行，不可避免地会发生大量的激活/预充电操作。考虑到限制行打开操作 (tFAW) 速率的计时参数，吞吐量可能会进一步下降。为了解决这种激活/预充电开销，我们提出了 AESPA，这是一种异步操作存储体的新并行执行方案。 AESPA 与之前的同步执行的不同之处在于（1）AESPA 的计算命令针对单个存储体，以及（2）每个处理单元计算存储在多个 DRAM 列中的数据。通过这样做，当一个存储体计算多个 DRAM 列时，内存控制器向其他存储体发出激活/预充电或 PIM 计算命令。因此，AESPA 隐藏了 PIM 计算的激活延迟，并充分利用银行的聚合带宽。为此，我们修改了硬件和软件以支持先前近岸 PIM 架构的向量和矩阵计算。特别是，我们更改了基于内积的矩阵向量乘法，以使其适合 AESPA PIM。以前的矩阵向量乘法需要跨所有处理单元进行数据广播和同时计算。通过改变矩阵向量相乘方法，AESPA PIM可以将数据传输到各个处理单元并异步开始计算。因此，与两种不同的最先进 PIM 相比，采用 AESPA 的近银行 PIM 实现了 33.5% 和 59.5% 的加速。

papers.title: Affinity Alloc: Taming Not-So Near-Data Computing.
papers.abstract:
To mitigate the data movement bottleneck on large multicore systems, the near-data computing paradigm (NDC) offloads computation to where the data resides on-chip. The benefit of NDC heavily depends on spatial affinity, where all relevant data are in the same location, e.g. same cache bank. However, existing NDC works lack a general and systematic solution: they either ignore the problem and abort NDC when there is no spatial affinity, or rely on error-prone manual data placement.

Our insight is that the essential affinity relationship, i.e. data A should be close to data B, is orthogonal to microarchitecture details and input sizes. By co-optimizing the data structure and capturing this general affinity information in the data allocation interface, the allocator can automatically optimize for data affinity and load balance to make NDC computations truly near data.

With this insight, we propose affinity alloc, a general framework to optimize data layout for near-data computing. It comprises an extended allocator runtime, co-optimized data structures, and lightweight extensions to the OS and microarchitecture. Evaluated on parallel workloads across broad domains, affinity alloc achieves 2.26 × speedup and 1.76 × energy efficiency over a state-of-the-art near-data computing technique with 72% traffic reduction.
papers.abstract_zh:
为了缓解大型多核系统上的数据移动瓶颈，近数据计算范例 (NDC) 将计算卸载到数据驻留在片上的位置。 NDC 的好处在很大程度上取决于空间亲和力，其中所有相关数据都位于同一位置，例如相同的缓存库。然而，现有的NDC工作缺乏通用和系统的解决方案：它们要么忽略问题并在没有空间亲和力时中止NDC，要么依赖容易出错的手动数据放置。

我们的见解是，基本的亲和关系（即数据 A 应接近数据 B）与微架构细节和输入大小正交。通过共同优化数据结构并在数据分配接口中捕获这种通用亲和性信息，分配器可以自动优化数据亲和性和负载平衡，使 NDC 计算真正接近数据。

有了这种洞察力，我们提出了affinity alloc，这是一个优化近数据计算的数据布局的通用框架。它包括扩展的分配器运行时、协同优化的数据结构以及操作系统和微架构的轻量级扩展。对跨广泛领域的并行工作负载进行评估后，affinity alloc 与最先进的近数据计算技术相比，实现了 2.26 倍的加速和 1.76 倍的能源效率，流量减少了 72%。

papers.title: AQ2PNN: Enabling Two-party Privacy-Preserving Deep Neural Network Inference with Adaptive Quantization.
papers.abstract:
The growing prevalence of Machine Learning as a Service (MLaaS) enables a wide range of applications but simultaneously raises numerous security and privacy concerns. A key issue involves the potential privacy exposure of involved parties, such as the customer’s input data and the vendor’s model. Consequently, two-party computing (2PC) has emerged as a promising solution to safeguard the privacy of different parties during deep neural network (DNN) inference. However, the state-of-the-art (SOTA) 2PC-DNN techniques are tailored explicitly to traditional instruction set architecture (ISA) systems like CPUs and CPU+GPU. This reliance on ISA systems significantly constrains their energy efficiency, as these architectures typically employ 32- or 64-bit instruction sets. In contrast, the possibilities of harnessing dynamic and adaptive quantization to build high-performance 2PC-DNNs remain largely unexplored due to the lack of compatible algorithms and hardware accelerators.

To mitigate the bottleneck of SOTA solutions and fill the existing research gaps, this work investigates the construction of 2PC-DNNs on field programmable gate arrays (FPGAs). We introduce AQ2PNN, an end-to-end framework that effectively employs adaptive quantization schemes to develop high-performance 2PC-DNNs on FPGAs. From an algorithmic perspective, AQ2PNN introduces an innovative 2PC-ReLU method to replace Yao’s Garbled Circuits (GC). Regarding hardware, AQ2PNN employs an extensive set of building blocks for linear operators, non-linear operators, and a specialized Oblivious Transfer (OT) module for secure data exchange, respectively. These algorithm-hardware co-designed modules extremely utilize the fine-grained reconfigurability of FPGAs, to adapt the data bit-width of different DNN layers in the ciphertext domain, thereby reducing communication overhead between parties without compromising DNN performance, such as accuracy. We thoroughly assess AQ2PNN using widely adopted DNN architectures, including ResNet18, ResNet50, and VGG16, all trained on ImageNet and producing quantized models. Experimental results demonstrate that AQ2PNN outperforms SOTA solutions, achieving significantly reduced communication overhead by, improved energy efficiency by 26.3 ×, and comparable or even superior throughput and accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh:
机器学习即服务 (MLaaS) 的日益普及带来了广泛的应用，但同时也引发了许多安全和隐私问题。一个关键问题涉及相关各方的潜在隐私暴露，例如客户的输入数据和供应商的模型。因此，两方计算（2PC）已成为在深度神经网络（DNN）推理过程中保护各方隐私的有前途的解决方案。然而，最先进的 (SOTA) 2PC-DNN 技术是专门针对传统指令集架构 (ISA) 系统（如 CPU 和 CPU+GPU）而定制的。这种对 ISA 系统的依赖极大地限制了它们的能源效率，因为这些架构通常采用 32 位或 64 位指令集。相比之下，由于缺乏兼容的算法和硬件加速器，利用动态和自适应量化来构建高性能 2PC-DNN 的可能性在很大程度上仍未得到探索。

为了缓解 SOTA 解决方案的瓶颈并填补现有的研究空白，这项工作研究了在现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 上构建 2PC-DNN。我们介绍 AQ2PNN，这是一种端到端框架，可有效地采用自适应量化方案在 FPGA 上开发高性能 2PC-DNN。从算法角度来看，AQ2PNN 引入了创新的 2PC-ReLU 方法来替代 Yao 的乱码电路（GC）。在硬件方面，AQ2PNN 分别采用了一组广泛的构建块用于线性算子、非线性算子以及用于安全数据交换的专门的不经意传输 (OT) 模块。这些算法-硬件协同设计的模块极大地利用了FPGA的细粒度可重构性，以适应密文域中不同DNN层的数据位宽，从而在不影响DNN性能（例如准确性）的情况下减少各方之间的通信开销。我们使用广泛采用的 DNN 架构（包括 ResNet18、ResNet50 和 VGG16）彻底评估 AQ2PNN，所有架构均在 ImageNet 上进行训练并生成量化模型。实验结果表明，AQ2PNN 的性能优于 SOTA 解决方案，显着降低了通信开销，将能源效率提高了 26.3 倍，并实现了相当甚至更高的吞吐量和精度。

papers.title: ArchExplorer: Microarchitecture Exploration Via Bottleneck Analysis.
papers.abstract:
Design space exploration (DSE) for microarchitecture parameters is an essential stage in microprocessor design to explore the trade-offs among performance, power, and area (PPA). Prior work either employs excessive expert efforts to guide microarchitecture parameter tuning or demands high computing resources to prepare datasets and train black-box prediction models for DSE.

In this work, we aim to circumvent the domain knowledge requirements through automated bottleneck analysis and propose ArchExplorer, which reveals microarchitecture bottlenecks to guide DSE with much fewer simulations. ArchExplorer consists of a new graph formulation of microexecution, an optimal critical path construction algorithm, and hardware resource reassignment strategies. Specifically, the critical path is constructed from the microexecution to uncover the performance-critical microarchitecture bottlenecks, which facilitates ArchExplorer to reclaim the hardware budgets of performance-insensitive structures that consume unnecessary power and area. These budgets are then reassigned to the microarchitecture bottlenecks for performance boost while maintaining the power and area constraints under the total budget envelope. Experiments show that ArchExplorer can find better PPA Pareto-optimal designs, achieving an average of higher Pareto hypervolume using at most fewer simulations compared to the state-of-the-art approaches.
papers.abstract_zh:
微架构参数的设计空间探索 (DSE) 是微处理器设计中探索性能、功耗和面积 (PPA) 之间权衡的重要阶段。先前的工作要么采用过多的专家努力来指导微架构参数调整，要么需要大量计算资源来准备数据集并训练 DSE 的黑盒预测模型。

在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过自动瓶颈分析来规避领域知识要求，并提出 ArchExplorer，它揭示了微架构瓶颈，以更少的模拟来指导 DSE。 ArchExplorer 由新的微执行图形表​​述、最佳关键路径构建算法和硬件资源重新分配策略组成。具体来说，关键路径是从微执行构建的，以发现性能关键的微架构瓶颈，这有助于ArchExplorer回收性能不敏感结构的硬件预算，这些结构会消耗不必要的功耗和面积。然后，这些预算被重新分配给微架构瓶颈，以提高性能，同时在总预算范围内保持功耗和面积限制。实验表明，ArchExplorer 可以找到更好的 PPA 帕累托最优设计，与最先进的方法相比，使用最多更少的模拟即可实现平均更高的帕累托超体积。

papers.title: Architectural Support for Optimizing Huge Page Selection Within the OS.
papers.abstract:
Irregular, memory-intensive applications often incur high translation lookaside buffer (TLB) miss rates that result in significant address translation overheads. Employing huge pages is an effective way to reduce these overheads, however in real systems the number of available huge pages can be limited when system memory is nearly full and/or fragmented. Thus, huge pages must be used selectively to back application memory. This work demonstrates that choosing memory regions that incur the most TLB misses for huge page promotion best reduces address translation overheads. We call these regions High reUse TLB-sensitive data (HUBs). Unlike prior work which relies on expensive per-page software counters to identify promotion regions, we propose new architectural support to identify these regions dynamically at application runtime.

We propose a promotion candidate cache (PCC) that identifies HUB candidates based on hardware page table walks after a last-level TLB miss. This small, fixed-size structure tracks huge page-aligned regions (consisting of N base pages), ranks them based on observed page table walk frequency, and only keeps the most frequently accessed ones. Evaluated on applications of various memory intensity, our approach successfully identifies application pages incurring the highest address translation overheads. Our approach demonstrates that with the help of a PCC, the OS only needs to promote of the application footprint to achieve more than of the peak achievable performance, yielding 1.19-1.33 × speedups over 4KB base pages alone. In real systems where memory is typically fragmented, the PCC outperforms Linux’s page promotion policy by (when 50% of total memory is fragmented) and (when 90% of total memory is fragmented) respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
不规则的内存密集型应用程序通常会产生较高的转换后备缓冲区 (TLB) 未命中率，从而导致显着的地址转换开销。使用大页面是减少这些开销的有效方法，但是在实际系统中，当系统内存接近满和/或碎片时，可用大页面的数量可能会受到限制。因此，必须有选择地使用大页面来支持应用程序内存。这项工作表明，为大页升级选择导致 TLB 未命中最多的内存区域可以最大程度地减少地址转换开销。我们将这些区域称为高重用 TLB 敏感数据 (HUB)。与之前依赖昂贵的每页软件计数器来识别升级区域的工作不同，我们提出了新的架构支持来在应用程序运行时动态地识别这些区域。

我们提出了一种升级候选缓存（PCC），它根据最后一级 TLB 未命中后的硬件页表遍历来识别 HUB 候选。这个小型、固定大小的结构跟踪巨大的页对齐区域（由 N 个基页组成），根据观察到的页表遍历频率对它们进行排名，并且只保留最常访问的区域。通过对各种内存强度的应用程序进行评估，我们的方法成功地识别出产生最高地址转换开销的应用程序页面。我们的方法表明，在 PCC 的帮助下，操作系统只需增加应用程序占用空间即可实现超过可达到的峰值性能，仅比 4KB 基页就产生 1.19-1.33 倍的加速。在内存通常存在碎片的实际系统中，PCC 的性能分别优于 Linux 的页面提升策略（当总内存的 50% 存在碎片时）和（当总内存的 90% 存在碎片时）。

papers.title: AuRORA: Virtualized Accelerator Orchestration for Multi-Tenant Workloads.
papers.abstract:
With the widespread adoption of deep neural networks (DNNs) across applications, there is a growing demand for DNN deployment solutions that can seamlessly support multi-tenant execution. This involves simultaneously running multiple DNN workloads on heterogeneous architectures with domain-specific accelerators. However, existing accelerator interfaces directly bind the accelerator’s physical resources to user threads, without an efficient mechanism to adaptively re-partition available resources. This leads to high programming complexities and performance overheads due to sub-optimal resource allocation, making scalable many-accelerator deployment impractical.

To address this challenge, we propose AuRORA, a novel accelerator integration methodology that enables scalable accelerator deployment for multi-tenant workloads. In particular, AuRORA supports virtualized accelerator orchestration via co-designing the hardware-software stack of accelerators to allow adaptively binding current workloads onto available accelerators. We demonstrate that AuRORA achieves 2.02 higher overall SLA satisfaction, 1.33 overall system throughput, and 1.34 overall fairness compared to existing accelerator integration solutions with less than 2.7% area overhead.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着深度神经网络 (DNN) 在各个应用程序中的广泛采用，对能够无缝支持多租户执行的 DNN 部署解决方案的需求不断增长。 This involves simultaneously running multiple DNN workloads on heterogeneous architectures with domain-specific accelerators.然而，现有的加速器接口直接将加速器的物理资源绑定到用户线程，没有有效的机制来自适应地重新分配可用资源。由于资源分配不理想，这会导致较高的编程复杂性和性能开销，从而使得可扩展的多加速器部署变得不切实际。

为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 AuRORA，这是一种新颖的加速器集成方法，可为多租户工作负载提供可扩展的加速器部署。特别是，AuRORA 通过共同设计加速器的硬件软件堆栈来支持虚拟化加速器编排，以允许将当前工作负载自适应地绑定到可用加速器上。我们证明，与现有加速器集成解决方案相比，AuRORA 的总体 SLA 满意度提高了 2.02，总体系统吞吐量提高了 1.33，总体公平性提高了 1.34，面积开销不到 2.7%。

papers.title: AutoCC: Automatic Discovery of Covert Channels in Time-Shared Hardware.
papers.abstract:
Covert channels enable information leakage between security domains that should be isolated by observing execution differences in shared hardware. These channels can appear in any stateful shared resource, including caches, predictors, and accelerators. Previous works have identified many vulnerable components, demonstrating and defending against attacks via reverse engineering. However, this approach requires much human effort and reasoning. With the Cambrian explosion of specialized hardware, it is becoming increasingly difficult to identify all vulnerabilities manually.

To tackle this challenge, we propose AutoCC, a methodology that leverages formal property verification (FPV) to automatically discover covert channels in hardware that is shared between processes. AutoCC operates at the register-transfer level (RTL) to exhaustively examine any machine state left by a process after a context switch that creates an execution difference. Upon finding such a difference, AutoCC provides a precise execution trace showing how the information was encoded into the machine state and recovered.

Leveraging AutoCC’s flow to generate FPV testbenches that apply our methodology, we evaluated it on four open-source hardware projects, including two RISC-V cores and two accelerators. Without hand-written code or directed tests, AutoCC uncovered known covert channels (within minutes instead of many hours of test-driven emulations) and unknown ones. Although AutoCC is primarily intended to find covert channels, our evaluation has also found RTL bugs, demonstrating that AutoCC is an effective tool to test both the security and reliability of hardware designs.
papers.abstract_zh:
隐蔽通道会导致安全域之间的信息泄漏，这些安全域应该通过观​​察共享硬件中的执行差异来隔离。这些通道可以出现在任何有状态共享资源中，包括缓存、预测器和加速器。之前的工作已经识别出许多易受攻击的组件，通过逆向工程展示和防御攻击。然而，这种方法需要大量的人力和推理。随着专用硬件的寒武纪爆发，手动识别所有漏洞变得越来越困难。

为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 AutoCC，这是一种利用形式属性验证 (FPV) 自动发现进程之间共享的硬件中的隐蔽通道的方法。 AutoCC 在寄存器传输级别 (RTL) 运行，以详尽地检查在产生执行差异的上下文切换后进程留下的任何机器状态。发现这种差异后，AutoCC 会提供精确的执行跟踪，显示信息如何编码到机器状态并恢复。

利用 AutoCC 的流程生成应用我们方法的 FPV 测试平台，我们在四个开源硬件项目上对其进行了评估，包括两个 RISC-V 内核和两个加速器。无需手写代码或定向测试，AutoCC 即可发现已知的隐蔽通道（只需几分钟，而不是测试驱动的模拟的多个小时）和未知通道。虽然AutoCC的主要目的是寻找隐蔽通道，但我们的评估也发现了RTL错误，这表明AutoCC是测试硬件设计安全性和可靠性的有效工具。

papers.title: Branch Target Buffer Organizations.
papers.abstract: To accommodate very large instruction footprints, modern high-performance processors rely on fetch directed instruction prefetching through huge branch predictors and a hierarchy of Branch Target Buffers (BTBs). Recently, significant effort has been undertaken to reduce the footprint of each branch in the BTB, in order to either minimize the storage occupied by the BTB on die, or to increase the number of tracked branches at iso-storage. However, designing for branch density, while necessary, is only one dimension of BTB efficacy. In particular, BTB entry organization plays a significant role in improving instruction fetch throughput, which is a necessary step towards increased performance. In this paper, we first revisit the advantages and drawbacks of three classical BTB organizations in the context of multi-level BTB hierarchies. We then consider three possible improvements to increase the fetch PC throughput of the Region BTB and Block BTB organizations, bridging most of the performance gap with the impractical but highly storage-efficient Instruction BTB organization, thus paving the way for future very high fetch throughput machines.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了适应非常大的指令占用空间，现代高性能处理器依赖于通过巨大的分支预测器和分支目标缓冲区 (BTB) 层次结构进行提取定向指令预取。最近，为了减少 BTB 中每个分支的占用空间，人们付出了巨大的努力，以便最大限度地减少芯片上 BTB 占用的存储空间，或者增加 iso 存储中跟踪的分支数量。 However, designing for branch density, while necessary, is only one dimension of BTB efficacy.特别是，BTB 条目组织在提高指令读取吞吐量方面发挥着重要作用，这是提高性能的必要步骤。 In this paper, we first revisit the advantages and drawbacks of three classical BTB organizations in the context of multi-level BTB hierarchies.然后，我们考虑三种可能的改进，以提高区域 BTB 和块 BTB 组织的获取 PC 吞吐量，弥补与不切实际但存储效率高的指令 BTB 组织的大部分性能差距，从而为未来非常高的获取吞吐量机器铺平道路。

papers.title: Bucket Getter: A Bucket-based Processing Engine for Low-bit Block Floating Point (BFP) DNNs.
papers.abstract:
Block floating point (BFP), an efficient numerical system for deep neural networks (DNNs), achieves a good trade-off between dynamic range and hardware costs. Specifically, prior works have demonstrated that BFP format with 3 ∼ 5-bit mantissa can achieve FP32-comparable accuracy for various DNN workloads. We find that the floating-point adder (FP-Acc), which contains modules for normalization, alignment, addition, and fixed-point-to-floating-point (FXP2FP) conversion, dominates the power and area overheads, hence hindering the hardware efficiency of state-of-the-art low-bit BFP processing engines (BFP-PE).

To mitigate the identified issue, we propose Bucket Getter, a novel architecture implemented with the following techniques for improving the energy efficiency and area efficiency: 1) we propose a bucket-based accumulation unit prior to FP-Acc, which uses multiple small accumulators (buckets) that are responsible for a small range of exponent values where intermediate results are distributed accordingly, and b) accumulate in FXP domain. This reduces the activities of power-hungry a) alignment and b) format conversion units. 2) We propose inter-bucket carry propagation, which allows each bucket to transmit overflow to an adjacent bucket and further reduces the activity of FP-Acc. 3) We propose an out-of-bound-aware, adaptive and circular bucket accumulator to significantly reduce the overhead for the bucket-based accumulator. 4) We further propose shared FP-Acc, which exploits the low activity of FP-Acc in the bucket-based architecture and shares an FP-Acc across several MAC engines to reduce the area overhead of FP-Acc.

The experimental results based on TSMC 40 nm demonstrate that our proposed Bucket Getter architecture reduces the computational energy by up to 57% and improves the area efficiency by up to 1.4 ×, compared to state-of-the-art BFP engines across seven representative DNN models. Furthermore, our proposed approach helps state-of-the-art floating-point engines reduce up to 32% of the PE area and 81% of the PE power.
papers.abstract_zh:
块浮点 (BFP) 是一种用于深度神经网络 (DNN) 的高效数值系统，在动态范围和硬件成本之间实现了良好的权衡。具体来说，之前的工作已经证明，具有 3 ∼ 5 位尾数的 BFP 格式可以针对各种 DNN 工作负载实现与 FP32 相当的精度。我们发现浮点加法器 (FP-Acc) 包含标准化、对齐、加法和定点到浮点 (FXP2FP) 转换模块，在功耗和面积开销中占主导地位，从而阻碍了最先进的低位 BFP 处理引擎 (BFP-PE) 的硬件效率。

为了缓解已发现的问题，我们提出了 Bucket Getter，这是一种采用以下技术实现的新颖架构，用于提高能源效率和面积效率：1）我们在 FP-Acc 之前提出了一种基于桶的累加单元，它使用多个小型累加器（桶）负责小范围的指数值，其中中间结果相应地分布，b）在 FXP 域中累加。这减少了耗电的 a) 对齐和 b) 格式转换单元的活动。 2）我们提出桶间进位传播，允许每个桶将溢出传输到相邻桶，并进一步减少 FP-Acc 的活动。 3）我们提出了一种出界感知、自适应和循环桶累加器，以显着减少基于桶的累加器的开销。 4）我们进一步提出共享FP-Acc，它利用基于桶的架构中FP-Acc的低活动性，并在多个MAC引擎之间共享FP-Acc以减少FP-Acc的区域开销。

基于 TSMC 40 nm 的实验结果表明，与七个代表性 DNN 模型中最先进的 BFP 引擎相比，我们提出的 Bucket Getter 架构可将计算能量降低高达 57%，并将面积效率提高高达 1.4 倍。此外，我们提出的方法有助于最先进的浮点引擎减少高达 32% 的 PE 面积和 81% 的 PE 功率。

papers.title: Cambricon-R: A Fully Fused Accelerator for Real-Time Learning of Neural Scene Representation.
papers.abstract:
Neural scene representation (NSR) initiates a new methodology of encoding a 3D scene with neural networks by learning from dozens of photos taken from different camera positions. NSR not only achieves significant improvement in the quality of novel view synthesis and 3D reconstruction but also reduces the camera cost from the expensive laser cameras to the cheap color cameras on the shelf. However, performing 3D scene encoding using NSR is far from real-time due to the extremely low hardware utilization (only utilization of hardware peak performance), which greatly limits its applications in real-time AR/VR interactions

In this paper, we propose Cambricon-R, a fully fused on-chip processing architecture for real-time NSR learning. Initially, by performing a thorough characterization of the computing model of NSR on a GPU, we find that the extremely low hardware utilization is mainly caused by the fragmentary stages and heavy irregular memory accesses. To address these issues, we propose Cambricon-R architecture with a novel fully-fused ray-based execution model to eliminate the computing and memory inefficiencies for real-time NSR learning. Concretely, Cambricon-R features a ray-level fused architecture that not only eliminates the intermediate memory traffics but also leverages the point sparsity in scenes to eliminate unnecessary computations. Additionally, a high throughput on-chip memory system based on Auto-Interpolation Bank Array (AIBA) is proposed to efficiently handle a large volume of irregular memory accesses.

We evaluate Cambricon-R on 12 commonly-used datasets with the state-of-the-art representative algorithm, instant-ngp. The result shows that Cambricon-R achieves PE utilization of, on average. Compared to the state-of-the-art solution on A100 GPU, Cambricon-R achieves 373.8 × speedup and 256.6 × energy saving, on average. More importantly, it enables real-time NSR learning with 69.0 scenes per second, on average.
papers.abstract_zh:
神经场景表示 (NSR) 开创了一种通过神经网络对从不同相机位置拍摄的数十张照片进行学习来编码 3D 场景的新方法。 NSR不仅显着提高了新颖视图合成和3D重建的质量，而且还降低了相机成本，从昂贵的激光相机转向廉价的彩色相机。然而，由于硬件利用率极低（仅利用硬件峰值性能），使用NSR进行3D场景编码远非实时，这极大地限制了其在实时AR/VR交互中的应用

在本文中，我们提出了 Cambricon-R，一种用于实时 NSR 学习的完全融合的片上处理架构。最初，通过对 GPU 上的 NSR 计算模型进行彻底的表征，我们发现极低的硬件利用率主要是由碎片阶段和严重的不规则内存访问造成的。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Cambricon-R 架构，该架构具有新颖的完全融合的基于射线的执行模型，以消除实时 NSR 学习的计算和内存效率低下的问题。具体来说，Cambricon-R采用光线级融合架构，不仅消除了中间内存流量，还利用场景中的点稀疏性来消除不必要的计算。此外，提出了一种基于自动插值存储阵列（AIBA）的高吞吐量片上存储系统，以有效处理大量不规则存储访问。

我们使用最先进的代表性算法 instant-ngp 在 12 个常用数据集上评估 Cambricon-R。结果表明，Cambricon-R 的平均 PE 利用率为 。与 A100 GPU 上最先进的解决方案相比，Cambricon-R 平均实现 373.8 倍加速和 256.6 倍节能。更重要的是，它能够实现平均每秒 69.0 个场景的实时 NSR 学习。

papers.title: Cambricon-U: A Systolic Random Increment Memory Architecture for Unary Computing.
papers.abstract:
Unary computing, whose arithmetics require only one logic gate, has enabled efficient DNN processing, especially on strictly power-constrained devices. However, unary computing still confronts the power efficiency bottleneck for buffering unary bitstreams. The buffering of unary bitstreams requires accumulating bits into large bitwidth binary numbers. The large bitwidth binary number needs to activate all bits per cycle in case of carry propagation. As a result, the accumulation process accounts for 32%-70% of the power budget.

To push the boundary of power efficiency, we propose Cambricon-U, a systolic random increment memory architecture featuring efficient accumulation. By leveraging skew number data format, Cambricon-U only activates no more than three bits (instead of all bits) from each number per accumulating cycle. Experimental results show that Cambricon-U reduces 51% power on unary accumulation, and improves 1.18-1.45 × energy efficiency over uSystolic, the SOTA unary computing scheme baseline, with -1.9% ∼ +0.77% area overhead.
papers.abstract_zh:
一元计算的算法仅需要一个逻辑门，可实现高效的 DNN 处理，尤其是在严格功耗限制的设备上。然而，一元计算仍然面临着缓冲一元比特流的功效瓶颈。一元比特流的缓冲需要将位累积成大位宽的二进制数。大位宽二进制数需要在每个周期激活所有位，以防进位传播。因此，累积过程占功率预算的32%-70%。

为了突破功率效率的界限，我们提出了 Cambricon-U，一种具有高效累积功能的脉动随机增量内存架构。通过利用偏斜数字数据格式，Cambricon-U 在每个累加周期仅激活每个数字中不超过三位（而不是所有位）。实验结果表明，Cambricon-U在一元累加上降低了51%的功耗，并且比SOTA一元计算方案基线uSystolic提高了1.18-1.45×能源效率，面积开销为-1.9%∼+0.77%。

papers.title: CASA: An Energy-Efficient and High-Speed CAM-based SMEM Seeding Accelerator for Genome Alignment.
papers.abstract:
Genome analysis is a critical tool in medical and bioscience research, clinical diagnostics and treatment, and disease control and prevention. Seed and extension-based alignment is the main approach in the genome analysis pipeline, and BWA-MEM2, a widely acknowledged tool for genome alignment, performs seeding by searching for super maximal exact match (SMEM). The computation of SMEM searching requires high memory bandwidth and energy consumption, which becomes the main performance bottleneck in BWA-MEM2. State-of-the-Art designs like ERT and GenAx have achieved impressive speed-ups of SMEM-based genome alignment. However, they are constrained by frequent DRAM fetches or computationally intensive intersection calculations for all possible k-mers at every read position.

We present a CAM-based SMEM seeding accelerator for genome alignment (CASA), which circumvents the major throughput and power bottlenecks brought by data fetches and frequent position intersections through the co-design of a novel CAM-based computing architecture and a new SMEM search algorithm. CASA mainly consists of a pre-seeding filter table and a SMEM computing unit. The former expands the k-mer size to 19 using limited on-chip memory, which enables the efficient filtration of non-SMEM pivots. The latter applies a new algorithm to filter out disposable SMEMs that are already contained in other SMEMs. We evaluated a 28nm CASA implementation using the human and mouse genome references. CASA achieves 1.2 × and 5.47 × throughput improvement over ERT and GenAx while only requiring less than 30GB/s DRAM bandwidth and keeping the same alignment results as BWA-MEM2. Moreover, CASA provides 2.57 × and 6.69 × higher energy efficiency than ERT and GenAx.
papers.abstract_zh:
基因组分析是医学和生物科学研究、临床诊断和治疗以及疾病控制和预防的重要工具。基于种子和延伸的比对是基因组分析流程中的主要方法，而 BWA-MEM2 是一种广泛认可的基因组比对工具，它通过搜索超级最大精确匹配 (SMEM) 来执行播种。 SMEM搜索的计算需要较高的内存带宽和能耗，这成为BWA-MEM2的主要性能瓶颈。 ERT 和 GenAx 等最先进的设计已经实现了基于 SMEM 的基因组比对的令人印象深刻的加速。然而，它们受到频繁的 DRAM 读取或每个读取位置上所有可能的 k 聚体的计算密集型交集计算的限制。

我们提出了一种基于 CAM 的用于基因组比对（CASA）的 SMEM 播种加速器，它通过基于 CAM 的新型计算架构和新的 SMEM 搜索算法的共同设计，规避了数据获取和频繁位置交叉带来的主要吞吐量和功率瓶颈。 CASA主要由预播种过滤表和SMEM计算单元组成。前者使用有限的片上内存将 k-mer 大小扩展到 19，从而能够有效过滤非 SMEM 枢轴。后者应用一种新算法来过滤掉其他 SMEM 中已包含的一次性 SMEM。我们使用人类和小鼠基因组参考评估了 28nm CASA 实施。与 ERT 和 GenAx 相比，CASA 的吞吐量提高了 1.2 倍和 5.47 倍，同时仅需要低于 30GB/s 的 DRAM 带宽，并保持与 BWA-MEM2 相同的对齐结果。此外，CASA 的能源效率比 ERT 和 GenAx 高 2.57 倍和 6.69 倍。

papers.title: CHERIoT: Complete Memory Safety for Embedded Devices.
papers.abstract:
The ubiquity of embedded devices is apparent. The desire for increased functionality and connectivity drives ever larger software stacks, with components from multiple vendors and entities. These stacks should be replete with isolation and memory safety technologies, but existing solutions impinge upon development, unit cost, power, scalability, and/or real-time constraints, limiting their adoption and production-grade deployments. As memory safety vulnerabilities mount, the situation is clearly not tenable and a new approach is needed.

To slake this need, we present a novel adaptation of the CHERI capability architecture, co-designed with a green-field, security-centric RTOS. It is scaled for embedded systems, is capable of fine-grained software compartmentalization, and provides affordances for full inter-compartment memory safety. We highlight central design decisions and offloads and summarize how our prototype RTOS uses these to enable memory-safe, compartmentalized applications. Unlike many state-of-the-art schemes, our solution deterministically (not probabilistically) eliminates memory safety vulnerabilities while maintaining source-level compatibility. We characterize the power, performance, and area microarchitectural impacts, run microbenchmarks of key facilities, and exhibit the practicality of an end-to-end IoT application. The implementation shows that full memory safety for compartmentalized embedded systems is achievable without violating resource constraints or real-time guarantees, and that hardware assists need not be expensive, intrusive, or power-hungry.
papers.abstract_zh:
嵌入式设备的普遍性是显而易见的。对增加功能和连接性的渴望推动了越来越大的软件堆栈，其中包含来自多个供应商和实体的组件。这些堆栈应该充满隔离和内存安全技术，但现有的解决方案会影响开发、单位成本、功耗、可扩展性和/或实时约束，限制其采用和生产级部署。随着内存安全漏洞的增加，这种情况显然是站不住脚的，需要一种新的方法。

为了满足这一需求，我们提出了一种新颖的 CHERI 功能架构改编方案，与全新的、以安全为中心的 RTOS 共同设计。它针对嵌入式系统进行了扩展，能够进行细粒度的软件分区，并为完全的分区间内存安全提供了支持。我们重点介绍中心设计决策和卸载，并总结我们的原型 RTOS 如何使用这些来实现内存安全的分区应用程序。与许多最先进的方案不同，我们的解决方案确定性（而不是概率性）消除了内存安全漏洞，同时保持源代码级兼容性。我们描述了功率、性能和面积微架构影响，运行关键设施的微基准测试，并展示了端到端物联网应用的实用性。该实施表明，在不违反资源限制或实时保证的情况下，可以实现分区嵌入式系统的完全内存安全，并且硬件辅助不需要昂贵、侵入性或耗电。

papers.title: CLIP: Load Criticality based Data Prefetching for Bandwidth-constrained Many-core Systems.
papers.abstract:
Hardware prefetching is a latency-hiding technique that hides the costly off-chip DRAM accesses. However, state-of-the-art prefetchers fail to deliver performance improvement in the case of many-core systems with constrained DRAM bandwidth. For SPEC CPU2017 homogeneous workloads, the state-of-the-art Berti L1 prefetcher, on a 64-core system with four and eight DRAM channels, incurs performance slowdowns of 24% and 16%, respectively. However, Berti improves performance by 35% if we use an unrealistic configuration of 64 DRAM channels for a 64-core system (one DRAM channel per core).

Prior approaches such as prefetch throttling and critical load prefetching are not effective in the presence of state-of-the-art prefetchers. Existing load criticality predictors fail to detect loads that are critical in the presence of hardware prefetching and the best predictor provides an average critical load prediction accuracy of 41%. Existing prefetch throttling techniques use prefetch accuracy as one of the primary metrics. However, these techniques offer limited benefits for state-of-the-art prefetchers that deliver high prefetch accuracy and use prefetcher-specific throttling and filtering.

We propose CLIP, a novel load criticality predictor for hardware prefetching with constrained DRAM bandwidth. Our load criticality predictor provides an average accuracy of more than 93% and as high as 100%. CLIP also filters out the critical loads that lead to accurate prefetching. For a 64-core system with eight DRAM channels, CLIP improves the effectiveness of state-of-the-art Berti prefetcher by 24% and 9% for 45 and 200 64-core homogeneous and heterogeneous workload mixes, respectively. We show that CLIP is equally effective in the presence of other state-of-the-art L1 and L2 prefetchers. Overall, CLIP incurs a storage overhead of 1.56KB/core.
papers.abstract_zh:
Hardware prefetching is a latency-hiding technique that hides the costly off-chip DRAM accesses. However, state-of-the-art prefetchers fail to deliver performance improvement in the case of many-core systems with constrained DRAM bandwidth.对于 SPEC CPU2017 同质工作负载，最先进的 Berti L1 预取器在具有 4 个和 8 个 DRAM 通道的 64 核系统上分别导致性能下降 24% 和 16%。然而，如果我们对 64 核系统使用不切实际的 64 个 DRAM 通道配置（每个核心一个 DRAM 通道），Berti 的性能将提高 35%。

Prior approaches such as prefetch throttling and critical load prefetching are not effective in the presence of state-of-the-art prefetchers.现有的负载关键性预测器无法检测存在硬件预取的情况下的关键负载，而最佳预测器提供的平均关键负载预测精度为 41%。 Existing prefetch throttling techniques use prefetch accuracy as one of the primary metrics.然而，这些技术为最先进的预取器带来的好处有限，这些预取器可提供高预取精度并使用预取器特定的限制和过滤。

我们提出了 CLIP，一种新颖的负载关键预测器，用于在 DRAM 带宽受限的情况下进行硬件预取。我们的负载关键预测器的平均准确度超过 93%，最高可达 100%。 CLIP 还过滤掉导致准确预取的关键负载。对于具有 8 个 DRAM 通道的 64 核系统，对于 45 和 200 64 核同构和异构工作负载混合，CLIP 将最先进的 Berti 预取器的效率分别提高了 24% 和 9%。我们证明，在存在其他最先进的 L1 和 L2 预取器的情况下，CLIP 同样有效。总体而言，CLIP 产生的存储开销为 1.56KB/核心。

papers.title: Clockhands: Rename-free Instruction Set Architecture for Out-of-order Processors.
papers.abstract:
Out-of-order superscalar processors are currently the only architecture that speeds up irregular programs, but they suffer from poor power efficiency. To tackle this issue, we focused on how to specify register operands. Specifying operands by register names, as conventional RISC does, requires register renaming, resulting in poor power efficiency and preventing an increase in the front-end width. In contrast, a recently proposed architecture called STRAIGHT specifies operands by inter-instruction distance, thereby eliminating register renaming. However, STRAIGHT has strong constraints on instruction placement, which generally results in a large increase in the number of instructions.

We propose Clockhands, a novel instruction set architecture that has multiple register groups and specifies a value as “the value written in this register group k times before.” Clockhands does not require register renaming as in STRAIGHT. In contrast, Clockhands has much looser constraints on instruction placement than STRAIGHT, allowing programs to be written with almost the same number of instructions as Conventional RISC. We implemented a cycle-accurate simulator, FPGA implementation, and first-step compiler for Clockhands and evaluated benchmarks including SPEC CPU. On a machine with an eight-fetch width, the evaluation results showed that Clockhands consumes 7.4% less energy than RISC while having performance comparable to RISC. This energy reduction increases significantly to 24.4% when simulating a futuristic up-scaled processor with a 16-fetch width, which shows that Clockhands enables a wider front-end.
papers.abstract_zh:
无序超标量处理器是目前唯一能够加速不规则程序的架构，但它们的功效较差。为了解决这个问题，我们重点讨论如何指定寄存器操作数。与传统 RISC 一样，通过寄存器名称指定操作数需要对寄存器进行重命名，从而导致功效较差并阻碍前端宽度的增加。相比之下，最近提出的称为 STRAIGHT 的架构通过指令间距离指定操作数，从而消除了寄存器重命名。然而，STRAIGHT 对指令放置有很强的限制，这通常会导致指令数量大幅增加。

我们提出了 Clockhands，这是一种新颖的指令集架构，它具有多个寄存器组，并将一个值指定为“之前在该寄存器组中写入 k 次的值”。时钟指针不需要像 STRAIGHT 那样重命名寄存器。相比之下，Clockhands 对指令放置的限制比 STRAIGHT 宽松得多，允许使用与传统 RISC 几乎相同数量的指令来编写程序。我们为 Clockhands 实现了周期精确模拟器、FPGA 实现和第一步编译器，并评估了包括 SPEC CPU 在内的基准测试。在八取宽度的机器上，评估结果显示，Clockhands 的能耗比 RISC 低 7.4%，同时性能与 RISC 相当。当模拟具有 16 取宽度的未来升级处理器时，能耗显着降低至 24.4%，这表明 Clockhands 可实现更宽的前端。

papers.title: CryptoMMU: Enabling Scalable and Secure Access Control of Third-Party Accelerators.
papers.abstract:
Due to increasing energy and performance gaps between general-purpose processors and hardware accelerators (e.g., FPGA or ASIC), clear trends for leveraging accelerators arise in various fields or workloads, such as edge devices, cloud systems, and data centers. Moreover, system integrators desire higher flexibility to deploy custom accelerators based on their performance, power, and cost constraints, where such integration can be as early as (1) at the design time when third-party intellectual properties (IPs) are used, (2) at integration/upgrade time when third-party discrete chip accelerators are used, or (3) during runtime as in reconfigurable logic.

A malicious third-party accelerator can compromise the entire system by accessing other processes’ data, overwriting OS data structures, etc. To eliminate these security ramifications, a unit similar to a memory management unit (MMU), namely IOMMU, is typically used to scrutinize memory accesses from I/O devices, including accelerators. Still, IOMMU incurs significant performance overhead because it resides on the critical path of each I/O memory access. In this paper, we propose a novel scheme, CryptoMMU, to delegate the translation processes to accelerators, whereas the authentication of the targeted address is elegantly performed using a cryptography-based approach. As a result, CryptoMMU facilitates the private caching of translation in each accelerator, providing better scalability. Our evaluation results show that CryptoMMU improves system throughput by an average of 2.97 × and 1.13 × compared to the conventional IOMMU and the state-of-the-art solution, respectively. Importantly, CryptoMMU can be implemented without any software changes.
papers.abstract_zh:
由于通用处理器和硬件加速器（例如 FPGA 或 ASIC）之间的能源和性能差距不断扩大，在各个领域或工作负载（例如边缘设备、云系统和数据中心）中出现了利用加速器的明显趋势。此外，系统集成商希望根据性能、功耗和成本限制更灵活地部署定制加速器，这种集成最早可以在（1）使用第三方知识产权（IP）时在设计时进行，（2）在使用第三方分立芯片加速器时在集成/升级时进行，或（3）在运行时进行，如在可重构逻辑中。

恶意的第三方加速器可以通过访问其他进程的数据、覆盖操作系统数据结构等来危害整个系统。为了消除这些安全影响，通常使用类似于内存管理单元 (MMU) 的单元，即 IOMMU 来仔细检查来自 I/O 设备（包括加速器）的内存访问。尽管如此，IOMMU 仍会产生显着的性能开销，因为它驻留在每个 I/O 内存访问的关键路径上。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方案 CryptoMMU，将翻译过程委托给加速器，而目标地址的身份验证是使用基于密码学的方法优雅地执行的。因此，CryptoMMU 促进了每个加速器中翻译的私有缓存，从而提供了更好的可扩展性。我们的评估结果表明，与传统 IOMMU 和最先进的解决方案相比，CryptoMMU 分别将系统吞吐量平均提高了 2.97 倍和 1.13 倍。重要的是，CryptoMMU 无需任何软件更改即可实现。

papers.title: Dadu-RBD: Robot Rigid Body Dynamics Accelerator with Multifunctional Pipelines.
papers.abstract: Rigid body dynamics is a core technology in the robotics field. In trajectory optimization and model predictive control algorithms, there are usually a large number of rigid body dynamics computing tasks. Using CPUs to process these tasks consumes a lot of time, which will affect the real-time performance of robots. To this end, we propose a multifunctional robot rigid body dynamics accelerator, named Dadu-RBD, to address the performance bottleneck. By analyzing different functions commonly used in robot dynamics calculations, we summarize their relationships and characteristics, then optimize them according to the hardware. Based on this, Dadu-RBD can fully reuse common hardware modules when processing different computing tasks. By dynamically switching the dataflow path, Dadu-RBD can accelerate various dynamics functions without reconfiguring the hardware. We design the Round-Trip Pipeline and Structure-Adaptive Pipelines for Dadu-RBD, which can greatly improve the throughput of the accelerator. Robots with different structures and parameters can be optimized specifically. Compared with the state-of-the-art CPU, GPU dynamics libraries and FPGA accelerator, Dadu-RBD can significantly improve the performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 刚体动力学是机器人领域的核心技术。在轨迹优化和模型预测控制算法中，通常存在大量的刚体动力学计算任务。使用CPU来处理这些任务会消耗大量的时间，这会影响机器人的实时性能。为此，我们提出了一种多功能机器人刚体动力学加速器，名为Dadu-RBD，以解决性能瓶颈。通过分析机器人动力学计算中常用的不同函数，总结它们之间的关系和特点，然后根据硬件进行优化。基于此，Dadu-RBD在处理不同的计算任务时可以充分复用通用的硬件模块。通过动态切换数据流路径，Dadu-RBD可以加速各种动态功能，而无需重新配置硬件。我们为Dadu-RBD设计了往返管道和结构自适应管道，可以大大提高加速器的吞吐量。不同结构和参数的机器人可以进行针对性的优化。与最先进的CPU、GPU动态库和FPGA加速器相比，Dadu-RBD可以显着提高性能。

papers.title: DASH-CAM: Dynamic Approximate SearcH Content Addressable Memory for genome classification.
papers.abstract: We propose a novel dynamic storage-based approximate search content addressable memory (DASH-CAM) for computational genomics applications, particularly for identification and classification of viral pathogens of epidemic significance. DASH-CAM provides 5.5 × better density compared to state-of-the-art SRAM-based approximate search CAM. This allows using DASH-CAM as a portable classifier that can be applied to pathogen surveillance in low-quality field settings during pandemics, as well as to pathogen diagnostics at points of care. DASH-CAM approximate search capabilities allow a high level of flexibility when dealing with a variety of industrial sequencers with different error profiles. DASH-CAM achieves up to 30% and 20% higher F1 score when classifying DNA reads with 10% error rate, compared to state-of-the-art DNA classification tools MetaCache-GPU and Kraken2 respectively. Simulated at 1GHz, DASH-CAM provides 1, 178 × and 1, 040 × average speedup over MetaCache-GPU and Kraken2 respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的基于动态存储的近似搜索内容可寻址存储器（DASH-CAM），用于计算基因组学应用，特别是用于具有流行意义的病毒病原体的识别和分类。与最先进的基于 SRAM 的近似搜索 CAM 相比，DASH-CAM 的密度提高了 5.5 倍。这允许使用 DASH-CAM 作为便携式分类器，可应用于大流行期间低质量现场环境中的病原体监测，以及护理点的病原体诊断。 DASH-CAM 近似搜索功能在处理具有不同错误特征的各种工业定序器时具有高度的灵活性。与最先进的 DNA 分类工具 MetaCache-GPU 和 Kraken2 相比，DASH-CAM 在以 10% 错误率对 DNA 读数进行分类时，F1 分数分别提高了 30% 和 20%。在 1GHz 下进行模拟时，DASH-CAM 分别比 MetaCache-GPU 和 Kraken2 提供 1, 178 × 和 1, 040 × 平均加速。

papers.title: Decoupled Vector Runahead.
papers.abstract: We present Decoupled Vector Runahead (DVR), an in-core prefetching technique, executing separately to the main application thread, that exploits massive amounts of memory-level parallelism to improve the performance of applications featuring indirect memory accesses. DVR dynamically infers loop bounds at run-time, recognizing striding loads, and vectorizing subsequent instructions that are part of an indirect chain. It proactively issues memory accesses for the resulting loads far into the future, even when the out-of-order core has not yet stalled, bringing their data into the L1 cache, and thus providing timely prefetches for the main thread. DVR can adjust the degree of vectorization at run-time, vectorize the same chain of indirect memory accesses across multiple invocations of an inner loop, and efficiently handle branch divergence along the vectorized chain. DVR runs as an on-demand, speculative, in-order, lightweight hardware subthread alongside the main thread within the core and incurs a minimal hardware overhead of only 1139 bytes. Relative to a large superscalar 5-wide out-of-order baseline and Vector Runahead — a recent microarchitectural technique to accelerate indirect memory accesses on out-of-order processors — DVR delivers 2.4 × and 2 × higher performance, respectively, for a set of graph analytics, database, and HPC workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了解耦矢量运行 (DVR)，这是一种核心预取技术，单独执行到主应用程序线程，它利用大量内存级并行性来提高具有间接内存访问功能的应用程序的性能。 DVR 在运行时动态推断循环边界，识别跨步负载，并对属于间接链一部分的后续指令进行矢量化。即使无序核心尚未停止，它也会主动为将来产生的负载发出内存访问，将其数据放入 L1 缓存，从而为主线程提供及时的预取。 DVR 可​​以在运行时调整矢量化程度，对内部循环的多次调用之间的同一间接内存访问链进行矢量化，并有效地处理矢量化链上的分支分歧。 DVR 作为按需、推测、有序、轻量级硬件子线程与核心内的主线程一起运行，并产生仅 1139 字节的最小硬件开销。 Relative to a large superscalar 5-wide out-of-order baseline and Vector Runahead — a recent microarchitectural technique to accelerate indirect memory accesses on out-of-order processors — DVR delivers 2.4 × and 2 × higher performance, respectively, for a set of graph analytics, database, and HPC workloads.

papers.title: Demystifying CXL Memory with Genuine CXL-Ready Systems and Devices.
papers.abstract: The ever-growing demands for memory with larger capacity and higher bandwidth have driven recent innovations on memory expansion and disaggregation technologies based on Compute eXpress Link (CXL). Especially, CXL-based memory expansion technology has recently gained notable attention for its ability not only to economically expand memory capacity and bandwidth but also to decouple memory technologies from a specific memory interface of the CPU. However, since CXL memory devices have not been widely available, they have been emulated using DDR memory in a remote NUMA node. In this paper, for the first time, we comprehensively evaluate a true CXL-ready system based on the latest 4th-generation Intel Xeon CPU with three CXL memory devices from different manufacturers. Specifically, we run a set of microbenchmarks not only to compare the performance of true CXL memory with that of emulated CXL memory but also to analyze the complex interplay between the CPU and CXL memory in depth. This reveals important differences between emulated CXL memory and true CXL memory, some of which will compel researchers to revisit the analyses and proposals from recent work. Next, we identify opportunities for memory-bandwidth-intensive applications to benefit from the use of CXL memory. Lastly, we propose a CXL-memory-aware dynamic page allocation policy, Caption to more efficiently use CXL memory as a bandwidth expander. We demonstrate that Caption can automatically converge to an empirically favorable percentage of pages allocated to CXL memory, which improves the performance of memory-bandwidth-intensive applications by up to 24% when compared to the default page allocation policy designed for traditional NUMA systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 对更大容量和更高带宽内存的不断增长的需求推动了基于 Compute eXpress Link (CXL) 的内存扩展和分解技术的最新创新。特别是，基于 CXL 的内存扩展技术最近受到了广泛关注，因为它不仅能够经济地扩展内存容量和带宽，而且能够将内存技术与 CPU 的特定内存接口解耦。然而，由于 CXL 内存设备尚未广泛使用，因此已在远程 NUMA 节点中使用 DDR 内存对其进行模拟。在本文中，我们首次全面评估了一个真正的 CXL 就绪系统，该系统基于最新的第四代 Intel Xeon CPU 和来自不同制造商的三个 CXL 内存设备。具体来说，我们运行一组微基准测试，不仅可以比较真实 CXL 内存与模拟 CXL 内存的性能，还可以深入分析 CPU 和 CXL 内存之间的复杂相互作用。这揭示了模拟 CXL 内存和真实 CXL 内存之间的重要差异，其中一些差异将迫使研究人员重新审视最近工作中的分析和建议。接下来，我们确定内存带宽密集型应用程序从使用 CXL 内存中受益的机会。最后，我们提出了一种 CXL 内存感知动态页面分配策略 Caption，以更有效地使用 CXL 内存作为带宽扩展器。我们证明，Caption 可以自动收敛到分配给 CXL 内存的页面的经验有利百分比，与为传统 NUMA 系统设计的默认页面分配策略相比，这可将内存带宽密集型应用程序的性能提高高达 24%。

papers.title: DF-GAS: a Distributed FPGA-as-a-Service Architecture towards Billion-Scale Graph-based Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search.
papers.abstract: Embedding retrieval is a crucial task for recommendation systems. Graph-based approximate nearest neighbor search (GANNS) is the most commonly used method for retrieval, and achieves the best performance on billion-scale datasets. Unfortunately, the existing CPU- and GPU-based GANNS systems are difficult to optimize the throughput under the latency constraints on billion-scale datasets, due to the underutilized local memory bandwidth (5-45%) and the expensive remote data access overhead (∼ 85% of the total latency). In this paper, we first introduce a practically ideal GANNS architecture for billion-scale datasets, which facilitates a detailed analysis of the challenges and characteristics of distributed GANNS systems. Then, at the architecture level, we propose DF-GAS, a Distributed FPGA-as-a-Service (FPaaS) architecture for accelerating billion-scale Graph-based Approximate nearest neighbor Search. DF-GAS uses a feature-packing memory access engine and a data prefetching and delayed processing scheme to increase local memory bandwidth by 36-42% and reduce remote data access overhead by 76.2%, respectively. At the system level, we exploit the “full-graph + sub-graph” hybrid parallel search scheme on distributed FPaaS system. It achieves million-level query-per-second with sub-millisecond latency on billion-scale GANNS for the first time. Extensive evaluations on million-scale and billion-scale datasets show that DF-GAS achieves an average of 55.4 ×, 32.2 ×, 5.4 ×, and 4.4 × better latency-bounded throughput than CPUs, GPUs, and two state-of-the-art ANNS architectures, i.e., ANNA [23] and Vstore [27], respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 嵌入检索是推荐系统的一项关键任务。基于图的近似最近邻搜索（GANNS）是最常用的检索方法，并且在十亿级数据集上取得了最佳性能。不幸的是，由于本地内存带宽未充分利用（5-45%）和昂贵的远程数据访问开销（约占总延迟的 85%），现有基于 CPU 和 GPU 的 GANN 系统很难在十亿级数据集的延迟限制下优化吞吐量。在本文中，我们首先介绍了一种适用于十亿级数据集的实用理想 GANNS 架构，有助于详细分析分布式 GANNS 系统的挑战和特征。然后，在架构层面，我们提出了 DF-GAS，一种分布式 FPGA 即服务（FPaaS）架构，用于加速十亿级基于图的近似最近邻搜索。 DF-GAS采用功能包装内存访问引擎和数据预取和延迟处理方案，分别将本地内存带宽增加36-42%，将远程数据访问开销减少76.2%。在系统层面，我们在分布式FPaaS系统上开发了“全图+子图”混合并行搜索方案。它首次在十亿级 GANN 上实现了每秒百万级查询和亚毫秒级延迟。对百万级和十亿级数据集的广泛评估表明，DF-GAS 的延迟限制吞吐量平均分别比 CPU、GPU 和两种最先进的 ANNS 架构（即 ANNA [23] 和 Vstore [27]）高出 55.4 ×、32.2 ×、5.4 × 和 4.4 ×。

papers.title: DOSA: Differentiable Model-Based One-Loop Search for DNN Accelerators.
papers.abstract:
In the hardware design space exploration process, it is critical to optimize both hardware parameters and algorithm-to-hardware mappings. Previous work has largely approached this simultaneous optimization problem by separately exploring the hardware design space and the mapspace—both individually large and highly nonconvex spaces—independently. The resulting combinatorial explosion has created significant difficulties for optimizers.

In this paper, we introduce DOSA, which consists of differentiable performance models and a gradient descent-based optimization technique to simultaneously explore both spaces and identify high-performing design points. Experimental results demonstrate that DOSA outperforms random search and Bayesian optimization by 2.80 × and 12.59 ×, respectively, in improving DNN model energy-delay product, given a similar number of samples. We also demonstrate the modularity and flexibility of DOSA by augmenting our analytical model with a learned model, allowing us to optimize buffer sizes and mappings of a real DNN accelerator and attain a 1.82 × improvement in energy-delay product.
papers.abstract_zh:
在硬件设计空间探索过程中，优化硬件参数和算法到硬件的映射至关重要。以前的工作主要通过独立地探索硬件设计空间和地图空间（两个单独的大空间和高度非凸空间）来解决这种同步优化问题。由此产生的组合爆炸给优化器带来了巨大的困难。

在本文中，我们介绍了 DOSA，它由可微性能模型和基于梯度下降的优化技术组成，可同时探索两个空间并识别高性能设计点。实验结果表明，在样本数量相似的情况下，DOSA 在改进 DNN 模型能量延迟乘积方面分别优于随机搜索和贝叶斯优化 2.80 倍和 12.59 倍。我们还通过学习模型增强我们的分析模型来展示 DOSA 的模块化和灵活性，使我们能够优化真实 DNN 加速器的缓冲区大小和映射，并在能量延迟乘积方面实现 1.82 倍的改进。

papers.title: Efficiently Enabling Block Semantics and Data Updates in DNA Storage.
papers.abstract: We propose a novel and flexible DNA-storage architecture, which divides the storage space into fixed-size units (blocks) that can be independently and efficiently accessed at random for both read and write operations, and further allows efficient sequential access to consecutive data blocks. In contrast to prior work, in our architecture a pair of random-access PCR primers of length 20 does not define a single object, but an independent storage partition, which is internally blocked and managed independently of other partitions. We expose the flexibility and constraints with which the internal address space of each partition can be managed, and incorporate them into our design to provide rich and functional storage semantics, such as block-storage organization, efficient implementation of data updates, and sequential access. To leverage the full power of the prefix-based nature of PCR addressing, we define a methodology for transforming the internal addressing scheme of a partition into an equivalent that is PCR-compatible. This allows us to run PCR with primers that can be variably elongated to include a desired part of the internal address, and thus narrow down the scope of the reaction to retrieve a specific block or a range of blocks within the partition with sufficiently high accuracy. Our wetlab evaluation demonstrates the practicality of the proposed ideas and a 140x reduction in sequencing cost and latency for retrieval of individual blocks within the partition.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖且灵活的DNA存储架构，它将存储空间划分为固定大小的单元（块），这些单元可以独立有效地随机访问以进行读和写操作，并进一步允许对连续数据块进行高效的顺序访问。与之前的工作相比，在我们的架构中，一对长度为 20 的随机访问 PCR 引物并不定义单个对象，而是定义一个独立的存储分区，该分区在内部独立于其他分区进行阻塞和管理。我们公开了可以管理每个分区的内部地址空间的灵活性和约束，并将它们合并到我们的设计中，以提供丰富且实用的存储语义，例如块存储组织、数据更新的高效实现和顺序访问。为了充分利用 PCR 寻址基于前缀的特性，我们定义了一种方法，用于将分区的内部寻址方案转换为与 PCR 兼容的等效方案。这使我们能够使用可以可变延长的引物运行 PCR，以包含内部地址的所需部分，从而缩小反应范围，以足够高的准确度检索分区内的特定块或一系列块。我们的湿实验室评估证明了所提出想法的实用性，并且测序成本和检索分区内各个块的延迟降低了 140 倍。

papers.title: ERASER: Towards Adaptive Leakage Suppression for Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computing.
papers.abstract:
Quantum error correction (QEC) codes can tolerate hardware errors by encoding fault-tolerant logical qubits using redundant physical qubits and detecting errors using parity checks. Leakage errors occur in quantum systems when a qubit leaves its computational basis and enters higher energy states. These errors severely limit the performance of QEC due to two reasons. First, they lead to erroneous parity checks that obfuscate the accurate detection of errors. Second, the leakage spreads to other qubits and creates a pathway for more errors over time. Prior works tolerate leakage errors by using leakage reduction circuits (LRCs) that modify the parity check circuitry of QEC codes. Unfortunately, naively using LRCs always throughout a program is sub-optimal because LRCs incur additional two-qubit operations that (1) facilitate leakage transport, and (2) serve as new sources of errors.

Ideally, LRCs should only be used if leakage occurs, so that errors from both leakage as well as additional LRC operations are simultaneously minimized. However, identifying leakage errors in real-time is challenging. To enable the robust and efficient usage of LRCs, we propose ERASER that speculates the subset of qubits that may have leaked and only uses LRCs for those qubits. Our studies show that the majority of leakage errors typically impact the parity checks. We leverage this insight to identify the leaked qubits by analyzing the patterns in the failed parity checks. We propose ERASER+M that enhances ERASER by detecting leakage more accurately using qubit measurement protocols that can classify qubits into |0⟩, |1⟩ and |L⟩ states. ERASER and ERASER+M improve the logical error rate by up to 4.3 × and 23 × respectively compared to always using LRC.
papers.abstract_zh:
量子纠错（QEC）代码可以通过使用冗余物理量子位编码容错逻辑量子位并使用奇偶校验检测错误来容忍硬件错误。当量子位离开其计算基础并进入更高的能态时，量子系统中就会出现泄漏错误。由于两个原因，这些错误严重限制了 QEC 的性能。首先，它们会导致错误的奇偶校验，从而混淆了错误的准确检测。其次，泄漏会扩散到其他量子位，并随着时间的推移产生更多错误。先前的工作通过使用修改 QEC 码奇偶校验电路的泄漏减少电路 (LRC) 来容忍泄漏错误。不幸的是，在整个程序中始终天真地使用 LRC 并不是最佳选择，因为 LRC 会产生额外的两个量子位操作，这些操作 (1) 促进泄漏传输，(2) 成为新的错误源。

理想情况下，仅在发生泄漏时才应使用 LRC，以便同时最小化泄漏和附加 LRC 操作带来的错误。然而，实时识别泄漏错误具有挑战性。为了实现 LRC 的稳健和高效使用，我们提出了 ERASER，它推测可能已泄漏的量子位子集，并且仅对这些量子位使用 LRC。我们的研究表明，大多数泄漏错误通常会影响奇偶校验。我们利用这种洞察力，通过分析失败的奇偶校验中的模式来识别泄漏的量子位。我们提出 ERASER+M，通过使用量子位测量协议更准确地检测泄漏来增强 ERASER，该协议可以将量子位分类为 |0⟩、|1⟩ 和 |L⟩ 状态。与始终使用 LRC 相比，ERASER 和 ERASER+M 分别将逻辑错误率提高了 4.3 倍和 23 倍。

papers.title: Eureka: Efficient Tensor Cores for One-sided Unstructured Sparsity in DNN Inference.
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs), while enormously popular, continue to place ever higher compute demand for which GPUs provide specialized matrix multipliers called tensor cores. To reduce the compute demand via sparsity, Nvidia Ampere’s tensor cores support 2:4 structured sparsity in the filters (i.e., two non-zeros out of four values) which provides uniform 50% sparsity without any load imbalance issues. Consequently, the sparse tensor cores maintain (input or output) operand stationarity, which is fundamental for avoiding high-overhead hardware, requiring only one extra 4-1 multiplexer per multiply-accumulate unit (MAC). However, 2:4 sparsity is limited to 2x improvements in performance and energy without loss of accuracy, whereas unstructured sparsity provides 5-6x opportunity albeit while causing load imbalance. Previous papers on unstructured sparsity incur high hardware overhead (e.g., buffering, crossbars, scatter-gather networks, and address calculators) mainly due to sacrificing operand stationarity in favor of load balance. To avoid adding high overheads to the highly-efficient tensor cores, we propose Eureka, an efficient tensor core for unstructured sparsity. Eureka addresses load imbalance via three contributions: (1) Our key insight is that a slight weakening of output stationarity achieves load balance most of the time while incurring only a modest hardware overhead. Accordingly, we propose single-step uni-directional displacement (SUDS), where a filter element’s multiplication can either occur in its original position or be displaced to a vacant MAC in the adjacent row below while the accumulation occurs in the original row to restore output stationarity. SUDS is an offline technique for inference. (2) We provide an optimal algorithm for work assignment for SUDS. (3) To achieve fewer bubbles in the tensor core’s systolic pipeline due to the irregularity of unstructured sparsity, we propose offline systolic scheduling to group together the sparse filters with similar, statically-known execution times (based on the number of non-zeros). Our evaluation shows that Eureka achieves 4.8x and 2.4x speedups, and 3.1x and 1.8x energy reductions over dense and 2:4 sparse (Ampere) implementations, respectively, and incurs area and power overheads of 6% and 11.5%, respectively, over Ampere.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 虽然非常受欢迎，但仍然提出了越来越高的计算需求，为此 GPU 提供了称为张量核心的专用矩阵乘法器。为了通过稀疏性减少计算需求，Nvidia Ampere 的张量核心在滤波器中支持 2:4 结构化稀疏性（即四个值中的两个非零），从而提供统一的 50% 稀疏性，而不会出现任何负载不平衡问题。因此，稀疏张量核心保持（输入或输出）操作数平稳性，这对于避免高开销硬件至关重要，每个乘法累加单元 (MAC) 仅需要一个额外的 4-1 多路复用器。然而，2:4 的稀疏性仅限于在不损失准确性的情况下性能和能量提高 2 倍，而非结构化稀疏性提供 5-6 倍的机会，尽管同时会导致负载不平衡。之前关于非结构化稀疏性的论文会产生较高的硬件开销（例如，缓冲、交叉开关、分散收集网络和地址计算器），这主要是由于为了负载平衡而牺牲了操作数的平稳性。为了避免给高效张量核心增加高额开销，我们提出了 Eureka，一种用于非结构化稀疏性的高效张量核心。 Eureka 通过三个贡献解决了负载不平衡问题：(1) 我们的主要见解是，输出平稳性的轻微减弱在大多数情况下可以实现负载平衡，同时只产生适度的硬件开销。因此，我们提出单步单向位移（SUDS），其中滤波器元素的乘法可以发生在其原始位置，也可以位移到下面相邻行中的空MAC，同时累加发生在原始行中以恢复输出平稳性。 SUDS 是一种离线推理技术。 (2)我们提供了SUDS工作分配的最佳算法。 (3) 由于非结构化稀疏性的不规则性，为了减少张量核心脉动管道中的气泡，我们提出离线脉动调度，将具有相似的静态已知执行时间（基于非零数）的稀疏滤波器分组在一起。我们的评估表明，与密集和 2:4 稀疏 (Ampere) 实现相比，Eureka 分别实现了 4.8 倍和 2.4 倍的加速，以及 3.1 倍和 1.8 倍的能量减少，并且与 Ampere 相比，面积和功率开销分别增加了 6% 和 11.5%。

papers.title: Exploiting Inherent Properties of Complex Numbers for Accelerating Complex Valued Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Since conventional Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) use real numbers as their data, they are unable to capture the imaginary values and the correlations between real and imaginary values in applications that use complex numbers. To address this limitation, Complex Valued Neural Networks (CVNNs) have been introduced, enabling to capture the context of complex numbers for various applications such as Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI), radar, and sensing. CVNNs handle their data with complex numbers and adopt complex number arithmetic to their layer operations, so they exhibit distinct design challenges with real-valued DNNs. The first challenge is the data representation of the complex number, which requires two values for a single data, doubling the total data size of the networks. Moreover, due to the unique operations of the complex-valued layers, CVNNs require a specialized scheduling policy to fully utilize the hardware resources and achieve optimal performance. To mitigate the design challenges, we propose software and hardware co-design techniques that effectively resolves the memory and compute overhead of CVNNs. First, we propose Polar Form Aware Quantization (PAQ) that utilizes the characteristics of the complex number and their unique value distribution on CVNNs. Then, we propose our hardware accelerator that supports PAQ and CVNN operations. Lastly, we design a CVNN-aware scheduling scheme that optimizes the performance and resource utilization of an accelerator by aiming at the special layer operations of CVNN. PAQ achieves 62.5% data compression over CVNNs using FP16 while retaining a similar error with INT8 quantization, and our hardware support PAQ with only 2% area overhead over conventional systolic array architecture. In our evaluation, PAQ hardware with the scheduling scheme achieves a 32% lower latency and 30% lower energy consumption than other accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于传统的深度神经网络（DNN）使用实数作为数据，因此它们无法捕获使用复数的应用程序中的虚值以及实数和虚数之间的相关性。为了解决这一限制，引入了复值神经网络 (CVNN)，能够捕获磁共振成像 (MRI)、雷达和传感等各种应用的复数背景。 CVNN 使用复数处理数据，并在层运算中采用复数算术，因此它们在实值 DNN 方面面临着独特的设计挑战。第一个挑战是复数的数据表示，这需要单个数据两个值，从而使网络的总数据大小加倍。此外，由于复值层的独特操作，CVNN需要专门的调度策略来充分利用硬件资源并实现最佳性能。为了缓解设计挑战，我们提出了软件和硬件协同设计技术，可以有效解决 CVNN 的内存和计算开销。首先，我们提出了极坐标形式感知量化（PAQ），它利用复数的特征及其在 CVNN 上的独特值分布。然后，我们提出支持 PAQ 和 CVNN 操作的硬件加速器。最后，我们设计了一种CVNN感知调度方案，通过针对CVNN的特殊层操作来优化加速器的性能和资源利用率。 PAQ 比使用 FP16 的 CVNN 实现了 62.5% 的数据压缩，同时保留了与 INT8 量化类似的误差，并且我们的硬件支持 PAQ，仅比传统脉动阵列架构减少 2% 的面积开销。在我们的评估中，采用该调度方案的 PAQ 硬件比其他加速器实现了 32% 的延迟降低和 30% 的能耗降低。

papers.title: Fast, Robust and Transferable Prediction for Hardware Logic Synthesis.
papers.abstract:
The increasing complexity of computer chips and the slow logic synthesis process have become major bottlenecks in the hardware design process, also hindering the ability of hardware generators to make informed design decisions while considering hardware costs. While various models have been proposed to predict physical characteristics of hardware designs, they often suffer from limited domain adaptability and open-source hardware design data scarcity.

In this paper, we present SNS v2, a fast, robust, and transferable hardware synthesis predictor based on deep learning models. Inspired by modern natural language processing models, SNS v2 adopts a three-phase training approach encompassing pre-training, fine-tuning, and domain adaptation, enabling it to leverage more abundant unlabeled and off-domain training data. Additionally, we propose a novel contrastive learning approach based on circuit equivalence to enhance model robustness. Our experiments demonstrate that SNS v2 achieves two to three orders of magnitude faster speed compared to conventional EDA tools, while maintaining state-of-the-art prediction accuracy. We also show that SNS v2 can be seamlessly integrated into hardware generator frameworks for real-time cost estimation, resulting in higher quality design recommendations in a significantly reduced time frame.
papers.abstract_zh:
计算机芯片日益复杂和缓慢的逻辑综合过程已成为硬件设计过程中的主要瓶颈，也阻碍了硬件生成器在考虑硬件成本的同时做出明智的设计决策的能力。虽然已经提出了各种模型来预测硬件设计的物理特性，但它们常常受到领域适应性有限和开源硬件设计数据稀缺的影响。

在本文中，我们提出了 SNS v2，一种基于深度学习模型的快速、稳健且可转移的硬件综合预测器。受现代自然语言处理模型的启发，SNS v2 采用了预训练、微调和领域适应的三阶段训练方法，使其能够利用更丰富的未标记和域外训练数据。此外，我们提出了一种基于电路等效性的新型对比学习方法，以增强模型的鲁棒性。我们的实验表明，与传统 EDA 工具相比，SNS v2 的速度提高了两到三个数量级，同时保持了最先进的预测精度。我们还表明，SNS v2 可以无缝集成到硬件生成器框架中，以进行实时成本估算，从而在显着缩短的时间内提供更高质量的设计建议。

papers.title: G10: Enabling An Efficient Unified GPU Memory and Storage Architecture with Smart Tensor Migrations.
papers.abstract:
To break the GPU memory wall for scaling deep learning workloads, a variety of architecture and system techniques have been proposed recently. Their typical approaches include memory extension with flash memory and direct storage access. However, these techniques still suffer from suboptimal performance and introduce complexity to the GPU memory management, making them hard to meet the scalability requirement of deep learning workloads today.

In this paper, we present a unified GPU memory and storage architecture named G10 driven by the fact that the tensor behaviors of deep learning workloads are highly predictable. G10 integrates the host memory, GPU memory, and flash memory into a unified memory space, to scale the GPU memory capacity while enabling transparent data migrations. Based on this unified GPU memory and storage architecture, G10 utilizes compiler techniques to characterize the tensor behaviors in deep learning workloads. Therefore, it can schedule data migrations in advance by considering the available bandwidth of flash memory and host memory. The cooperative mechanism between deep learning compilers and the unified memory architecture enables G10 to hide data transfer overheads in a transparent manner. We implement G10 based on an open-source GPU simulator. Our experiments demonstrate that G10 outperforms state-of-the-art GPU memory solutions by up to 1.75 ×, without code modifications to deep learning workloads. With the smart data migration mechanism, G10 can reach 90.3% of the performance of the ideal case assuming unlimited GPU memory.
papers.abstract_zh:
为了打破 GPU 内存墙以扩展深度学习工作负载，最近提出了各种架构和系统技术。他们的典型方法包括使用闪存扩展内存和直接存储访问。然而，这些技术仍然存在性能欠佳的问题，并且给 GPU 内存管理带来了复杂性，使其难以满足当今深度学习工作负载的可扩展性要求。

在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 G10 的统一 GPU 内存和存储架构，其驱动因素是深度学习工作负载的张量行为是高度可预测的。 G10将主机内存、GPU内存和闪存整合到统一的内存空间中，在扩展GPU内存容量的同时，实现数据透明迁移。基于这种统一的 GPU 内存和存储架构，G10 利用编译器技术来表征深度学习工作负载中的张量行为。因此，它可以通过考虑闪存和主机内存的可用带宽来提前安排数据迁移。深度学习编译器和统一内存架构之间的协作机制使G10能够以透明的方式隐藏数据传输开销。我们基于开源 GPU 模拟器实现 G10。我们的实验表明，在无需对深度学习工作负载进行代码修改的情况下，G10 的性能比最先进的 GPU 内存解决方案高出 1.75 倍。凭借智能数据迁移机制，假设GPU内存不受限制，G10可以达到理想情况下90.3%的性能。

papers.title: GME: GPU-based Microarchitectural Extensions to Accelerate Homomorphic Encryption.
papers.abstract:
Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) enables the processing of encrypted data without decrypting it. FHE has garnered significant attention over the past decade as it supports secure outsourcing of data processing to remote cloud services. Despite its promise of strong data privacy and security guarantees, FHE introduces a slowdown of up to five orders of magnitude as compared to the same computation using plaintext data. This overhead is presently a major barrier to the commercial adoption of FHE.

In this work, we leverage GPUs to accelerate FHE, capitalizing on a well-established GPU ecosystem available in the cloud. We propose GME, which combines three key microarchitectural extensions along with a compile-time optimization to the current AMD CDNA GPU architecture. First, GME integrates a lightweight on-chip compute unit (CU)-side hierarchical interconnect to retain ciphertext in cache across FHE kernels, thus eliminating redundant memory transactions. Second, to tackle compute bottlenecks, GME introduces special MOD-units that provide native custom hardware support for modular reduction operations, one of the most commonly executed sets of operations in FHE. Third, by integrating the MOD-unit with our novel pipelined 64-bit integer arithmetic cores (WMAC-units), GME further accelerates FHE workloads by . Finally, we propose a Locality-Aware Block Scheduler (LABS) that exploits the temporal locality available in FHE primitive blocks. Incorporating these microarchitectural features and compiler optimizations, we create a synergistic approach achieving average speedups of 796 ×, 14.2 ×, and 2.3 × over Intel Xeon CPU, NVIDIA V100 GPU, and Xilinx FPGA implementations, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
完全同态加密 (FHE) 可以在不解密的情况下处理加密数据。 FHE 在过去十年中引起了广泛关注，因为它支持将数据处理安全外包给远程云服务。尽管 FHE 承诺提供强大的数据隐私和安全保证，但与使用明文数据进行相同的计算相比，FHE 的速度降低了高达 5 个数量级。目前，这种开销是 FHE 商业应用的主要障碍。

在这项工作中，我们利用云中成熟的 GPU 生态系统，利用 GPU 来加速 FHE。我们提出 GME，它结合了三个关键的微架构扩展以及对当前 AMD CDNA GPU 架构的编译时优化。首先，GME 集成了轻量级片上计算单元 (CU) 侧分层互连，以在跨 FHE 内核的缓存中保留密文，从而消除冗余内存事务。其次，为了解决计算瓶颈，GME 引入了特殊的 MOD 单元，为模块化缩减操作（FHE 中最常执行的操作集之一）提供本机自定义硬件支持。第三，通过将 MOD 单元与我们新颖的流水线 64 位整数算术核心（WMAC 单元）集成，GME 进一步将 FHE 工作负载加速了 .最后，我们提出了一种局部感知块调度器（LABS），它利用 FHE 原语块中可用的时间局部性。结合这些微架构功能和编译器优化，我们创建了一种协同方法，与 Intel Xeon CPU、NVIDIA V100 GPU 和 Xilinx FPGA 实现相比，平均加速分别为 796 ×、14.2 × 和 2.3 ×。

papers.title: GMX: Instruction Set Extensions for Fast, Scalable, and Efficient Genome Sequence Alignment.
papers.abstract:
Sequence alignment remains a fundamental problem in computer science with practical applications ranging from pattern matching to computational biology. The ever-increasing volumes of genomic data produced by modern DNA sequencers motivate improved software and hardware sequence alignment accelerators that scale with longer sequence lengths and high error rates without losing accuracy. Furthermore, the wide variety of use cases requiring sequence alignment demands flexible and efficient solutions that can match or even outperform expensive application-specific accelerators.

To address these challenges, we propose GMX, a set of ISA extensions that enable efficient sequence alignment computations based on dynamic programming (DP). GMX extensions provide the basic building-block operations to perform fast tile-wise computations of the DP matrix, reducing the memory footprint and allowing easy integration into widely-used algorithms and tools. Furthermore, we provide an efficient hardware implementation that integrates GMX extensions in a RISC-V-based edge system-on-chip (SoC). Compared to widely-used software implementations, our hardware-software co-design leveraging GMX extensions obtains speed-ups from 25–265 ×, scaling to megabyte-long sequences. Compared to domain-specific accelerators (DSA), we demonstrate that GMX-accelerated implementations demand significantly less memory bandwidth, requiring less area per processing element (PE). As a result, a single GMX-enabled core achieves a throughput per area between 0.35-0.52 × that of state-of-the-art DSAs while being more flexible and reusing the core’s resources. Post-place-and-route results for a GMX-enhanced SoC in 22nm technology shows that GMX extensions only account for 1.7% of the overall area while consuming just 8.47mW. We conclude that GMX extensions represent versatile and scalable ISA additions to improve the performance of genome analysis tools and other use cases that require fast and efficient sequence alignment.
papers.abstract_zh:
序列比对仍然是计算机科学中的一个基本问题，其实际应用范围从模式匹配到计算生物学。现代 DNA 测序仪产生的基因组数据量不断增加，推动了软件和硬件序列比对加速器的改进，这些加速器可以在不损失准确性的情况下适应更长的序列长度和高错误率。此外，需要序列比对的各种用例需要灵活高效的解决方案，这些解决方案可以匹配甚至超越昂贵的专用加速器。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 GMX，这是一组 ISA 扩展，可实现基于动态编程 (DP) 的高效序列比对计算。 GMX 扩展提供基本的构建块操作来执行 DP 矩阵的快速分块计算，减少内存占用并允许轻松集成到广泛使用的算法和工具中。此外，我们提供了一种高效的硬件实现，将 GMX 扩展集成到基于 RISC-V 的边缘片上系统 (SoC) 中。与广泛使用的软件实现相比，我们利用 GMX 扩展的硬件-软件协同设计获得了 25-265 倍的加速，可扩展到兆字节长的序列。与特定领域加速器 (DSA) 相比，我们证明 GMX 加速实现需要的内存带宽显着减少，每个处理元件 (PE) 所需的面积也更少。因此，单个启用 GMX 的内核可实现单位面积吞吐量的 0.35-0.52 倍于最先进的 DSA，同时更加灵活并可重用内核资源。采用 22nm 技术的 GMX 增强型 SoC 的布局布线后结果表明，GMX 扩展仅占总面积的 1.7%，而功耗仅为 8.47mW。我们得出的结论是，GMX 扩展代表了通用且可扩展的 ISA 添加，可提高基因组分析工具和其他需要快速高效序列比对的用例的性能。

papers.title: Grape: Practical and Efficient Graphed Execution for Dynamic Deep Neural Networks on GPUs.
papers.abstract:
Achieving high performance in machine learning workloads is a crucial yet difficult task. To achieve high runtime performance on hardware platforms such as GPUs, graph-based executions such as CUDA graphs are often used to eliminate CPU runtime overheads by submitting jobs in the granularity of multiple kernels. However, many machine learning workloads, especially dynamic deep neural networks (DNNs) with varying-sized inputs or data-dependent control flows, face challenges when directly using CUDA graphs to achieve optimal performance. We observe that the use of graph-based executions poses three key challenges in terms of efficiency and even practicability: (1) Extra data movements when copying input values to graphs’ placeholders. (2) High GPU memory consumption due to the numerous CUDA graphs created to efficiently support dynamic-shape workloads. (3) Inability to handle data-dependent control flows.

To address those challenges, we propose Grape, a new graph compiler that enables practical and efficient graph-based executions for dynamic DNNs on GPUs. Grape comprises three key components: (1) an alias predictor that automatically removes extra data movements by leveraging code positions at the Python frontend, (2) a metadata compressor that efficiently utilizes the data redundancy in CUDA graphs’ memory regions by compressing them, and (3) a predication rewriter that safely replaces control flows with predication contexts while preserving programs’ semantics. The three components improve the efficiency and broaden the optimization scope of graph-based executions while allowing machine learning practitioners to program dynamic DNNs at the Python level with minimal source code changes.

We evaluate Grape on state-of-the-art text generation (GPT-2, GPT-J) and speech recognition (Wav2Vec2) workloads, which include both training and inference, using real systems with modern GPUs. Our evaluation shows that Grape achieves up to 36.43 × less GPU memory consumption and up to 1.26 × better performance than prior works on graph-based executions that directly use CUDA graphs. Furthermore, Grape can optimize workloads that are impractical for prior works due to the three key challenges, achieving 1.78 × and 1.82 × better performance on GPT-J and Wav2Vec2 respectively than the original implementations that do not use graph-based executions.
papers.abstract_zh:
Achieving high performance in machine learning workloads is a crucial yet difficult task.为了在 GPU 等硬件平台上实现高运行时性能，通常使用 CUDA 图等基于图的执行，通过以多个内核的粒度提交作业来消除 CPU 运行时开销。然而，许多机器学习工作负载，特别是具有不同大小输入或数据相关控制流的动态深度神经网络 (DNN)，在直接使用 CUDA 图实现最佳性能时面临挑战。我们观察到，使用基于图的执行在效率甚至实用性方面提出了三个关键挑战：（1）将输入值复制到图的占位符时需要额外的数据移动。 (2) High GPU memory consumption due to the numerous CUDA graphs created to efficiently support dynamic-shape workloads. (3) Inability to handle data-dependent control flows.

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Grape，这是一种新的图形编译器，可为 GPU 上的动态 DNN 提供实用且高效的基于图形的执行。 Grape 包含三个关键组件：(1) 别名预测器，通过利用 Python 前端的代码位置自动删除额外的数据移动；(2) 元数据压缩器，通过压缩有效利用 CUDA 图内存区域中的数据冗余；(3) 预测重写器，用预测上下文安全地替换控制流，同时保留程序语义。 The three components improve the efficiency and broaden the optimization scope of graph-based executions while allowing machine learning practitioners to program dynamic DNNs at the Python level with minimal source code changes.

我们使用配备现代 GPU 的真实系统，在最先进的文本生成（GPT-2、GPT-J）和语音识别（Wav2Vec2）工作负载（包括训练和推理）上评估 Grape。我们的评估表明，与之前直接使用 CUDA 图的基于图的执行工作相比，Grape 的 GPU 内存消耗减少了 36.43 倍，性能提高了 1.26 倍。此外，由于三个关键挑战，Grape 可以优化以前的工作不切实际的工作负载，在 GPT-J 和 Wav2Vec2 上分别实现比不使用基于图的执行的原始实现提高 1.78 倍和 1.82 倍的性能。

papers.title: Hardware Support for Constant-Time Programming.
papers.abstract:
Side-channel attacks are one of the rising security concerns in modern computing platforms. Observing this, researchers have proposed both hardware-based and software-based strategies to mitigate side-channel attacks, targeting not only on-chip caches but also other hardware components like memory controllers and on-chip networks. While hardware-based solutions to side-channel attacks are usually costly to implement as they require modifications to the underlying hardware, software-based solutions are more practical as they can work on unmodified hardware. One of the recent software-based solutions is constant-time programming, which tries to transform an input program to be protected against side-channel attacks such that an operation working on a data element/block to be protected would execute in an amount of time that is independent of the input. Unfortunately, while quite effective from a security angle, constant-time programming can lead to severe performance penalties.

Motivated by this observation, in this paper, we explore novel hardware support to make constant-time programming much more efficient than its current implementations. Specifically, we present a new hardware component that can greatly improve the performance of constant-time programs with large memory footprints. The key idea in our approach is to add a small structure into the architecture and two accompanying instructions, which collectively expose the existence/dirtiness information of multiple cache lines to the application program, so that the latter can perform more efficient side-channel mitigation. Our experimental evaluation using three benchmark programs with secret data clearly show the effectiveness of the proposed approach over a state-of-the-art implementation of constant-time programming. Specifically, in the three benchmark programs tested, our approach leads to about 7x reduction in performance overheads over the state-of-the-art approach.
papers.abstract_zh:
Side-channel attacks are one of the rising security concerns in modern computing platforms.观察到这一点，研究人员提出了基于硬件和基于软件的策略来减轻旁道攻击，不仅针对片上缓存，还针对内存控制器和片上网络等其他硬件组件。虽然针对侧信道攻击的基于硬件的解决方案通常实施起来成本高昂，因为它们需要修改底层硬件，但基于软件的解决方案更实用，因为它们可以在未修改的硬件上工作。最近基于软件的解决方案之一是恒定时间编程，它试图转换输入程序以防止侧信道攻击，以便对要保护的数据元素/块进行的操作将在独立于输入的时间内执行。 Unfortunately, while quite effective from a security angle, constant-time programming can lead to severe performance penalties.

受这一观察的启发，在本文中，我们探索了新颖的硬件支持，以使恒定时间编程比当前的实现更加高效。具体来说，我们提出了一种新的硬件组件，可以极大地提高具有大内存占用的恒定时间程序的性能。我们方法的关键思想是在架构中添加一个小结构和两个附带指令，它们共同向应用程序公开多个缓存行的存在/脏信息，以便后者可以执行更有效的侧通道缓解。我们使用三个带有秘密数据的基准程序进行的实验评估清楚地表明了所提出的方法相对于最先进的恒定时间编程实现的有效性。具体来说，在测试的三个基准程序中，我们的方法使性能开销比最先进的方法减少了约 7 倍。

papers.title: HARP: Hardware-Based Pseudo-Tiling for Sparse Matrix Multiplication Accelerator.
papers.abstract:
General sparse matrix-matrix multiplication (SpGEMM) is a memory-bound workload, due to the compression format used. To minimize data movements for input matrices, outer product accelerators have been proposed. Since these accelerators access input matrices only once and then generate numerous partial products, managing the generated partial products is the key optimization factor. To reduce the number of partial products handled, the state-of-the-art accelerator uses software to tile an input matrix. However, the software-based tiling has three limitations. First, a user manually executes the tiling software and manages the tiles. Second, generating a compression format for each tile incurs memory-intensive operations. Third, an accelerator that uses the compression format cannot skip ineffectual accesses for input matrices.
